sid_disclaimerepilepsy_document_disclame: A small percentage of people may experience epileptic seizures or blackouts when being exposed to certain visuals, including without limitation light patterns or rapidly flashing lights. If you start to experience any of the following symptoms while playing the game, IMMEDIATELY stop and seek consultation from your physician/doctor before resuming the play: blackouts, seizures, dizziness, altered vision, eye or muscle twitches, jerking or shaking of arms or legs, loss of awareness, disorientation, confusion, any involuntary movement, or convulsions.
Be aware that such symptoms may occur even if you previously had no photosensitivity history.
sid_disclaimerfiction_document_disclaime: This game is a work of fiction. Any resemblance to actual persons, living or dead, or actual events is purely coincidental. The storyline, characters, and events depicted in this game are purely the creation of the author's imagination and are not intended to represent any real individuals or situations.
sid_disclaimersave_document_disclaimerAu: This game uses the autosave feature. This symbol will be displayed while the game is being saved. Do not exit the game or turn off the power supply during the autosave process. Exiting or turning off may result in lost progress or corrupted save files.
sid_effects_weapon_wearingExternal_name: Wear and tear from external sources
sid_items_A012A_description: Loaded with a weighty bullet, this 12-gauge shotgun shell excels in armor penetration and delivering substantial damage at short range. However, the increased powder content can compromise the weapon's reliability. More effective against armored enemies.
sid_items_A012D_description: A 12-gauge shotgun shell loaded with large-diameter buckshot, cherished by hunters on the Mainland and stalkers in the Zone.
sid_items_A012E_description: A 12-gauge shotgun shell featuring an expanding bullet designed for smoothbore guns. Exhibiting tremendous killing power at short distances, it comes at the cost of increased wear on the rifle. Significantly more effective against mutants.
sid_items_A045A_description: This 11.43x23mm caliber pistol cartridge boasts hardened bullets and increased powder gas pressure, resulting in improved armor penetration at the cost of additional wear on the weapon when firing. Best used against heavily armored enemies.
sid_items_A045D_description: Introduced in the early twentieth century, this pistol cartridge has stood the test of time, proving to be an excellent choice for both law enforcement and self-defense.
sid_items_A045E_description: An expanding NATO .45 caliber cartridge designed to maximize damage to soft tissue, albeit at the cost of reduced penetration. Using this ammunition also leads to increased wear and tear on the weapon. Effective against mutants.
sid_items_A545A_description: Featuring an armor-piercing bullet with a high-carbon steel core, this assault rifle cartridge surpasses the armor penetration ratio of a bullet with a plain steel core by an order of magnitude. Using it comes at the cost of increased maintenance requirements.
sid_items_A545D_description: A standard intermediate cartridge with a plain steel core, commonly employed in assault rifles from Warsaw Pact countries.
sid_items_A545E_description: An upgraded intermediate cartridge with an expanding bullet. Inflicts significant damage on soft tissue at the cost of reduced armor penetration. This makes it an effective option against mutants, although it requires additional barrel maintenance.
sid_items_A556A_description: This armor-piercing variant of the standard NATO assault rifle cartridge incorporates a tungsten carbide core, offering exceptional armor penetration. Firing this ammunition accelerates weapon wear. Has potential to annihilate heavily-armored enemies.
sid_items_A556D_description: A standard intermediate cartridge, developed in Belgium to meet NATO requirements. Inexpensive and widely available.
sid_items_A556E_description: A 5.56mm cartridge with an expanding soft point bullet, designed to reduce the risk of ricochet while maximizing damage to soft tissue. Firing this ammunition accelerates wear and tear on the weapon. Tends to reduce the population of mutants.
sid_items_A556S_description: A specialized variant of the NATO round, developed for Special Operations Forces. Features enhanced flatness of trajectory and reduced fouling, extending weapon service life.
sid_items_A762A_description: A cartridge with an armor-piercing incendiary bullet. The incendiary properties of this ammunition are questionable at best, but its penetrating capabilities are outstanding. Using this cartridge results in increased barrel fouling, demanding more meticulous weapon maintenance. Ideal for destroying body armor.
sid_items_A762D_description: Developed in the 1940s, this intermediate cartridge is designed for use in assault rifles, carbines, and machine guns. The bullet features a plain steel core.
sid_items_A762E_description: Designed for civilian use, this version of the Soviet intermediate cartridge features a soft, heavy bullet with low penetration and enhanced stopping power. This cartridge is ideal for targeting the Zone's fauna, but using it results in increased wear and tear on the weapon.
sid_items_A762NATOA_description: This rifle cartridge comes with a hardened armor-piercing bullet with a steel core. It incorporates an increased load of higher-quality gunpowder, resulting in noticeably accelerated wear when firing. Especially effective against heavy armor.
sid_items_A762NATOD_description: Standard rifle cartridge developed for use across Western Bloc countries, also known by the military designation 7.62×51mm. Not suitable for sniper rifles due to inconsistent quality.
sid_items_A762NATOS_description: Precision shooting cartridge. Originally designed for sports shooting, later adapted for military use where superior trajectory is required. High-grade powder helps minimize weapon wear during use.
sid_items_A762SniperA_description: Developed in the mid-30s, this rifle cartridge features an armor-piercing bullet intended for use against light tanks. Despite being almost a century old, it has not lost its relevance, particularly with the emergence of heavy body armor. Increases wear and tear on the weapon.
sid_items_A762SniperD_description: First introduced nearly a century and a half ago, this cartridge proved exceptionally reliable and is still in service today. However, firing it from sniper rifles is prohibited due to the risk of critical weapon damage.
sid_items_A762SniperS_description: A sniper round developed during the late Soviet period. Strict quality control, improved ballistic performance, and premium powder significantly extend effective range against single targets. Reduces weapon wear.
sid_items_A918A_description: An improved pistol cartridge boasting increased armor-piercing capabilities, primarily designed for SWAT teams. Increases wear and tear on the weapon. Especially effective against humans in body armor.
sid_items_A918D_description: A basic cartridge for pistols and submachine guns. Simple and cost-effective ammunition with modest armor-piercing capabilities.
sid_items_A919A_description: This improved 9mm cartridge comes with an armor-piercing core and increased powder gas pressure. It offers enhanced penetration at the cost of accelerated wear on the weapon. Best used against heavily armored enemies.
sid_items_A919D_description: This standard pistol cartridge has solid ballistic characteristics, but proves ineffective against armored targets.
sid_items_A939A_description: Enhanced armor-piercing ammunition with improved characteristics, designed for long-range armor penetration. Using this ammunition significantly increases weapon fouling. Perfect against enemies weraing heavy armor like exoskeletons.
sid_items_A939D_description: A more economical iteration of the SP-6 special cartridge offering affordability with a compromise on armor penetration. The design’s limitations are balanced by its remarkable lethality.
sid_items_A939E_description: A specialized cartridge with a semi-jacketed bullet, designed for specific tasks requiring maximum lethality and minimal noise. Using this ammunition results in a more pronounced impact on weapon wear. A great tool to get rid of the Zone's mutated fauna.
sid_items_A939S_description: High-quality assault rifle cartridge. Equipped with a semi-jacketed bullet featuring an exposed, hardened steel core. Offers improved range and causes less fouling, keeping weapons cleaner.
sid_items_AArtifactWeirdBall_description: A scruffy children's ball. While equipped, you recover quicker, especially in combat. It almost seems like the toy is absorbing the impact.
sid_items_AArtifactWeirdBolt_description:
One of the legendary “altered items” often mentioned in hushed tones by stalkers around the campfire.

As long as this bolt is charged and secured to your belt, it reduces damage from anomalies. It takes a lot of anomalous energy to recharge, though — far beyond what regular anomalies can offer.
sid_items_AArtifactWeirdFlower_descripti:
One of the legendary “altered items” often mentioned in hushed tones by stalkers around the campfire.

If you sleep with this flower on your belt, its fragrance will mask your scent, though the effect diminishes over time.
sid_items_AArtifactWeirdKettle_descripti:
One of the legendary “altered items” often mentioned in hushed tones by stalkers around the campfire.

Although the pot is empty, steam is always wafting from beneath its lid. This item helps to allay one’s thirst and hunger, but be careful: the Zone’s gifts can be unpredictable.
sid_items_AArtifactWeirdMirror_descripti:
One of the legendary “altered items” often mentioned in hushed tones by stalkers around the campfire.

It looks like an ordinary mirror that shows nothing but fog. Yet, upon closer inspection, there’s an eerie shadow lurking within it. You get the feeling that if the mirror were to break, something horrible might burst forth from it.
sid_items_AArtifactWeirdNut_description:
One of the legendary “altered items” often mentioned in hushed tones by stalkers around the campfire.

Eerily cold to the touch, this unusual nut promotes rapid blood coagulation when attached to your belt, though the wounds themselves take longer to heal.
sid_items_AArtifactWeirdWater_descriptio:
One of the legendary “altered items” often mentioned in hushed tones by stalkers around the campfire.

You can’t drink this stuff, but strap it to your belt, and radiation won’t bother you as much. It makes moving around a bit smoother too, although you might go a little weak in the knees from time to time.
sid_items_AGA_description: An advanced next-generation power cell employed in Product 62M. Thanks to superior manufacturing technology, it can store energy for significantly longer durations compared to the previous generation's batteries.
sid_items_AHEDP_description: Ammunition for the M203 underbarrel grenade launcher. Unlike its Soviet counterpart, this grenade is breech-loaded, requiring the removal of the cartridge case after every launch.
sid_items_APG7V_description: A shaped charge warhead for a portable rocket-propelled grenade launcher. Effective against both lightly armored vehicles and concentrated infantry due to secondary fragments.
sid_items_AVOG_description: Ammunition designed for the GP-25 underbarrel grenade launcher, widely adopted since the 1980s. An effective choice in engagements involving multiple adversaries.
sid_items_Altered_Toast_description: A piece of toast, warm and hard to the touch. Its extraordinary properties can only be felt by those feeling other's hardships like their own. For everyone else, it's just an inedible slice of stale bread.
sid_items_Anomaly_Scientific_Armor_descr: Designed to endure the challenges of the Zone, the SSP-99 anomalous protection suit, featuring built-in air filtration and conditioning systems, is a common choice for scientific expeditions. Not intended for combat operations.
sid_items_AntiRad_description: A contemporary solution for rapid radiation removal, conveniently packaged in special injectors that some medics find handy to reuse. Do not dispose of the injector!
sid_items_ArmyMedkit_description: This kit has all the essentials needed to deal with shrapnel, bullet wounds, and other battlefield injuries. Fortunately, thanks to the IPSF presence in the Zone, anyone can get their hands on these kits.
sid_items_Bandage_description: A dressing to stop bleeding, possibly even sterile. Handy for bandaging wounds, stopping arterial bleeding, and preventing infection.
sid_items_BattleExoskeleton_Varta_Armor_: This exoskeleton model was created for the elite units of the Ward.  Everyone else in the Zone can only dream of gear with deep modifications of the PSZ-20 and modern servos.
sid_items_Battle_Dolg_Armor_description: An upgraded version of the PSZ-5 specifically adapted for mutant hunting, produced by Duty’s skilled technicians.
sid_items_Battle_Dolg_End_Armor_descript: A special gear kit developed for working in the conditions of the X7 Lab. Origins unknown.
sid_items_Battle_Military_Helmet_descrip: This headgear provides basic protection against pistol bullets. It does not incorporate a gas mask.
sid_items_Battle_Monolith_Armor_descript: A Monolith stalker suit, manufacturer unknown. The very sight of this suit used to frighten any Zone dweller. Even now, just looking at it gives you the heebie-jeebies.
sid_items_Battle_Spark_Armor_description: A PSZ-5 series army suit, modernized by Novykov. The army standards do not include Zone-specific protection, obviously, so the armor needed some serious tune-ups.
sid_items_Battle_Svoboda_Armor_descripti: The Freedom version of one of the Zone’s most popular armored suits. This modification prioritizes all-around versatility without any specific focus.
sid_items_Battle_Varta_Armor_description: This suit represents a new generation in the Personal Protection System series of armored suits. Drawing from the experience of its predecessors, it was developed in record time to meet the specific demands of the Ward.
sid_items_Bear_description: An improved first-generation artifact detector. Compared to the Echo, it features a more user-friendly radar display and upgraded electronic components.
sid_items_Beer_description: While it’s true that beer can help flush out radiation, you’d need to consume a considerable amount compared to vodka. Incidentally, plenty of folks are more than happy to do just that.
sid_items_Bread_description: A staple of the stalker diet. Following the takeover of Rostok, Myklukha became the Zone’s principal bread supplier. How an ordinary loaf of bread stays fresh for such an extended period of time is one of the greatest mysteries of the Zone.
sid_items_CArtifactBouncyBall_descriptio:
A rare artifact found in chemical anomalies.

It exudes an acrid and repulsive odor reminiscent of ammonia.
sid_items_CArtifactBubble_description:
A common artifact found in acid anomalies.

The Bubble’s transparent membrane conceals a substance that resembles the contents of the Fruit Punch anomaly.
sid_items_CArtifactBun_description:
An uncommon artifact found in chemical anomalies.

It may unexpectedly become soft and slip out of your grasp, causing numerous tiny wounds that prove exceptionally challenging to heal.
sid_items_CArtifactChunkMeat_description:
A common artifact found in acid anomalies.

The liquid oozing from the Meat Chunk bears a resemblance to animal fat in terms of its chemical composition. Consumption is strongly discouraged.
sid_items_CArtifactCottonWool_descriptio:
A common artifact found in acid anomalies.

Despite its unsightly appearance, the Crust is utilized in wastewater treatment owing to its ability to decompose a wide range of organic pollutants.
sid_items_CArtifactCrystalThorn_descript:
A common artifact found in acid anomalies.

Composed of an anomalously hard material unknown to science, with spikes varying in thickness from 0.3 millimeters to just a few molecules.
sid_items_CArtifactDevilsMushroom_descri:
A rare artifact found in acid anomalies.

Ingesting fragments of the artifact leads to symptoms similar to acute food poisoning, with a mortality rate ranging from 60% to 90%.
sid_items_CArtifactEchinus_description:
An uncommon artifact found in acid anomalies.

Submerging the artifact in a test tube filled with saline solution triggers the accelerated growth of its needles. The process ceases once the needles have completely filled the vessel.
sid_items_CArtifactKryptonite_descriptio:
A common artifact found in acid anomalies.

Facilitates the rapid growth of fungi and microbes. Storing it alongside foodstuffs, including canned goods, is not advised.
sid_items_CArtifactLiquidStone_descripti:
A legendary artifact found in acid anomalies.

Among its less apparent properties, the Liquid Rock exhibits an analgesic effect for migraines. To ensure the desired result, it is necessary to carry the artifact on one's person.
sid_items_CArtifactMica_description:
A common artifact found in acid anomalies.

When exposed to ultraviolet or infrared light, the Mica loses its transparency, becoming pitch black.
sid_items_CArtifactPellicle_description:
A rare artifact found in chemical anomalies.

Because of its scarcity, it was long regarded as a stalker myth.
sid_items_CArtifactPlasticine_descriptio:
An uncommon artifact found in chemical anomalies.

Any damage to the outer membrane of the artifact results in a reduction in the effectiveness of its practical properties.
sid_items_CArtifactRosin_description:
An uncommon artifact found in chemical anomalies.

Emits a pungent stench of decay. Examining it without a gas mask is not recommended.
sid_items_CArtifactSlime_description:
A common artifact found in acid anomalies.

When subjected to extremely contrasting temperatures, the Slime melts and solidifies into a distinctive spiral shape.
sid_items_CArtifactSlug_description:
A common artifact found in acid anomalies.

When hit by a heavy object or dropped onto a hard surface, the Slug quickly hardens for 0.1 seconds.
sid_items_CArtifactThorn_description:
A common artifact found in acid anomalies.

The internal structure of the Thorn's needles represents an infinite fractal.
sid_items_CannedFood_description: The contents of these cans is a mystery that no ones dares delve into for the sake of their own sanity. Once heated over a campfire, they transform into a tasty, nutritious meal.
sid_items_Cinnamon_description: Enhances blood coagulation, accelerates wound healing, and reduces the likelihood of severe bleeding. Rumor has it that bloodsuckers tend to steer clear of those who regularly abuse this drug.
sid_items_DalinOfficeArtefact_descriptio: The first artifact grown on the Artifact Farm. Only an experienced stalker can tell the difference from a 'natural' one.
sid_items_Default_Military_Armor_descrip: Standard-issue vest for the enlisted and NCOs. For this low a price, its main purpose is to protect you from other people. While not as efficient for protection from everything else, it’s still a lot better than nothing.
sid_items_DetectorOko_description: The most advanced artifact detector, equipped with a radar and an anomalous formation visualizer. Its high price is more than justified by its exceptional effectiveness.
sid_items_EArtifactAtom_description:
A rare artifact found in electro anomalies.

Direct physical contact with the Glare deprives a person of the ability to sleep, even under medication.
sid_items_EArtifactBattery_description:
A common artifact found in electro anomalies.

The high-frequency alternating current glowing within the Battery does not cause burns upon contact.
sid_items_EArtifactChocolate_description:
A common artifact found in electro anomalies.

Trying to separate the plates causes them to collapse back into their original shape at speeds exceeding 700 feet per second.
sid_items_EArtifactCrystalGlass_descript:
A rare artifact found in electro anomalies.

Despite their apparent fragility, the spikes on the Crest are hard enough to scratch diamond.
sid_items_EArtifactDope_description:
A legendary artifact found in electro anomalies.

When gradually heated to 78 degrees Celsius, it induces vibrant collective hallucinations portraying a utopian theme.
sid_items_EArtifactDummy_description:
A common artifact found in electro anomalies.

Caution: risk of injury even under controlled laboratory conditions. Avoid inserting fingers between the disks!
sid_items_EArtifactFlash_description:
A common artifact found in electro anomalies.

When the Flash is pulverized into powder, each particle continues to generate electrical discharges.
sid_items_EArtifactJellyFish_description:
A common artifact found in electro anomalies.

According to stalker folklore, smuggling a Sapphire in someone else’s gear will pass on the troubles of the previous owner to the new one.
sid_items_EArtifactMoonlight_description:
An uncommon artifact found in electro anomalies.

A single contact with this artifact may inspire certain individuals with a manic desire to possess it. As of now, the underlying causes are yet to be determined.
sid_items_EArtifactRazor_description:
A rare artifact found in electro anomalies.

Upon contact with saltwater, the artifact sets off an electrolysis reaction, resulting in the precipitation of salt.
sid_items_EArtifactSnowflake_description:
A common artifact found in electro anomalies.

After touching this artifact, individuals may experience lingering sensations of phantom electrical discharge for several days.
sid_items_EArtifactSoul_description:
An uncommon artifact found in electro anomalies.

Despite its apparent fragility, the artifact remains impervious to destruction via mechanical, thermal, or chemical means.
sid_items_EArtifactSparkler_description:
A common artifact found in electro anomalies.

Resembling the flawed work of a glassblower, the Sparkler is employed in the production of ultra-high-capacity batteries.
sid_items_EArtifactThunderHedgehog_descr:
An uncommon artifact found in electro anomalies.

Even those who have completely lost their sight can perceive the light and outline of the artifact when looking in its direction.
sid_items_EArtifactTow_description:
An uncommon artifact found in electro anomalies.

If the bolts are removed from the core of the artifact, it takes approximately a week for them to grow back.
sid_items_EArtifactWorm_description:
A common artifact found in electro anomalies.

Every wire within the tangle generates an electromagnetic field, causing the Rat King to continuously move.
sid_items_EN_BuckLaunch_1_description: An underbarrel shotgun is an excellent way to boost firepower at extremely close combat range.
sid_items_EN_ColimScope_1_description: Designed for ease of aiming, this compact and modern collimator sight is meant to be mounted on the appropriate rail. It also allows you to fire while using an NVG.
sid_items_EN_GLaunch_1_description: Standardized in NATO countries, the Model 203 underbarrel grenade launcher is a product of mid-twentieth-century conflicts.
sid_items_EN_GLaunch_2_description: An underbarrel grenade launcher designed for the German GP37 assault system, compatible with standard NATO grenades.
sid_items_EN_GoloScope_1_description: A holographic sight designed to be mounted on a Picatinny rail, favored by the militaries of Western countries. Сompatible with night-vision goggles.
sid_items_EN_Silen_1_description: A silencer for NATO .45 ACP caliber pistols, it provides remarkable noise reduction with the 11.43x23mm caliber heavy subsonic bullet.
sid_items_EN_Silen_2_description: A sound suppressor designed for pistol caliber weapons commonly used in the West. It effectively conceals the shooter’s position while significantly reducing both sound and muzzle flash during firing.
sid_items_EN_Silen_3_description: A sound suppression device tailored to fit NATO assault rifles. Essential for sabotage operations, particularly in the Zone.
sid_items_EN_Silen_4_description: Designed for NATO sniper rifles, this modern silencer efficiently disperses the sound of the shot and muzzle flash, enabling the shooter to remain undetected for an extended period of time.
sid_items_EN_X2Scope_1_description: A specialized scope designed for assault operations in urban environments.
sid_items_EN_X4Scope_1_description: A 4X scope popular in NATO countries. Fits a Picatinny rail.
sid_items_EN_X8Scope_1_description: This high-magnification scope designed to be mounted on a Picatinny rail is effective for hunting both mutants and humans.
sid_items_Echo_description: With outdated electronic components and subpar usability, this basic artifact detector is only redeemed by its very modest price.
sid_items_EcoMedkit_description: The experimental drugs included in these kits can work wonders, but keep in mind that many of them haven't undergone clinical testing yet. Use them at your own risk.
sid_items_Energetic_Limited_description: A limited edition of the energy drink with caffeine, vitamins and a refreshing watermelon flavor.
sid_items_Energetic_Limited_name: NON STOP Limited Edition Energy Drink
sid_items_Energetic_description: Featuring an enhanced formula comprised of caffeine, taurine, and vitamins C, B5, B6, B9, and PP, this energy drink is a must-have for extended raids in the Zone.
sid_items_Energetic_v2_description:
Energy drink with an improved formula, including caffeine, taurine, vitamins C, B5, B6, B9, and PP. Indispensable for long Zone raids. Builds up tolerance: with constant use, the energy effect weakens. To decrease tolerance, give the product up for a while.
Caffeine overdose: drinking several cans in a row will cause tremors and impair shooting accuracy.
sid_items_Exoskeleton_Dolg_Armor_descrip: National-produced version of an exoskeleton, procured by Duty. Extra sturdy materials ensure a much higher soldier survival chance, even in the most savage mutant encounters.
sid_items_Exoskeleton_Mercenaries_Armor_: A limited-production exoskeleton designed to meet the requirements of mercenaries. Certain features were customized for the specific missions carried out by these professionals.
sid_items_Exoskeleton_Monolith_Armor_des: An advanced exoskeleton in use by Monolith forces. The question of how this cutting-edge technology ended up in the possession of fanatics remains unanswered, yet the armor is often seen on elite Monolith soldiers.
sid_items_Exoskeleton_Neutral_Armor_desc: A relatively common exoskeleton. Its ability to handle heavy loads has enabled the integration of a more sophisticated armored suit capable of facing the Zone’s myriad challenges. The primary downside lies in the elevated price tag.
sid_items_Exoskeleton_Svoboda_Armor_desc: Developed exclusively for Freedom, this suit stands as the pinnacle of exoskeleton design. Unfortunately, great performance comes at a great price — literally.
sid_items_FArtifactBakedBolts_descriptio:
An uncommon artifact found in thermal anomalies.

Despite its red-hot appearance, it feels barely warm to the touch, a phenomenon attributed to low thermal conductivity.
sid_items_FArtifactBurntHunk_description:
A common artifact found in thermal anomalies.

The color of the sparks from the artifact transitions to a pale green when taken outside the Zone.
sid_items_FArtifactCandle_description:
A rare artifact found in thermal anomalies.

Despite their red-hot core, Petals do not cause burns even when touched without protection.
sid_items_FArtifactCore_description:
A rare artifact found in thermal anomalies.

Laboratory experiments have confirmed that the flame inside the Torch remains lit in both hostile environments and vacuum conditions.
sid_items_FArtifactCrystal_description:
A common artifact found in thermal anomalies.

What seems to be the coloring of the artifact is, in fact, flames burning inside the crystal.
sid_items_FArtifactDeadSponge_descriptio:
An uncommon artifact found in thermal anomalies.

Powdered Dead Sponge used to be sought after by practitioners of alternative medicine on the Mainland. The remedy’s popularity waned following a series of deaths among its users.
sid_items_FArtifactDrops_description:
A common artifact found in thermal anomalies.

When subjected to a temperature of absolute zero, the surface of the Droplets coalesces into an opaque black film. It dissolves as the temperature increases.
sid_items_FArtifactEye_description:
A common artifact found in thermal anomalies.

Some stalkers believe that the artifact’s “pupil” reacts to movement, but this claim remains unconfirmed by experiments.
sid_items_FArtifactFireBall_description:
A common artifact found in thermal anomalies.

Surprisingly cold to the touch, the Fireball exhibits a temperature difference of 500 degrees Celsius between its membrane and core.
sid_items_FArtifactFireworks_description:
A rare artifact found in thermal anomalies.

The burning is sustained through a combination of propane and phosphine released from the artifact's internal pores.
sid_items_FArtifactGlass_description:
A common artifact found in thermal anomalies.

Slightly accelerates the growth of nearby plants.
sid_items_FArtifactHellishHedgehog_descr:
An uncommon artifact found in thermal anomalies.

The stone flecks within the artifact seem to possess a gravitational field of their own.
sid_items_FArtifactMomsBeads_description:
An uncommon artifact found in thermal anomalies.

Highly valued on the Mainland’s black market as an exclusive interior decoration.
sid_items_FArtifactPlasma_description:
An uncommon artifact found in thermal anomalies.

Defense contractors actively hunt for Plasma artifacts on the Mainland’s black markets.
sid_items_FArtifactResin_description:
A common artifact found in thermal anomalies.

Even the slightest vibrations cause its string-like formations to heat up.
sid_items_FArtifactRingOmnipotence_descr:
A legendary artifact found in thermal anomalies.

The full potential of this artifact has yet to be discovered. It emits ultra-long radio waves and has potential applications in space navigation.
sid_items_FArtifactSteak_description:
A common artifact found in thermal anomalies.

If you hold the Steak in your bare hand long enough, you’ll have to peel it off along with patches of skin.
sid_items_GArtifactBloodStone_descriptio:
A common artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

The reddish-brown veins on the Stone Blood’s surface are due to the accumulation of iron salts.
sid_items_GArtifactBud_description:
A rare artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

Breaking down the artifact releases an oily substance with a floral fragrance.
sid_items_GArtifactCompass_description:
A legendary artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

Stalkers hold the belief that whoever discovers and holds onto the Compass will gain the ability to safely navigate the Zone’s most treacherous areas.
sid_items_GArtifactGoldFish_description:
An uncommon artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

The Goldfish will sink in water with any salt content, but remains buoyant in distilled water.
sid_items_GArtifactGraphiteBlock_descrip:
An uncommon artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

Due to its resemblance to a piece of jewelry, the Crown fetches a premium price on the Mainland’s black markets.
sid_items_GArtifactGravy_description:
A common artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

The Gravi can only be cut into pieces using plasma tools. This artifact exhibits a density and hardness surpassing that of diamond.
sid_items_GArtifactHedgehog_description:
An uncommon artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

The flagella cause burns upon contact with unprotected skin. Follow all safety precautions.
sid_items_GArtifactLandSlug_description:
A common artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

The Jellyfish can attract or repel radioactive particles depending on the surrounding environment.
sid_items_GArtifactNightStar_description:
A rare artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

The needles on the artifact are brittle. If a needle punctures the skin, the wound must be disinfected immediately.
sid_items_GArtifactPlane_description:
A common artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

Despite its imposing appearance, the artifact feels porous to the touch and crumbles under pressure.
sid_items_GArtifactRubiksCube_descriptio:
A rare artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

When exposed to the infrared spectrum, it becomes transparent.
sid_items_GArtifactSplitStone_descriptio:
An uncommon artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

In the absence of an observer, the artifact cannot be measured by any instruments.
sid_items_GArtifactSponge_description:
A common artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

Combines both gaseous and solid particles in continuous motion.
sid_items_GArtifactSpring_description:
An uncommon artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

Even under a load of over 3,000 tons, the Spring maintains its compression and decompression cycle.
sid_items_GArtifactStoneDrop_description:
A common artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

According to stalker legends, if you cut out a controller’s heart, it will look exactly like this artifact.
sid_items_GArtifactTrunk_description:
A common artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

It is highly prized among Mainland jewelers.
sid_items_GArtifactWrenched_description:
A common artifact found in gravitational anomalies.

In extreme cold, the Wrenched is warm to the touch, while in high temperatures, it remains cool.
sid_items_Gilka_description: A next-generation detector in the beginner tier, designed to supersede the Echo. Thanks to its all-new electronic components and antenna, it can detect artifacts at a greater range than its predecessor.
sid_items_GrenadeF1_description: A classic defensive grenade with roots going back to the 1910s. The enduring success of the “pineapple” design is reflected in its steadfast use across more than 50 countries for over a century.
sid_items_GrenadeRGD5_description: An offensive grenade developed in the 1950s, designed with a compact blast radius to minimize the risk of hitting the thrower.
sid_items_GunAK74_Korshunov_ST_descripti: A modernized version of the iconic assault rifle. Exceptionally reliable in harsh conditions, it has become the weapon of choice for many factions in the Zone.
sid_items_GunAK74_MagIncreased_descripti: A high-capacity magazine originally intended for light machine guns, it is compatible with the AKM-74S and Dnipro rifles.
sid_items_GunAK74_ST_description: A modernized version of the iconic assault rifle. Exceptionally reliable in harsh conditions, it has become the weapon of choice for many factions in the Zone.
sid_items_GunAK74_Strelok_ST_description: A modernized version of the iconic assault rifle. Exceptionally reliable in harsh conditions, it has become the weapon of choice for many factions in the Zone.
sid_items_GunAK74_Upgraded_Gamescom_desc: An upgraded version of the legendary assault rifle. Due to its reliability, it fits perfectly into the realities of the Zone, becoming the main weapon of many groups.
sid_items_GunAKU_PP_description: A shortened variant of the renowned assault rifle, this weapon combines the firepower of its larger counterpart with the compact frame of a submachine gun. It proves particularly valuable when venturing deep inside the Zone.
sid_items_GunAKU_Upgraded_Gamescom_descr: A shortened version of the popular rifle. The power of an assault rifle in the dimensions of a submachine gun is especially appreciated when hiking deep into the Zone.
sid_items_GunAK_MagPaired_description: Coupled magazines for 5.45x39 caliber weapons, compatible with the AKM-74 and AKM-74U.
sid_items_GunAPB_HG_description: A silenced pistol, once a staple of the Soviet Special Forces. In the Zone, it quickly became a tool of choice for discreetly resolving all manner of problems.
sid_items_GunAPB_MagIncreased_descriptio: A high-capacity magazine for the special automatic suppressed pistol. With this bullet capacity, the APSB basically transforms into a compact machine gun.
sid_items_GunBucket_MagIncreased_descrip: A high-capacity magazine for the Soviet submachine gun. Designed to meet the demands of police SWAT teams during assault operations.
sid_items_GunBucket_PP_description: Conceived by the USSR as a compact automatic self-defense weapon, this design has found popularity on the outskirts of the Zone despite its modest efficiency.
sid_items_GunD12_MagIncreased_descriptio: A high-capacity magazine for the D-12 smoothbore shotgun. Perfect for facing a pack of Fleshes or a group of bandits when you’d rather not bother with frequent reloading.
sid_items_GunD12_MagLarge_description: For a semi-automatic shotgun, nothing beats a high-capacity magazine — except maybe a drum magazine with even greater capacity! Perfect for annihilating anything that moves.
sid_items_GunD12_MagPaired_description: A coupled pair of magazines compatible with the AKM-74-based smoothbore shotgun. Streamlines the reloading process between the two magazines.
sid_items_GunD12_SG_description: Based on the AKM-74, this shotgun is favored among stalkers and professional military alike for its prowess as a powerful assault weapon.
sid_items_GunDnipro_MagPaired_descriptio: A pretty solid coupling of 5.45х39 caliber magazines. Used in Dnipro assault rifle with bullpup configuration.
sid_items_GunDnipro_ST_description: Designed to replace the Soviet AKM-74 in special force units, this Ukrainian assault rifle is utilized not just by military special forces, but also by seasoned stalkers.
sid_items_GunFora_MagIncreased_descripti: A high-capacity magazine compatible with Israeli rifles like the Kharod and Fora-221. Its unique design supports both 5.45 and 5.56 caliber cartridges, eliminating the need to swap magazines when changing the weapon’s caliber.
sid_items_GunFora_ST_description: This modular next-gen assault rifle has earned multiple prestigious global accolades, along with unofficial commendations from the stalker community.
sid_items_GunG37_ST_description: This German-made assault rifle is an exemplary piece of modern weaponry, featuring lightweight construction, excellent reliability, and an ergonomic design.
sid_items_GunGP37_MagLarge_description: A large-capacity drum magazine that was initially developed for a light machine gun based on the GP37 design, but is also compatible with the assault rifle. It provides a truly impressive ammunition capacity.
sid_items_GunGP37_MagPaired_description: A high-capacity magazine compatible with the German GP37 assault rifle.
sid_items_GunGauss_MagIncreased_descript: The Product 62 project included the development of batteries with increased capacity, seeking to improve the battlefield autonomy of individual rifle operators.
sid_items_GunGauss_SP_description: Developed in the Zone and incorporating an electromagnetic bullet acceleration system, this sniper rifle is used exclusively within the Zone.
sid_items_GunGauss_Scar_SP_description: A unique modification of the gauss cannon. It was designed specifically to disable electrical appliances, but it can also harm living creatures by affecting the target's nervous system.
sid_items_GunGrim_MagIncreased_descripti: A high-capacity magazine compatible with the Grom assault weapon system.
sid_items_GunGrim_MagLarge_description: A large-capacity drum magazine for the Grom assault weapon system. It's not the most user-friendly design, but it’s a bullpup machine gun, and that’s all that really matters.
sid_items_GunGrim_ST_description: Automatic rifle and grenade launcher system – an assault rifle configuration that can come in quite handy in the Zone. A good fit for lovers of ultimate firepower at both short and medium distances.
sid_items_GunGvintar_MagIncreased_descri: This high-capacity magazine doubles the ammunition capacity of the Vintar special rifle. Incidentally, the Lavina special assault rifle comes pre-equipped with this type of magazine.
sid_items_GunGvintar_ST_description: This specialized rifle designed for suppressed fire is highly regarded among veterans for its ability to keep the shooter’s position concealed.
sid_items_GunIntegral_MagIncreased_descr: A high-capacity magazine compatible with the Integral-A submachine gun. By minimizing reloading interruptions, it eliminates the main disadvantage of this futuristic weapon.
sid_items_GunIntegral_PP_description: An elite submachine gun renowned for its effectiveness in confined spaces. A favorite among seasoned diggers.
sid_items_GunKharod_MagPaired_descriptio: A coupled pair of magazines compatible with the Kharod assault rifle.
sid_items_GunKharod_ST_description: A rare, advanced assault weapon system treasured by stalkers for its remarkable efficiency even in the most challenging conditions.
sid_items_GunLavina_MagIncreased_descrip: This high-capacity magazine transforms the AS Lavina into a full-fledged assault rifle. This magazine hasn’t gained widespread popularity among Zone veterans, primarily owing to the added weight of the special 9x39mm caliber ammunition.
sid_items_GunLavina_ST_description: Derived from the Vintar sniper rifle, this silenced assault rifle enables effective firing without exposing the shooter’s position.
sid_items_GunM10_HG_description: Low price and low precision – that’s all you need to know about this submachine gun. Especially popular among rookies, but not for long. Real Zone life soon shows just how risky it is to cheap out on gear.
sid_items_GunM10_MagIncreased_descriptio: A high-capacity magazine for the M10 Gordon compact submachine gun. Even more ratta-tat-tat!
sid_items_GunM16_MagIncreased_descriptio: A high-capacity 5.56x45mm caliber magazine for use with AR416 system rifles. More ammunition means a better chance of hitting the target.
sid_items_GunM16_ST_description: This assault rifle stands out as one of the most popular choices on the market. In the Zone, its true potential came to light during Freedom’s defense of the Barrier.
sid_items_GunM16_Upgraded_Gamescom_descr: One of the most popular assault rifles on the market today. In the Zone, its potential was first revealed by Freedom during the defense of the Barrier.
sid_items_GunM701_SP_description: Bolt-action sniper rifle. Considered a sport weapon on the Mainland, yet rather popular among mutant hunters and stalkers headed for Prypiat.
sid_items_GunM860_SG_description: A pump-action shotgun prized for its lightweight build and reliability, it has earned a distinguished reputation as one of the world’s most famous shotguns and remains extremely popular in the Zone.
sid_items_GunMark_MagIncreased_descripti: High-capacity magazine for the Mark I. Developed for the assault rifle modification, it is now compatible with this model as well, thanks to some crafty stalkers. Also fits other configurations.
sid_items_GunMark_SP_description: An American-made semi-automatic rifle introduced in the early 1950s, it has undergone several modernizations and upgrades over the years.
sid_items_GunMosina_SP_description: This venerable three-line rifle spans both world wars and numerous other military conflicts. Legend has it its bullets can cut through rails — lengthwise.
sid_items_GunObrez_SG_description: This small and lightweight sawed-off hunting shotgun proved itself surprisingly useful in the ever-changing environment of the Zone. Very efficient in close quarters and comfortable for concealed carry.
sid_items_GunPKP_Korshunov_MG_descriptio: A machine gun modified under Korshunov's personal supervision. Weapon number 150289. It has an extended magazine and a high-precision laser designator, along with a custom-made grip and NATO collimator.
sid_items_GunPKP_MG_description: Combining the formidable firepower of a heavy machine gun with the portability of an assault rifle, this weapon excels at eliminating entire groups of enemies.
sid_items_GunPKP_MagIncreased_descriptio: A large-capacity ammo box used with the RP-74M light machine gun. It's primarily intended to be used from stationary firing positions, but there’s nothing stopping you from taking on a pseudogiant with it.
sid_items_GunPKP_MagLarge_description: An ammo box used with the tank-mounted TP-74, but equally suitable for the RP-74M light machine gun variant. Its ammunition capacity is simply mind-blowing.
sid_items_GunPM_HG_description: Service pistol, upgraded. Designed in the ’60s to equip police and army officers in Eastern Bloc countries. Popular in the Zone thanks to its reliability.
sid_items_GunPM_MagIncreased_description: An extended magazine for upgraded service pistols.
sid_items_GunRPD_MG_description: An early Soviet light machine gun that trades accuracy for a high rate of fire. In the Zone, its primary use is assaulting buildings and eliminating groups of mutants.
sid_items_GunRPD_MagIncreased_descriptio: An extended-capacity ammo box for the RPO-44 infantry machine gun. Perfect for when you need to suppress an entire platoon of enemies.
sid_items_GunRPD_MagLarge_description: Designed for the tank-mounted variant of the RPO-44, this ammo box provides a significantly larger ammunition capacity — enough to suppress all the bandits in Garbage.
sid_items_GunRam2_SG_description: Combining the strengths of pump-action shotguns and double-barreled rifles, this highly unusual weapon is an anomaly even by the Zone’s standards.
sid_items_GunRhino_HG_description: With its high caliber, this revolver is often marketed as a hunting weapon, proving equally effective against African buffalo and Zone chimeras.
sid_items_GunRpg7_GL_description: A rocket-propelled grenade launcher dating back to the 1960s, found in abundance in military warehouses and subsequently making its way to the Zone. It operates as a smooth-bore, single-shot recoilless launcher.
sid_items_GunSPSA_SG_description: A distinctive shotgun designed to accommodate various rounds, including police ammunition. Although weighty, it boasts excellent firepower.
sid_items_GunSVDM_SP_description: This tried-and-true sniper rifle is a common sight in the Zone, delivering solid performance at a reasonable price.
sid_items_GunSVU_MagIncreased_descriptio: An expanded magazine with a higher round capacity, purpose-built for the SVU-MK S-3 automatic sniper rifle to complement its impressive rate of fire.
sid_items_GunSVU_SP_description: Sniper rifle designed for special forces. Some of the Zone’s wonders are better to watch from a safe distance. This beauty will help you to do just that.
sid_items_GunTOZ_SG_description: A common hunting rifle, widespread and cheap. Still beats a handgun when it comes to dealing with mutants.
sid_items_GunUDP_HG_description: A pistol known for its ergonomic design, accuracy, and reliability. Widely favored in the Zone, it is sought after by both professionals and affluent newcomers.
sid_items_GunUDP_MagIncreased_descriptio: A high-capacity magazine compatible with the German UDP pistol. Originally designed for target shooting, it's proven to be equally suitable for combat use in the Zone.
sid_items_GunViper_MagIncreased_descript: A high-capacity magazine for the Viper-5 submachine gun. A valuable addition for deep recon missions.
sid_items_GunViper_PP_description: A highly accurate and compact submachine gun favored by the rapid response units of various countries, as well as nearly every faction in the Zone.
sid_items_GunVulkan_MagPaired_descriptio: A pretty solid coupling of 5.45х39 caliber magazines. Used in Dnipro assault rifle with bullpup configuration.
sid_items_GunZubr_MagIncreased_descripti: An advanced helical magazine designed to further enhance the already substantial ammunition capacity of the Zubr-19 submachine gun. It has not been widely adopted.
sid_items_GunZubr_PP_description: Based on the AKM-74U, the design of this submachine gun strikes a perfect balance between price, weight, accuracy, and rate of fire.
sid_items_Gun_Cavalier_SR_description: The owner must have watched too many documentaries on early 20th-century military conflicts, leading to a desire to own a modern reinterpretation of a bolt-action cavalry carbine.
sid_items_Gun_Combatant_AR_description: “Dmytro and I were just discussing a certain puzzle we’ve been working on in the Zone, but we can’t quite seem to get all the pieces to fit. Give me a hand, would you?”
sid_items_Gun_Deadeye_HG_description: Crafted to order, this pistol is outfitted with sporting attachments. No one can ascertain how this rare piece found its way into the Zone, but the pistol still offers remarkable performance under harsh local conditions.
sid_items_Gun_Decider_AR_description: An early version of the Fora-221, second-hand. The previous owner clearly splurged on upgrades.
sid_items_Gun_Drowned_AR_description: Somebody dropped this assault rifle in water. It can still do a decent job if you treat it right.
sid_items_Gun_EM1_SR_description: A unique modification of the gauss cannon. It was designed specifically to disable electrical appliances, but it can also harm living creatures by affecting the target's nervous system.
sid_items_Gun_Encourage_HG_description: Awarded to Alexander Korshunov during his time as a lieutenant, this pistol boasts precise craftsmanship. The bolt bears an inscription: “Glory. Service. Honor.”
sid_items_Gun_FDensity_MG_description: An overseas import to the Zone, this machine gun features a somewhat antiquated design complemented by modern accessories.
sid_items_Gun_GStreet_HG_description: Modeled after gangster movies from the 80s and 90s, this customized M10 may look impressive, but its practicality in the Zone remains questionable.
sid_items_Gun_Gabion_AR_description: A short-barrel prototype of a special-ops rifle. Developed for concealed carry and extremely close-quarter battle.
sid_items_Gun_Krivenko_HG_description: The meaning of a sacrifice at the beginning of the game can only be truly appreciated in the endgame.
sid_items_Gun_Logarithm_SMG_description: An Integral-A after some serious tuning. The main difference from the basic version is a specialized barrel with an integrated sound moderator and a longer handguard.
sid_items_Gun_Lummox_AR_description: An old AKM-74S, must have fired thousands of rounds. Worn-out, but perfectly clean and greased. Looks like Valik Lummox never got the chance to see it in action.
sid_items_Gun_Lynx_SR_description: This rifle boasts a unique modification, handcrafted by a now-deceased master. The addition of a new barrel with a custom twist rate has notably improved accuracy and damage, though it appears to have seen little use of late.
sid_items_Gun_Margach_SG_description: A customized version of the D-12 smooth-bore shotgun. Aluminum and polymer components reduce weight, improving the overall ergonomics.
sid_items_Gun_Merc_AR_description: A perfect tool is the first thought that comes to mind when examining this Vintar, tailored to excel in a specific range of tasks where silence is paramount.
sid_items_Gun_ModelCompact_HG_descriptio: A short-barrel revolver, used by police forces in different countries. Small and easy to use, yet efficient.
sid_items_Gun_ModelSpecial_HG_descriptio: A manual-assembly sport revolver. All the gaps adjusted, trigger mechanism replaced with a sharper one. Great choice for shooting bloodsuckers…speed shooting bloodsuckers.
sid_items_Gun_Novator_AR_description: A Fora-221, with numerous modifications to achieve increased efficiency for special missions inside and outside the Zone. Equipped with a built-in sound moderator.
sid_items_Gun_Partner_SR_description: This well-worn Mark rifle is fitted with a collimator sight, indicating the owner’s desire to gain an edge in firefights at short and medium range.
sid_items_Gun_PistolMonolith_HG_descript: Thank you for revealing the cunning plans of Your enemies to us! May Your light shine down on the souls of the brave soldiers who gave their lives in service to Your will. Blessed be their eternal union with the Monolith!
sid_items_Gun_Predator_SG_description: Formerly belonging to Trapper, this custom-built pump-action shotgun was designed to meet the owner’s specific request for a significant boost in lethality.
sid_items_Gun_ProjectY_HG_description: “All the Zone really needs is our compassion.”
sid_items_Gun_Rail_SG_description: This shotgun features a rifled barrel, enhancing its performance with slugs, but precluding the use of buckshot. The end result is akin to a handmade elephant gun, crafted with the purpose of hunting pseudogiants.
sid_items_Gun_RatKiller_SMG_description: A Zubr variant chambered for a different caliber. The body of this submachine gun boasts an urban camouflage paint job. It’s an absolute delight for shooting rats and rodents.
sid_items_Gun_Redemption_MG_description: Handcrafted by Khors for the trader Quiet, this piece reflects the technician’s unwavering dedication to his work. The weapon has undergone significant improvements in all characteristics, notably addressing the renowned reliability issues often found in machine guns of this series.
sid_items_Gun_RifleMonolith_AR_descripti: ... To battle, defenders of the Monolith! Fight! Avenge our fallen brothers...
sid_items_Gun_S15_AR_description: A factory-made Grom chambered in 5.45x39 caliber. While it may not have made waves on the Mainland for a number of reasons, in the Zone, it's acquired a devoted following, largely due to the wide range caliber it can accommodate.
sid_items_Gun_SOFMOD_AR_description: A rifle assembled by a certain Freedom member to suit his needs. An excellent choice if you want a single gun for tackling all the challenges the Zone throws your way.
sid_items_Gun_Sbanger_HG_description: Someone went the extra mile to chamber this revolver for special intermediate cartridges. The effort invested in this project is difficult to measure, but the outcome is undeniably impressive.
sid_items_Gun_Shakh_SMG_description: The personal firearm of the Shah, the kingpin of the Brood, is a custom order from the Mainland, complete with an extended magazine. You won’t find another gun quite like this in all of Garbage!
sid_items_Gun_Sharpshooter_AR_descriptio: An experiment to convert an assault rifle into sort of a sniper carbine — surprisingly successful despite the limitations of its ammunition.
sid_items_Gun_ShotgunMonolith_SG_descrip: ... Blessed be their eternal union with the Monolith! Death, cruel death to those who reject Its sacred power!
sid_items_Gun_Silence_SMG_description: A special forces variant of an assault rifle, this particular piece was owned by a stalker known as Bes.
sid_items_Gun_SkifGun_HG_description: Skif’s honorary PTM. A somewhat painful reminder of the army that became a comfortable, familiar weapon.
sid_items_Gun_Sledgehammer_SG_descriptio: A custom modification of an Italian shotgun, made for a famous stalker. This firearm combines high damage with a surprisingly decent rate of fire for a shotgun.
sid_items_Gun_Sotnyk_AR_description: Degtyarev’s personal assault rifle is truly a universal soldier among weapons, equally effective against the most ferocious mutants and the most experienced enemy combatants.
sid_items_Gun_Spitfire_SMG_description: A compact self-defense weapon combining the rate of fire of a machine gun with the accuracy typically found in assault rifles.
sid_items_Gun_Spitter_SMG_description: While most stalkers aren’t big fans of the S-2, this one clearly belonged to a true aficionado. Engraved on the side are the letters “SC,” likely the former owner's initials.
sid_items_Gun_Star_HG_description: Developed in the 1960s, this modernized service pistol was introduced as the standard issue handgun for law enforcement and army officers in Eastern Bloc countries.
sid_items_Gun_Tank_MG_description: A fusion of light machine gun and tank machine gun, this hybrid features a larger ammo box, a heavy barrel, and a lightweight bolt. The cost of improved reliability, extended range, and increased rate of fire is the substantial uptick in overall weight.
sid_items_Gun_Texas_SG_description: A true embodiment of Texan gun culture, this weapon is heavy, expensive, powerful, and absolutely merciless.
sid_items_Gun_Trophy_AR_description: An ordinary stalker acquired this special assault rifle in a battle with a certain veteran mercenary. It seems all that experience couldn’t spare the merc from an early grave.
sid_items_Gun_Unknown_AR_description: An AR416 assault rifle found in the Poppy Field. It appears that the previous owner took excellent care of his weapon and seldom parted with it.
sid_items_Gun_Veteran_AR_description: I'll make it, whatever it takes. I'll buy my own house... near the river, at the forest edge. No more radiation, no more beasts, no more freaking bastards.
sid_items_Gun_Whip_SR_description: This rifle has replaced the Lynx in the hands of the finest Monolith sniper. It’s rare to find a rifle that excels in both rate of fire and accuracy, but this one defies the norm.
sid_items_Gun_Zvirolov_SR_description: A rifle, modified specifically for better camouflage. Great for counter-sniping, especially in a forest.
sid_items_Heavy2_Military_Armor_descript: Designed for army special forces, this specialized armored suit is an extensive upgrade of the PSZ-5 series. While not the most practical option for extended ventures into the Zone, its users seldom find themselves in such scenarios.
sid_items_HeavyAnomaly_Monolith_Armor_de: Heavy armored suit used by “Monolith” assault teams. The manufacturer clearly valued functionality more than comfort, so a normal person won’t be able to wear this monstrosity for more than two hours.
sid_items_HeavyAnomaly_SIRCA_Armor_descr: One of the new-generation scientist suit versions. Ensures top-level protection from all known types of anomalous impact. Developed exclusively for SIRCAA.
sid_items_HeavyAnomaly_Scientific_Armor_: A next-generation prototype scientific suit utilizing materials and technologies akin to those found in space suits. It incorporates a cutting-edge system for suppressing anomalous effects.
sid_items_HeavyAnomaly_Spark_Armor_descr: A prototype SSP-100, modified for Spark stalkers. The basic armored vest was replaced with a stronger one, significantly improving the soldiers’ survival chances.
sid_items_HeavyBattle_Spark_Armor_descri: Guerilla warfare in the Zone is a entire art on its own, and this suit is the creation of those who have mastered it. A Sparker version of one of the most efficient armored suits across this side of the Perimeter.
sid_items_HeavyExoskeleton_Dolg_Armor_de: Outfitting the PSZ-9D with basic servos and heavier armor plates transforms it into the excellent Shield of Duty exosuit, offering an exceptional price-to-performance ratio.
sid_items_HeavyExoskeleton_Monolith_Armo: An experiment in cost-effective exoskeleton design, the Ruby combines upgraded Corundum components with first-generation servos to offset the armored suit's substantial weight.
sid_items_HeavyExoskeleton_Svoboda_Armor: The incorporation of first-generation servos into the Bulat has streamlined its operation during extended raids, further improving an already excellent exosuit.
sid_items_HeavyExoskeleton_Varta_Armor_d: A specialized Ward armored suit version. Equipped with a heavy-duty vest, built-in exoskeleton, a sturdy helmet and bright elements for fast identification friend or foe.
sid_items_Heavy_Dolg_Armor_description: The Duty variant of the PSZ-9 is nearly indistinguishable from the original in terms of performance, although certain materials were substituted with more cost-effective alternatives. A superb armored suit for assault operations.
sid_items_Heavy_Duty_Helmet_description: A modern titanium helmet with aramid reinforcement, complemented by a high-quality gas mask equipped with photochromic lenses.
sid_items_Heavy_Mercenaries_Armor_descri: A PSZ-9 army suit, upgraded for mercenary needs. This model has had a few great versions, which is why so many stalkers trust it with their lives.
sid_items_Heavy_Military_Helmet_descript: This effective combination of a ballistic helmet and a military gas mask has been widely adopted by military units operating in the Zone.
sid_items_Heavy_Svoboda_Armor_descriptio: After the military rejected the PSZ-12 in favor of the Berill, a large batch of these armored suits was written off and sold as surplus inventory. In the end, almost all of the Bulats were bought by Freedom.
sid_items_Heavy_Svoboda_Helmet_descripti: A heavy-duty assault helmet equipped with ballistic goggles and an aramid-reinforced respirator.
sid_items_Heavy_Varta_Helmet_description: Standard equipment for Ward soldiers, this gas mask provides reliable protection against chemical and radiation hazards. The reinforced visor adds an extra layer of defense against stray shrapnel.
sid_items_Hercules_description: The second generation of a strength-enhancing drug. It effectively raises the fatigue threshold of muscles, enhancing their ability to endure prolonged exertion.
sid_items_Jacket_Bandit_Armor_descriptio: This bandit leather jacket features sewn-in armor plates and aramid overlays. Comes with jeans, style, and attitude.
sid_items_Jemmy_Neutral_Armor_descriptio: Just an ordinary jacket. Provides basic protection against rain, cold, and maybe rat bites. Any kind of resistance against radiation or anomalies remains a beautiful dream.
sid_items_Light_Bandit_Helmet_descriptio: A vintage civil defense gas mask, expertly modified to endure the harsh conditions of the Zone. The mask gets its nickname from the reinforced inner frame that slightly squeezes the wearer’s face.
sid_items_Light_Duty_Helmet_description: An ordinary civil defense gas mask featuring a simple rubber mask and a modern, yet fairly basic filtration system.
sid_items_Light_Mercenaries_Armor_descri: Mercenary-designed suit, based on special forces gear. High molecular polyethylene plates and aramid padding not only sound futuristic, but provide excellent protection from high-corrosion Zone weapons.
sid_items_Light_Mercenaries_Helmet_descr: A military adaptation of a civilian gas mask equipped with anti-glare lenses and a flexible filter mount that can be attached on either side, simplifying weapon use for left-handed wearers.
sid_items_Light_Military_Helmet_descript: A newer, cost-effective revision of a military gas mask employing denser materials. The filter can no longer be attached on the opposite side, but the housing has been downsized to offset this limitation.
sid_items_Light_Neutral_Helmet_descripti: A civilian-grade gas mask featuring a solid visor and the option to mount a pair of filters. Fairly popular in the Zone.
sid_items_Medkit_description: Even if they’re past their expiration date, medkits can handle basic first aid, but expecting anything more than that could be deadly.
sid_items_Middle_Bandit_Armor_descriptio: A combination of a stylish jacket and a decent bulletproof vest. This outfit may not be the top choice for exploring anomalies, but when it comes to shaking down a hapless stalker, you can’t get any better than this.
sid_items_Milk_description: Considered a Zone delicacy, it is often taken on extended expeditions and occasionally used as bait for mutants, which also have a bit of a sweet tooth.
sid_items_Nasos_Neutral_Armor_descriptio: This protective suit consisting of rubber overalls and a gas mask is adapted to the Zone’s unforgiving conditions, significantly improving the wearer’s chance of survival in anomaly-rich and radiation-contaminated areas.
sid_items_Newbee_Neutral_Armor_descripti: Basically a jacket reinforced with aramid fibers and nylon thread, complemented with a basic load-bearing system. It serves as the bare minimum for survival. This suit doesn’t protect against anomalies and won’t stop a bullet, but its simplicity and cost-effectiveness make it a practical choice.
sid_items_PSYBlocker_description: A drug intended to partially offset the adverse effects of psi-radiation on humans. One of the few available ways to prevent the inside of your head from getting fried.
sid_items_QuestArtifactHeartOfChornobyl_: An incredibly rare, almost mythical artifact that functions as a psi-radiation amplifier. The degree of amplification depends on the characteristics and individual capabilities of the source. Its properties are still not fully understood, with the comprehensive range of parameters yet unknown. Presumed to encapsulate the original structure of the Zone’s matter.
sid_items_RU_ColimScope_1_description: A collimator sight designed for Eastern Bloc firearms. Perfectly compatible with NVG.
sid_items_RU_GLaunch_1_description: Designed for AKM-47 and AKM-74 series assault rifles, this underbarrel grenade launcher offers a practical solution for accurately launching grenades over several hundred yards.
sid_items_RU_Silen_1_description: A suppressor for small-caliber guns utilized by Eastern Bloc countries, originally developed for the SWAT teams of the old Soviet police force.
sid_items_RU_Silen_2_description: A suppressor for assault rifles used by the militaries of former Warsaw Pact countries. An indispensable tool for recon troops.
sid_items_RU_Silen_3_description: Designed for sniper rifles originating from post-Soviet countries, this silencer excels at concealing the shooter’s position, especially during long-range engagements.
sid_items_RU_X2Scope_1_description: A versatile scope suitable for both close- and medium-range engagements.
sid_items_RU_X4Scope_1_description: A 4x magnification scope of Soviet design, compatible with a dovetail mount.
sid_items_RU_X8Scope_1_description: A high-magnification Soviet scope designed to fit on a dovetail mount.
sid_items_Rook_Dolg_Armor_description: Standard-issue attire for rank-and-file Duty members, this suit has been maliciously dubbed the “body bag” due to its perceived inadequacy for mutant hunting — the faction’s main pursuit.
sid_items_Rook_Svoboda_Armor_description: Lightweight Freedom group gear set. Usually used by rookies, but also loved by many veterans for its sporty comfort.
sid_items_SEVA_Dolg_Armor_description: Compared to the original SEVA suit, the main distinction of the Duty version lies is its integration with the armored vests of the PSZ-5 series. While significantly lowering production and maintenance expenses, this measure comes with trade-offs in certain performance aspects.
sid_items_SEVA_Monolith_Armor_descriptio: «Why did you abandon us? We can’t hear you. We’re waiting for your orders.»
sid_items_SEVA_Neutral_Armor_description: A top-notch suit manufactured by a defense company outside the Zone. It integrates a lightweight bulletproof vest, a sealed breathing system, and advanced technologies designed to mitigate the harmful impact of anomalies and radiation.
sid_items_SEVA_Spark_Armor_description: A common gripe with the SEVA suit revolves around the insufficient level of protection offered by its integrated bulletproof vest. The upgraded Spark version seeks to eliminate this issue.
sid_items_SEVA_Svoboda_Armor_description: The famous and legendary SEVA, exquisitely upgraded by the Freedom craftsman Screw. Some of the solutions are quite surprising, but none of them made it less comfortable to wear.
sid_items_SS_PGO7Scope_description: An optical scope designed to magnify the effective range and accuracy of the RPG-7U rocket-propelled grenade launcher.
sid_items_Sausage_description: The key advantage of this sausage is its long shelf life. It’s best not to speculate on how this is achieved in order to avoid ruining your appetite and those of others.
sid_items_SkinJacket_Bandit_Armor_descri: An inexpensive dark jacket worn by thugs everywhere. It won’t actually protect you, but it makes you look dope as hell.
sid_items_UltraLight_Mercenaries_Armor_d: A suit upgraded for the Rostok bar bouncers. High-molecular polyethylene plates reduce weight, along with bullet resistance.
sid_items_Veles_description: An improved second-generation detector. Despite its relatively high price, this detector is favored by seasoned stalkers for its user-friendly interface, reliability, and remarkable efficiency.
sid_items_Vodka_description: A must-have alcoholic drink produced by GSC, renowned for its ability to flush radiation from the body. It's also an excellent remedy against the tedium of everyday life in the Zone.
sid_items_Water_description: Finding clean water in the Zone is no easy task, since all natural sources there are contaminated with radiation. Fortunately, this isn't an issue on the Mainland yet.
sid_items_X7_Armor_description: A special gear kit developed for working in the conditions of the X7 Lab. Origins unknown.
sid_items_Zorya_Neutral_Armor_descriptio: A masterpiece of local craftsmenship, this suit combines two layers of rubberized fabric with a polymer lining and a bulletproof vest effective against pistol bullets. The Sunrise’s reasonable price and upgrade potential have solidified its status as a top-selling item.
sid_items_Zorya_Tourist_Armor_descriptio: The former owner of this suit had an excellent understanding of weight distribution and echeloning of equipment. Redesigned pockets, a corset that relieves the back, additional pouches and a travel backpack allow you to carry more weight, which is very handy during long raids into the Zone.
sid_items_moneyCard_description: A compact data carrier that can be used in PDAs, laptops, and other devices. Stalkers often use such memory cards to store coupons in caches.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartBayun_d: Scientists call them "biogenic superconductors." No one knows what that is, so they drag them to the technicians — still conductors, right? And the techs send the unlucky hunters back to the merchants.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartBlindDo: Scientists believe that these glands help blind dogs navigate much better than their non-blind counterparts. Until this theory is proven or rejected, they will be valuable.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartBloodsu: Rumor has it that the hemostatic agents in the scientists' first aid kits are made from these. Sometimes the less you know, the better.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartBoar_de: A rookie's favorite trophy. Selling it to traders is quite honorable, while smartasses who bought a fang for bragging rights are the laughingstock at any campfire.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartBurer_d: No matter what tricks these mutants play on gravity, they always stand firmly on their feet. To understand why, scientists order their toes, hundreds of them. However, for the merchant to accept the loot, the fingertip must be intact.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartChimera: Collectors are ready to pay an arm and a leg for the mutated ears, but stalkers who have earned this trophy are not ready to part with it. After all, the chimera ear is proof you're a true stalker legend.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartControl: Any psi-effect researcher's dream and the most desired drug of world research institutes. Although scientists hardly think about the price at which it ended up in their lab.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartFlesh_d: Everyone hates swarms of fleshes — especially couriers. That's why traders are willing to pay for their enlarged eye, as proof of kill.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartHornhea: Incredibly light and very sturdy. No one yet understands what mutations made them this way, but growing this kind of “living armor” in a laboratory is a gunsmith's dream.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartPolterg: Scientists are trying to figure out which of the poltergeist's organs gives them invisibility. And until they figure it out, merchants are buying them all up.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartPseudod: There is a theory that pseudodogs' ability to coordinate their phantoms is linked to receptors on their skin. Solving this mystery could be a breakthrough in creating new camouflage.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartPseudog: People on the mainland used to buy rare horns and tusks — now "magical" properties have been given to the nails of pseudogiants. What matters is folks are still willing to pay.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartRodent_: Some stalker in Zalissya used to say rodent paws bring luck — and now merchants buy them as good luck charms. That stalker was mauled by bloodsuckers long ago, though. Looks like the charm wasn't so lucky after all.
sid_items_mutpartspack_MutantPartSnork_d: A snork's neck vertebra, mutated to withstand mutant jumps. Word is, dog tags of some stalkers were found grown into in the bones.
sid_items_myriflepack_GunKora_HG_descrip: Pistol with a capital “P”. A true classic of firearm engineering. Designed over a century ago, yet still relevant today thanks to its powerful ammunition and near-total reliability under any conditions.
sid_items_myriflepack_GunKora_MagIncreas: Extended high-capacity magazine for the Kora pistol. Solves the main issue of the weapon — lack of ammunition in the factory version.
sid_items_myriflepack_GunThreeLine_SP_de: This venerable three-line rifle spans both world wars and numerous other military conflicts. Legend has it its bullets can cut through rails — lengthwise.
sid_items_myriflepack_Gun_NightStalker_H: A unique variant of the classic pistol. Custom-made components appear to have been precisely fitted during assembly. Chambered in 9mm Parabellum.
sid_items_nvgpack_Gun_Dragunka_SR_descri: This rifle served Honta for years, and now it has been passed on to his student. It's been well looked after and is still in good working order. Whether you're up against a rhino or a chimera, it won't fail you.
sid_items_nvgpack_NVG_gen1_description: NVG developed in the 1960s. Based on an ancient image intensifier, they're easily damaged and susceptible to overexposure and interference. Not the most effective device, but better than nothing.
sid_items_nvgpack_NVG_gen2_description: Classic NVG from the 90s. The Gen 2 image intensifier has better light sensitivity, and the two lenses expand the field of view. A good compromise between cost and effectiveness.
sid_items_nvgpack_NVG_gen3a_description: Modern night-vision goggles. The quadrocular layout provides a wide field of view, and the powerful image intensifier has a high-brightness matrix capable of 'extracting' light, even from the darkest corners of the Zone.
sid_items_nvgpack_NVG_gen3b_description: A rare upgrade of the Gen 3 goggles. The standard intensifier has been replaced, changing the classic green light to a softer white.
sid_items_supack_Gun_GP37V2_AR_descripti: A rare modification of the GP37, designed for the German Navy. Its key distinction from the base version is the replacement of its automatic fire with a three-round burst mode. It was released in a limited run and failed to find favor.
sid_journal_E05_MQ05_Name: Like a Moth to the Flame
sid_journal_E06_MQ04_Name: To the Last Drop of Blood
sid_journal_E07_MQ01_Name: Just Like the Good Old Days
sid_journal_E15_MQ02_Name: Through the valley of the shadow of death
sid_journal_SQ06_Name: A Light in the End of the Tunnel
sid_journal_description_DLC00_ItemHunt_J: It seems that in the Zone, challenges and mysteries await me at every step. I need to be prepared. First, I'll look in my personal Storage box — maybe there's something there to help me on the way.
sid_journal_description_E01_MQ01_Descrip: Seems like a fair trade-off: Hermann gets my special stone, and I get a new home and hope for a new life. All I have to do is cross the Perimeter and successfully activate the Scanner. That know-it-all insists it’s the only way to restore the anomalous properties of my faded artifact. I’m just hoping this little experiment won’t drag on too long, regardless of the tall tales going around about this Zone.
sid_journal_description_E02_MQ01_Descrip: Now I’ve lost both the Scanner and the artifact, and my head’s still reeling from the blow it took. Hermann has gone off the air, so I’ll have to find those bastards myself. I guess I need to scout the area and find a place where the locals gather to exchange the latest news and rumors.
sid_journal_description_E02_MQ02_C01_Des: As it turns out, there’s a way to track Squint – or at least his PDA. The Gaffer mentioned that the tower in Zalissya and a technician called Lens can help me out.
sid_journal_description_E02_MQ02_C03_Des: Squint asked me to retrieve a particular artifact. He claims it could help him escape from the Lesser Zone, even with the Ward’s quarantine in place. I guess I’ll get it for him, and then we’ll see where things stand.
sid_journal_description_E02_MQ02_Descrip: The residents of Zalissya apparently know Solder, but they’re still reluctant to tell me about him. Their terms are clear: if I want intel on Solder, I gotta find Squint first. Looks like I’ll have to trade a looter for a snitch.
sid_journal_description_E02_MQ03_C01_Des: There’s an Emission coming. Even from a distance, it looks truly apocalyptic. If I get caught in the open, it’s game over for me. I gotta find shelter before it reaches Zalissya.
sid_journal_description_E02_MQ03_Descrip:
The plan I made with Hermann has failed because of that slippery guy Solder. Although, I have to admit that one out of three coordinates did turn out to be golden, just not for me.
He sold us out. But to whom? I need to track the bastard down and interrogate him with extreme prejudice. That’s the only way to get the Scanner back.
sid_journal_description_E02_SQ01_C01_Des: I helped a stalker called Zhorik fight off some bandits at the Post Office. Turns out his partner is being held captive by the same gang. They’re holed up in the Boiler House. Zhorik asked me to rescue Gloomy if I can.
sid_journal_description_E02_SQ02_Descrip: I’ve heard from the locals that the most important people in the Zone are technicians and traders. I should find both in Zalissya and see what they can do for me.
sid_journal_description_E03_MQ01_Descrip: Solder turned out to be nothing more than a flunky. Nevertheless, he still served a purpose: he told me that a guy called Nestor was the mastermind behind the entire scanner scheme. Zotov told me to go to the Chemical Plant, the Ward’s headquarters, and talk to Colonel Korshunov. I hope he’ll be willing to help me.
sid_journal_description_E03_MQ02_Descrip: Solder turned out to be nothing more than a flunky. Nevertheless, he still served a purpose: he told me that a guy called Nestor was the mastermind behind the entire scanner scheme. Richter said his stalker friends at the Detention Center can help me find him.
sid_journal_description_E03_MQ03_Descrip: Varan claims that Nestor set him up. He says his bandits were also targeted because of the Scanner, and now he’s holding one of the attackers prisoner. He offered to give me some information if I eliminate one of his rivals for Garbage’s throne: Roosevelt, the head of the Commissary, or the Shah, the kingpin of the Brood. He hinted that the Shah has been dealing with Huron from the Slag Heap. As for Roosevelt, I should look for his former comrade Borodulin, who’s often found drinking in Garbage.
sid_journal_description_E03_MQ04_Descrip: Following Diode’s lead, I found Nestor’s personal notes and uncovered the entire Scanner operation. It’s clear to me now that Varan’s men were behind the attack on the kingpin’s couriers. Looks like it’s time to go to the Plant and ask the bandit a few unpleasant questions.
sid_journal_description_E03_MQ05_Descrip: This is interesting… Nestor, the kingpin of Garbage, has vanished without a trace. It seems like everyone involved in the Scanner scheme is in trouble. Even Diode, the kingpin’s technician henchman, is in some serious hot water. I should meet him at the Slag Heap and find out what he knows.
