Illyukha Sparrow: Alone? No way! You lookin’ to get killed out there?
Marik Stomper: I’m fed up with the Gaffer’s yapping, man. I’m sick of tagging along with a bunch of rookies on a jaunt right around the corner. Nah, I’m looking for a fresh start. Found myself an artifact in an anomaly field just yesterday, like a real stalker! You get me?
Illyukha Sparrow: I do… I’m actually a little jealous.
Marik Stomper: No need, bro. I’ve already set up my own stash. It ain’t fancy, but it’ll come in handy. But take care – word is, some bandits from the Swamps are coming our way.
sid_notes_EQ109_MarikTopotNote_hint: PDA from a stalker’s body inside the crashed helicopter
sid_notes_EQ109_VitekLunaNote_body:
$J0L0Vityok Moon: Me and the crew are done with the Sultan’s joint, Tokha. We’re striking out on our own here.
Tokha Meadow: “Here?” And where’s that?
Vityok Moon: You won’t rat us out, will ya? We’re out in the boonies. They say it’s called the Burnt Forest. Come on over, man. The stalkers here are real sloppy. Easy pickings.
Tokha Meadow: Maybe I’ll swing by. I need to think it over.
Vityok Moon: What’s there to think over? Ain’t you tired of wondering if your own buddies are gonna put a bullet in your skull? Join us, man. But pack some grub – we’ve got no traders here.
sid_notes_EQ109_VitekLunaNote_hint: PDA from a bandit’s body at the Swinery
sid_notes_EQ110_DokaPDANote_body:
$J0L0 I’m getting close. Hermit picked this spot for a reason. It takes guts to scavenge for loot in this neck of the woods. Word is, he was among the first stalkers to prowl the Zone. Which means the guy could be stashing some serious swag.
There are critters roaming around the school, but they say Hermit always traveled light. Maybe I can find a way to slip through… If I discover his secret stash, I’ll have a tale to share over a drink. Fingers crossed it’s not just a bunch of expired canned chow…
sid_notes_EQ110_DokaPDANote_hint: PDA from a stalker’s body near the school
sid_notes_EQ110_HermitNote_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I had a bizarre dream yesterday. There was a family gathering around the kitchen table. The mother was serving food, and the TV was humming softly in the background. Toys all over the floor, but some of them were artifacts. A child was playing with them as though they were ordinary playthings. Everyone smiled as they sat down to eat, but in the backdrop, an Emission was looming. Black high-rise buildings against a fiery red sky… </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> The morning brought a biting wind – a sign from the Zone to go north. The route to the Zone’s heart goes through the Red Forest. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I’m traveling light, taking only what’s absolutely necessary. I’m leaving the rest behind for whoever stumbles across it. Something tells me I won’t be coming back.  </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> There’s something in the air. The Zone is stirring, like a growling, restless beast in a cage. If it breaks free, it will spare no one. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ110_HermitNote_header: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I’ve been having trouble sleeping lately. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ110_HermitNote_hint: Note from Hermit’s stash near the School
sid_notes_EQ118_NoteDeadIskra_body:
$J0L0Ozersky: We have been picking up an odd signal coming from Lymansk lately. Time to figure out what is going on there.
Ozersky: Head to the coordinates, find some high ground, and record whatever you hear. I have filed the request for equipment with the warehouse. It will be ready for pickup when you need it.
sid_notes_EQ118_NoteDeadIskra_hint: A PDA found near the checkpoint at the bridge in the Red Forest
sid_notes_EQ11_Norton_Note_body:
$J0L0Norton: West, we got a problem. Those damn loners from the Cordon offloaded the artifacts to Sidorovich—and they’re not giving back the advance.
Norton: Word is, we tried to pull a fast one, but Sidor straightened ’em out about the prices.
Norton: Fuck, when did we start pinching pennies harder than Sidor?
West: I dunno. Maybe when you lost your last bolt in a game of cards, smartass.
West: Anyway, we gotta silence those dudes before they start spreading the word that Freedom are easy marks. Text your merc, whoever he is.
Norton: Moth. Told you a hundred times.
West: I don’t give a damn what his name is. Just make sure he’ll do the job quickly and quietly.
sid_notes_EQ11_Norton_Note_hint: Freedom members discussing a hit on their former partners
sid_notes_EQ13_Filimon_Note_body:
$J0L0Adik Pedal: Hey, huckster. Heard you’re the stash guy. We’re after a big one. Good guns.
Filimon: Some assault rifles, a couple of hunting rifles, and a machine gun, I think. Plus ammo for all of ’em. Got Fleshes nearby. 7,000, if that’s good with you.
Adik Pedal: That’s a ripoff! We’ll burn through half the ammo just dealing with the critters, and that’s if my boys even make it. Gimme a discount!
Filimon: Take it or leave it. My stashes move fast.
Adik Pedal: Fuck, you Freedom scumbags are nothing but scammers. All right, the coupons are on the way.
sid_notes_EQ13_Filimon_Note_hint: A contract to sell a weapons stash to bandits
sid_notes_EQ13_MihaNote_body:
$J0L0Moth: Hey there. Heard you’re after the guy who supplied the bandits with guns. I got a lead for you. It’ll cost you, though. A thousand coupons.
Mykha Cowboy: Sent the coupons your way. Now spit it out.
Moth: Ever heard of Filimon from Freedom? He’s the man who sold them the stash.
Mykha Cowboy: How’d you find out?
Moth: Had a few with Adik. He runs the gang that took out your pals. Spilled everything in his cups.
Mykha Cowboy: Son of a bitch... I know Filimon. I can deal with him. Where’s Adik now?
Moth: Gonna need more for that info. Ten grand. Can you swing it?
Mykha Cowboy: I’ll make it happen. Keep in touch.
sid_notes_EQ13_MihaNote_hint: The tip that sparked Mykha’s vendetta against Filimon
sid_notes_EQ140_IluhaVorobejNote_NoDetec:
$J0L0 Can a man be cursed with perpetual misfortune? No, I refuse to accept it. When a technician botches your gear, then you get mauled by mutants, then bandits rough you up, your luck is bound to turn around eventually. And if it doesn’t… well, that’s just not fair, damn it.
The guys make fun of me. They say if the Zone rejects you, you’re better off spinning yarns by the campfire – the sausage and vodka are on us. But that’s not why I came all the way here. If I was willing to settle for less, I’d have stayed put on the Mainland after I got my lit degree. No, out there… success is waiting for me.
I’ll head to Perun’s Hill. The journey is long and daunting, and my detector is acting up. I wish that stalker had sold me one of his… Now, I’ll have to make do with this piece of junk to hunt for artifacts. Still, if I manage to find just one, it’ll make up for all my past failures. After all, fortune favors the bold… right?
PDA from a loner’s body in the Burnt Forest
sid_notes_EQ140_IluhaVorobejNote_body:
$J0L0 Can a man be cursed with perpetual misfortune? No, I refuse to accept it. When a technician botches your gear, then you get mauled by mutants, then bandits rough you up, your luck is bound to turn around eventually. And if it doesn’t… well, that’s just not fair, damn it.
The guys make fun of me. They say that if the Zone rejects you, you’re better off spinning yarns by the campfire – the sausage and vodka are on us. But that’s not why I came all the way here. If I was willing to settle for less, I’d have stayed put on the Mainland after I got my lit degree. No, out there… success is waiting for me.
I’ll head to Perun’s Hill. The journey is long and daunting, and the place is as barren as it gets – no traders, nowhere safe to rest – but if I make it back with an artifact, it’ll make up for all my past failures. After all, fortune favors the bold… right?
sid_notes_EQ140_IluhaVorobejNote_hint: PDA from a loner’s body in the Burnt Forest
sid_notes_EQ143_NoteRybakinKolumb_body:
$J0L0[15:23]Rybyakin: The advance is coming through. Everything’s set. Drop the goods at the coordinates I sent.
[15:24]Rybyakin: And make sure to grab some anti-rad! Those buses are soaked in rads, like they circled around the reactor back in ’86 or somethin’. $J0L0[17:40]Columbus: Dude, that spot you picked is hot as hell. My counter was screaming blue murder while I stashed the goods!
[17:41]Rybyakin: No one’s gonna snoop around that place. Pretty smart, huh?
[18:01]Columbus: I don’t feel so hot. I think I messed up with the anti-rads
[18:02]Rybyakin: Get to the bar quick, we’ll sort you out! $J0L0[19:11]Rybyakin: You all right, man?
sid_notes_EQ143_NoteRybakinKolumb_hint: Rybyakin gives instructions for the stash
sid_notes_EQ144_GlazgoNote_body:
$J0L0Glasgow: I’m sober now, Tyoma. Shit… you’re at Chystohalivka? We found a stash in the basement, but then someone locked us in. Can you come get us out?
Glasgow: There was an Emission outside, and Short wouldn’t let some guy in, so he locked us inside, then dropped dead. I need your help.
Glasgow: Short’s so hammered that he can’t even stand up. That vodka must’ve been bad. I’m scared to go check on him, what if he’s dead? Dammit… my head’s pounding.
Glasgow: Dammit, I can hear a PDA beeping from outside every time I text you. You were the dude Short didn’t let inside? I’m sorry. He never said he called you.
Glasgow: But if you’re dead over there… then, who’s making all that noise?
sid_notes_EQ144_KucyjNote_body:
$J0L0Short: Guess what, Tyoma – me and the gang stumbled across a stash! Looks like Freedom’s. Sweet spot, nobody around!
Short: We hit the booze jackpot, Tyoma! We’re so sloshed! Where the hell are you?
Short: Can you believe this? Some chump tried to crash our party! We didn’t let him in. There’s barely enough room for us!
Short: That son of a bitch locked us in! Now he’s gone and croaked outside, but somehow jammed the damn door shut! Get us outta here!
sid_notes_EQ145KostaKonusNoteText_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Yesterday: </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L1<NoteBody><ListItem><NoteDefault>Southern checkpoint – to the southwest, every 2 hours</NoteDefault></ListItem><ListItem><NoteDefault>Eastern checkpoint – to the northeast, every 3 hours.</NoteDefault></ListItem></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Today: </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L1<NoteBody><ListItem><NoteDefault>Southern checkpoint – to the southwest, every 4 hours</NoteDefault></ListItem><ListItem><NoteDefault>Eastern checkpoint – to the northeast, every hour</NoteDefault></ListItem></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Patrols keep changing their routine. Can’t see a pattern yet. Snipers are active in the area. No blind spots. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ145KostaKonusNoteText_hint: A note found on a Sparker’s body in Chornobyl-2
sid_notes_EQ14_KuzaNote_body:
$J0L0Sanya Chief: How’s it going? Bright mentioned you’re rolling in it over in Rostok.
Kuzya: Yeah, we struck gold. Rostok’s full of rich suckers cozying up to Freedom. They’re all loaded – not a piece of cake for a shakedown, but they’re ripe for a scam.
Sanya Chief: So you’re making a living off smooth talk? Really?
Kuzya: You bet. I’ve got the gift of gab, and it’s paying off. If you wanna join the party, chip in on the stash. I’ll ping you the location.
Sanya Chief: Sounds dope. I’ll mull it over. Catch you later.
sid_notes_EQ14_KuzaNote_hint: PDA of a bandit named Kuzya, who tried to sell a car
sid_notes_EQ150_NoteOtshelnikText_body:
$J0L0 I got out of the Red Forest. The journey was grueling. I encountered a hornhead. Mutants usually steer clear of me, but this one halted in my path, glaring at me with a vacant, menacing gaze, as if barring my passage. For a heartbeat, I feared it would charge and tear me limb from limb. But it veered off, snapping dry branches underfoot as it went.
Even now, when I close my eyes, I see lush green canopies in place of the withered red. It’s as if the forest is saying, “Behold my former glory. Behold what’s been wrought upon me.” The First Disaster, the breach of the Noosphere… Humanity has shown no mercy to this place. Now, it reaps what it has sown.
One met his end with a bullet in his back, another got torn apart by mutants, a third fell off a ledge into an anomaly… More bodies littered the path, but I paid them no heed.
A brief rest, and then onward, to the Dead Valley. The Zone calls to me, its heart beckoning. What truths lie within? What revelations does it hold?

I’ll leave some provisions here. Should another escape the Red Forest, they will surely be needed.
sid_notes_EQ150_NoteOtshelnikText_hint: A note found in the village in Yaniv
sid_notes_EQ155_BromPDAText_body:
$J0L0[14:30] Hosha Boyara: What was that drunk gibberish you sent me last night, Bromine? Something about some fat sucker you ran into?
[14:31] Hosha Boyara: Did you see him in a mirror?
[14:35] Borya Bromine: Shut your trap. That sucker’s a lab tech for the eggheads. We got him wasted, and he spilled the beans about a kick-ass stash. But the door’s got a damn code lock!
[14:37] Hosha Boyara: Well, I dunno, try 1111 or 1234…
[14:40] Borya Bromine: Are you fucking stupid? I don’t have to guess. The password’s written on some lab critter’s collar from their experiments. It’s probably been dead for ages. Just gotta find the corpse.
[14:40] Hosha Boyara: You better watch out, or there’ll be two dead critters there. Ha ha. $J0L0[16:02] Hosha Boyara: Cat got your tongue? You mad at me, bro?
sid_notes_EQ155_BromPDAText_hint: Found on a body near the Hydrodynamics Lab
sid_notes_EQ155_CollarControllerNotes_hi: Text on a collar tag taken from a controller
sid_notes_EQ156_MorozPDANote_body:
$J0L08/12
Viktoria Dorozhnyuk: About those samples… keep it under wraps, all right?
Zhenya Blizzard: Sure thing. But seriously, why the sudden interest in these bones? You’re more of a techie, aren’t you?
Viktoria Dorozhnyuk: This is not my project. A colleague of mine is very interested in them, though. He’s itching to study the bone marrow of bloodsucker victims. $J0L08/15
Viktoria Dorozhnyuk: How’s it going? Found a partner yet? Zhenya Blizzard: I can handle it on my own. I found a sweet spot in the swamp. Enough to fill a dozen of your suitcases.
Viktoria Dorozhnyuk: I don’t need a dozen, all right? Just bring me one, settle the bill, and we’ll put this behind us.
sid_notes_EQ156_MorozPDANote_hint: PDA of a Sparker killed in the swamp near Ahroprom
sid_notes_EQ161_kudravyjNote_body:
$J0L0Curly: My boys spotted Skif heading down to X5. I’m thinking we can catch him at the military warehouses.
Scar: Not a smart move.
Curly: Why not? We’ve got the numbers, and we know the turf. We’ll take him down quick, snatch Korshunov’s badge, and waltz into the Chemical Plant like we own the place.
Scar: Skif’s a good man who made some bad choices. I want to give him a chance to make things right.
Curly: That’s bullshit, Scar. He’s a Warden bitch. It’s too late to get all high and mighty.
Scar: Suit yourself. But something tells me he’ll be the one walking away from this, not you.
sid_notes_EQ161_kudravyjNote_hint: An ambush planned for Skif at the base near Ahroprom
sid_notes_EQ163_PripoyFuneralNote_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> IN MEMORY OF PANAS, FROM HIS ASSHOLE FRIENDS </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ163_PripoyFuneralNote_hint: A farewell to the man who died in the Slag Heap assault
sid_notes_EQ165_TrachukPDANote_body:
$J0L0Trachuk: I need a favor, Trickster… I’ve got a flash drive with extremely valuable information on it. Can you keep it safe for me while I look for a way to process the data?
Trickster: What kind of data are we talking?
Trachuk: I’ve been analyzing the information obtained over the course of an Emission, when anomalous energy was bursting from the Noosphere. I don’t want it to fall into the wrong hands. Call me paranoid, but I suspect someone in Malachite is working for the Ward. If they find out about my research, they’ll take it from me and use it for leverage.
Trickster: I see. Here are the coordinates of a spot far from Ward patrols. Meet me there.
sid_notes_EQ165_TrachukPDANote_hint: Found on a dead scientist near the vehicle station in Malachite
sid_notes_EQ166_ValerianPDANote_body:
$J0L0 Father Valerian: Got a new job from Duty. What’s your ETA?
Van: I’m not coming back.
Father Valerian: Come on, Van! We’ve been in this together since the Cordon! We’ve gone through so much!
Van: Cut the crap. You keep living in your memories about the time when we were fending off Yoga’s bandits. It’s all in the past. After the Second Emission, no one needs the base at the Cordon anymore. No one needs us. We’ve become errand boys for Duty. And I’m done with it.
sid_notes_EQ166_ValerianPDANote_hint: PDA found on a stalker’s body by the Cooling Towers
sid_notes_EQ167_NoteOtshelnikText_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I’m here. I’m home. I’m ready. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ167_NoteOtshelnikText_hint: A note found in the Dead Valley
sid_notes_EQ16_FaraPDANote_body:
$J0L0 Stopped by the Ribs today to honor the fallen. Whoever named it had quite the wits. Wish I was that creative… It’s like, a titan was walking through, his chest rupturing as he collapsed and died, and now his rib cage is the only thing left…
Just think of how many lives that giant has taken! I hope the medkits I left will come in handy.
Freaking beautiful view of the Poppy Field, especially at sunset. Sky is red, the flowers too, mirroring each other, blending together…
What sort of folks are we? Always fussing around, messing around, not even noticing the beauty of it all!
sid_notes_EQ16_FaraPDANote_hint: PDA belonging to Headlight, a stalker who marveled at the Zone’s splendor
sid_notes_EQ20_PropositionFromZhukovsky_:
$J0L0Pvt. Pavlyuk: Hey, Zulu. My buddy and I are done beating around the bush with Voronin. We wanna roll with the real Duty. You got room for us?
Zulu: I can hook you up with a couple of jobs. Nail those, then we’ll talk.
Zulu: Number one: nab the stash at these coordinates. Number two: mop up all the mutants in Kopachi. You got three days. Any questions?
Pvt. Pavlyuk: Negative. We’ll split and get it done in one day.
Zulu: Don’t go playing the hero. Stick together.
Zulu: Pasha, do you copy?
PDA from a Duty member’s body in Eastern Tunnel
sid_notes_EQ26_ChatWithOzerskijAndLevsa_:
$J0L08/07
Dorozhnyuk: Get the equipment from the storage room tonight. I need psi-radiation measurements from Yantar. I’ll provide the coordinates.
Dorozhnyuk: Handle the equipment with care, and keep this mission under wraps. Especially from Ozersky.
Lefty: Understood. $J0L08/08
Lefty: We’re pinned down in the psi-radiation zone. Surrounded, can’t break out.
Dorozhnyuk: What about the equipment?
Lefty: We ditched it at the last mark. We need backup ASAP.
Dorozhnyuk: Hang in there! I’ll do what I can.
PDA from a stalker’s body near Lake Yantar
sid_notes_EQ29_TradeNote_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> We’re gonna do it the old-fashioned way. You drop the artifact and pick up the goods. Mess up like the last guy, and you’ll vanish in the Zone like the others. Remember, you’re breaking the law by trespassing here. Unlike us. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ29_TradeNote_hint: A note from the Eastern Checkpoint stash
sid_notes_EQ30_DobryakReturn_Note_body:
$J0L0Alex Koldoba: We never knew each other, and you’ll never get a chance to read this, but I still feel the need to write it… To explain myself, maybe. I was so happy when I snatched the artifact in that anomaly and somehow made it out alive, and then… then I saw you buried under a pile of rocks. $J0L0
Alex Koldoba: It could have been me. But the Zone chose me today, and I wanted to do the right thing, like a decent human being. I’m sorry I couldn’t get your body out. It was just too dangerous. But at least I have your PDA. I’ll leave it here, by this cross. $J0L0
Alex Koldoba: Rest in peace.
sid_notes_EQ30_DobryakReturn_Note_hint: A stalker’s PDA left by a rock near the Ribs
sid_notes_EQ30_DobryakReturn_Note_name: A farewell message to a fallen stalker
sid_notes_EQ30_LuckyTicket_Note_body:
$J0L0Poltos: I found your lucky bolt. It was in the sleeping bag. I didn’t believe you back then… Sorry.
Poltos: I’ll leave it here so it’ll always be with you.
sid_notes_EQ30_LuckyTicket_Note_hint: PDA belonging to Lyova Reshka, who died at the Ribs
sid_notes_EQ30_RIPTitun_Note_body:
$J0L0Suvor: I’m so glad you died in that anomaly, you piece of shit! I hope you choked on my loot! $J0L0

$J0L0

$J0L0

$J0L0
sid_notes_EQ30_RIPTitun_Note_hint: A stalker’s PDA left near the Ribs
sid_notes_EQ35_LegendAdvice_body: $J0L0 I betcha it's not what you came here looking for. Still beats a bullet through your skull. The Legend's letting you go, so hit the road. And you better appreciate it, next time you won't be so lucky. $J0L0
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNoteVAlive_body:
$J0L0Snag: I’m hustling chumps at the Flea Market these days. Need some muscle.
Varan: My rates are still the same.
Snag: Cool. Just make sure your goons dress the part.
Varan: No problem. We just offed a couple of loners yesterday.
Snag: And make sure they call me “Lex the Legend.” Can’t let the act slip.
Snag: Yesterday, I had some nosy son of a bitch asking too many questions. I got out, but I’ve got this fucking feeling he’s not done bugging me. Send a couple more guys my way, just to be safe.
Varan: Fine. I’ll send one more, but that’s all you’re getting. You’re not exactly flush with cash. Chill out and head back. Don’t worry. You’re not big enough of a deal to have the whole Zone looking for you.
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNoteVAlive_head: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I could use some help here, Varan… </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNoteVAlive_hint: The Legend asks Varan for backup
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNoteVAlive_name: Lex the Legend’s chat with Varan
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNoteVDead_body:
$J0L0Snag: I’m hustling chumps at the Flea Market these days. Need some muscle.
Varan: My rates are still the same.
Snag: Cool. Just make sure your goons dress the part.
Varan: No problem. We just offed a couple of loners yesterday.
Snag: And make sure they call me “Lex the Legend.” Can’t let the act slip.
Snag: Yesterday, I had some nosy son of a bitch asking too many questions. I got out, but I’ve got this fucking feeling he’s not done bugging me. Send a couple more guys my way, just to be safe.
Snag: Varan, you there? Lost your PDA or something? Hellooo?
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNoteVDead_heade: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I could use some help here, Varan… </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNoteVDead_hint: The Legend asks Varan for backup
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNoteVDead_name: Lex the Legend’s chat with Varan
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNote_body:
$J0L0Snag: I’m hustling chumps at the Flea Market these days. Need some muscle.
Varan: My rates are still the same.
Snag: Cool. Just make sure your goons dress the part.
Varan: No problem. We just offed a couple of loners yesterday.
Snag: And make sure they call me “Lex the Legend.” Can’t let the act slip.
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNote_header: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I could use some help here, Varan… </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNote_hint: The Legend asks Varan for backup
sid_notes_EQ35_LehaLegendNote_name: Lex the Legend’s chat with Varan
sid_notes_EQ35_VolanNote_body:
$J0L0 Hi, Teacher. I spotted you near the Swamp streetcar with some sketchy guys the other day. If you’re in a bind, just holler – we’ve got your back.

P.S. Why were those thugs calling you “Snag,” if you don’t mind me asking? Just curious.
sid_notes_EQ35_VolanNote_hint: One of the Legend’s disciples is worried about his idol
sid_notes_EQ36_KucherNote_body:
$J0L0Ihor: You went to Tolik’s grave again, didn’t you?
Gena Hackman: Yeah.
Ihor: You gotta let him go. Let the whole thing go. It ain’t your fault he’s gone. You gotta find a way to move on, dude. I bet Tolik would want that.
Gena Hackman: You hitting the booze in there? Playing shrink now, are ya?
Ihor: Maybe a little. All right, let’s toast to Tolik’s memory with the boys. He was the real deal. Knew Strelok himself!
sid_notes_EQ36_KucherNote_hint: PDA from a stalker’s body at the Cemetery
sid_notes_EQ37_NoteFromGrom_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> May at least some of the victims of the First Raid find remembrance here. Mikha Sheepskin, Luther, Hollywood… rest in peace. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ37_NoteFromGrom_hint: Found at the mass grave by the Cage
sid_notes_EQ38_Note_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Energy drinks from decent folks. Take what you need, leave what you can. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ38_Note_hint: A paper note from the energy drink stash
sid_notes_EQ38_ThanksNotes_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Big shoutout for the energy drinks, pals. Saved me from dozing off for good in the Poppy Field. When I swing back with the loot, I’ll make sure to restock the stash. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ38_ThanksNotes_hint: A message from the milk truck stash
sid_notes_EQ38_ThanksNotes_name: Note from the Energy Drink Stash
sid_notes_EQ48_GiverNote_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> So, you like rummaging through other people’s stashes? You’ve sure been persistent enough to get this far. I get it. I was in your shoes once, but I’ve had my fill now. Take my stuff, and in return, do me a favor – put a good word in with the Zone for a former stalker. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ48_GiverNote_hint: Note from a stash at the Cordon
sid_notes_EQ51_TemaJetPDANote_body:
$J0L0Pvt. Pavlyuk: Hey there! Just sent over Zulu’s orders. Got your gear ready?
Pvt. Tymchenko: Locked and loaded! Let’s hit Kopachi first, then grab the stash.
Pvt. Pavlyuk: Nah, that won’t get us anywhere. I’ll snag the stash while you deal with Kopachi.
Pvt. Tymchenko: Wait, what? They’re both two-man jobs.
Pvt. Pavlyuk: You think we’re the only ones Zulu’s testing? The early bird gets the worm. All right, I’m off. See you back at base.
sid_notes_EQ51_TemaJetPDANote_hint: PDA from a Duty member’s body in Kopachi village
sid_notes_EQ52_PuzirPDANote_body:
$J0L0Shah: Think you can hide? Think again, motherfucker.
Shah: If you don’t cough it up, I’ll carve snowflakes out of your eyelids and dangle them on your window. You’ll be peering through the gaps to see where I strung your balls up.
sid_notes_EQ52_PuzirPDANote_hint: PDA of a bandit who died in the anomaly
sid_notes_EQ58_NotesAboutZombieFriend_bo:
$J0L07/16
Foster walked into a psi anomaly today and suffered significant exposure… Rostok was out of the question – he’s in rough shape, and they’d put him down on sight. So I brought him to the tunnel and gave him some meds. Fingers crossed he pulls through and doesn’t turn into a zombie. $J0L07/17
It didn’t work. Foster’s pale as a ghost, blank stare, doesn’t seem to recognize me anymore. He’s just pacing around, lashing out at me. I had to lock him up in a cage. Thought I’d put him out of his misery, but couldn’t bring myself to do it. And he keeps calling my name.
sid_notes_EQ60_NoteVovchik_body:
$J0L0Twine: Got everything squared away? Everyone’s hanging tight. We’re just waiting on you.
Koldyba: I’m still at the pig farm, sorting out my stash. I’ll be heading out soon.
Twine: Man, you’re slower than molasses in January! The crew’s getting restless. Hurry up, or we’ll leave Garbage without you.
sid_notes_EQ60_NoteVovchik_hint: PDA from a body found at the Pig Feedlot in Garbage
sid_notes_EQ62_MuhaNote_body:
$J0L0Tarragon: Tire’s freaking out. We really going through with this?
Fly: Calm your tits, I’ve got it under control. But I’m warning you, if anyone blabs, I’ll knock your teeth out!
Tarragon: Got it, mum’s the word. But you better sweet-talk them real good, or we’re toast.
sid_notes_EQ62_MuhaNote_hint: PDA of a gang boss killed near the railway tracks in Garbage
sid_notes_EQ64_MakisPDANote_body:
$J0L0Breadcrumb: I’ve run outta bullets.
Smiley: Don’t sweat it. I got extra.
Breadcrumb: I’m sick of this. We’re living like fucking hobos. No coupons, no crib. I came here to make bank, not rot away in the Lesser Zone.
Smiley: Chill. We’ll score big soon – get some loot, buy decent gear, head to Rostok. They say it’s the place to be. And we won’t have to deal with greenhorns no more.
Breadcrumb: Dude, we’re the greenhorns. Fine, whatever. I’m in.
sid_notes_EQ64_MakisPDANote_hint: Stalker’s PDA found in the southern part of the Lesser Zone
sid_notes_EQ65LosNote_body:
$J0L0Sidorovich: Leech’s looking for a sidekick to hit a stash. How convenient. Why don’t you volunteer?
Alex Moose: You for real, man? We’ve all had it with his crap. Might be nice to get away from his yapping for a bit.
Sidorovich: Remember what we talked about? Go with Leech, find out where he scored the cash for that fancy gun, and ask him about the IPSF. He’ll blather on about it, guaranteed.
Sidorovich: If my gut is right and he’s selling artifacts straight to the IPSF, you come back solo. If not, he lives. I’ll pay you either way.
Alex Moose: Well, I dunno about that… Not everyone’s cut out for the Zone, and that gun of his is calling my name.
Sidorovich: Your call. Just make sure to bring me his PDA. And keep your trap shut about our little deal.
sid_notes_EQ65LosNote_hint: Found on Moose’s PDA at the Elevator
sid_notes_EQ67_UraKotPDANote_body:
$J0L0Yura Cat: Titmouse! We’re screwed! Help! Monolith hit us hard and I’m hurt real bad.
Yura Cat: These freaks are nastier than ever… Nobody made it!
Yura Cat: Say something, damn it! I’m bleeding out over here!
Titmouse: I’m sorry.
Yura Cat: WTF? Get someone over here! The Monolith goons are gone. THEY’RE GONE!
sid_notes_EQ68_Order_for_Kubrak_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Pvt. Kubrak is hereby tasked with leading the cleanup of mutant-infested areas. Additionally, Pvt. Zhyvotko is assigned to this duty as disciplinary action for tardiness. Upon completion, a verbal report is to be delivered to Lt. Mateus at the base, with a written report to be submitted to Cpt. Shkarlat. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ68_Order_for_Kubrak_name: Pvt. Kubrak’s Orders to Eliminate Mutants
sid_notes_EQ70_DeadBodyNote_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Slick Dimon: </NoteBold><NoteDefault>Take four signs and put ’em up by that shack near the building. We’ll make a stash there. The rookies piss themselves anywhere near radiation, so they won’t touch it with a ten-foot pole. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_EQ70_DeadBodyNote_hint: PDA from the body of a rookie killed by Fleshes in the Lesser Zone
sid_notes_EQ70_DeadBodyNote_name: Message from a dead stalker’s PDA
sid_notes_EQ73_EdikBaskaPDANote_body:
$J0L0Docent: The Shah took our cut again. That’s three months in a row, dammit!
Edik the Dome: Same old, same old.
Edik the Dome: Still working for free, or are we already in the red?
Docent: Tomorrow, we’ll be back in the black.
Docent: Huron’s delivering the cargo to the Shah.
Docent: Time to set your plan in motion.
Edik the Dome: About time! Lend me a couple of guys to make an impression.
Edik the Dome: We’ll catch the courier early and take what’s ours.
Docent: Make sure to mask up, and take the goods straight to the boiler house.
Docent: No detours.
Edik the Dome: Relax. It’s gonna be smooth as silk!
sid_notes_EQ73_EdikBaskaPDANote_hint: Found at the scene of a gang fight in Garbage
sid_notes_EQ73_EdikBaskaPDANote_name: Chat from Edik the Dome’s PDA
sid_notes_EQ74_JitnichenkoNote_body:
$J0L0Smirnov: You’re overstepping, Zhytnychenko! Your ludicrous theories about anomalies transforming radionuclides into artifacts are not only groundless, but they also contradict my own research!
Zhytnychenko: I respect your findings, Professor, but I can’t discount my own observations. My hypothesis could offer insights into the true nature of anomalies!
Smirnov: Very well. I’ll greenlight your expedition to Garbage. Let’s put this “hypothesis” of yours to the test.
Zhytnychenko: Hold on, I didn’t request permission for an expedition!
Smirnov: Let’s just cut through the red tape and consider it granted in advance.
sid_notes_EQ74_JitnichenkoNote_hint: PDA from the body of a scientist in Garbage
sid_notes_EQ92_PDA_body:
$J0L0[18:28] Unknown: Any updates, stalker?
[18:29] Kiryukha: I found some intel on those guerrillas. Not too much – they keep things tight – but it’s as reliable as it gets!
[18:31] Unknown: Good. Shoot it over, we’ll vet it.
[18:32] Kiryukha: That’s not what we talked about! I take this directly to the commander, and he hooks me up with the Ward – that was our deal.
[18:41] Unknown: All right, I’ll arrange a meeting for you. With the commander. Tomorrow, 6 PM, at the tunnel.
[18:42] Kiryukha: Deal! $J0L0[17:50] Kiryukha: I’ll be there in a couple of minutes.
[17:51] Unknown: Hold tight. Like I said, I’ll be there.
[18:02] Kiryukha: So where are you?
sid_notes_EQ92_PDA_hint: PDA from a stalker’s body in the tunnel near the checkpoint
sid_notes_Engergetik_Telegraf_body:
$J0L0Telegraph: They called us all to the Palace, the only safe place left.
Telegraph: If "safe" is an option when it's Monolith we're talking about.
Telegraph: I thought Deggy was blowing it out of proportion, but it turns out he was sugar-coating it.
Telegraph: And that's just the beginning, I'm sure. This town is only quiet before a storm.
Harpy: Well, is your heart still beating? Got your gun?
Harpy: You only get to message me if you got a problem with either.
sid_notes_Engergetik_Telegraf_hint: Found at the Corps base in Prypiat
sid_notes_GDN_01_NotesForKort_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I told you there was someone out there, Squat! I saw a stalker, probably one o’ them loonies from Wild Island. Carrying something hefty – looked like a big score. I’ll stay put and keep tabs on him while you rally the crew. Just in case, you know. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_02_NotesWithWarning_body:
$J0L0 Don’t wait up. I sent you my location, but you’re better off outta here – this critter messed me up, so it’s sure gonna get you too. In case you got a death wish, take whatever you want. I won’t need it anyway.
Sure hope Scar wasn’t lying about the Shining Zone.
sid_notes_GDN_03_NotesForGuide_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> No comms here… Guess I’ll be talking to myself. When you told me about this pipe, why the hell didn’t you say it smells like Flesh ass? Who’s gonna let me into a bar stinking like this? Drinks are on you. Some guide you are, damn it. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_04_NotesAboutFishing_body:
$J0L0[09:21]: Should’ve set up a stash by the river to go on night runs.
[09:33]: That catfish sure as hell remembered me – every foggy morning, I can see it staring at me from the water.
[09:38]: That’s what drinking’ll do to ya. Freaking catfish, really? That water will make a Monolithian float belly up. If there were any left…
sid_notes_GDN_05_NotesAboutStash_P1_name: Note found on a body in the village
sid_notes_GDN_06_NotesAboutStash_P2_name: Note found on a body near the Marshes
sid_notes_GDN_07_NotesAboutStash_P3_name: Note found on a body inside the Popper
sid_notes_GDN_08_NotesMercenaries_body:
$J0L0[12:24]: Got anything?
[12:36]: Not really. All quiet on the bridge, but I did scare the crap outta this stalker. He told me all about his sweet stash.
[12:36]: Near the cliff, left of the bridge. Can’t check it out myself. Gotta keep a low profile.
[12:52]: Gotcha. We’ll swing by on the next raid and get it.
sid_notes_GDN_08_NotesMercenaries_name: Mercs chatting about some sweet loot
sid_notes_GDN_100_NotesAboutGarbage_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> You’re digging in the wrong place, stalker. Look at this pile of garbage. Isn’t it beautiful? There’s something amazing in there, right? That’s what everyone’s thinking, yeah. You gotta be smarter than that. Look for a dig site. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_101_NotesBanditsTalk_body:
$J0L0[15:18]: He kept babbling about how he knew all the shortcuts around here.
[15:18]: He shut up real quick when he took a tumble off the crossing. By the way, your cut’s stashed under the mattress, same as always.
[15:19]: But that little piece of… Anyway, catch you later.
sid_notes_GDN_102_NotesAboutOmen_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[11:20]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Here's some folk wisdom for you: don’t go turning left three times, or the evil eye might get you. If you stumble upon someone under a bridge, offer up some loot or toss it way up. And no whistling at night if you want any chance of finding artifacts. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_103_NotesAboutContract_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Laying it all on Freedom isn’t fair, Alex. They might not be the friendliest bunch, but who in the Zone is? If you’ve got the cash, they’ll do what you need. Guns, a ride to Rostok – they’ve got you covered. Just don’t cause trouble at the checkpoint. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_108_NotesAboutDetector_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[20:19]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Have you lost your damn mind, snagging my detector without a word, Deadly? I busted my ass for a month to scrape up enough for it. Next time we cross paths, you won’t be Deadly anymore – you’ll just be dead. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_109_NotesNewbieTalk_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[17:06]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Come find me in Zalissya when you’ve had your fill of being Sidorovich’s flunky, Zinger. Look for the path northwest of the village. Don’t forget your backpack – I stashed some supplies along the way. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_110_NotesGoToDepo_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[14:47]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> So, sonny, you decided to try your chances in the Zone on your own? Fair enough, and good for you. Don’t work your ass off for Sidorovich. I stashed some proper loot in Garbage, near the Depot. Take it. It should be enough to get you started. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_111_NotesForIgor_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> You have to get out of this shitty business, Ihor. I’ve got a good job for you at Rostok. Do you remember how you shared your last loaf of bread with me when I lost my finger? Well, I never forgot that. You’ll find everything for the masquerade next to the vehicles. Be sure to pull it out with both hands. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_117_NotesAboutTunnel_body:
$J0L0[07:19]: Got a bit of a problem here.
[07:19]: I don’t get it. I looked everywhere, but there’s no power switch. I can’t get the ladder down without it.
[07:20]: Must be somewhere below, but I’m not going down there. That slurping sound is freaking me out.
sid_notes_GDN_117_NotesAboutTunnel_name: Chat between Guys Stuck in the Tunnel
sid_notes_GDN_122_NotesForDen_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Dan, I can see the loot from the opposite window, but the door to the apartment is locked. There’s something in there. I can hear scratching. If you manage to get anything of value, bring it straight to the Palace. We’re almost out of supplies. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_123_NotesAboutSenyaDeath_b:
$J0L0[04:59]: Fuck my life. Senyok got himself blown to pieces, and all his loot got thrown onto a balcony.
[05:00]: As soon as you get back from patrol, go to these coordinates. Gotta find a way to get that loot.
[05:11]: I’m getting some movement on the roof. I’ll see who it is and get back to you.
sid_notes_GDN_128_NotesAboutCat_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[01:33]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> You’re never gonna believe this. I’ve been seeing a cat dragging random trash into the red garage. I was just laughing at the stupid thing, but yesterday, I saw it dragging a bag of loot! I guess we should go see what else it might have. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_128_NotesAboutCat_name: Message about a Cat in the Garage
sid_notes_GDN_129_NotesAboutAutotunnel_b: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[00:45]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Mission complete, Commander. We lost two men, and one is heavily wounded. We’re on the move to Wild Territory. Restocking from our stash in the Automotive Tunnel on the way. I’ll report as soon as we get there. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_131_NotesAboutSandpit_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Sheepy, rally your men and head to Zaton. Report as soon as you get there. Get a gun and some ammo from the stash at the Sand Mine on your way. And don’t you dare touch anything else in that stash! </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_132_NotesAboutGiantMunant_: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[23:09]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> I’m alive! Picture this: I’m holed up in the Village, waiting out the rain, when suddenly, there’s a rumble. It felt like an earthquake! I bolt outside, and there’s this colossal monster! I barely got away. Too bad I left my backpack with loot back at the house. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_134_NotesAboutLeshchyna_bo:
$J0L0Destination: Lishchyna.
Cargo: Medical supplies.

Note. Keep the key to the safe in the truck with you at all times.
sid_notes_GDN_135_NotesAboutPahan_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[08:06]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> I gotta meet with the boss. He said he’s gonna make me dig my own grave if I don’t settle my debt. Hold on to the stash key for now. See you at the parking lot. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_135_NotesAboutPahan_name: Part of a Chat between Two Bandits from the Burnt Forest
sid_notes_GDN_136_NotesAboutCherevach_bo:
$J0L0[08:06]: I gotta meet with the boss. He said he’s gonna make me dig my own grave if I don’t settle my debt. Hold on to the stash key for now. See you at the parking lot.
[12:43]: I’ll keep the key, but if you don’t show up tomorrow, I’m helping myself to your loot. I know it’s tucked away in your place in Cherevach.
sid_notes_GDN_136_NotesAboutCherevach_na: Chat between Two Bandits from the Burnt Forest
sid_notes_GDN_140_NotesAboutSafe_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Take the safe to our spot in the room behind the theater stage. Don’t forget to change the code. Tweak it like you usually do, and I’ll figure it out. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_140_NotesAboutSafe_name: Note from a Corpse in Lab X15
sid_notes_GDN_141_NotesForSanya_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Sanya, there are </NoteDefault><NoteBold>eighteen</NoteBold><NoteDefault> dead bodies here, </NoteDefault><NoteBold>six</NoteBold><NoteDefault> of them with claw wounds. I don’t know what tore them apart like that, but </NoteDefault><NoteBold>one</NoteBold><NoteDefault> thing is clear: you shouldn’t be going out alone at night. But I guess you’ve already figured that out. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_141_NotesForSanya_name: Note from a Corpse in the Fairytale Pioneer Camp
sid_notes_GDN_144_VistaNote1_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Start with this tower, like we agreed. I didn’t climb the balloon, so you better not. Catch up at the second mark. Wanna scout all these heights in a month. Hurry up – it’s freaking scary out here. I’m not gonna wait. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_144_VistaNote1_name: Note from a comms tower in Zalissya
sid_notes_GDN_145_VistaNote2_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Who’d have thought these bastards can run so fast. Barely got away. If you spot a boar, climb somewhere high up – running ain’t gonna save you. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_146_VistaNote3_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> This is a real birds-eye view. I told you this would be better than back home. You better catch up! </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_146_VistaNote3_name: Note from the top of the elevator
sid_notes_GDN_147_VistaNote4_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> This place is full of shitheads: tried to shoot me, but no dice. Keep your head on a swivel, lock and load. Good thing we were trained for this. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_147_VistaNote4_name: Note found at a port crane
sid_notes_GDN_148_VistaNote5_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Found a pretty cool gun on this poor grunt, and he won’t be needing it anyway. I’ll keep it. Might come in handy. Long time no see – I’m worried about you. Find me at the local hub. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_148_VistaNote5_name: Note found next to a gun
sid_notes_GDN_149_VistaNote6_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> While I was chilling here, I saw a Flesh torn apart in a whirligig. Always watch your step, my friend. You still gotta catch up. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_14_NotesFromCorpse_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Hey, do you even read my messages? Folks say nobody’s going beyond the Firebreath except for zombies and cats. What a load of crap! I heard gunfire myself when I passed by the train. Someone’s poking around out there, I tell ya! And if there’s someone, there’s gotta be loot. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_14_NotesFromCorpse_name: Note from a Corpse near an Anomaly
sid_notes_GDN_150_VistaNote7_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Barely made it up here. Met some seasoned stalkers, and they shared a lot about Zone life. I’ll tell you all about it when we meet. Now you gotta catch up with me. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_150_VistaNote7_name: Note from the Slag Heap sky deck
sid_notes_GDN_151_VistaNote8_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> You’ll have to get through the anomalies to reach the stash. Those bolts will come in handy. Never thought we’d make some money here. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_152_VistaNote9_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> There’s an anomaly up on the pipe. No way to climb it. I’ll wait for you near the stash. Stalker, whoever you are: if you made it all the way up here, we, K. and L., left this stash for you. This sunset view should be rewarding enough, but still. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_153_VistaNote10_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Lots of Monolithians on the way to the stash – tread carefully, my friend. Those fanatics shoot first and talk later. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_153_VistaNote10_name: Note on the way to a stash
sid_notes_GDN_154_VistaNote11_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> The view here is incredible. Take a breather, grab a bite. Always someone shooting down there, so run to the stash when it quiets down. You know what I mean… </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_155_VistaNote12_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> There’s a bunch of loners chilling by the stash, so you can catch your breath, but be careful: if the fire’s out, that means there’s mutants. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_156_VistaNote13_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> You can see all of Prypiat from up here – it’s just fascinating. Oh, by the way, there are zombies near the stash. Before the grand finale, let the rookies have their moment. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_156_VistaNote13_name: Note from up top outside of Prypiat
sid_notes_GDN_157_VistaNote14_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Now the final step – the Sarcophagus pipe. I know you won’t like it, but I’ve climbed every building in the Zone. I can do it, totally. I’ll see you at the bar once I do this. You better get the party drinks ready! </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_157_VistaNote14_name: Note from the Prypiat panoramic view spot
sid_notes_GDN_17_NotesForKlers_body:
$J0L0 Hey Molasses, scribbling this just in case we don’t come back. Caught bandits from the tunnel on the radio yapping about stashing loot in a safe. We’re heading there tonight.
If you’re reading this, either we’re toast, or we decided to cut you out, loser.
sid_notes_GDN_18_NotesValediction_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Rest in peace, Whisker. You were one hell of a stalker. Been to the Ahroprom underground, to Prypiat, and died here, at the Cordon. Got right back where you started. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_23_NotesAboutEnergyDrink_b: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Medic, my ass! Doctors are all full of crap. Mainland doctors, Zone doctors, same shit. Lay off those energy drinks, you’ll have a heart attack, blah blah blah… Almost botched my trip past the Boundary. Spirit doesn’t have all day… All right. Just need one more for the road, and then I’m off. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_23_NotesAboutEnergyDrink_n: Note from the Corpse of an Energy Drink Addict
sid_notes_GDN_24_NotesAboutEmission_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Guess what? Everything went down just like you said: I bet a crate of vodka that I’d ride the Emission out here, and those morons fell for it. Have the snacks ready. I’m not stupid – I’ll sneak into a proper shelter when they’re not looking. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_25_NotesAboutMarks_body:
$J0L0 Markers by the garages.
You were right, Goose. And I was wrong. Pretty stupid, eh?
Markers by the garages.
sid_notes_GDN_26_NotesAboutSafe_P1_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Package secured in the deserted barracks safe. Split the safe combination among myself, the private, and the sergeant to safeguard it. My part is 26. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_27_NotesAboutSafe_P2_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Gotta keep that code in my head. It’s 57. Hope the private’s holding up out there. Starting to lose it myself. Remember – 57. Don’t forget! </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_28_NotesAboutSafe_P3_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> They sure as hell ditched me here. Said they were off on recon… as if I’d buy that. Damn bastards. Semchenko, if you’re reading this, head straight to the colonel. And just in case, the code is 19. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_29_NotesGlobalStash_P0_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> You were right, you know. Fuck the Zone. I was the </NoteDefault><NoteBold>first</NoteBold><NoteDefault> here, and now I’m the only </NoteDefault><NoteBold>one</NoteBold><NoteDefault> left standing. I drank to your memory. Here comes the Emission, damn it all. My loot, my PDA, everything. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_30_NotesGlobalStash_P1_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Already into day </NoteDefault><NoteBold>two</NoteBold><NoteDefault>, and it’s still radio silence. Who’s gonna read this, anyway? Unless someone finds me here somehow. I had </NoteDefault><NoteBold>three</NoteBold><NoteDefault> buddies, but when push came to shove, they were gone. Friendship ain’t got no place here. Nor do decent folks. Just assholes. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_31_NotesGlobalStash_P2_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault>Ha! You hear me, you swampy piece of shit? I said my </NoteDefault><NoteBold>third</NoteBold><NoteDefault> run would be a hit! And you were like, “What the hell are you thinking?” Yeah, I’ve only got grub for </NoteDefault><NoteBold>two</NoteBold><NoteDefault> days, and some asshole cleaned out my stash, but I’ve scored enough loot to stock three stashes this size.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_31_NotesGlobalStash_P2_nam: Stalker’s Note about a Successful Run
sid_notes_GDN_32_NotesGlobalStash_P3_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Four</NoteBold><NoteDefault> freaking days I’ve been stuck here, and those bloodsuckers won’t piss off. And you still won’t show up, will you, you piece of shit? Think you can take my loot, Mole? Screw you! I’ve got </NoteDefault><NoteBold>six</NoteBold><NoteDefault> spare mags – enough to deal with all of you! </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_33_NotesGlobalStash_P4_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Okay, Needle. You called it. It’s been </NoteDefault><NoteBold>five</NoteBold><NoteDefault> days now, and those damn dogs are still on my tail. I look around and nobody’s there, but I swear, out the corner of my eye, I see </NoteDefault><NoteBold>three</NoteBold><NoteDefault> dogs every damn time. Guess it’s time to lay off the vodka. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_34_NotesGlobalStash_P5_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Damn it, Rotgut, I’m stranded up on the tower. Boars got me cornered, ammo’s gone, and the signal’s crap. Get over here and lend a hand. Maybe they’ll clear out by morning – I’m stuck here for the night either way. </NoteDefault><NoteBold>One</NoteBold><NoteDefault> sheep, </NoteDefault><NoteBold>two</NoteBold><NoteDefault> sheep… </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_35_NotesGlobalStash_P6_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Harry, you’ve got </NoteDefault><NoteBold>seven</NoteBold><NoteDefault> fucking days to settle your debt. Think fast, or prepare for what’s coming. We’re not known for giving </NoteDefault><NoteBold>second</NoteBold><NoteDefault> chances. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_36_NotesGlobalStash_P7_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I’ve had enough of your life lessons. I didn’t leave the Mainland for this. I brought back </NoteDefault><NoteBold>eight</NoteBold><NoteDefault> artifacts from my last run, just ask the guys! The Zone’s taught me one thing: even when you’re knee-deep in shit, there are always </NoteDefault><NoteBold>two</NoteBold><NoteDefault> ways out. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_37_NotesBadIdea_body:
$J0L0[18:32]: Why is there a damn tornado here? What’s next, a tsunami?! At least it’s not raining fire, thank goodness!
[18:34]: Quit whining. Wherever you got anomalies, you also got artifacts, right?
[18:35]: Yeah, I get it. I should check it out, but it’s giving me the creeps.
[18:40]: I’ll try sneaking into the center. It looks calmer there. I’ll message you when I’m done.
[19:30]: How’s it going?
[22:00]: Hey, you holding up okay?
sid_notes_GDN_39_NotesForSkat_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> No dice, Stingray. I’m not buying that those soldiers aren’t snagging valuable stuff under the table. I saw a lieutenant sneaking across the training grounds with a hefty backpack last night. That loot’s better off with me anyway! Just gotta wait for the right moment to slip in unnoticed. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_40_NotesForGars_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Enough’s enough, Hars. I’m beat. It’s off to the swamps for me. The guy at the bar spilled the beans on how to dodge the checkpoint search: just shut your Geiger counter off and slip through the gap after dark. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_41_NotesMilitaryLife_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Wolf to Tiger. Eagle out, repeat, Eagle out. Taking position. Over. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Wolf, this is Tiger. Roger that. Finishing my patrol and heading back with the snacks. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_42_NotesObservation_body: $J0L0<NoteBody> <NoteDefault>Observation log #56:</NoteDefault> </NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody> <NoteDefault>These aren’t your ordinary wild dogs. They exhibit a clear hierarchy and mark the northern territory deliberately. They should’ve thought twice before kicking me out of college!</NoteDefault> </NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_43_NotesBanditsAccounting_:
$J0L0 Riffraff, putz: sawed-off shotgun.
Grizzle, putz: two mags.
Uncle: solid guy, I let him in for free.
Fatso, putz: didn’t pay, got the boot.
Emissions are our gravy train. They’re the best time to fleece suckers for coupons.
sid_notes_GDN_46_NotesGiftOnCrane_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[16:34]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Fuck, I can’t take this anymore! Vitalyk’s at it again. He knows damn well I’m scared shitless of heights, but he still stashes our loot way up on that damn hill. “It’s nothing,” he says, “just walk over the crane. I left a little surprise for you there.” Nah… once this gig is over, I’m telling him to shove it. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_46_NotesGiftOnCrane_name: Notes from a Stalker with a Fear of Heights
sid_notes_GDN_47_NotesPasswordPuzzle_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[11:28] </NoteBold><NoteDefault>The password is 03079_. I’ve got the cash, and now I’m off to explore the </NoteDefault><NoteBold>four</NoteBold><NoteDefault> corners of the earth. You’re not stupid, so you can figure out the final digit. And if you can’t, that’s on you. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_50_NotesStalkerDelirium_bo:
$J0L0[15:37]: Imagine if moles mutated, eh? We’d put ’em to work digging for us. With a whole pack of ’em, we’d find every underground stash!
[15:39]: Yeah, right. You can’t even get yourself to do any digging, let alone a mole. The only thing you can find is the bar. Now stop hogging the line.
sid_notes_GDN_50_NotesStalkerDelirium_na: Musings of a Stalker with Delirium Tremens
sid_notes_GDN_54_NotesAboutArmor_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[07:16]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> They’ll stash the gear south, by the edge of the forest. Just gotta scrounge up an artifact to cover the cost. Can’t wait to slip into those duds and finally feel like a proper stalker! </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_54_NotesAboutArmor_name: Notes about a Deal with Smugglers
sid_notes_GDN_55_NotesAboutStimulants_bo:
$J0L0[11:47]: Too bad Yurchik got himself killed in an anomaly. Still, his loot shouldn’t go to waste.
[11:54]: Yeah, he was into herbs and stuff, so a greenhouse is a good place to look for his stash. There’s one marked on this map, but how do we get past the patrol?
sid_notes_GDN_56_NotesParanoiaAboutBees_:
$J0L0 Note 443, from 01/09/21$J0L0 It’s hard to believe, but the darn bees stole my candy again. Do the bloody bugs even realize how hard those things are to come by?
Never mind. They won’t get to my stash this time. I’ll hide it under something heavy. Something their tiny little legs can’t lift.
sid_notes_GDN_57_NotesArtifactTheory_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I told the kids about my hypothesis, and they laughed in my face. They don’t know a damn thing. They just poke anomalies blindly with their gadgets, and that’s pretty much all they can do. Let’s see who’s laughing when I come back with artifacts after the next Emission. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_57_NotesArtifactTheory_nam: Note on an Innovative Approach to Artifact Acquisition
sid_notes_GDN_58_NotesThoughtsOnRiver_bo: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[11:40] </NoteBold><NoteDefault>The sarge is eager to go back to the Mainland and keeps bitching about them not letting him. He says it stinks here. But look at the river, the beauty of it all… It’s got some rads in it, sure, but you can get used to it. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_58_NotesThoughtsOnRiver_na: Soldier’s Thoughts on the Uzh River
sid_notes_GDN_60_NotesNewShelter_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[02:57]</NoteBold><NoteDefault>: I found us a new shelter, a good one. And you doubted me! It’s all empty, and the place looks solid. We’ll drag a couple of barrels inside, make ourselves a little fire, and get all nice and cozy! </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_60_NotesNewShelter_name: Happy Note about a New Shelter
sid_notes_GDN_63_NotesRendezvous_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[15:30]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Oh, come on! Don’t be such a buzzkill! The boys will be so happy to see you. It’s not that far, and it’s a real sweet spot. Come on, bring some snacks and booze – a bottle or two will do it. Or maybe three. Three is always better. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_64_NotesArtifactInAir_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[07:14] </NoteBold><NoteDefault> I mean it’s like floating in midair, can you believe it? Gives off rads like a bitch, though. Too scary to go for it, drunk or not. You said you had some anti-rad, right? Get it ready. I’m coming soon. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_67_NotesWhereIsMyStash_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[04:37] </NoteBold><NoteDefault>Hey, Vitya! Come in! Where’s the damn bird with my loot? I’m in Wild Territory, right? I’m sure I am! I couldn’t have gotten THAT drunk! Right? </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_70_NotesAboutLimanskRoad_b: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[19:58]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Come on, it’s gonna be okay! By the look of it, it’s not that hard to get there. A couple of jumps, pull yourself up the edge, and that’s it. Just gotta avoid falling in the water, that’s all. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_70_NotesAboutLimanskRoad_n: Stalker’s Thoughts about the Road to Limansk
sid_notes_GDN_73_NotesSecretStash_body:
$J0L0[04:24]: So where the hell’s that secret stash of yours? I looked everywhere and couldn’t find it!
[04:44]: Search the quarry. I’m giving you the exact same info I got. And mind you, I’m giving it to you for free.
sid_notes_GDN_75_NotesAboutMine_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[14:11]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> There’s nothing good left here. Heading for the mine tomorrow. That place has gotta be warmer and easier to defend. There might be even some bandit loot left. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_75_NotesAboutMine_name: Stalker’s Thoughts Before Heading for the Mine
sid_notes_GDN_77_StashInCamp_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> If you find this stash, be a good Stalker and don’t touch it. It’s for emergencies. You never know what could be lurking in these woods... so if you take something, be sure to leave a replacement later. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_78_NotesAboutGraveFinding_:
$J0L0[09:45]: There was no point coming here. That wooden cross must have rotted away or something. I can’t find the grave.
[09:47]: Or maybe it was the dogs.
[09:50]: Screw you!
Stalker’s Notes about Searching for a Grave
sid_notes_GDN_80_NotesAboutTruck_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[04:37]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> That’s it, okay? I’m so fucking done! There’s no way in hell I can get this fucking truck to start! Three years of my life I wasted on this damn wreck! Brought parts for it from all over the Zone! And they’re all either faulty, or radioactive, or both!  </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_80_NotesAboutTruck_name: Bandit’s Note about Repairing a Truck
sid_notes_GDN_81_NotesAboutBloodsucker_b: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[04:37]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> So that’s the way it goes, brother. I’m royally fucked. They used to lock up bandits here to keep civilians safe… and now it’s my place to hide, hoping against hope that this bloodthirsty beast won’t get to me. If I escape in one piece, I’ll start a new life. I swear on my dear Mom’s memory!  </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_82_NotesAboutTheft_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[14:17]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Some bastard went through my stash. Can you believe it? Nothing’s missing, though – they just screwed off some random bit of my car. Lunatics. Who would even want that trash?  </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_83_NotesNewHut_body: $J0L0<NoteBody> <NoteDefault>Hey, Vovan! You won’t believe the setup the boys have here! Yeah, we lost Gray in the process of, uh… evicting the previous tenants, but he was a drag anyway. So swing by for the send-off.</NoteDefault> </NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_87_NotesStupidDeath_body:
$J0L0[02:10]: Where the hell are you, Coarse?
[02:10]: Trying to mark your territory across the whole damn campsite?
[02:11]: Shit, I told you it was a lousy spot, but no, you had to bed down right by the anomalies…
sid_notes_GDN_87_NotesStupidDeath_name: Bandit’s Chat with a Missing Buddy
sid_notes_GDN_88_NotesBanditGambling_bod: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[11:22]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> It’s done. We carved that cheat up, just like we said we would. “I’m just lucky” this and “the Zone’s on my side,” that. Yeah, right! We’ve seen his kind before. Now the problem is I’ve got no clue where that punk stashed his winnings. No worries. I’ll have the boys turn the place upside down. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_88_NotesBanditGambling_nam: Bandit’s Notes about Games of Chance
sid_notes_GDN_89_NotesAngryRookie_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[03:19]</NoteBold><NoteDefault> I saw your face, fucker. Don’t even think I won’t recognize you! And I’ll get out of this cave, mark my words. Come morning, I’ll crawl out, find you, and gut you. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_89_NotesAngryRookie_name: Note from a Stalker Abandoned in a Cave
sid_notes_GDN_90_NotesWoundedRookie_body:
$J0L0[01:12]: We drove the dogs out. We’re close to Zalissya, but the rookie got bitten. He can hardly walk. We have to make a decision.
[01:17]: Bring him here. Mykolayich will see what he can do.
[01:17]: Tell me you saw it.
[01:29]: I did. I saw a bloodsucker.
[01:30]: Damn. Are you two out of there?
[01:40]: I am, yeah.
sid_notes_GDN_93_NotesCowboy_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I’m setting off with some kid from Freedom to find boars. He says his folks were cowboys, so he’s betting he can ride the beast. If I don’t make it back, here’s some slugs to cool the kid off. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_GDN_93_NotesCowboy_name: Note about a Bet between Stalkers
sid_notes_GDN_96_NotesAboutFleshWalking_:
$J0L0 So here’s the deal, rookie: Fleshes are easy to herd – no need for a leash or loud noises, just keep whistling softly, and they’ll find their way. They’re smart.
If you’re tired, bring them inside. I left their favorite food there.
sid_notes_GDN_99_NotesOnMeadow_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> You’re as good as your word. I appreciate that. Got a table waiting for you, just like back on the Mainland – the fanciest spot in the Zone. If you need more gigs, you know where to find me. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_Himzavod_Hub_Note_1_body:
$J0L0Report on sanitary casualties in the Ward.
Following the full implementation of the Guardian training program, there has been a significant decrease in casualties among personnel, dropping from sixteen last month to just nine this month.
Natural factors within the Zone still account for the majority of injuries and fatalities. Anomalous activity ranks highest in the overall statistics.
I believe it’s imperative to continue with the program.
However, Colonel, I strongly advise we consider enlisting a stalker instructor. It’s evident our soldiers lack practical survival skills in the Zone.
sid_notes_Himzavod_Hub_Note_1_hint: A classified medical report for Korshunov
sid_notes_Himzavod_Hub_Note_2_body:
$J0L0 I’ve got a few Sevas in stock. We can use them until we sort out our supply chain issues.
Naturally, I’ve reinforced their armor. These suits were salvaged from the stalkers who occupied the Chemical Plant before us. They had quite the stockpile of research equipment.
They even had spare parts for the suits. I took any extras from the gear they had on, too, as I thought it might come in handy. Fortunately, those stalkers were taken out cleanly, so there weren’t many holes.
So, what do you think?
sid_notes_Himzavod_Hub_Note_2_hint: A proposal addressing the body armor shortage
sid_notes_Himzavod_Hub_Note_2_name: Note from a Chemical Plant Tech to Maj. Dvoryankov
sid_notes_Himzavod_Hub_Note_AgathaToKors: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault>Don't be surprised by the changes in the decor, Colonel. It is a gift. Remember how we talked about how important decisions need a fitting backdrop?</NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_Himzavod_Hub_Note_LevaFan_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Lyova Fan:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Got anything good for me, pal?</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Danya Squirrel</NoteBold><NoteDefault>: I changed my mind. I'm out.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Lyova Fan</NoteBold><NoteDefault>: Sure about that?</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Danya Squirrel</NoteBold><NoteDefault>: Coupons ain't worth it. I don't wanna be a snitch.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Lyova Fan</NoteBold><NoteDefault>: You got it wrong. You have no choice. Get the list to me tonight, or wait for a slug to catch.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_Himzavod_Hub_Note_ScientistsWh: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Professor Strumylo:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> I would like to express the outrage shared by the research personnel, signed below, caused by the conditions of our tenure at the "Chemical Plant". We were promised that it was a temporary measure, however, we have been here for several days already, and you have not reacted to a single concern we have expressed.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Professor Strumylo:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> But most importantly, you have personally guaranteed us full safety from the Zone at the Institute premises! Take action immediately, or we will make sure the global scientific community will know how you treat people.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Professor Strumylo: </NoteBold><NoteDefault>Make no mistake, no respectable scientist will ever want to work with you.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Doctor Dalin:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> No respectable scientist will ever put his own comfort above science itself. Quit complaining and do your job.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>
Professor Strumylo's chat with Doctor Dalin
sid_notes_IKAR_Hub_Note_BigLandChat_body:
$J0L0[September]
This message may be delivered a long time from now. It will probably be useless to answer, the tech says it's a separate network here. But I don't want to leave having said nothing.$J0L0I'm in the Zone.$J0L0You will have to trust me when I say I'm ready for this. Wait for me, I'll be back in a year, with trophies.$J0L0
$J0L0[December]
I know it's been a while since you heard from me, but I'm alive. Exhausted, though. It is impossible to sleep through the night here. I'm starting to understand what they meant, when those who came back said this place is eating you from the inside. People start acting... different.$J0L0Looks like we got new pills. Maybe, these will help. I can feel something growing inside of me.$J0L0I hope I'll come home soon.

$J0L0[March]
I won't be back. I'm sorry, I can't bring this back with me. I can feel it in my bones, and no matter how hard I try to wash it off, the smell is still on me. I have to stay here.$J0L0Tell Mom I love her. You were right, all of you.
sid_notes_Ikar_Note_Batalov_Desperate_bo: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault>Please excuse my breaking the chain of command and going over Senkevych's head, but I see no other option. I would like to report that our patient headcount is catastrophic. The infirmary is packed. So is the main building. I am forced to pretend these kinds of mental disorders are common in this place, but not even Kryvenko knows what is going on here, despite his efforts to persuade me otherwise.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault>I am not even certain Icarus has any soldiers fit to fight.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault>SIRCAA does nothing. I am doing whatever I can, but it's not enough. My only hope is you, Colonel. I am asking you to take immediate action.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_Ikar_Note_Krivenko_ToLeskiv_bo: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault>… and, despite your skepsis, Mrs. Leshkiv, psi-immunity turned out to be no less complicated than the regular human immune system. Just as complex. I was able to confirm my theory, stating that practically every component may be weakened or enhanced, similarly to a regular immune mechanism. Right now, I am finding proof that even short-term influence...</NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_LeshiyNote_body:
$J0L0Varan: I’ve got a job only a pro like you can handle, Leshy.
Varan: You’re taking out Elbow.
Leshy: You want me to off a big shot? And paint a bullseye on my back?
Varan: Smart men always open the door when opportunity knocks.
Varan: Check the pay. And consider the prospects.
Leshy: I see the pay. But the prospects aren’t anything special.
Varan: I’ve always admired people who know how to haggle.
Leshy: All right. That sounds more like it. Give me a week.
sid_notes_LeshiyNote_hint: Taken from a mercenary killed at the Supply Depot
sid_notes_MaksSubbotaPDANote_body:
$J0L0Max Saturday: I need help.
Max Saturday: We ran into a Monolithian. Everybody’s dead.
Dew: What the fuck? What happened?
Max Saturday: The bastard grabbed Mastiff… to make a zombie out of him. I need backup. Please! I’ll owe you big time.
Max Saturday: Why aren’t you saying anything?
Max Saturday: This is urgent! Remember the place the Gaffer mentioned? I think that’s where he went.
Dew: Hold tight. I’m on my way. The fucker’s gonna pay for everything.
sid_notes_MaksSubbotaPDANote_hint: Chat on Max Saturday’s (Mastiff’s squad) PDA
sid_notes_Malahit_Hub_Note_1_body:
$J0L0 Your job is to manage inventory, not determine which experiments are appropriate.
My requests are to be fulfilled promptly and with no questions asked. $J0L0 Let’s make sure this doesn’t happen again.
sid_notes_Malahit_Hub_Note_1_hint: A message from Professor Ozersky to Viktoria Dorozhnyuk
sid_notes_Malahit_Hub_Note_2_body:
$J0L0 After carefully assessing your CV, I must inform you that we are unable to offer you a position.
Here at SIRCAA, we seek out only the most promising scientists, and, unfortunately, your previous work has not met the criteria set by myself, my colleagues, and the project manager.
sid_notes_Malahit_Hub_Note_2_hint: A document found at the Malachite facility
sid_notes_Malahit_Hub_Note_2_name: Reply to a Request for Cooperation
sid_notes_Malahit_PDA_body:
$J0L0 Dear Dr. Dorozhnyuk, your responsibility is to manage inventory, not determine which experiments are appropriate.
My requests are to be fulfilled promptly and with no questions asked.
Let’s make sure this doesn’t happen again.
sid_notes_Malahit_PDA_hint: Viktoria Dorozhnyuk’s PDA found at the Malachite facility
sid_notes_PDA_Skif_Background_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> Out of the frying pan and into the fire! </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I returned after three years of service in real hell to cool off, quietly trading ‘dummies’ – the cheapest artifacts, burnt out after being taken out of the Zone by some lucky stalkers, drinking in my smoke-filled apartment, and staring at the TV as if it were a window. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> And everything seemed to be going according to plan until my flat got blown to smithereens one night. An anomaly. Right in my kitchen. It wrecked the little I had and left behind another ‘dummy.’ Only this time, it was different. A special anomaly, a special dummy, and, if a certain Hermann is to be believed, special money if I manage to recharge it with his scientific gadget. The catch is, I’ll have to venture into the Zone to do it. </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I’ve heard enough stories to avoid the Zone at all costs, but it decided to reach out to me. Well, it’s time to pay a visit. Could it get any worse? As my demoted commander said: “If you’re born to hang, you’ll never drown.” </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_Prypat_NoteFromUnknown2_body:
$J0L0 The Monolithians couldn’t care less about Emissions, and the Emissions couldn’t care less about your so-called protection. The major was a good man, but I’m at a loss as to where he scavenged that spacesuit from or what he was thinking when he put it on and walked into that Emission for “recon.”
Don’t waste your time looking for him. As the saying goes, ashes to ashes.
sid_notes_Prypat_NoteFromUnknown2_hint: Message to the Palace of Culture
sid_notes_Prypat_NoteFromUnknown_body:
$J0L0 You saw the writing on the wall, and so did I. The Monolith ain’t going nowhere, and we’re not getting any younger. In a way, it’s ironic – we basically ended up replacing them. But now our watch is over, Colonel.
Let your men go while there’s still someone left to walk away.
sid_notes_RSQ01_NewbieNotes2_body:
$J0L0 Don’t worry about me, okay? It’s not as scary as you think. They even helped me out with some gear in Zalissya – for a small cut, but still. And I’ve already found my first artifact! It’s called a Meat Chunk. Tell Dad I’ll get the money soon. There’ll be enough for his treatment, and for the roof repairs, and for golden earrings. The ones you liked at that store, remember?
I love you so much! I’ll be home soon!
sid_notes_RSQ01_NewbieNotes2_name: Message to a Missing Stalker’s Mom
sid_notes_RSQ01_NewbieNotes3_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[01.45]:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Where are you? </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[01.50]:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Come on, man, don’t be an idiot! Come back – it’s getting dark! </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[02.24]:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> I was just kidding! It was a joke, okay? Didn’t you get it?! </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[04.15]:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> Hey! Look at your PDA, you goddamn moron! </NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>[12.35]:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> You’re not coming back, are you? </NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_RSQ01_NewbieNotes3_hint: Chat on a missing stalker’s PDA
sid_notes_RSQ01_NewbieNotes3_name: Incoming Messages from a Former Friend
sid_notes_RSQ01_NewbieNotes4_body:
$J0L0 You scumbag. I’ll find you. I’ll get out of this lousy hole, and then I’ll come after you. Whether it’s in the Zone or on the Mainland, I’m coming for you!
Don’t expect me to forget how you left Serhiy to die. I’ll tear anyone limb from limb when it comes to my friends, so you better watch your back as long as I’m alive, you son of a bitch!
sid_notes_RSQ01_NewbieNotes4_hint: Threat from a dead stalker’s PDA
sid_notes_RSQ01_NewbieNotes_body:
$J0L0 I know I’m not coming back.
Will you forgive me? I shouldn’t have left you. I should’ve lived my life like everyone else. But… I just couldn’t. Work, sleep, repeat…
No. The Zone – this is the life for me.
sid_notes_RSQ04_C10_GlavarNotes_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> IF YOU EVEN THINK OF TOUCHING THIS STASH, I’LL SHOOT YOUR BALLS OFF.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_RSQ05_C10_Notes1_body:
$J0L0Unknown: Found him.
Owl: You’re sure?
Unknown: Ihor Ihnatyev, aka Attila. Changed his nickname after becoming a merc. Was presumed dead. Often seen near Rostok.
Owl: You know what to do.
Unknown: What, by myself?! Did you hear what he’s done to the Sultan’s men?
Owl: The Sultan’s men don’t get paid as much as you do.
Unknown: Fuck.
sid_notes_RSQ05_C10_Notes1_hint: From the PDA of Owl’s informer
sid_notes_RSQ05_C10_Notes2_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault> I know what’s coming next. You know what’s coming next. Even the blind dogs at the Cordon know what’s coming next. If you don’t want Owl to find out about what happened, transfer the coupons. You know how much and where to. Or you can come find me. I don’t mind either way… pal.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_RSQ05_C10_Notes2_hint: From the secret PDA of Owl’s informer
sid_notes_RSQ05_C10_Notes2_name: Message to Owl’s Agent from Unknown
sid_notes_RSQ05_C10_Notes3_body: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteDefault>You shouldn’t have taken this job, Owl. I’ll see you soon.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>
sid_notes_RSQ05_C10_Notes3_hint: From the dead body of Owl’s informer
sid_notes_RSQ05_C10_Notes4_body: $J0L0<NoteBody> <NoteDefault>…so we can say that the Reflection Program … significant changes … I strongly recommend not to make any rushed … to ensure that the experiment is successful. or at least without catastrophic…</NoteDefault> </NoteBody>
sid_notes_RSQ05_C10_Notes4_hint: Taken from a fragment of an important document
sid_notes_RookieVillage_Hub_Note_Agent_b: $J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Dragonfly:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> What if I double that?</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Whale:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> You don't have that kind of money, do you?</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Dragonfly:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> I'll triple it.</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Dragonfly:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> How does Sidorovich contact Strelok?</NoteDefault></NoteBody>$J0L0<NoteBody><NoteBold>Whale:</NoteBold><NoteDefault> It's the fifth time you're asking me. The answer is the same: no one's seen Strelok.
