You will never understand Her!
Quit twitching! You'll die anyway!
(laughing through pain)
I'm still alive, Skif. Unlike you!
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Comment_KorshunovCon: Granite Squad, Laboratory X7's security force. They succumbed to the influence of C-Consciousness and became the original Monolithians.
Those were my men. The very people they were protecting turned them into this.
Those scientists, always looking down on us... That’s why neither Dalin nor his bastard son belong in this pod. I’ll take care of it.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Comment_Korshunov_On: Retrieve the archive containing the information on all C-Consciousness Agents. This is my last request.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Comment_Korshunov_Re: Ready to go. We’re coming in.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Comment_Kourshunov_C: Your next objective is to locate the teleporters and get them up and running.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Comment_Krivenko_Flu: I’d like to take another reading.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Comment_Krivenko_OnF: I’ve worked so hard for this moment... you do realize that without class 5 protection, none of this would’ve been possible, right?
Agatha has secured me a position as the director of a research center that will guide humanity into a better, brighter future.
Rest assured, your rewards will be commensurate.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Comment_Krivenko_OnI: I need to get ready. This is the most pivotal day of my entire career.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Comment_Scientist3_O: I don’t want to make the colonel angry. Excuse me.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Comment_Warden2_OnIn: The Colonel says this is the Ward’s final mission. It's a shame so many good folks won’t get to see how it ends.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Comment_Warden3_OnIn: It’ll sure be nice to finally get out of this place, huh?
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Dialog_Korshunov_Aga: It’s not working. We have to activate the backup power.
I know where it is. Looks like I’ll get to meet them after all. Follow me.
Yevhen can handle it just fine on his own. Your involvement poses a risk, so it’s completely out of the question. This is no time for a nostalgic rendezvous, Colonel Korshunov.
Or have you, much like Dr. Dalin, forgotten that we’re not doing this for our own sake, but for the future of all humanity?
Go, Skif. I’ll meet you downstairs.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Dialog_Korshunov_Las: The scientists will get the equipment ready, and we’ll make sure they’re not disturbed. But before we wrap this up, there’s one last thing we have to do.
There’s an archive on the lower levels containing files on every Agent recruited by C-Consciousness.
Retrieve that archive, Skif. Yes, I could track them from the pod, but having a backup could be helpful in case those damn eggheads screw something up.
Roger that, Colonel. I’ll retrieve the files.
No need for formalities. Consider this a request, not an order.
One last favor before I enter the pod.
What can you tell me about this facility?
Generators… This is where C-Consciousness created the Zone and all the shit we’ve dealt with ever since. That lab is where the infection that is the Agents started spreading around the world.
Monolith was created just to safeguard this very location.
This is where it all began, and this is where it all ends. We’ll get started just as soon as you retrieve the archive.
Are you ready for what’s about to happen?
Colonel Korshunov is a Ward soldier like any other. A soldier is always ready. He’s just waiting for his orders.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Dialog_Korshunov_Ski: I’ve got the archive. And there’s one name we can scratch off the list.
Scar was getting to the end of his own file when I found him. He’d completely lost it.
I’d wanted him dead for years, but even I wouldn’t wish this fate upon him.
Finding out you’ve been an Agent all along, not even in control of your own life… I guess you did him a favor.
I’m waiting for you. It’s time to go down to X7 and get this over with.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Dialog_Korshunov_Str: It was Strelok. All clear now.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ01_Dialog_Korshunov_Tak: I want you to keep the archive.
You’re the only person I can trust to keep an eye on things around here.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_KlerikOnIter: I wish I could go with you. Best of luck to you and Scar. Give the Monolith one last good thrashing for me!
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_KlerikWishes: If I didn’t have my orders, I’d be right there fighting the Monolithians with you, loner. Give ’em hell for us, just like you did at the Duga.
And help Scar, all right? Make sure everything goes according to plan so all our guys can finally come back.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_KuprienkoOnI: You and Scar are very, very close to performing a genuine scientific miracle. Good luck!
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_KuprienkoWis: Skif! You might not remember me well, but I sure remember you. You visited Malachite a few times.
We’ve come a long way since then, haven’t we? It took me a while to get on track. But now I’ve learned that Professor Ozersky was working with Spark, so…
I’m glad to be here, right at the heart of it all, when the Zone is finally purged of all darkness. If you make it happen, this will be a scientific experiment unlike any other. Good luck to you.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_PolynCallsOn: What the hell? What the fuck just happened?!
Skif, check the teleporter on your end!
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_PolynOnInter: Don’t waste any time. Get to Scar — he’s waiting for you.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_PolynWishesL: Scar told us to secure the teleporters in case any other unwelcome guests decide to show up. But hopefully he’ll reach out for help if things go sideways.
Best of luck, Skif. I hope I see you again, whether it’s before the Shining Zone or within it.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_ScarBehindTh: Don’t wait around, Skif! Find the truck workshop. I’ll meet you there.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_ScarCallsOnA: We’re in contact. That means you’ve made it to the Generators. The voices of the living cannot penetrate into the Dead Valley.
Now head to the communication node that connects to the Foundation and activate it.
If all goes well, I’ll join you shortly.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_ScarCallsOnC: Congrats, Skif. You’ve connected to the Foundation, and the Representative has teleporters set up. Let's get the party started!
I’m already there. Couldn’t wait for backup. We must reach X7 as quickly as possible. Do me a favor: head down to the Teleporter Room and provide cover for my men. They’ll join us shortly.
I don’t want the Monolithians to stop them from witnessing the birth of the Shining Zone.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_ScarElevator: You pulled it off, Skif. The elevator’s up and running.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_ScarOnAccide: Then again, the Zone was never part of the initial plan. You and I, Skif, are manifesting the ultimate eventuality!
The most important things never go as planned. It is luck that creates them. Or the other way around.
It is pure eventuality that we're here now. I'm here because I can mediate. You - because of all places the Zone could reveal itself, it chose your home.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_ScarOnLightZ: A new world lies before us.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_ScarOnPlans_: Got me thinking, you know. About plans. I'm sure every one of us here had one.
And yet, look at them, useless and dead. Defeated. Can luck be calculated, though?
Or can anyone who gave up on his plans and listened to his inner voice count on luck?
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_ScarOnX7_X7_: You see, Skif? History is spiralling. Many years ago, C-Consciousness ran their very first experiment and created the Zone, right here in this lab.
And here we are, about to conclude their last experiment, so the Zone can be reborn and become what it was always supposed to be.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_ScarRegained: All right, Skif. It’s time for a miracle.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Comment_StrelokDisap: You chose to side with those fanatics. Now you'll have to perish with them.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Dialogue_PolynCallsF: Skif, are you in position? Scar made it clear we shouldn’t proceed to the Generators until you’re ready.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Dialogue_ScarFindsFa: What you believe in doesn’t matter anymore, Scar.
You made me believe. For real. And that means you’re gonna step into that pod, no matter what happens next.
Because in the Shining Zone, everything will be just as it’s meant to be. That's what I believe.
You know, Skif, I just had a funny idea...
What if I changed my mind about entering the eighth pod?
What if everything I've believed in, everything I’ve worked for, wasn’t truly mine? What if all it belonged to someone else?
You can’t afford to change your mind now — not when we’re on the verge of making the world a better place.
We can cleanse it of all the filth and pain. Get rid of the darkness within us.
Forget about the past, Scar. What does your previous goal matter now? Is there anything more important than the Shining Zone?
Thank you. I needed to hear that. Now we need to get past the blast door. Let’s go.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Dialogue_ScarOnTheNo: I hear some noise on your end. Did some Monolithians pay you a visit?
No, it was Strelok. He won’t be causing any more trouble, though. He’s dead.
No one in the Zone dies for good, Skif. Especially the legends.
I’m heading to the Neurolaboratory. Come down and meet me there. The others should stay put in the Teleporter Room. We’ll wrap this up together, you and I.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ02_Dialogue_ScarWounded: Anything I can do about your injury? Do you need a medkit?
Don’t worry, I’ve got it under control. I’ll live to see the Shining Zone.
Such a small piece of lead, yet what a hindrance it is on the journey to immortality for all mankind...
And the elevator to X7 is out of commission too. You’ll need to go restart it.
Just make sure you don't catch a bullet from Granite like I did. Where did they come from after all these years? Did the Signal wake them up too?
A hello from the past, courtesy of the colonel. He was in charge of a special unit called Granite Squad. They used to guard X7 before the Zone even existed.
When C-Consciousness’s plans went sideways because of Kaymanov’s meddling, they turned Granite into the first Monolithians. Korshunov was the sole survivor.
Watch out for them when you reboot the elevator. I’d help you if I weren’t woefully ineffective in combat at the moment.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ03_Comment_Strelok_Abou: You need to restart the elevator, Skif. It's the only way to get to X7.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ03_Comment_Strelok_GoDo: You need to get further down, Skif. And be careful. You're not alone there. Stay in touch.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ03_Comment_Strelok_GoTo: See you at X7. She's waiting for us.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ03_Commet_Skif_AboutEle: They’re aiming for the Noosphere, but they’ve got no one to fix the goddamn elevator.
Now I’m stuck walking in circles. Fuck…
sid_phrase_E16_MQ03_Dialog_Strelok_After: Skif, come in. I'm done with the teleport — it's now full of surprises. What's up? Why did you go radio silent?
I ran into Scar. He’s dead now.
I guess it's goodbye, then. Well, I won't cry.
Get down to the workshop. I'll be waiting for you near the trucks. We're almost there.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ03_Dialog_Strelok_NearT: I was expecting a live fight with the Monolithians.
I thought there'd be more of them.
Someone's decided to save us some ammo. And I don't like this.
Let's split up for now. I'll set the explosives at the teleport to cover your back. You go on. I'll catch up.
Avoid any unnecessary risks. I’ll be in touch.
sid_phrase_E16_MQ03_Dialog_Strelok_Truck: It's always something with these trucks, every single time.
X7 is below. But the elevator won't budge. We need to restart it.
I tried. Turns out Granite was there. I tried to get close but they cut me off. My bad, I let my guard down too early. Now you'll go.
Save it for yourself. Might come in handy.
I've got my own. Took some before, just need to come round.
Korshunov's rabble. A Special Operations Unit. They've guarded X7 since before the Zone was around.
And then, thanks to C-Consciousness, they became the first of the Monolith. Korshunov was lucky to get away. He thought they were all gone. But here they are, back on duty after the Signal.
Here. You'll need this card to get in. Deggy took it off the colonel back at the Foundation. Came in handy. When you get off the elevator, it's the door to your right.
What’s the deal with these trucks?
These are for the Agents. Used to ride around the Zone in them.
Stalkers called them death trucks. Because the Zone often destroyed them, with everything inside.
But to me, she was merciful. I was found near one of those at the Cordon. Injured, amnesiac. Ever heard of the Marked One? That's the name Sidorovich gave me for the tatoo on my arm.
sid_phrase_EQ04_Comment_BanditsFight_1_4: Shoulda taken the easy way out, asshole…
sid_phrase_EQ04_Comment_DinamitCoolSkif_: Oh, shit! Take it easy, loner. These things happen. We didn’t know who we were dealing with.
Let’s keep it civil, okay? We ain’t got no beef with you.
sid_phrase_EQ04_Comment_DinamitLetsStart: See, boys? Here’s to new beginnings!
sid_phrase_EQ04_Comment_DynamitFirst_1_4: What the fuck are you snoopin’ around for? Get the hell outta here!
sid_phrase_EQ04_Comment_TohaTunec_1_4109: I've got my eye on you!
sid_phrase_EQ04_Comment_TunecSeePlayer_t: You took a wrong turn, bro. You’re not welcome here.
sid_phrase_EQ04_Comment_TunecifSkifCool_: Just chill, okay, loner? This is all Dynamite’s fault.
sid_phrase_EQ04_Comment_VadyaKepka_1_FF_: What the hell?! We’ve got an intruder here, boys!
sid_phrase_EQ04_Dialog_IfFindBandits_Oop: Still don't get it, huh? Fine, I’ll explain.
sid_phrase_EQ04_Dialog_WithBandit_angryk: Yeah, I killed him, and I just might kill you too.
If ya took him out, fine, that’s between you and him. Just toss us a few coupons, and we’ll pretend we didn't see nothin'.
sid_phrase_EQ04_Dialog_WithBandit_dontki: Bullshit! You think you can off our bro like that, then act all innocent?!
We need to bury him, and funerals ain’t cheap.
Gimme some cash! Or would ya rather join him?!
I just found the body. Someone else did this.
sid_phrase_EQ04_Dialog_WithBandit_hello_: Did you waste our buddy Tymokha?
Did you do this? I’m talking to you, guy!
sid_phrase_EQ04_Dialog_WithBandit_killth: I don't have any coupons. How about some ammo?
sid_phrase_EQ04_Dialog_WithBandit_money_: All right, here’s your money. Now what?
sid_phrase_EQ04_dinamit_0_HelloTopic_a_3: Well? What else do you want?
sid_phrase_EQ04_dinamit_0_InfoTopic_1_1_: We are never gonna run outta chumps to shake down, so… yeah, we’re good.
sid_phrase_EQ04_toha_tunec_0_InfoTopic_1: We're hangin' in there, bro. As long as we’re locked and loaded, the coupons'll come.
sid_phrase_EQ04_vala_kepka_0_BusyTopic_1: What the hell do you want? Get lost!
sid_phrase_EQ04_vala_kepka_0_InfoTopic_1: It sucks ass, same as always.
sid_phrase_EQ04_vala_kepka_0_ResumeComme: So, where was I? Oh, right…
sid_phrase_EQ05_Comment_CloseRange_Warni: What the hell are you doin’ here? Keep your hands off the stiff! That's my loot!
sid_phrase_EQ05_Comment_EmissionReaction: Fuck, does it have to be now?!
sid_phrase_EQ05_Comment_LootBody_StartLo: Now I gotta find me a new lair…
sid_phrase_EQ05_Comment_SkifStandCloseTo: What the hell are you waitin’ for? Guess I’ll have to put you down too!
sid_phrase_EQ05_Comment_SniperKillMutant: It’s highway robbery, I tells ya... the guys kill my mutants and don't even have the decency to die…
sid_phrase_EQ05_Comment_StayFriends_1_53: Come on, let’s keep it civil. We'll just go our separate ways, okay?
sid_phrase_EQ05_Comment_WalkToBody_Mutan: You offed my entire workforce, for Christ's sake! And I just got this whole thing up and runnin’…
sid_phrase_EQ05_Dialog_SkifTalkWithKolun: I see you’re a little slow on the uptake, huh? Get lost, or you’re gonna owe me one.
Watch your mouth. What are you doing here? You've got one chance to explain yourself.
Come on, take it easy. I’m just sellin’ leads to empty stashes. No promises about 'em bein' safe!
It’s all fair and square. The mutants get the meat, I get the gear, and the little shits learn a lesson for their next life.
Tough guy, are ya? Well, we ain't got no beef, you and me. Let’s just stay outta each other’s business and go our separate ways. Deal?
Well, whatever. I have to go.
sid_phrase_EQ05_fima_neverasij_0_DefeatC: Help me! I need a medkit, now!
sid_phrase_EQ05_fima_neverasij_0_InfoTop: Freedom’s gettin’ uppity. They’re actin’ like they own the Zone, but they can’t hold a candle to the Ward. Then again, when ya got two evils to pick from, it ain't even worth choosin’.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_First_1_47019: Just one. What’s with the sour puss? Not happy to see a customer?
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_First_1_47020: Nah, my joints are actin’ up. An Emission’s probably brewin’.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_First_1_47021: Well, thank Myklukha for the bread for me. Stay healthy now.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_Fourth_4_47012: Well, well. I’ll take a couple of the freshest loaves in Rostok, please.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_Fourth_4_47013: In Rostok? You wound me, buddy! We’ve got the freshest bread in the entire Zone!
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_Fourth_4_47014: That’s a bold claim! All right, how much do I owe you?
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_Fourth_4_47015: It’s on the house. Courtesy of Freedom. Don't worry, we can afford it.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_Second_2_47016: Two broaves… damn! I mean, two loaves, please.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_Second_2_47017: Here you go. Stop by anytime.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_SkifOfQueueTrade: You think you’re clever, huh? Get in line and wait your turn like everybody else. One at a time now...
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_SkifOfQueue_No_4: Nah, I’ll pass on the bread.
You’re missing out! This is the freshest bread in Rostok!
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_SkifOfQueue_Wher: Where are you going? Should I save your spot?
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_SkifOfQueue_Yes_: Sure. If anyone asks, I’m behind you.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_Third_3_47024: The boys are waiting. I promised to grab some grub for our booze run, a quick in-and-out. But then I got stuck here.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_Third_3_47025: Got it. Here you go. Remember to raise a toast to Myklukha.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Comment_TraderCalls_Call: Hey, folks, gather ’round! Fresh bread’s just come in! Myklukha’s spoilin’ you — he doesn’t want you to live off crackers like the rest of ’em!
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_DimaKrotLAstWords: And my supposed drinking buddies? They ditched me while I was in line for bread. Real classy.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_Krot_NoTalk_47156: Can’t you see I’m busy, man?
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_KrucenijLastWords: I shoulda joined Freedom a long time ago. Life here is something else.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_RulonLastWords_ru: Brick’s quite the actor, blaming his creaky joints on an Emission… we all know he just can’t stand the sight of me — too chicken to say it to my face, though.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_Rulon_Bread_47155: Tryin’ to sweet-talk your way ahead and cut in line, are you?
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_Rulon_NoTalk_4715: No way, bud. We can chat later.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_SkifTrader_AboutL: You say you got the finest bread in the Zone?
Yeah, but you’re shit outta luck. Myklukha gets it for Freedom folks only.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_SkifTrader_Loaf_4: The same as everyone else: a loaf of bread.
This bread’s for Freedom folks. Myklukha gets it for his crew only.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_SkifTrader_Take_4: On the other hand… fine, you can have some. Be sure to let everyone know how generous Myklukha can be!
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_TohaLastWords_toh: Major props to Myklukha. It’s been forever since I had bread this fresh.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_Toha_Bread_47159: You want bread, get in the line.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_TraderLastWords_l: You’ve already got your bread. Don’t be an ass.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_WhatIsIt_AreYouLa: Are you the last in the line?
Last, but not least. You can get behind me.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_WhatIsIt_Bye_4700: All right. I should get going.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_WhatIsIt_Bye_4701: It’s your call. If you’re not into it, I’ll happily snag a couple of loaves for myself.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_WhatIsIt_ForReal_: Do I look like a clown to you? Myklukha brought us some fresh bread, believe it or not.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_WhatIsIt_ImIn_470: Right. Where else in the Zone can you score a treat like this?
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_WhatIsIt_Repeat_4: Changed your mind? Trust me, the bread’s worth it.
sid_phrase_EQ08_Dialog_WhatIsIt_SmthElse: Is there anything else besides bread?
What, that's not enough for ya? When’s the last time you held a loaf of fresh bread? Soft, crusty bread… I can't wait to take a bite.
sid_phrase_EQ08_dima_krot_0_InfoTopic_1_: Rostok is such a cool spot. We’ve got a bar, all kinds of goods for sale… it used to be a dreary place when Duty was in charge, but it’s way better now.
sid_phrase_EQ08_kirpic_0_InfoTopic_1_Inf: There’s not much new going on here. I’m mostly runnin’ the store and helpin’ out with chores for Myklukha. Pretty soon, I’m gonna forget what it’s like to go on a run.
sid_phrase_EQ08_krucenyj_0_InfoTopic_1_I: It sure is great being in Freedom. Those loners are always griping about how money makes the world go round, like it’s the root of all evil. But I know they’re just jealous.
We’re living the good life here, while they're off bustin' their asses for peanuts. But there’s money to be made off the “poor but proud.” So let 'em yap all they want.
sid_phrase_EQ08_rulon_0_InfoTopic_1_Info: You think the Ward runs the Zone? Or maybe the stalkers? No way. It’s the merchants. Whoever controls the food, controls your stomach — and you.
sid_phrase_EQ08_toha_cerepaha_0_InfoTopi: There was this one smartass, he used to yammer on and on about how Myklukha stole the whole coupon idea from him. Why would anybody care about some loser with nothing to his name?
Here in the Zone, your rep matters way more than your coupons. That’s why that kid didn’t hang around here for too long.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Comment_BanditsNear2ndB: The base’s been waiting for a medkit since yesterday, man. Sultan’s gonna gut us!
We’ll give him a cut. It’s gonna be all right.
A handful of slugs and a busted old AK? That’s a hell of a gift for a kingpin!
All right. One last stiff, and we’re done.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Comment_BanditsNearFirs: Whoa, that’s a lot of slugs!
Check his underwear. He might have something stashed in there too.
Come on, man... look at all this free stuff! It’d be a shame not to grab some.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Comment_BanditsNearSeco: The base’s been waiting for a medkit since yesterday, man. Sultan’s gonna gut us!
We’ll give him a cut. It’s gonna be all right.
A handful of slugs and a busted old AK? That’s a hell of a gift for a kingpin!
All right. One last stiff, and we’re done.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Comment_CheckanGo_go_31: Where the hell do you think you're going? You said that was the last one!
sid_phrase_EQ101_Comment_CheckanGo_go_41: I’m just gonna check his pockets, that’s all.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Comment_ChekanGo2Cont_g: Where the hell do you think you're going? You said that was the last one!
I’m just gonna check his pockets, that’s all.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Comment_IfSkifTryToLoot: Shit, I told ya to stay away! That’s it, you’re a goner!
sid_phrase_EQ101_Comment_SlavonAboutDead: Dammit, Chekan… What am I supposed to tell Sultan?
sid_phrase_EQ101_Comment_ToSkif_hey_3121: Hey! What the fuck? Hands off our loot!
sid_phrase_EQ101_Dialog_ChekanAfterZombi: Why did you have to mess with the zombies, man? Either way, I don’t owe you shit. Go loot the stiffs if you want.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Dialog_ChekanWordsIfSki: The stiffs are all yours. What more do you want?
sid_phrase_EQ101_Dialog_SkifAskBandits_d: Not anymore. You gotta share now.
Well I’ll be damned... who the hell do you think you are?
sid_phrase_EQ101_Dialog_SkifAskBandits_h: Fuck off! We found those stiffs first. That’s our stuff.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Dialog_SkifAskBandits_p: All right, all right. I’m already leaving.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Dialog_SkifAskBandits_s: I don’t like this deaf asshole. Don’t like him one damn bit.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Dialog_SkifAskBandits_w: Chill out, Chekan. He's armed to the teeth, bro.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Dialog_SlavonAfterZombi: Well, thanks for the help... I guess.
Fuck off, man. Go pat them stiffs down or something.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Dialog_SlavonChekanAfte: Let’s get out of here, Chekan! Screw these stiffs.
Right. I'll just have a smoke, and then off we go.
sid_phrase_EQ101_Dialog_SlavonWordsIfSki: No problem, my good man. The loot's yours.
sid_phrase_EQ101_cekan_0_InfoTopic_1_inf: Do I look like an info desk to you?
Who gives a fuck? We have a plenty of old shit to deal with first.
sid_phrase_EQ101_slavon_0_BusyTopic_Busy: Buzz off. No time to talk now.
sid_phrase_EQ101_slavon_0_DefeatComment_: Oh shit… I’m all outta luck…
sid_phrase_EQ101_slavon_0_InfoTopic_1_sl: Just… There’s a lot of zombies in the Swamps lately. Like, a fuckton of them.
So I’m keepin’ a low profile, get it? Don’t want the kingpin to send me there again.
sid_phrase_EQ101_slavon_0_ResumeComment_: What were we talking about? Oh, right…
sid_phrase_EQ109_Comment_LunaAttack_Atta: Watch out, boys! A stalker! Get him!
sid_phrase_EQ109_Comment_LunaSeek_Seek_4: Look for the stash. There ain’t many spots around here to hide loot!
sid_phrase_EQ10_Comment_VetalAngry_1_681: Where the fuck did you come from?!
sid_phrase_EQ10_Dialog_VitkaPastuh_IHelp: Let me patch you up first.
Don’t... don’t bother. Can’t you see I’m done for? You go after Vetal... you bring him... my last regards...
sid_phrase_EQ10_Dialog_VitkaPastuh_Vitka: Hey, stalker... I’m done for... my partner betrayed me. Just kill the bastard, would ya?
His name’s Vetal... he’s robbing me as we speak... sending you... the coordinates...
Kill the rat, take my stash... just watch your step, I’ve got tripwires there.
sid_phrase_EQ10_Dialog_VitkaPastuh_WhoIs: I thought he was my friend. I told him about my stash. I was so stupid... thought there was such thing as friendship in the Zone... ha ha... argh...
sid_phrase_EQ10_vetal_zhiga_0_InfoTopic_: So I had this buddy named Vityok. He liked to talk, and he talked about his stash a lot. Not my fault he was such a moron.
Here in the Zone, you’re either smart and alive, or gullible and dead.
sid_phrase_EQ10_vitka_pastuh_0_InfoTopic: So that’s how it goes... you trust a guy, and he stabs you in the back. Even Vetal turned out to be a rat.
I’ve spent plenty of years in the Zone, but I'm still a lousy judge of character. What a naive idiot...
sid_phrase_EQ111_Comment_BeforeDeath_Dea: Fuck, it hurts... everything's going blurry... might pass out... help me, I’m in the basement...
sid_phrase_EQ111_Comment_LastWords_LastW: Who’s there? Hey! Can you hear me? Got a medkit?
Hey! Who are you... fuck! No! Get away!
sid_phrase_EQ111_Comment_RepeatCalling_N: Hello? Anybody? If you can hear me... I’m wounded... in the basement, hiding from mutants...
sid_phrase_EQ11_Comment_GiveMedkitCall_g: You took care of the freak? Good, now lend me a hand.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Comment_MercCalls_Call_F: Watch your back, loner! There’s a Bloodsucker nearby!
sid_phrase_EQ11_Comment_Mol_Recovery_Bus: I have nothing more to say to you.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Comment_NoTalking_No_FF_: Are you dumb? Shoot that thing! Then we can chat!
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_Bye_48932: I gotta go. See you around.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_Bye_48945: So long, stalker. And… well, thanks.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_Fight_48937: Lecture? No. I’ll just put you down like a dog.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_Fight_48958: Give it a shot, punk. Try me.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_FoundPDA_489: Based on the Freedom members’ messages, they hired you to take out loners, right?
Yeah, they did. You gonna lecture me or something?
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_Help_48915: Nicely done, stalker. Way to ice that freak.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_Kit_48918: Thanks for the assistance. The coupons are already on your PDA. I don’t like owing favors.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_NoJudgement_: What for? If it wasn’t you, they’d just find another gun for hire. There’s always someone else.
Smart thinking, loner. See you around, then. Thanks for your help.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_NoKit_48919: Shit. I messed up big time…
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_NotCare_4893: I've got another idea: you pay me, and I won’t spill the beans to Sidorovich about your little plan to off his guys.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_NotCare_4895: You son of a bitch… fine, have it your way. But mark my words, every mercenary out there is gonna hear about this.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_Order_48927: What kind of job was it?
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_Order_48940: Nothing too fancy — go there, do this…
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_Order_52290: You’re a loner, right? So, you’re a bit of a merc yourself. You know how it goes.
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_RepeatHeal_5: You don't happen to have a medkit, do you?
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_Merc_WhatHappened: Some Freedom guys hit me up for a job. They didn’t bother to scope out the place beforehand.
So they're now a Bloodsucker buffet. Man, the level of stupidity I’ve got to deal with…
sid_phrase_EQ11_Dialog_TopicWithSidor_si: Do you know a merc named Moth? He was planning to off your men.
Well, if he was, there must’ve been a good reason for it.
Don't you want to give your guys a heads-up to stay clear of him?
Sure, I’ll just go tell ’em “mercs might cap you.” What’s next? “Hide from Emissions?” “Put a hat on when it’s chilly?”
Cut the crap, Skif. You got goods, hand ’em over. If not, find a way to be productive.
sid_phrase_EQ11_mol_0_DontLeaveMe_1_7346: Where are you going?! Help me first, and then you can piss off!
sid_phrase_EQ11_mol_0_Emission_1_73466: Good job taking that bastard down, stalker. Let's go take shelter. I owe you one for the rescue.
sid_phrase_EQ11_mol_0_InfoTopic_1_Info_5: Do I look like a gossiping old lady to you? Go to the bar, sit by the fire, and they’ll tell you everything about Duga, the Scorcher, and Prypiat itself. Just pour them some vodka, and you’re done.
sid_phrase_EQ139_Comment_MarchenkoPissed: Hit the road. The Zone is big. Go hang out somewhere else.
sid_phrase_EQ139_Comment_VartaChat_camp_: How much longer are we gonna be stuck here? This place is nasty, even for the Zone. There’s something in the air… it gives me the creeps.
Stop complaining, soldier. It’s bad enough as it is. The professor said we’re almost done.
I’m not complaining. It’s not like this is my first time. I'm just saying this place is creepin’ me the hell out. And I’m almost out of smokes, too.
sid_phrase_EQ139_Comment_ZareckijDespair: I feel so bad. So bad. I can’t take it. Can’t take it anymore. I want it to end. I want it all to end…
sid_phrase_EQ139_Dialog_ZareckijNight_sc: They're gone. They abandoned me… what should I do? I don’t understand how it all… why I’m so…
sid_phrase_EQ139_Dialog_ZareckijNight_se: I’m gonna go look for your men first. When I find them, I’ll come back.
No, you… you won’t find them! I told you, something bad's already happened. You’re just like them. You don’t want to listen to me. You want to abandon me here! Well, get out then! The hell with you!
sid_phrase_EQ139_Dialog_ZareckijNight_st: Stop pitching a fit. Your men are probably just doing some recon. When they’re done, they’ll come back.
Are you… are you kidding me?! Do you think I’m stupid? Or insane? Don’t you see it? Can’t you feel… oh, I can’t take it anymore! Get out of here!
sid_phrase_EQ139_Dialog_ZareckijNight_wh: I don’t know. I have no idea.
My guards… I tried to stop them, but it was like they couldn’t hear me. They just walked out into the night and vanished. I need to find them. Will you find them?
No, wait. Hold on. Don’t leave. Please. Something bad is about to happen. It's already happened. I can feel it.
sid_phrase_EQ139_Dialog_ZareckijStartDay: Got too much on my mind for small talk. So many reports to fill out…
Isn’t it a little scary, working in a place like this?
I can handle it... as long as no one's bugging me.
I have competent bodyguards, despite whatever shortcomings they may have — a complete and utter lack of enthusiasm for scientific matters, for example.
But what else can you expect from soldiers? I need to cut them a little slack.
What's a stalker doing here? Tell him to clear the area.
What are you doing here, stalker? Wait… I think we’ve met before. Sorry, I’m a little preoccupied at the moment.
I already told you in no uncertain terms that I don’t have time to talk right now!
Anomalies. And I have a lot to prepare for the night's research! I wouldn't want to waste time satisfying your idle curiosity.
I've been studying a certain topic for a long time now: the appearance of artifacts inside anomalies. You might call it a specialty of mine.
The way the artifacts come into being inside psi-anomalies hasn’t been studied thoroughly enough. Here, I have an opportunity to observe the process in the field.
The anomaly I'm studying is only active at night. I need to complete all preparations before nightfall. I'd appreciate it if your interrogation didn't take too long.
I think you can spare a little time for me.
I’m so tired of this constant supervision… can't I just work in peace? Well, what do you want to know?
sid_phrase_EQ139_lejtenant_marcenko_0_In: I get that research is important, but why do we always have to wait so long? They send us out with one ration, then make us stand guard for an entire day.
sid_phrase_EQ139_professor_zareckij_0_Bu: Go away. You’re interfering with my work.
sid_phrase_EQ139_professor_zareckij_0_In: If we want to study the Zone in earnest, we cannot limit ourselves to sterile lab experiments. Collecting data outside SIRCAA makes much more sense.
sid_phrase_EQ139_professor_zareckij_0_Re: Sorry, lost my train of thought there.
sid_phrase_EQ139_radovoj_gurevic_0_BusyT: I have my orders. Leave me alone.
sid_phrase_EQ139_radovoj_gurevic_0_Hello: What are you snooping around for?
sid_phrase_EQ139_radovoj_gurevic_0_InfoT: In the Swamps, there’s this constant feeling, like something’s crawling across your skin. There it is again! I’m itching all over.
sid_phrase_EQ13_Comment_MihaMeltdown_mih: You shouldn’t have wandered over here, man.
sid_phrase_EQ13_Comment_MihaReward_Rewar: Hey there! I did some digging, and it turns out Adik really is six feet under! Just like I said, I’m sending you a reward. Stay safe out there!
sid_phrase_EQ13_Dialog_FreedomAfterEQTop: I just sold them the stash. How could I know…
sid_phrase_EQ13_Dialog_LonerAfterEQTopic: I had a little run-in with him before. He’s dead.
No kidding? That sounds a little too good to be true, but I’ll look into it. If it checks out, I’ll owe you one.
Now I just gotta track those thugs down… then I can rest easy.
Same goes for you. Be careful who you call a friend, or you might find yourself in my shoes.
This little twerp spilled the beans to some bandits about a gun stash. They used those same guns to wipe out our friends. And this weasel just shrugs and says, “Not my fault.”
The bandits had him cornered, just like the rest of us! You’d think there’d be a bit of honor, some kinda solidarity, damn it! But no, money talks, bullshit walks...
No matter, it’s done now. Time to track down the kingpin, Adik Pedal. I’m gonna splatter his brains all over the ground, and then his lackeys will scatter like roaches without a leader.
sid_phrase_EQ13_Dialog_StalkersTalk_Appr: Rook, Hleck, Stern… remember them? Remember how we ventured into the Zone together, our first time out? Or does Freedom forget their friends if they're broke?
Look, Mike, I’m sorry… I just sold them the stash, you know? It ain’t my fault it turned out that way. They’d have found some guns sooner or later anyway.
I remember them, Cowboy. What’s on your mind?
They’re gone. Bandits got ’em. The ones you tipped off about the guns! Was it worth it? Did you make a pretty penny?
sid_phrase_EQ13_filimon_0_InfoTopic_1_fi: I tried to hunt down that bandit who used my guns to kill the loners. It’s like he disappeared into thin air! Someone must have tipped him off.
If Cowboy had been more reasonable, I could’ve led him right to the bastard. But no, he had to put all the blame on me… while that lowlife is chugging vodka and prancing around the Zone.
sid_phrase_EQ13_miha_kovboj_0_InfoTopic_: Ever noticed how mutants tend to huddle together when there’s a bigger, meaner predator around?
The scumbags who took out my buddies will be doing the same thing pretty soon. But it won’t save their asses. It’ll just make my job even easier.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Comment_IluhaAboutDetec: Yeah, I knew it was you right away. You sold me a detector in the Burnt Forest, remember?
It turned out to be one hell of a device! I used it to get a ton of great artifacts! I’m loaded now, man!
I’m not trying to brag or anything, I just wanted to thank you. Here, this is for you. I'll never forget what you did for me.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Comment_IluhaCallSkifAf: Hey, stalker! I remember you! Come over here, I’ve got something to say.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Comment_IluhaCallSkif_c: Hey, stalker! Come have a seat. Let’s talk.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Comment_IluhaMutter_mut: Work, you lousy piece of shit!
sid_phrase_EQ140_Dialog_AboutDetector_as: If you’ve got any questions, just ask. I know this area like the back of my hand.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Dialog_AboutDetector_do: I don’t carry an extra detector on me.
No? Okay... how about we just sit and chat then?
sid_phrase_EQ140_Dialog_AboutDetector_gi: I’ve got this one. It’s a good device.
Whoa! Really? You don’t mind? Thanks, man! With a detector like this, I ain’t afraid of no anomalies!
I don’t have many coupons, but I can throw in some valuable information.
Oh, I’ll take anything that works! I don’t have many coupons, but I can throw in some valuable information.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Dialog_AboutDetector_st: My damn detector’s no good... you don't have a spare one, do you? I’ll buy it!
sid_phrase_EQ140_Dialog_AboutPlaces_Circ: What do you know about the Krug Antenna Complex?
That godforsaken shithole... Bloodsuckers used to nest in its basements. They'd go hunting stalkers in the dead of night, then haul their victims back there.
I heard Degtyarev was the one who took the damn vermin out — and single-handedly at that. He suffocated most of 'em with gas. The ones that were tough enough to survive, he filled full of lead.
But no one dares to go in there. One of our vets said he heard wailing and blood-curdling screams coming from inside. I don’t know if it’s true, and I ain't planning to find out.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Dialog_AboutPlaces_ceme: What can you tell me about the cemetery?
There’s some bad shit going down there, I tell ya. Every time you pass it, you see one or two empty graves. It’s no use filling them — there’ll just be a new one there the next day.
Every grave is just waiting for someone to lie in it... and after a couple of days, it'll find 'em. So unless you fancy becoming a grave-dweller, stay as far from those graves as possible.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Dialog_AboutPlaces_gave: They say the anomalies there are powerful, and that means good artifacts too. I’m thinking about heading there with your detector, so thanks again, man.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Dialog_AboutPlaces_not_: They say the anomalies there are powerful, and that means good artifacts too. I’m thinking about doing a little recon there... as soon as I fix this damn detector.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Dialog_AboutPlaces_peru: That’s an interesting place all right. There are some pre-Christian totems there. No one knows who made them or why. They were there long before the Zone.
Someone named it after the Slavic god of lightning 'cuz it got struck by electros during an Emission, and the name stuck.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Dialog_AboutPlaces_scho: What do you know about the school?
They say there are ghosts inside. They make all kind of noise, they throw things at you... no one in their right mind would go there. But there was one stalker, they called him Hermit...
Well, he was a real weirdo. He used to go in there empty-handed — just like that, no gun or proper gear! Maybe he was hiding some loot there or just trying his luck, I don’t know.
sid_phrase_EQ140_Dialog_AboutPlaces_star: Are you up for a few stories? I can tell you about the Krug Antenna Complex, Perun’s Hill, the Cemetery, or the School. Go ahead, ask away!
sid_phrase_EQ140_iluha_vorobej_0_InfoTop: Some veteran stalkers don’t like the Gaffer. They say he fusses too much over rookies.
Well, what would they rather have him do, throw rookies straight into the Zone like blind kittens? Let Sidorovich exploit them?
sid_phrase_EQ141_Audiolog_Turga_Help_FF_: Help! Someone! I’m here, by the helicopter!
sid_phrase_EQ141_Audiolog_Turga_Loot_466: Hey, Rowboat, guess what! I found a stash on the bus! It’s packed with food!
Where are you, dude? I scarfed down three cans already.
Is that you by the water, Rowboat? You playin' hard to get or somethin'? Oh, fuck! Come on, I’m here…
sid_phrase_EQ141_Comment_Baiun_1_70265: Help! Someone! I’m here, by the helicopter!
sid_phrase_EQ145_Comment_NeutralRepRespo: I told you not to come back.
sid_phrase_EQ145_Comment_WatchNote_patro: The patrols are following a strict schedule, too frequent to slip in. I don’t see a safe entry point so far.
sid_phrase_EQ145_Dialog_FirstMeet_aftery: Don’t be clever now. I got here first.
Either you tell me who the hell you are, or you get the hell out.
sid_phrase_EQ145_Dialog_FirstMeet_iwilll: I just got lost. I’m leaving.
sid_phrase_EQ145_Dialog_FirstMeet_nameyo: Yeah, I heard of you all right. You shouldn’t have come here, Skif.
Yeah, I heard of you. Well, you’re here, so come in.
Well, how about you go mind your own business, Skif. As far from me as possible.
sid_phrase_EQ145_Dialog_SparkGoodRep_abo: What’s so special about the Duga? Why is Spark keeping an eye on it?
Oh, everything. The Duga is an old Soviet radar station. Designed for early missile warnings, military stuff like that.
There used to be a rumor that the radar could mess with your head. That was before the first accident.
I don’t know if it’s true, but it’s heavily guarded. There's gotta be some reason for it, right?
sid_phrase_EQ145_Dialog_SparkGoodRep_bye: I’ll leave you to it then. Bye.
sid_phrase_EQ145_Dialog_SparkGoodRep_spo: And are they any good, their defenses?
They sure look it. Those patrols'll fill anything moving with lead and ask questions later.
I wish I could get in, though... I’d go straight for the engineering corridor in the Big Duga. They’re hiding something there, I’m telling you.
sid_phrase_EQ145_Dialog_SparkGoodRep_why: I’m watching the Duga. Looking for weak spots in the ISPF's defenses.
sid_phrase_EQ145_kosta_konus_0_InfoTopic: Weird people, those diggers. They go to such great lengths to dig up good shit, then sell it to the nearest dealer for a song!
They’d be better off hauling it all to Malachite — at least those eggheads pay a fair price. And it’s good to know you’re helping science.
sid_phrase_EQ145_kosta_konus_0_ResumeCom: Yeah, let’s pick it back up.
sid_phrase_EQ146_Audiolog_FaustSermon_1_: Listen to me, brothers, for I am the Word of the Monolith!
There will be no more pain, no more fear. The Monolith has taken them and given us power instead!
Those who are in eternal union with the Monolith can never be stopped!
You can’t kill God, just like you can’t kill the sky above our heads.
sid_phrase_EQ146_Comment_MonolithNoticeS: The Monolith has heard us! To arms, brothers!
sid_phrase_EQ146_Comment_MonolithPray_1_: Monolith, let us face Faust's murderer in battle! Let us avenge Your Word!
sid_phrase_EQ146_svetlyj_0_DefeatComment: I give my life to the will of the Monolith.
sid_phrase_EQ148_Audiolog_KontrollerFigh: You two, cover the windows! The rest of you, search the room! Stay alert!
Where the fuck are you going, Kostas? Give us some covering fire, goddammit!
Shit! That freak locked us in!
Open the door, you little shit! That’s an order! I’m gonna fuck you up!
No, no, I can’t. I gotta get out of here. I gotta get out!
Kostas, open the door, please! Open the door! Aaaah!
sid_phrase_EQ148_Comment_Mumbling_Forth_: I gotta get out of here… I gotta get out.
sid_phrase_EQ148_Comment_SkifZombieFirst: Huh? Where’d you come from, you goddamn zombie?!
sid_phrase_EQ148_Comment_SkifZombieThird: I’ll fucking kill you, you piece of shit!
sid_phrase_EQ14_Comment_Bandits_Rumble2_: Come here, stalker! It's good to see you, bro!
Yeah, right. Five guys went by, and what do we have to show for it? Jack shit.
Just sit tight. Good things come to those who wait.
You’re the only conman here, pal. I’m an honest businessman. Well… almost.
How about we rob the next loner who comes through here, like in the good old days? Just to stay sharp, ya know? Then we can wait some more.
And how much do you expect to get from that? Nah, I’m looking for a big score now. I’ve got a rep to worry about.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Comment_Bandits_Rumble_b: That’s one way to get a big score. Beats getting shot at, right?
All you ever care about is the next big score…
Like you don’t. Oh yeah, you’re here for the thrills, right? You wanna prance around with stalkers in the moonlight?
Up yours. Being free… that’s the only kinda thrill I care about. I mean really free, with no one to boss me around.
Free, huh? So you don’t like getting bossed around? Guess you don’t need your cut then, huh? Or my gun?
That’s different. I’m working with you of my own free will. ’Cuz it pays well.
Right, it pays well… money makes the world go ’round, huh?
Bullshit. Would you be here if you had a million coupons?
See? That’s what I am talking about. But relax, we’re gonna have it all — money, freedom, you name it. Everything you ever wanted.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Comment_Bandits_Shows_Ca: This ride is a beast! So, are you in?
sid_phrase_EQ14_Comment_Kuza_BoughtCar_s: Don’t just leave the car here. Someone could drive it away.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Comment_Kuza_HurtCar_hur: Great, just great. You just touched my whip, bro! That’s like slapping me in the face!
sid_phrase_EQ14_Comment_Kuza_NearCar_nea: Hey! What the hell are you doing in there?! Hands off!
sid_phrase_EQ14_Comment_temyc_Interact_1: Nah, dude. Talk to those guys, not me. Just leave me alone, okay?
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_BanditsSellsCar_A: So you've got cash, huh? I can tell you're an important person. An upstanding individual like myself. Money creates opportunities, am I right? Well, you’re lookin' at the opportunity of a lifetime here.
Things are rough, but I manage.
I see. You're just like I used to be back in the day. I had a tough time of it… until I bought something that changed my life.
No anomaly can stop you if you’re fast as lightning and weigh a ton. No bullshit, man. I can share my secret with you.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_BanditsSellsCar_B: This thing belongs in a dump. It isn’t worth a single coupon.
So you don’t like my car, huh? And you’re saying it right to my face?! Show a little respect!
But can she survive an anomaly?
Just put the pedal to the metal, and you’ll breeze through any anomaly. Her paint’s special too.
Great! It’s a deal. The car’s yours. Just start her up, and off you go.
Take a load off, bro. See that whip over there? That’s my baby. She can get you to the Cordon in ten minutes, or to the CNPP in twenty. No mutants, no anomalies, nothing can stop her. You want her?
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_BanditsSellsCar_F: Freedom. I make my own rules here.
Living for the thrills, are ya? You do whatever you want, nobody can boss you around…
Life’s good. Except for one thing: you’re lying to yourself. But as for me, nothing can stop me. Nothing at all.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_BanditsSellsCar_H: Came to your senses, huh? You gotta have a car in the Zone, bro. And I’m not asking for much. Deal?
What are you looking for in the Zone, stalker? Money? Freedom?
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_BanditsSellsCar_I: Look, buddy, I really like you, so I'm willing to give you a special discount.
Not even if I put a bullet in your head?
Hmm… you won’t. I’m your golden ticket to the sweet life in the Zone.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_BanditsSellsCar_L: I want to take a closer look at the car.
Mind if I take a closer look?
Sure, go ahead. Just don’t touch anything.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_BanditsSellsCar_M: I can respect that. So, are you rich yet?
Don’t worry, we ain’t lookin’ to jam you up. Why should we? I’m a successful businessman.
They scamper away in fear. The ones that ain’t quick enough, they turn into mincemeat. No bullshit, man. I can share my secret with you.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_BanditsSellsCar_N: Take my advice, stalker — think real hard about this. You’re missing out! Mull it over and come back with some cash, okay?
I don’t have that kind of money on me.
No prob. Look, I’ll be here for a couple more days, so you can grab your cash and head right back.
Not interested. I like things the way they are.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_BanditsSellsCar_R: I’ve got my reasons for being here. Mind your own business.
Okay, I see. Maybe I can help.
I know your kind. You've got a goal, and you keep reaching for it, no matter what. But all the shit around here keeps distracting you, right?
I’ll tell you what — I’ve got an ace up my sleeve. Something just for special people like you and me.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_BanditsSellsCar_S: I don’t have time for small talk.
Don’t be stupid. Listen to me.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_BanditsSellsCar_W: Just what are you getting at?
Then why are you selling her?
I’m gettin’ some new wheels. Why let this beauty rust out when someone else could take care of her?
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_KuzaBoughtCar_bou: Itching for a ride already, huh? Nah, bro, you gotta charge her up first. Just put an artifact on the hood and wait half of an hour or so.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_KuzaCarFuel_fuel_: The car doesn’t need any! I used to scrounge for gas, but then I got a fuel regulator from some scientists. She uses artifacts for fuel now.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_KuzaCarRusted_rus: It’s all rusted up. Does it even start?
That hurts, bro. This baby flies like a bird! Ignore the rust, it’s only on the top layer. It’s a special coating to keep the body from wearing out.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_KuzaCarTiers_whee: The car’s all banged up. And the wheels look off.
The road here was kinda rough. But I’m selling her with spare parts! Look, I’ve got wheels, doors, even a seat! It’s all yours.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_KuzaConsequence_g: A real helicopter? How much do you want for it?
Are you shitting me? We gotta keep folks like you around. Here, buy yourself a meal.
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_KuzaConsequence_h: Oh, hey. I’ve got a helicopter nearby. Wanna buy it?
sid_phrase_EQ14_Dialog_KuzaConsequence_l: You ripped me off. That car was a waste of space.
No way! Caveat emptor, stalker. If you don’t like the car, sell it.
sid_phrase_EQ14_kuza_0_HelloTopicBadRep_: Now you’re really making me mad. Piss off!
sid_phrase_EQ14_kuza_0_HelloTopicGoodRep: Enough chitchat, okay? We’re both busy people. Go find somebody else to entertain.
sid_phrase_EQ14_kuza_0_InfoTopic_1_Info_: The stalkers nowadays are a piss-poor bunch. Got nothin' to loot. Spark’s got all the best stuff, but those assholes will shoot back…
sid_phrase_EQ14_temyc_0_DefeatComment_De: Fuck, gimme some meds! I’m about to bite it!
sid_phrase_EQ14_temyc_0_InfoTopic_1_Info: Eh? I shake down punks, shut loudmouths up, respect the bosses — and I’m five by five. Our kind’s everywhere, so if you’re a decent guy, the gigs and the green'll be on point.
sid_phrase_EQ14_zeka_svetlyj_0_HelloTopi: If I was a kingpin, you wouldn’t mess with me.
sid_phrase_EQ14_zeka_svetlyj_0_InfoTopic: Don’t mess with Freedom. They’ve got some good stuff, but they’ve got good guns too… and itchy trigger fingers. Piss one of 'em off, and he’ll fill ya full of lead before ya can blink.
sid_phrase_EQ152_Comment_AfterDialog_1_5: I need to pull myself together and head back to my group.
sid_phrase_EQ152_Comment_AllDead_1_55600: What the hell was that?! My head is spinning... what do I do now?
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_GiveVodka_ItWasM: Monolith is back. They're the ones who attacked you and finished off those stalkers.
Crap… sounds like those guys got killed because of me.
Thanks for filling me in, stalker. Once I recover, I’ll head back to my group.
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_GiveVodka_Leave2: I need to get going. Take care.
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_GiveVodka_Leave3: You were just following orders, Sarge. I gotta go.
Sure thing. I won’t keep you. Thanks for the vodka.
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_GiveVodka_Leave4: Ask your CO. I need to get moving.
Don't let me keep you. Thanks for the vodka.
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_GiveVodka_No_556: Nah, I’m all out. You're not gonna shoot me over it, are you?
Get the hell outta here, smartass.
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_GiveVodka_WhatHa: Let’s start at the beginning: what went down here?
After the commotion over at SIRCAA, we got a call from Korshunov. He dispatched my squad to the Duga, while I got orders to stay put and stop anyone from passing through.
I was holding this position when I saw these loners coming at me, screaming for help. I fired a warning shot, but they just kept running.
I figured it was a ploy to seize the checkpoint, so I fired a burst at their legs, and they went down.
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_GiveVodka_Yes_55: Thanks. I need to clear my head after this whole mess…
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_GiveVodka_YouAli: And then you finished them off?
No. Some other stalkers showed up after them. They started shooting, and I took cover. They threw grenades at me, and then I got knocked out.
When I came to, the wounded stalkers were already dead… you’re a loner too, right? What the hell's going on here?
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_Main_FirstWFR_Sp: I take it you killed those stalkers, huh? The Ward would be proud to have a defender like you.
Don’t push your luck, loner. Get outta here. I don’t feel like wasting any more bullets today.
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_Main_FirstWFR_Va: I’m a friendly. Calm down and let me pass.
I don’t know… I’ve got my orders. I can’t just…
Fuck! Screw it. If you’ve got any vodka, stalker, hand it over.
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_Main_Spark2_5560: Then don’t. What are you guarding here, anyway? Dead bodies?
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_Main_Spark2_5561: Where’s your squad? Did they leave you behind?
I’m holding this post alone. Command’s gone silent. I’ve got orders to…
Fuck! Screw it. If you’ve got any vodka, stalker, hand it over.
sid_phrase_EQ152_Dialog_Main_Start_55594: Halt! My orders are not to let anyone through.
sid_phrase_EQ152_serz_topolev_0_DefeatCo: I need help… give me a medkit!
sid_phrase_EQ152_serz_topolev_0_InfoTopi: My partner was sent out on a recon mission. His last message was about spotting a Monolith squad. Then he went silent.
As you know, the Monolithians take no prisoners…
sid_phrase_EQ154_Comment_PanteraGo_1_566: Let’s catch up at Rostok, all right?
sid_phrase_EQ154_Comment_PanteraLoot_1_5: Why not? No sense in letting the good stuff go to waste.
sid_phrase_EQ154_Comment_Start_1_57272: Don't shoot, man! I’m a friendly!
sid_phrase_EQ154_Dialog_main_Go2_56650: Next time, you better run like hell. I gotta go.
sid_phrase_EQ154_Dialog_main_MonolithBac: The Monolithians are back. They’re all over the Zone now.
Holy shit… I’ve heard about those whackjobs from the old-timers. If they’re really making a comeback, we’re screwed.
All right… I gotta haul ass to Rostok. Maybe it’s safe there.
If you need supplies, help yourself. My guys had it all – medkits, bandages, you name it. I’m outta here.
sid_phrase_EQ154_Dialog_main_Start_56645: I thought I was a goner for sure. Thanks for dealing with those guys.
sid_phrase_EQ154_Dialog_main_Why_56647: When the shooting started, I dropped to the ground and stayed still. I closed my eyes and waited, hoping they won’t notice me.
sid_phrase_EQ154_Dialog_main_Why_56648: But then they started checking the bodies. "That’s it," I thought, "I’m done for." And that’s when you showed up.
sid_phrase_EQ154_Dialog_main_Why_56649: Who the hell were those pricks anyway? They don’t look like your typical bandits. Their gear's way too good…
sid_phrase_EQ154_vova_pantera_0_InfoTopi: The Zone has changed. Going solo is too dangerous these days. I’m thinking about joining Freedom. It was fun being a loner, but staying alive sounds way better.
sid_phrase_EQ156_Comment_Call_1_59695: Hey, stalker, get over here. I owe you one.
sid_phrase_EQ156_Comment_MorozCallsAgain: Come on, help me out! What are you looking at?!
sid_phrase_EQ156_Comment_MorozCalls_call: Hey, stalker! I need a hand! I can’t do this alone!
sid_phrase_EQ156_Comment_MorozSeeAfter_w: We’re square, stalker. Now do me a favor and move along.
sid_phrase_EQ156_Dialog_DoroznukBones_gi: I found a suitcase. Seems like it was meant for you. There are some bones inside.
Bones? Did Blizzard give them to you?
In a way. Blizzard is dead. He had the suitcase with him.
I warned him not to go alone. Why don’t they ever listen to me?!
All right. I hope he didn’t die for nothing, and these samples will do. Here, this is for your help.
sid_phrase_EQ156_Dialog_MorozThanks_abou: What, are you feeling sorry for this monster?
What did it do wrong? It’s a predator. It hunts to survive — builds its own nest, protects it if it has to.
But when it comes to monsters… humans are the worst monsters out there.
sid_phrase_EQ156_Dialog_MorozThanks_hi_5: You got me out of a jam, stalker. Thanks for that.
I was trying to slip past without disturbing this beautiful creature, but it didn’t work out. It's a damn shame.
sid_phrase_EQ156_Dialog_MorozThanks_leav: You’re alive — that’s good enough for me. Take care.
Thanks for not walking on by. Let me send you a little something.
sid_phrase_EQ156_Dialog_MorozThanks_myde: It was a job from Malachite. They wanted the bones of people who’d been killed by Bloodsuckers. What for? You’d have to ask those scientists themselves.
Either way, here’s something for your trouble. I’ll get back to collecting bones.
I had my reasons. But I’ll find a way to return the favor.
sid_phrase_EQ156_Dialog_MorozThanks_whyh: Why did you come here? This place is a deathtrap.
sid_phrase_EQ156_moroz_0_DefeatComment_d: Oh, damn… I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_EQ156_moroz_0_InfoTopic_1_inf: I always tell rookies to show respect for the Zone. The Zone can sense disrespect right from the get-go, and it doesn’t take kindly to it.
sid_phrase_EQ161_Comment_ContactBefore_1: I’ve seen Skif in action. He’s a formidable adversary, so give it your all.
sid_phrase_EQ161_Comment_ContactBefore_2: Once we’re through with him, you can have whatever you want. All I’m after is Korshunov’s badge.
sid_phrase_EQ161_Comment_Contact_1_FF_59: There he is! Let’s do it!
sid_phrase_EQ162_Comment_ContactBefore_1: Find ways underground, brothers. We must protect the Prophet.
The voice of Faust shall guide us.
sid_phrase_EQ162_Comment_Contact_1_63679: Yield to the will of the Monolith!
sid_phrase_EQ162_Comment_Contact_1_FF_60: I see an infidel! Get ready, brothers!
sid_phrase_EQ162_Comment_MoveFirst_1_601: Look for ways underground. We must descend and eliminate all threats to the Voice of the Monolith.
sid_phrase_EQ162_Comment_MoveSecond_1_60: Entry point detected. Keep searching for more.
sid_phrase_EQ162_Comment_MoveSecond_1_63: The Monolith will show us the way.
sid_phrase_EQ163_Comment_NeceredaCall_1_: Are you gonna come any closer, stalker?
sid_phrase_EQ163_Comment_NeceredaInterac: Now hit the road, would ya? I need some time to think.
sid_phrase_EQ163_Dialog_NeceredaThanks_g: Do you know whose grave this is?
Of course I do. I dug it myself, after all. Don’t worry, I even checked it with a dosimeter. I might be a softy, but I ain't stupid.
Panas is buried here. When the Monolith attacked the Slag Heap, he went out to defend it with the others. He was a drunk, but when it came to fighting, he gave those thugs a run for their money.
He went out protecting his buddies. Who'd-a thunk it, huh? Not me, that's for sure.
sid_phrase_EQ163_Dialog_NeceredaThanks_h: He went down fighting, protecting his drinking buddies — single-handedly took down two Monolithians. He might've been a boozehound, but he was still a good man.
sid_phrase_EQ163_Dialog_NeceredaThanks_s: What do you expect them to smell at a freshly dug grave? We're all just tryin' to survive. At least the scavengers are more honest than the rest of ’em.
They act all normal one moment, then go ape-shit the next. I always knew Noontide was just a front…
You could’ve given me a hand, you know. That's the second time those freaks have shown up. They can smell it.
Thanks, stalker. That's the second time those freaks have shown up. They can smell it.
sid_phrase_EQ163_Dialog_NeceredaThanks_t: I don’t really know, stalker. I guess I came here for the cash, like most folks. Bought into all the stories about a brighter future.
Here’s your future in the Zone — an unmarked grave. If you’re lucky, it’ll be deep enough to keep the dogs from digging you up.
sid_phrase_EQ163_Dialog_NeceredaThanks_w: 'Cuz nobody else would — not even his so-called buddies. Can you believe it? He took a bullet for them, and they wouldn’t even bury him. “We’d rather drink to his memory,” they said.
So I had to do it myself. Finding a safe spot, spending half a day digging… 'cuz I’m still a human being, got it?!
I’ve had enough of this, stalker. There’s no humanity left here, no future. Korshunov can take his paycheck and shove it where the sun don’t shine.
sid_phrase_EQ163_serzant_necereda_0_Defe: Someone, please… I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_EQ163_serzant_necereda_0_Info: You think I've seen something new here? No, it’s like everywhere else – ordinary human greed.
It's just that on the Mainland it smells of money or oil, and in the Zone – of artifacts. And where there's greed, there are no people – only beasts.
sid_phrase_EQ164_Comment_VadikCall_1_639: Hey, buddy, can you help a foolish man out?
sid_phrase_EQ164_Comment_VadikScream_1_F: Let’s do it! Take that thing out!
sid_phrase_EQ164_Comment_VadikThanks_1_6: Thanks, stalker. Here you go, as promised. Hope it comes in handy.
sid_phrase_EQ164_Dialog_VadikTalk_HelloL: You’re back? Will you help me take that thing down?
sid_phrase_EQ164_Dialog_VadikTalk_Hello_: I barely managed to escape. Scrambled up here in a panic. Can you help me kill the fucker? I’ll owe you big.
sid_phrase_EQ164_Dialog_VadikTalk_NoBye_: I’ve got no time for this.
sid_phrase_EQ164_Dialog_VadikTalk_WhatTh: What kind of mutant was it?
I was sprinting too fast to get a good look. But it’s huge! I can’t handle it on my own.
sid_phrase_EQ164_Dialog_VadikTalk_Yep_63: Hang on, I’ll lure it over here.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Comment_BaturinAfterVar: We'll wait here while they sort it out at HQ, Kluyev. Keep your head on a swivel.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Comment_BaturinAftermat: No offense, man. I was just doing my job.
You can go now. I’m a man of my word.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Comment_FakirRadio_Data: Trachuk, this is Trickster, come in. I’m at the meeting point, waiting for you with the data. Watch out for the Ward — they’re patrolling the area.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Comment_KluevAftermath_: Get out of my hair, okay?
You flashed your badge right in the nick of time. You could have gotten shot.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Comment_TrachukAfterDia: What are you waiting for? Go get that flash drive! Eh... please?
sid_phrase_EQ165_Comment_TrachukAftermat: You should speak to Victoria. I’ll tell her how you helped us. But I have to get in touch with Trickster first. I think we should change our meeting place.
I have nothing to say to you. Thanks for your assistance.
You've ruined everything! They’ll slash our budget now. Our work will be classified and transferred to SIRCAA. I’ll tell Victoria what kind of a man she trusted!
sid_phrase_EQ165_Comment_TrachukSkifLeav: Where are you going? What about my data?
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_AboutJob_Bye_674: Another time, okay? I don’t think your flash drive is going anywhere.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_AboutJob_Data_65: What kind of data were you gathering?
It was a standard procedure – we were measuring Anomalous energy levels over the course of an Emission. It’s white noise and static, usually…
But I detected something strange once. What I’m saying is the data is unique, Skif. So please help me get it back.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_AboutJob_Hi_6570: You’re Skif, right? Vicky... I mean, Professor Dorozhnyuk said you would come. I really appreciate your help!
So, I left the flash drive in the field lab, on the second floor of the Vehicle Station. I had to hide from an Emission, and when I came back, the station was full of anomalies.
That drive contains priceless data! It took months to gather it all! I tried to get it myself and nearly died... I need the help of a skilled stalker. Will you do it?
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_AboutJob_LetsGo_: Okay. Doesn’t sound too hard. You wait here, I’ll bring you your flash drive.
Thank you! Vicky went to so much trouble procuring the necessary equipment for our observations.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_AboutJob_Return_: So you've changed your mind? Please tell me you've changed your mind! I can’t get the data without you!
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_SparkSide_BadgeT: Are you on a friendly footing with the Ward? I hope Victoria wasn't wrong about you and you use your dogtag for a good cause.
And now, please, hand over the flash drive. Trickster must be waiting.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_SparkSide_Fakir_: Who's this Trickster guy? I heard him over the radio.
He's my contact in Spark. I asked him for help, to hide the data.
I suspect that some of my colleagues work for the Ward. If they find out what's on this flash drive, they'll take it from me and classify it.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_SparkSide_GiveUS: Here’s your flash drive. Now hurry, before the Ward comes to check up on their patrol.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_SparkSide_How_66: Okay, I get why this flash drive is so important to you. But why would the Ward want it?
This data isn't just a set of zeroes and ones, Skif. I've determined that every Emission carries a piece of information from the Noosphere. And I've learned to read it, so to speak.
I’ve only managed to process a fragment of this colossal data set, but even so... I learned things. Horrible things...
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_SparkSide_How_68: Things I wish I didn't know... imagine what could happen if this information gets to the Ward. It’s too terrifying for words...
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_SparkSide_ManyTh: I feel sick... this a nightmare... please give me the flash drive. Trickster is waiting for me.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_SparkSide_PayMe_: Sounds like valuable data, so it’s gonna cost you extra.
But Vicky said she handled the financial stuff... Oh. I see.
Yeah, I've heard that you stalkers aren't exactly the altruistic sort... fine, I’m sending you the coupons, and let’s be done with it.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_SparkSide_Trachu: Thank you, Skif! You’ve contributed to scientific progress and to making the Zone a safer place.
You’ve just helped so many people, Skif, you can’t even imagine!
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_VartaSpark_Badge: We are not your enemy, soldier. Release the doctor and go.
Okay, I see, I’m not blind... Klyuev, stand by.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_VartaSpark_TakeI: Take it, soldier. I don’t want any trouble.
Smart move, stalker. You can go.
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_VartaSpark_Varta: So, you’re Skif. I’ve heard of you. I’m sure we can find a compromise. Hand over the flash drive.
Shut up! Hand over the flash drive, stalker!
sid_phrase_EQ165_Dialog_VartaSpark_YouAr: Careful, stalker. What did you take from the lab? Hand it over. Don’t make us search your dead body too.
Careful, stalker. Trachuk told us everything. We know you have the flash drive. Give it to us, and you’re free to go.
No, no... they’ll steal my work! Skif, don’t do it!
sid_phrase_EQ165_docent_tracuk_0_InfoTop: You know why I came here? The Zone is the only place on the planet where a scientist can be a pioneer. It’s the frontier.
It's a place to step beyond the horizon of knowledge, escape the limits of our understanding of the universe... it sure beats sitting on your ass in a sterile lab from nine to five...
sid_phrase_EQ165_serzant_baturin_0_Defea: We need a medkit here! Quick!
sid_phrase_EQ165_serzant_baturin_0_InfoT: One of you stalkers asked to buy the armor off my back the other day. “Take it off,” he said. “Name your price.”
I said, “How about we take it outside, and if you beat me, it's yours?” He said no. Because the Ward’s strength isn't in our equipment. You stalkers just don't get it.
sid_phrase_EQ165_soldat_kluev_1_InfoTopi: I’ve seen some serious shit in my day... but the Zone is something else. They brief you thoroughly before sending you here. They give you this thick rule book...
About everything — all kinds of anomalies, every type of mutant. And then you see your teammate getting sucked into a whirligig, and you realize that rule book is only good for wiping your ass.
sid_phrase_EQ166_Comment_Valerian_AfterF: You really got me out of a jam there. Come over here, and let’s talk.
sid_phrase_EQ166_Comment_Valerian_Call_1: Either get in here with me or beat it while you’re still in one piece!
sid_phrase_EQ166_Comment_Valerian_Fight_: Where the heck are you bastards coming from?!
sid_phrase_EQ166_Dialog_OtecValerian_Bye: A simple “thank you” isn’t quite gonna cut it. I’m more interested in the reward.
Seems like everyone’s the same these days… All right, here’s a tip for a stash. I’m gonna get as far from here as possible.
sid_phrase_EQ166_Dialog_OtecValerian_Tha: Thanks for the help. Guess there are still a few youngsters out there who aren't completely hopeless.
I used to raise hell too, but those days are long gone…
sid_phrase_EQ166_Dialog_OtecValerian_Wha: What happened after the Second Emission?
Things settled down. The war with the bandits petered out. It was almost like the Zone itself was against it.
Afterwards, some of the guys left, and Sidor pushed us out of the Cordon.
All right, enough chitchat, it’s still risky around here. Take this tip for a stash for your help, and I’ll make my exit. I’ll just say goodbye to the guys first.
sid_phrase_EQ166_Dialog_OtecValerian_Who: A scumbag of the highest order! He ran Garbage. Wanted to take over the whole neighborhood with his goons.
They had the nerve to stake a claim on the Cordon. So I rounded up some loners to push the bastards back.
We gave them a good thrashing! We were ready to keep fighting, but then the Second Emission hit. I’ve never seen anything like it in my whole life.
sid_phrase_EQ166_Dialog_OtecValerian_Why: Duty sent us to clear the area. We failed. Overestimated ourselves.
I'm the only one who made it. Couldn’t save anyone else. I was so stupid... my men and I had been together since the Cordon.
Not a lot of people remember it nowadays, but we used to have a whole group going, protecting stalkers from Yoga’s bandits.
sid_phrase_EQ166_otec_valeran_0_ByeTopic: If you need anything, stop by!
sid_phrase_EQ166_otec_valeran_0_HelloTop: Hey there, stalker. What brings you here?
Catch you later — in a safer spot next time.
sid_phrase_EQ166_otec_valeran_0_InfoTopi: It's too bad about the guys. And I thought they’d be safer with me… I still remember the day we found our first artifact together.
We all gathered around it in a circle and just stared at it. We couldn’t believe what we were seeing. I’ll never forget that scene, that radiance… and the comrades who stood beside me.
sid_phrase_EQ16_Comment_LastComment_fara: Take care of yourself — and the Zone.
sid_phrase_EQ16_Dialog_WithFaraAboutAnom: Well… enjoying the view, I guess. These anomalies are… beautiful, don’t you think?
Makes you want to get closer, really look at them… feel them, even.
I haven’t really thought about it. I'm kinda busy.
You really should, stalker. Trust me, it's worth it. You spend your whole life chasing after loot…
And then, when shit hits the fan, there is nothing to remember. Here, help yourself. Let's enjoy the view.
You’d be better off admiring it from afar. It’s safer that way.
Yeah, that’s what they say. “Back off, stupid! It’s dangerous!” But they all get killed anyway, by a bandit's bullet or a mutant bite.
We all end up the same way, so why don't we do what we feel like? Eh, whatever. Move along, stalker. Take care.
Right on! Just look at this one. It could twist you and break you and turn you inside out in the blink of an eye.
Such power… and such unbelievable beauty! I keep trying to share this with someone, but they just don't get it.
You’re the first guy I’ve met who does… well, help yourself. Let’s just enjoy the view for a while.
sid_phrase_EQ16_fara_0_HelloTopic_1_4091: Beautiful day, isn't it? So what did you want?
sid_phrase_EQ16_fara_0_InfoTopic_1_whats: Have you seen the Ribs? The anomaly, I mean. The really freaking big one.
Slabs of concrete flying around like dandelion fluff... they look like they’re dancing. You really should check it out. It’s amazing!
sid_phrase_EQ16_fara_0_InfoTopic_2_1_588: If you haven’t been to the Poppy Field, you gotta check it out. It’s amazing!
But take a bunch of energy drinks with you. The place makes you fall asleep… and never wake up.
sid_phrase_EQ16_fara_0_InfoTopic_3_1_588: I haven't seen much of it, to be honest. Always chasing that loot. Then my leg got caught in an anomaly, and that was it for me.
I walked around a lot while I was recovering. That’s when I forgot about the coupons in my account and embraced the beauty of the Zone. Once you see it, you can't unsee it.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Bloodsucker_7: Bloodsucker tentacles. And, before you ask, we don't make first aid kits out of them!
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Boar_73042: Boar fangs. Lots of boars everywhere. Won't take too much time.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Burer_73049: Burer fingers. Be careful with the fingertips! I won't be able to accept damaged ones.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Cat_73048: Bayun whiskers. Perfect biogenic superconductors. It's a pity they aren't very durable.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Chimera_73052: Chimera ears. I understand the difficulty of the task, so the payment is appropriate.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Controller_73: Controller brain fragments. A dangerous mission, so think twice.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Deer_73044: Hornhead horns. Extra durable material our researchers managed to turn into dust. That process alone will be subject for separate research…
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Dog_73040: Nasal glands of a blind dog. Do not damage them when extracting!
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Done2_73167: Perfect, right on time! I'll record it in the log.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Done3_73169: Not mine. The Center's. This is your contribution to top research.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Done_73061: Finally! Thank you for your contribution to science.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Flesh_73041: Flesh eyes. Shouldn't be too much trouble, right?
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Jerboa_73043: Rodent paws. Yes, yes, I know they're lucky charms, but they serve a scientific purpose here.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Later_73055: Please keep in mind that the offer is time sensitive.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_List_73039: Here's what's crucial for our current research. I hope I can rely on your assistance.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_New_73037: What special orders do you have?
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_No_73038: As of this moment, none. Lab orders are still being processed, so you can try again later.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_NotYet2_73475: In progress. Need a bit more time.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_NotYet2_73476: I hope I can rely on you. Science is at stake.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_NotYet3_73477: Not yet. I'm working on it.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_NotYet3_73478: It's crucial that you speed up. The lab can't wait.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_NotYet_73056: I don't have everything yet. I'll come back.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_NotYet_73057: I would appreciate it if you'd hurry.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Poltergeist_7: Poltergeist organs. It's hard to get a pure specimen. I hope you can succeed.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Pseudodog_730: Pseudodog hide specimen. We are on the verge of developing a new generation of camouflage!
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Pseudogiant_7: Pseudogiant nails. Yes, a collector's order. Our budget is limited, but we're doing the best we can.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Refuse_73058: I can't fulfill this special order.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Orders_Snork_73046: Snork vertebra. Preferably from the neck. This kind of flexibility would be great for new exoskeletons.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Questions_1_73096: Do researchers happen to have any use for mutant parts?
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Questions_1_73097: We sure do! The labs are booked up for at least another week, and there's a constant need for more material.
sid_phrase_EQ197_QD_Questions_1_73098: You can submit what you have or take a special order with an extra reward.
sid_phrase_EQ198_AboutParts_Batya_1_7340: Is everyone after mutant parts in the Zone? Even rookies?
Why not? Gives them something to do. Before that, new folks would be hunted by bandits or just get themselves in some other kinda trouble.
sid_phrase_EQ198_AboutParts_Batya_1_7341: This way, they get a bit more used to the Zone, earn some coupons – and get sick of Hamster ripping them off.
sid_phrase_EQ198_AboutParts_Bereza_1_734: You're selling gear, so why do you need mutant pieces?
Ever heard of complementary sales? Relax. I'm just messing with you.
Seriously, though, I sell vests to hunters, then they kill mutants while wearing the vest, and they come back alive. Damn good reason to spread the word, loudly.
sid_phrase_EQ198_AboutParts_Boroda_1_734: What do you need mutant parts for?
I don’t really care what I trade in. And that damn Zaton zoo finally getting cleared out is a good thing.
Money flows, loners get work, bloodsuckers get bullets through their skulls. Everyone's happy.
sid_phrase_EQ198_AboutParts_Guron_1_7341: Aren't you grossed out by all those mutant parts?
What kinda question is that? The only thing I can smell is money.
You seem like a sharp one, but these questions…
sid_phrase_EQ198_AboutParts_Kalyna_1_734: Why did you start buying pieces of mutants?
You, of all people, Skif… Because there needs to be a supply when there's demand.
Or did you want to surprise me, not upset me? Contact my customers directly? I’d advise against testing my patience.
sid_phrase_EQ198_AboutParts_Kukuha_1_734: Why wouldn’t I? They can pick flowers or gut fleshes – whatever. As long as I get them to the destination in one piece.
They sell pieces of mutants to merchants, who then resell to whoever on the Mainland.
sid_phrase_EQ198_AboutParts_Pifagor_1_73: What does Malachite do with the mutant pieces?
Their research is the real thing! Some are used for regeneration tests, others for camo production, like a pseudodog’s. Can't say it's been going well, though…
But that's temporary. We'll definitely witness a breakthrough!
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Batya_1_1_7: When you’re done making charm bracelets out of mutant fangs, take them to Hamster. He’s got use for them, and coupons for you.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Batya_2_1_7: If Hamster asks for a piece of a bloodsucker, tell him to piss off. Stick with fleshes. Don’t go around playing hero.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Batya_3_1_7: Got yourself a nice mutant? Cut the good stuff out right away instead of dragging the whole thing to Hamster’s. His shop ain’t a butchery.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Bereza_1_1_: I got news! Someone wants to buy pieces of mutants. No idea what for, but you can sell yours to me.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Bereza_2_1_: In case anyone forgot: dead mutants are worth money! Hack ‘em up, and bring the parts here. Best exchange rate in the Zone!
