sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Bereza_3_1_: Hunters, it's time to gear up! If your vest is good enough, you can forget about fleshes – you’ll be selling chimeras in no time!
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Boroda_1_1_: Stalkers! Come sell your chopped up mutants. The reward will cover the ammo – and more!
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Boroda_2_1_: Remember: mutant parts are now up for trading. Clear Zaton, and make some coupons while you’re at it.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Boroda_3_1_: If I hear that anyone’s shaking other stalkers down for mutant parts, I’ll make sure you're missing parts and hanging from the mast! Is that clear?!
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Dorozhnyuk_: Attention: any mutant remains shall be received according to the list only! Anything not on this list goes into the incinerator.
To all field employees: I am always ready to collect mutant parts, even after hours.
Colleagues, we’re all adults here! Please record mutant pieces used in the experiment log! Otherwise, new orders for stalkers cannot be placed on time.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Guron_1_1_7: Enough of this crap with the mutant parts! I said I’m buying horns, so quit bringing me tails. Same for the other way around.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Guron_2_1_7: Find some skins, hooves, ears or whatever on a stalker? Don’t get all grossed out. Bring ‘em to me. I’m buying.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Guron_3_1_7: Get those mutant parts to me on the double! Y’all dragging them with you for weeks, then trying to sell me rotten crap I can barely sell.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Kalyna_1_1_: Whoever owes me doesn’t have the money and is too shy to stop by. Owl is buying mutant parts. You’re welcome to exchange guts for coupons!
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Kalyna_2_1_: Merchants now consider mutant parts less speculative trading and more an investment – which means they’re willing to buy. Get your mutant pieces to Owl.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Kalyna_3_1_: For the last time, take your nasty mutant bits to Owl! If you dump that crap on my counter one more time, you’ll be cleaning it with your tongue.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Kukuha_1_1_: Who’s willing to hunt some mutants down? I know places swarming with them. You can carve up so many that you’ll be swimming in coupons!
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Kukuha_2_1_: Righto, guys: I take you to the mutants, but I don’t help you take them down, got it? Or you split the reward you get for them.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Kukuha_3_1_: Huron asked to spread the word. If you shoot some mutants, hack them up and bring back the good stuff. Not for free, of course.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Pifagor_1_1: Don't enter the bar with mutant parts! It’s already been difinsec– disenfic— Ah, just don’t make me clean this up again! Take them to Dorozhnyuk.
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Pifagor_2_1: All mutant parts are to be taken to Dorozhnyuk at once. No need to give them a tour of Malachite! And wash your hands!
sid_phrase_EQ198_Loudspeaker_Pifagor_3_1: Dear colleagues and guests. A reminder from STC Malachite on the rules of submitting bio— Ah, screw it. Take your mutant pieces to Dorozhnyuk.
sid_phrase_EQ26_Comment_SignalSOS_1_5167: Can anybody hear me? We're surrounded and need help. I repeat, we need help. We've got wounded.
sid_phrase_EQ29_Comment_FirstScenario_Pl: So the artifact is there, but the courier isn't one of ours? I don’t like it.
Agreed. Find another spot. A quiet one.
Copy that. I’ll try to be discreet.
sid_phrase_EQ29_Comment_SecondScenario_P: Who was that guy? I thought he was gonna steal our stuff.
Everything's still there, but we don’t want this kind of attention. Find another spot. A quiet one.
Copy that. I’ll try to be discreet.
sid_phrase_EQ29_Comment_SkifCameBackToCl: Why is this prick sniffing around?
I don’t give a fuck. Let’s put him down.
sid_phrase_EQ29_s_hyphen_t_igor_valunec_: Nothing. Same ol’ picture, same ol’ scenery, like I’m posted in front of a photo backdrop. Wouldn’t mind a couple of days off… my brain’s already turning to mush.
sid_phrase_EQ29_s_hyphen_t_pavel_kropiva: Can’t you see I’m busy over here?!
I’m hit! I need a medkit!
Beats me. All I see is what's in my sights. And let me tell you, that scope ain’t exactly hot shit.
sid_phrase_EQ32_Audiolog_MSOPRadio_1_704: Come in, HQ. This is North. We spotted a mercenary near the checkpoint whose description matches the APB on Leshy.
He’s heading east, toward the abandoned construction site. I’m keeping an eye on him. Awaiting orders.
sid_phrase_EQ32_Dialog_AboutRadio_1_5105: Man, we’ve been riding the IPSF airwaves like bitches in heat, and there’s nothing! Leshy’s not a sucker – he won’t let the military have him. How much longer are we gonna listen to them?
As long as Elbow orders us to.
That’s bullshit! We should be eavesdropping on whoever might have hired him. Like Varan. Or the Shah. Either of them could be planning a new hit.
sid_phrase_EQ32_Dialog_AboutRadio_1_5106: Shut your trap. I’ve got something.
sid_phrase_EQ32_Dialog_MSOPRadio_1_51190: Come in, HQ. This is North. We spotted a mercenary near the checkpoint whose description matches the APB on Leshy.
sid_phrase_EQ32_Dialog_MSOPRadio_1_51191: He’s heading east, toward the abandoned construction site. I’m keeping an eye on him. Awaiting orders.
sid_phrase_EQ32_dima_vertuha_0_DefeatTop: Help me out, bro… I need a medkit.
sid_phrase_EQ32_dima_vertuha_0_InfoTopic: Look, pops, if I wasted my time jawin’ with everyone, I’d be walkin’ around with no teeth! But my whole grill is right where it oughtta be! You catch my drift?
sid_phrase_EQ32_dima_vertuha_0_ResumeCom: What was I talkin’ about? Oh yeah!
sid_phrase_EQ32_gerc_0_BusyTopic_1_51125: Come on, I’m busy. Hit the road.
sid_phrase_EQ32_gerc_0_InfoTopic_1_1_571: Them stalkers are getting tougher — refusing to share their loot, showing no respect, killing honest folk… we oughtta knock some sense into you smartasses. Remind ya who’s in charge around here.
sid_phrase_EQ33_Comment_Jeltok1_1_58314: Are you tone-deaf or somethin', Lytvyn? You’re off-key!
sid_phrase_EQ33_Comment_JeltokLitvin1_1_: Your songs suck, Lytvyn! Play something fun!
I don’t know any fun songs!
You’re such a downer, dude. At least play louder!
sid_phrase_EQ33_Comment_JeltokLitvin2_1_: Once these 24 hours are up, you and I are gonna have a little chat…
Are you threatening me, dude? You lost, and now you’re gonna pay. Come on, play louder!
sid_phrase_EQ33_Comment_JeltokTasksOrBye: Did you come here just to listen to some blind dogs howling? Calm your tits, that was just Lytvyn tryin' to sing.
sid_phrase_EQ33_Comment_JeltokToBar_1_58: Lytvyn’s one tough cookie. He could’ve squashed me like a bug. But now… now he won’t. Thanks for stepping in, man.
sid_phrase_EQ33_Comment_LitvinAfterTasks: All the rookies by the campfire are full of themselves. I used to be like them. Wisdom comes with age... if you manage to make it that far.
sid_phrase_EQ33_Comment_LitvinToBar_1_58: You set Yolk straight just in time. I’m not usually one to get riled up easily, but the kid just doesn't know when to pump the brakes.
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_1_: Can’t get enough, can ya? Don’t listen to him, stalker. He’s a goddamn Bloodsucker, except he feeds on coupons, not blood.
That’s how I met him. One thing led to another, and we ended up playing cards. Little did I know, he had a knack for cheating. The bastard cleaned me out.
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_2_: Fine! Get lost! You guys are all a bunch of squares! Crank it up, Lytvyn!
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_By: I’m not getting involved. So long.
I don’t care. Do whatever you want. I gotta go.
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_Ca: See that? He does whatever I tell him! While Lytvyn was busy memorizing poetry in school, I was beating my old man’s buddies at cards!
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_En: All right, that’s enough. You’ve brought a smile to my face, stalker.
Take a break, Lytvyn. And play me something upbeat while you’re at it!
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_Go: He could show you around the Zone, or even teach you about artifact hunting.
Why should I bother schlepping a bunch of artifacts around when I can just win 'em at cards?
Word travels fast in the Zone — faster than an Emission. It won't be long before nobody wants to play with you. What are you gonna do then?
Fuck, maybe you’re onto something there… fine, teach me then. What the fuck are you waitin’ for? As for you, stalker — get your ass outta here. I don't need no competition.
All right, I’ll leave you to it. Have fun.
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_Le: All right, let’s go. But if you get wasted, I’ll just leave you there. I’m not gonna carry you around.
Don’t piss Lytvyn off, stalker. You'd better cool it if you want to leave in one piece. Or better yet, just let him go.
Eh, come on. He ain't mad at me… you ain't mad at me, are you, Lytvyn?
Fuck-a-doodle-quack… So I was just fooling around a bit, so what? All right, let’s just hit the bar. You get me drunk enough, I’ll forgive you your debt. Deal?
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_Pl: Something’s off. You say he cleaned you out, but here you are, playing guitar for him.
It was either hand over my gear, or dance to his tune for one day. And as you can see, I've still got my gear.
At least he does what he’s told. Give it a shot, he’ll do whatever you tell him.
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_Ru: Move your ass, I said! Go, go, go! Oh, great! How do you like my little horsie? Just look at him go!
Run to that tree over there!
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_Sq: Do it! One, two… I’ll get you back in shape before you know it, Lytvyn.
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_St: Did you hear that? Atten-hut! Forward ma-… I mean, at ease!
Hello, my good man! How do you feel about a little gambling?
Lytvyn’s a seasoned stalker. He can show you the ropes... if you stop fucking around.
Why do I care if he’s a vet? What’s in it for me?
sid_phrase_EQ33_Dialog_TasksForLitvin_Wh: I don't owe you shit, man.
sid_phrase_EQ33_litvin_0_BusyTopic_1_590: Not right now. Can’t you see I’m busy?
sid_phrase_EQ33_litvin_0_InfoTopic_1_1_4: I’m still amazed I didn’t strangle Yolk that one time, but he actually turned out to be a decent guy — when he ain’t getting wasted or trying to con you out of your dough, that is.
sid_phrase_EQ33_litvin_0_InfoTopic_1_1_5: I'll make a real stalker of him in no time. Maybe then he'll stop getting artifacts and anomalies mixed up.
sid_phrase_EQ33_litvin_0_InfoTopic_2_1_5: Remember that rookie I lost at cards to? I heard he’s dead. Don’t give me that look, I had nothing to do with it. I don’t waste good bullets on shitstains like him.
sid_phrase_EQ33_litvin_0_ResumeComment_1: Give me a sec… oh, right.
sid_phrase_EQ33_zeltok_0_BusyTopic_1_590: Stay outta my way! This can wait!
sid_phrase_EQ33_zeltok_0_InfoTopic_1_1_4: Well, when Lytvyn and I went to the bar, I was already pretty hammered, so I started beltin' out some tunes. Guess what — a whole bunch of mutants came rushing in to listen to me sing!
If it hadn’t been for Lytvyn, my tale would’ve taken a nasty turn. Now I’m the one who owes him, not the other way around.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_GetRidOfSkif2_2_: Look, we had a chat and reached an agreement of sorts. If you keep disrupting my classes, there will be consequences.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_GetRidOfSkif3_3_: It looks like he’s laughing at us, folks. Let’s gear up and show him he’s messing with the wrong crew!
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_GetRidOfSkif_Tip: That's it for today’s lecture. Let's thank our fellow stalker over there, who tried to snag my hard-earned wisdom for free!
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_HrustalGlad_Gues: I’m so thrilled that the Legend is sharing his wisdom with us! Money is no issue — if I listen a little more, my first run'll definitely cover the cost.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_HrustalListening: Leave me alone. I'm trying to listen to the teacher.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_MasterTips_ITell: Blind dogs aren’t fully blind, and they’re terrified of the color orange. It reminds them of fire, you see. Those instincts are awfully strong.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_Silok_1_PP_52196: Man, this Lex guy is a hell of a storyteller. He really knows how to spin a yarn! It’s a real treat, eh?
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_Sobachnik_1_5219: This guy is something else! He’s been through a ton and seen a lot, and now he’s passing on his experience. It’ll cost you, sure... but it still beats getting your foot gnawed off by a mutant.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_Tip1_1_51734: I tore a Snork’s gas mask off once, and it dropped dead right away. I don't waste bullets on them anymore — I just take them down up close and personal.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_Tip2_2_51735: If you’re facing off against a Poltergeist, get drunk first. Those creatures are blind and deaf, but they can still sense your presence. But if you can’t sense yourself, the mutants can’t either!
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_Tip2_2_53231: Whoa, cool! And here I thought vodka was only good against radiation.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Comment_Tip3_3_51736: I’ve seen so much in the Zone… sometimes those memories keep me up at night. That’s when I head to the Poppy Field — you can catch up on a week’s worth of sleep in just a couple of hours.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_MasterAttacks_Owe: The Legend, eh? Or should I call you “Snag?” We had a deal, but your stash turned out to be bullshit.
Fuck, it’s that prick! Take him down!
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_MasterAttacks_Wha: Huh? Whaddya want? Can’t you see I’m chillin’ with the guys here?
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_SkifLegend_Amalga: Are you gonna tell me how important it is to develop my anomaly sense? Amalgam almost bit the dust trying to develop his.
Look, listening to advice is only half the battle. You also need to know how to put it into action.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_SkifLegend_Bespre: Why don’t you tell me how to track a chimera using fuel barrels? Bedlam’s still looking for one, you know.
Yes… that was unfortunate. But sometimes the hardest lessons stick the best. The kid will learn, get wiser, and probably thank me for it in time.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_SkifLegend_Bullsh: I don’t want to keep my audience waiting, so let’s cut to the chase. You’re looking for either money or loot. We’re both reasonable men, so how about we make a deal?
Easy, guys! Just give us a couple of minutes alone. I got this.
Hey! Are you messing with us?
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_SkifLegend_Bye_51: I’d better go. You can keep your tips.
Knowledge isn’t something you can stash in your bag like loot. And an attitude like that won’t score you much loot either.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_SkifLegend_Hi_515: I trust your hunt was successful, stalker. If not, feel free to seek my advice. I collaborate with scientists and possess extensive knowledge. I’ve been to both SIRCAA and Prypyat.
I'll give you my first tip free of charge. We’re a close-knit community, after all. We all tread in the shadow of the same Perimeter and seek refuge from the same Emissions. What say you?
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_SkifLegend_Leave_: All right. It’s none of my concern.
Hmm... what a strange conversation. But I won’t keep you. I need to prepare for a trip to Prypyat. The Oasis isn't going to discover itself, after all.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_SkifLegend_LetsTr: Really? So what are you suggesting?
I’ll give you the coordinates of a stash. It’s got some choice loot — you’ll love it. After that, we’ll never cross paths again.
Now, assuming we’re on the same page, leave this place, and stop hindering others from seeking enlightenment.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_SkifLegend_MoreTi: We're going to jump ahead a bit in the syllabus for our guest’s sake.
I can tell this isn't your first rodeo — you need an advanced tip. Well, here you go: a pseudogiant is kind of like a bear, and its eyesight is poor at best. If you run into one, freeze and stay put.
It’ll think you're part of the scenery and leave you alone — unless you piss it off first. But then you’re going to need a whole new plan anyway.
Third time’s the charm. Any more tips?
A thirst for knowledge is a wonderful thing, but try to keep it in check. Let’s come back to this some other time.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_SkifLegend_Ok_515: Ever tried disabling an anomaly with a grenade? A well-placed hit won’t destroy it outright, but it can render the anomaly harmless for about a minute.
But figuring out when it’ll come back to life requires either guts or hours of observation. Now, would you like another tip? The next one’ll cost you.
sid_phrase_EQ35_Dialog_SkifLegend_PayOff: I see. Then we'll do this the hard way.
sid_phrase_EQ35_kola_hrustal_0_InfoTopic: When I first set foot in the Zone, I thought I was the smartest guy around. I went out alone and almost got myself killed. Now I’m trying to wise up and learn from guys who really know their shit.
sid_phrase_EQ35_leha_legenda_0_InfoTopic: I just love veterans of the Zone. Want to know why? They’re way too important to deal with the rookies. Meanwhile, I’m happy to share my knowledge — for the right price, of course.
sid_phrase_EQ35_romka_sobacik_0_InfoTopi: I’ve got the worst luck! First they sell me a busted gun, then I drop my backpack right into an anomaly. Even the local thugs won’t bother shaking me down — they know I’m flat broke.
The Legend and his lessons are my last shot.
sid_phrase_EQ35_silok_0_BusyTopic_Busy_5: Get lost, I’m real busy right now!
sid_phrase_EQ35_silok_0_InfoTopic_1_Info: Can you believe they’ve set up a proper market at Rostok? Freedom’s making a killing there lately. I still remember the days when Duty ran Rostok… time flies, eh?
sid_phrase_EQ36_Comment_DidNotHelp_Disap: You’re as useful as a screen door on a submarine, stalker.
sid_phrase_EQ36_Comment_IfSkifDontHelp_h: What are you doing, man? Fire!
sid_phrase_EQ36_Comment_KucerAsksForHelp: Help me out, man! Take ’em down!
sid_phrase_EQ36_Comment_SkifHelped_GoodJ: Thanks, stalker. You helped me out big time.
sid_phrase_EQ36_Comment_WhileKucerRunToG: Hold on, I gotta take a look at the grave.
sid_phrase_EQ36_Dialog_MutantsDead_Burie: Who went and dug up this grave?
Fucking mutants, that's who! They can dig up a shallow grave in a flash. And with all the radiation, you can’t dig a proper one.
Yeah. Can’t dig a proper pit with all the radiation around. And a shallow grave gets uncovered in no time. Goddamn beasts…
The mutants dug up the grave?
sid_phrase_EQ36_Dialog_MutantsDead_HowTo: What happened to Tolik? How did he die?
We were out on a run not far from here. It was getting late, and I got caught in an anomaly. He pushed me out, but…
We covered almost the entire Zone together, him and me. He taught me so much, bailed me out countless times… and I… I couldn’t even tend his grave. Fuck…
sid_phrase_EQ36_Dialog_MutantsDead_Leave: Sorry for your loss. I’ll leave you to it. See you around.
sid_phrase_EQ36_Dialog_MutantsDead_NoTal: I’m real busy right now, man. Move along.
sid_phrase_EQ36_Dialog_MutantsDead_Rewar: I helped you with mutants. Are you gonna give me something in return?
Here you go. It’s not coupons, but this stuff can be pretty valuable out in the field.
sid_phrase_EQ36_Dialog_MutantsDead_TellA: New around here, are ya? Strelok’s a legend. He was just about the first to make it to the center of the Zone.
The place is relatively safe nowadays. But ten years ago, you go north of Malachite, and your brains would turn to mush.
sid_phrase_EQ36_Dialog_MutantsDead_WhoLi: Who was buried here? A partner of yours?
Yeah… my partner and mentor. Tolik was one of a kind. He knew Strelok personally. He told me Strelok once rescued him at the Rookie Village.
sid_phrase_EQ36_Dialog_MutantsDead_secon: Well, ask away, since you came back here.
sid_phrase_EQ36_kucer_0_InfoTopic_1_Info: Every now and then I hear stories from guys who swear they’ve crossed paths with Strelok. They always say he's a grim, somber dude, someone you’d better not mess with.
I think they’re full of shit. He saved Tolik. That means Strelok is a decent guy, not some bogeyman.
sid_phrase_EQ37_Comment_Attention_Attent: Mikha Sheepskin… Luther, Hollywood… so many years, and it still feels like yesterday…
sid_phrase_EQ37_Comment_Random_1_Random1: Mikha… your brother, our platoon commander… the mutants tore him to shreds, you know? There was nothing left to bury…
sid_phrase_EQ37_Comment_Random_2_Random2: By the way, Hollywood… I never thought I’d say this, but I miss your dumb jokes. You were the only one who ever laughed at them, remember? Used to guffaw like a hyena…
sid_phrase_EQ37_Comment_Random_3_Random3: I guess I lost our bet, Luther. I’m over 40, and still not a general. Here, I brought you a bottle. Just like you asked.
sid_phrase_EQ37_Dialog_AboutPast_DoNotDi: I’ll leave you to it. See you around.
sid_phrase_EQ37_Dialog_AboutPast_MoreInf: Can you tell me more about that?
You’ve heard of the Second Disaster, right? That’s what they call the very first Emission, the one that created the Zone. It happened back in 2006.
They sent in the military to blow the whole place to Kingdom Come. I was one of the first to get here. I served with Tachenko’s company…
It was a hell I’ll never forget. We were totally unprepared. Nobody knew anything. We had no detectors, no protection… so many of our men died…
sid_phrase_EQ37_Dialog_AboutPast_NeedToG: I’m sorry for your loss. I need to go now.
Sorry for bothering you. I’d better go.
sid_phrase_EQ37_Dialog_AboutPast_Start_4: Well, ask away, since you’re here.
sid_phrase_EQ37_Dialog_AboutPast_WhatHap: Why are you drinking all alone? Did something happen?
Yeah. About twenty years ago. See that foundation?
It’s a grave, stalker. A mass grave.
sid_phrase_EQ37_Dialog_AboutPast_WhoBurr: The men who are buried here… did you serve with them?

Yeah. Another Emission hit us when we were about to go to the Center of the Zone. I thought the world was about to end right there. When I climbed out of my foxhole, the place was littered with corpses.
We found some intact equipment, collected the bodies, and poured concrete over them… then Tachenko told HQ to fuck off and founded Duty. That’s a piece of our history, loner.
Then the survivors began pouring in. Tachenko was told there was no extraction coming, so he ordered us to bury the dead.
sid_phrase_EQ37_Dialog_LeaveMe_Leave_499: Give me some space, would you?
sid_phrase_EQ37_grom_0_CallPlayer_Call_5: Hey. Come over here, would you?
sid_phrase_EQ37_grom_0_DefeatTopic_NeedH: Help! Don’t leave me here to die…
sid_phrase_EQ37_grom_0_InfoTopic_1_Info_: I don’t know. This place doesn’t change much. There’s a schism in Duty. The guys who are dissatisfied with Voronin are getting bolder and louder.
As for me… a long time ago, I swore to avenge my fallen comrades, and I’ll side with whoever can help me get my revenge against the Zone.
sid_phrase_EQ38_Comment_GrechkaAboutStas: I found a stash of energy drinks in the Poppy Field. Your handiwork? Pretty useful.
Sure did come in handy, huh? I damn near bought the farm in that field. Still can’t figure how I made it out in one piece.
That’s why I got that stash together. Figured it might be a lifesaver for another stalker like me. Maybe it’ll inspire him to lend a hand to others too.
Yeah, that was me. Figured it might help some poor bastard who goes charging into that anomaly unprepared like I did. But I guess stalkers are better at receiving than giving.
I thought we were all in this to survive, but it feels more like we’re just robbing the Zone and each other… anyway, I’m clocking out. It was a dumb idea to begin with.
sid_phrase_EQ38_Comment_Rumor_EnergyDrin: I just grabbed an energy drink from there yesterday!
sid_phrase_EQ38_Comment_Rumor_Everything: Somebody was very thoughtful. Booze, snacks... what else do you need, right?
sid_phrase_EQ38_Comment_Rumor_Food_37207: Someone added some snacks to the menu!
sid_phrase_EQ38_Comment_Rumor_GoodPeople: There are still good people out there!
sid_phrase_EQ38_Comment_Rumor_NeverMind_: Whenever I stop by to check it out, it’s empty. Some asshole just grabs everything and never puts anything back in! That’s it, I’m done with charity.
sid_phrase_EQ38_Comment_Rumor_PDA_37213: Too bad somebody stole the note. It said, "Take what you need, leave what you can." Everybody's gonna miss the point now!
sid_phrase_EQ38_Comment_Rumor_Rumor2_500: The one at the Poppy Field, by the milk truck.
sid_phrase_EQ38_Comment_Rumor_Rumor_3720: Remember that stash of energy drinks I left behind, guys?
sid_phrase_EQ38_Comment_Rumor_StealPDA_3: I walked by it yesterday, and the note was gone. I guess the backpack won’t be sticking around for long either. This is what happens when you try to help.
sid_phrase_EQ38_Comment_Rumor_Vodka_3721: I was walking by it earlier and decided to check on it... and there was vodka in the backpack! Pretty sweet, right?
sid_phrase_EQ38_grecka_0_InfoTopic_2_1_6: I’m new to the Zone, still learning the ropes. Only been to the Poppy Field so far. It's gorgeous, but it’s a dangerous place!
It makes you drowsy, and if you fall asleep, you’re as good as dead. Better stick to Zalissya. If you nod off there, it’s just out of sheer boredom.
sid_phrase_EQ38_grecka_InfoTopic_1_1_395: People are getting restless. There's so much anger in the air. There are guys who'll gun you down at the drop of a hat. They'll kill a man for nothing without a second thought.
sid_phrase_EQ43_Comment_KiryaMedicHub_He: I got exposed to radiation. Barely made it here. Help me!
sid_phrase_EQ43_Comment_KiryaSkif_Sorry_: No offense, but I’d rather talk when I’m not at death's door.
sid_phrase_EQ43_Comment_Recovery_Recover: I appreciate it, guy, but let’s talk later. I need to rest.
sid_phrase_EQ43_Dialog_Kirya_BadAttitude: I brought some medication. It’ll help against radiation exposure.
This is for me? What’s with the sudden generosity? Eh, it doesn’t matter.
I brought you some medicine. It’ll help with the radiation — and your failing health, too.
Huh… whoa. Nice. That’s some strong stuff.
I’m afraid I can’t help you with your condition.
How polite of you… well, scram.
Don’t mind me, man. Thanks, or whatever. I’m just… well, I'm still a little tipsy. Diarrhea of the mouth, ya know? Well, I’m off. I’ll catch up with you later.
You wanted some vodka. Well, here it is. Now get to the doctor.
Now we’re talking! What took ya so long?
Oh, it’s you again. Here to watch me croak, huh? Or just waiting to snatch my loot? Well, hold your horses. I’m still kicking.
sid_phrase_EQ43_Dialog_KiryathanksForSav: Here, this'll come in handy. I really appreciate what you done for me.
There you are! I’ve got something for ya.
Hey there. What have you got?
Here, take this. It’s for saving my ass from radiation. I really appreciate what you done for me. Take care, stalker.
Can you remind me who you are again?
I caught a ton of rads from a radioactive artifact. But I made it here, all thanks to you.
sid_phrase_EQ43_Dialog_SkifKiryaHelp_Ant: Hey, that’ll help a little. Thanks!
sid_phrase_EQ43_Dialog_SkifKiryaHelp_NoH: Shit, I’m gonna croak over here…
sid_phrase_EQ43_Dialog_SkifKiryaHelp_NoT: Sorry, I don’t have time for this.
I’ve got even less time than you do, man!
sid_phrase_EQ43_Dialog_SkifKiryaHelp_Rep: Gimme some vodka or anti-rad, please!
sid_phrase_EQ43_Dialog_SkifKiryaHelp_ScK: I’ve got a scientific medkit. It’ll flush those radionuclides out in no time.
Sounds complicated… but this thing oughtta fix me up real quick. Might even help with my hangover.
sid_phrase_EQ43_Dialog_SkifKiryaHelp_Sti: Need a little hair of the dog? You reek of booze.
I’ve absorbed a shit-ton of rads, man. If radiation had a smell, ya wouldn’t even notice the vodka.
I chugged two bottles just to keep going. Do ya have any more? Or maybe some anti-rad… I gotta make it to the doc.
sid_phrase_EQ43_Dialog_SkifKiryaHelp_Vod: I ain't no drunk, okay? But now I can make it to the doctor. Thanks!
sid_phrase_EQ43_Dialog_SkifKiryaHelp_Wha: I got ex… exposed to radiation. Real bad.
I chugged two bottles just to stay on my feet. So, uh... got any more? Or maybe some anti-rad, if ya got any. I gotta make it to the doc.
sid_phrase_EQ43_Dialog_SkifKiryaHelp_hel: Stalker, help me out! Get me some vodka, will ya? Don’t leave me here to die!
sid_phrase_EQ43_kira_0_BusyTopic_Busy_53: I’m in the middle of something here. Later!
sid_phrase_EQ43_kira_0_InfoTopic_1_Info_: Remember when I caught a massive dose of rads? That's what I get for diving into an anomaly after an artifact. Turns out that ugly piece of rock was pretty much worthless.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_BanditsNoticePla: Look alive, boys! We got a client here!
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_Bandits_WatchDut: The Shah's right, you know. We keep starting shit with Duty, but the pricks never get off their lazy asses.
Why don’t you shut your trap and keep your eyes peeled? We’re on patrol here.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_NotShoot_NotShoo: Why didn’t you shoot? We need a soldier, not a spectator! Get lost!
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_SergDidenko_Afte: Those criminals have gotten way too cocky. But that's okay, Zulu'll put 'em in their place.
So... the damn Bloodsuckers couldn't even get the lieutenant, but then those punks took him out.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_SergDidenko_Befo: Go talk to the boss, loner.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_SergSemidomov_Af: Not now. Wrong place, wrong time.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_SergSemidomov_Be: Listen up, people! Are you ready to remind those scumbags what it means to face the real Duty? Then let’s go!
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_SergSemidomov_Ca: Help us, stalker! Shoot those bandit pricks!
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_SergSemidomov_Fi: Hey loner, come over here. We have something to discuss.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_SergSemidomov_Pl: Pull yourself together! We need your help!
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_SergValuev_After: Those bandits will steer clear of us now. Thanks for the help.
What a bloodbath... it’s too bad the lieutenant didn’t make it.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_SergValuev_Befor: Go talk to the boss, man. He wanted to talk to you.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Comment_ZulusGiveReward_: They say no one's irreplaceable, but that's just not true. No one can replace the lieutenant. They broke the mold when they made that guy.
We appreciate your help, stalker. Duty won’t forget it.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Dialog_AlreadyKilledBand: There was some commotion at the bandit camp. We haven't seen them since. Do you know what happened?
You won’t be seeing them again. They're all dead.
That's tough, but fair. I respect it.
Okay then, we’d better check the area. And you can expect a little token of our gratitude very soon. Good luck, stalker.
I happened. They had it coming.
Well, shit! You're our kind of guy!
Okay then, we’d better check the area to make sure there aren't any surprises... and you can expect a little token of our gratitude very soon. Good luck, stalker.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Dialog_BanditsKilled_Deb: I took a risk here. Gimme some extra pay.
This isn't Rostok, and I’m not in the mood to haggle. Take your coupons, loner.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Dialog_BanditsKilled_Gla: Hey, we did a good deed here. Happy to help.
You’re damn right we did, stalker! Those bandits have no respect for us, and they'll treat everyone like shit if we don’t stop them.
Now take this and patch yourself up. Good luck.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Dialog_BanditsKilled_Hel: Those bastards were a tough bunch... thanks for taking our side.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Dialog_HelpDuty_Bye_5046: I think I’ll pass. Got enough on my plate right now.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Dialog_HelpDuty_Bye_5047: Then wish us luck, and go take care of that plate of yours.
sid_phrase_EQ50_Dialog_HelpDuty_Hello_50: Hi, stalker. So, we have a... tricky tactical situation on our hands. The bandits are squatting in one of our facilities, but Voronin is choosing to ignore it.
But I think we have to get those assholes out of there, with or without his orders. So we could use your help — for an decent reward, of course. What do you say?
sid_phrase_EQ50_Dialog_HelpDuty_SkifNeed: What are the bandits looking for here?
That's a damn good question, stalker. The bastards are taking over turf that belongs to Duty. And, unlike Voronin, Zulu isn't having it.
sid_phrase_EQ50_serzant_didenko_0_Defeat: Fuck, it hurts... I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_EQ50_serzant_didenko_0_InfoTo: You heard about the Treaty? Voronin signed it, and guess what? Nothing's changed! Actually, a few things have changed... for the worse!
They used to fear us — in other words, they respected us. Now every asshole in the Zone tries to spit in our faces, and we let it slide.
sid_phrase_EQ50_serzant_semidomov_0_Busy: It’s gonna have to wait, stalker.
sid_phrase_EQ50_serzant_semidomov_0_Defe: I’m hit! I need a medkit, now!
sid_phrase_EQ50_serzant_semidomov_0_Hell: So, what brings you here, loner?
sid_phrase_EQ50_serzant_semidomov_0_Info: Nothing’s new. We keep clearing the surface, eliminating mutants when Voronin isn't looking. So... same old, same old.
I wish we could do some recon over by the Concrete Forest — mutants keep coming out of there. But we don’t have enough men to risk it.
sid_phrase_EQ50_serzant_valuev_0_DefeatC: Fuck... I’m hit! Need a medkit!
sid_phrase_EQ50_serzant_valuev_0_InfoTop: Have you seen the guns the Ward is packing? So new and shiny... now look at ours — they're held together by duct tape and a prayer.
My gun is barely holding on, and those assholes refuse to give me a new one. They say it's still good. I'm gonna be fighting off mutants with sticks and stones at this rate.
sid_phrase_EQ51_Comment_AfterDialog_Pash: I should have talked you out of it, Pashko… man, I’m such an idiot…
sid_phrase_EQ51_Comment_TemaJet_AfterFig: Did you kill ‘em all? Whoa! Goddamn it, now I owe you one.
sid_phrase_EQ51_Comment_TemaJet_FirstMee: Hello! Anybody?! The mutants took me down! I need help!
sid_phrase_EQ51_Dialog_AboutMutants_AskF: A little reward goes a long way…
Sure thing, loner. Here, take this.
sid_phrase_EQ51_Dialog_AboutMutants_ByeN: Thanks for not leaving me in the lurch. I won’t let you go without some coupons. Have a good one.
sid_phrase_EQ51_Dialog_AboutMutants_ByeR: Thanks for not leaving me in the lurch. See you around.
sid_phrase_EQ51_Dialog_AboutMutants_EQ20: Look… I found your friend. He’s dead. I’m sorry.
Fuck… I should have talked him out of it. But I just kept my trap shut, as usual…
He was always the cocky one… loved to take risks. And I… I just took the bait... shit, this is all my fault.
Well, it doesn’t matter anymore… thanks for telling me.
sid_phrase_EQ51_Dialog_AboutMutants_Hell: I thought I was done for. Thanks a million, bud.
Why the hell did me and Pashko split up? I just knew we were gonna blow our mission. We should have gone in together! Stupid show-offs, both of us…
sid_phrase_EQ51_Dialog_AboutMutants_What: What mission are you talking about?
We got sick of standing watch and delivering paperwork to Voronin, so we decided to go to Zulu.
He gave us a test to prove we’ve got what it takes to be real soldiers worthy of serving in Duty.
Pashko talked me into splitting up in order to impress Zulu. And I stupidly went along with it.
sid_phrase_EQ51_Dialog_AboutMutants_WhoP: My squadmate. Private Pavlyuk. We’re from the same platoon. We had some orders to carry out, but we split up like a couple of morons.
He went into the tunnel to get the stash while I dealt with the mutants here. I hope he’s at least completed his mission.
sid_phrase_EQ51_Dialog_AboutMutants_WhoZ: And it looks like I just botched mine. If Pashko shits the bed too, we can forget about serving under Zulu.
So Pashko and I decided to give it a try, but… the whole thing went tits up, as you can see.
Zulu’s a good dude. The Zone never broke him, unlike Voronin. He still remembers what Duty’s supposed to be all about.
He’s got a unit of his own. And if you want to serve with him, you gotta pass the test.
sid_phrase_EQ51_tema_dzet_0_BusyTopic_Bu: I’m real busy right now. Later.
sid_phrase_EQ51_tema_dzet_0_DefeatCommen: Help… fuck, it hurts so bad…
sid_phrase_EQ51_tema_dzet_0_HelloTopic_H: Hey, loner. I knew we’d meet again.
sid_phrase_EQ51_tema_dzet_0_InfoTopic_1_: Well, Zulu took me in. Too bad Pashko didn’t live to see it…
He wanted to join the real Duty so bad, the dumbass got himself killed. Almost got me killed too…
I told Zulu everything — all about you, the mutants… and he still took me in. I told ya he was a good dude.
Well, Zulu took me in. I told him everything — all about you, the mutants… I told ya he was a good dude.
sid_phrase_EQ51_tema_dzet_0_ResumeCommen: All right. Let’s get back to it.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Comment_AlternateStart_h: Hey, stalker! That’s my bro over there. Bring me his body, okay? Please?
sid_phrase_EQ52_Comment_BodyFound_hey_29: That’s him, that’s Bubbs! Bring him over here!
sid_phrase_EQ52_Comment_BodyStolen_perve: Where are you taking him, you sick fuck?!
sid_phrase_EQ52_Comment_CallPlayer3_call: Stalker, wait! I’m serious. I need some help!
sid_phrase_EQ52_Comment_CallPlayer_call_: Hey, Mister! I'm talking to you. Get over here!
sid_phrase_EQ52_Comment_Damage_ouch_2910: Can you see him? Try to stay alive in there, bro!
sid_phrase_EQ52_Comment_IfEmissionAfterD: We need to find shelter. We’ll come back later.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Comment_Left_left_29854: Where are you going? He’s right there!
sid_phrase_EQ52_Comment_RIPFriend_1_4601: Tough luck, bro… it’s all the fucking Shah fault!
sid_phrase_EQ52_Comment_SkifDropBody_2_4: Just bring him over to me. I’ll make it worth your while.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Comment_UraSorryEmission: I’m sorry, Bubbs. I’ll be back.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_CompleteQuest_Bro: You know what? You got any problems, gimme a call. I got your back. Word is bond.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_CompleteQuest_Che: Here you go. May he rest in peace.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_CompleteQuest_Don: Grand! How about a toast to my bro?
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_CompleteQuest_Kup: Bubbs was right, there’s still some decent folk out there. Gimme a sec, I’ll send you the coupons.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_CompleteQuest_Loo: You looted my bros’ body. You ain’t gettin’ a single coupon from me.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_CompleteQuest_Mon: Gimme a sec. Thanks for gettin’ Bubbs outta there.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_CompleteQuest_Not: I’ll drink to his memory, sure. But the booze is on you.
If I had any... Here’s the deal: you go buy some, and we’ll raise a glass to my bro. Got it? I’ll send you the dough.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_End_end_29852: You can go now. I need some time alone. It’s personal. Show some respect, okay?
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_Final_Neutral_meh: We got nothing to talk about.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_InProgress_anomal: He’s right there, inside the anomaly. Bring me his body, and you’ll get paid.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_TakeQuest_helpme_: Help me out, loner. My bro died in an anomaly. I can’t just leave him there, you know? We gotta get him out.
My bro owed some dough to some real bad dudes, and he just couldn’t break even. Eventually he got desperate and decided to try his hand at the artifact biz. That’s how he ended up in that anomaly.
I’m asking you, man to man: you gotta get him out of there.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_TakeQuest_ifno_29: So, what do you say? Will you help me get my friend out of the anomaly?
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_TakeQuest_ihelp_2: Now we’re talking. It’s a deal!
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_TakeQuest_loot_45: And no robbing the dead, okay? Show my bro some respect.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_TakeQuest_no_2909: Fuck… All right. Come back if you change your mind. I ain’t leavin’ Bubbs in there.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_TakeQuest_suspici: Don’t you dare talk shit about me, bro. I’m a man of my word.
sid_phrase_EQ52_Dialog_TakeQuest_why_290: Why don’t you get him out on your own? He’s your friend, right?
If I stick my nose into that shit, I’ll end up dead too. I’d rather pay a pro.
sid_phrase_EQ52_ura_fantomas_0_HelloTopi: Hey, I remember you. You’re the guy who got my dead bro outta that anomaly.
sid_phrase_EQ52_ura_fantomas_0_InfoTopic: If you’re looking for work, I can’t help you there, bro. Let’s toss one back instead. To Bubbs! And to your health too.
sid_phrase_EQ52_ura_fantomas_0_ResumeCom: So, where was I? Oh, right!
sid_phrase_EQ54_Comment_ArkanBusy_1_6360: You should ask Root over there.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Comment_FriendsChat_Firs: You’ve had enough. You drink one more, and you just might fall yourself.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Comment_FriendsChat_Seco: Remember when you tried to lure a Flesh to Sidorovich?
Yeah... it was smarter than us, that Flesh. It didn’t wanna go anywhere near him.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Comment_MalavaBusy_1_636: Root invited you, so ask him.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Comment_Reward_1_64038: I see you put up with their bitching and moaning. Thanks, man. I owe you one. Here, I sent you some coordinates.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Comment_Reward_1_64039: Got them the other day as part of a trade. Got no idea what’s there, and, frankly, I don’t really want to go. But if you check it out, there might be some loot there.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Comment_SecondCall_1_FF_: Don’t just stand there, come sit with us!
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_ArcanStory_Quit_6: You should rest, soldier. I’ll be on my way.
Then go! Quick march, double time!
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_ArcanStory_Start_: That fucker Voronin… I’d like to kill him with my bare hands…
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_ArcanStory_TellMe: You shouldn’t drink that much on an empty stomach.
And you... shouldn’t tell me... what to do. Screw you. And screw Voronin.
He said anyone who’s in cahoots... with Zulu... doesn't deserve good guns. He gave us this crap... so mine jammed when those mutants attacked us.
So Andrew’s dead now... I couldn’t protect him... screw Voronin, and screw Zulu!
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_KorenStory_NoProb: Really? So Freedom treats you well?
Of course. It’s not as uptight as Duty. You wake up whenever you want, you bet in the Arena, you drink at the bar with your pals... ain’t that sweet?
My time with Sidorovich was just a nightmare. You always gotta keep your freedom, stalker. Remember that. And let Sidor burn in hell.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_KorenStory_Quit_6: Good for you. I have to go.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_KorenStory_Start_: Thinking about Sidor makes me sick to my stomach... I don’t like dwelling on the past. Things are way better today.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_FirstWFR_Alt: So, you wanna drink and chat? Wise choice!
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_FirstWFR_Con: So, let’s make some introductions. That drunk over there is Noose. Former Duty. Used to be a man of high integrity, but his delicate psyche made him drink it all away.
This goblin here is Garry. He's always been a wreck, but he really started falling apart here in Garbage — both mentally and physically.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_FirstWFR_NoD: I’ll pass on that drink. So, why did you call me over?
Cutting right to the chase, huh? Fair enough. The Zone’s no place to drink with strangers.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_FirstWFR_Yes: Okay. It'd be rude to refuse.
Hey, we've got a proper gentleman here, boys!
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_ForthWFR_Alt: If you deal with Sidor, you'll end up owing him your pants before you know it.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_ForthWFR_Pro: We brought him loot once — almost died getting it, all covered in blood and sweat. He paid us for it, but when we asked to buy some medkits, he jacked up the price.
He knew we had no choice — there was no medic here at the time. Not only did we have to give him all the coupons we got for the loot, we even found ourselves in debt! That’s when we decided to leave.
Yeah, it was shitty time. The boys are no better now, though. They’ll tell you all about it if you’re willing to listen. Please do. I’m so sick of being their shoulder to cry on.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_Quit_63619: Okay, nice chat. Time for me to get going.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_Quit_63620: Oh, that’s too bad. I was kinda hoping to talk to you more... All right. Take care.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_SecondWFR_In: You’re from Freedom, right? You’re quite the curious bunch.
That we are. But we all started out as loners at the Cordon — shared some adventures there, hated Sidor together... and then we just went our separate ways.
But we still like to get together here sometimes — sharing news, remembering the old days... but the boys aren't in a good mood today. So, what brings you here?
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_Start_63607: Finally, a new face! I’m sick of seein' the same ugly mugs all the time. Especially yours, Jacket.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_Start_63609: Don’t mind him, he’s just bitchy today. Bitchier than usual, anyway. Have a drink with us, loner.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_ThirdWFR_Con: Yeah, I get that. Just steer clear of Sidorovich — he'll rob you blind.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_ThirdWFR_Got: I’ve got my reasons, and I don’t want to discuss them, okay?
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_Main_ThirdWFR_Loo: I just took a scenic route to admire the area's natural beauty.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_MalyavaStory_Afte: There’s no Garbage anymore. The kingpins couldn’t agree on sharing a fucking dumpster.
Now we’re all under the Ward’s boot. Well, fuck that. I’m not gonna be the Ward’s bitch. I’m taking my boys and leaving.
Root'll give us some gigs. We’ll manage. Freedom has plenty of... duties to be dealt with. And they don’t like to get their hands dirty.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_MalyavaStory_Befo: The situation's normal: all fucked up. It’s all gone to hell without Nestor. All the kingpins are at each other’s throats.
Everyone tries to hog the blanket. Nestor would never have allowed that. All that's left for us is... fucked if I know. I’m actually afraid my pals are gonna stab me in my sleep.
It can’t go on like this. We’ll just kill each other, and there’ll be none of us left. There has to be one kingpin, and that’s it.
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_MalyavaStory_Ques: So, what’s the situation at Garbage right now?
sid_phrase_EQ54_Dialog_MalyavaStory_Star: So, what do you want, mate?
sid_phrase_EQ54_arkan_0_ByeTopic_1_61933: Off you go. No need to salute.
sid_phrase_EQ54_arkan_0_DefeatComment_1_: Toss me a medkit! I’m right here!
sid_phrase_EQ54_arkan_0_InfoTopic_1_1_61: Freedom's got a special store just for members. Know what they call it? The Duty-Free Shop! Can you believe those assholes?
sid_phrase_EQ54_koren_0_InfoTopic_1_1_61: He’s a good boss, our Myklukha. He’s one of us. He’s not above hanging out with us. As for Voronin... I don’t think he remembers his men’s faces, let alone their names.
sid_phrase_EQ54_malava_0_InfoTopic_1_1_6: I’m thinking about getting the hell out of Garbage. I hate it with every fiber of my being, you know? Especially my liver! Or what’s left of it after all the vodka, anyway...
sid_phrase_EQ55_Comment_AfterFail_1_6099: Why’d you bail on me? I was counting on you, and now I’m the laughingstock of the entire Cordon…
sid_phrase_EQ55_Comment_Appeal_2_61299: Hey! Can you give me a hand?
sid_phrase_EQ55_Comment_Appeal_3_61300: Hold on! You got a minute?
sid_phrase_EQ55_Comment_NotHere_1_60964: Here’s the ladder. Climb on up.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Comment_Reward_1_64254: Swing by, I owe you one.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Comment_Sucess_1_60967: Thank you, stalker! That's step one — I got an invite to the fire. Now I just need to find someone to watch my back.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Comment_Sucess_Reward_64: Here’s a little something for your creativity. I’m off to join the guys. Take care!
sid_phrase_EQ55_Comment_Where_1_60963: Where you at, buddy? Get up to the attic. It’s right over here, up this ladder.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_1_60851: You wanna hear a joke, man?
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_AreYouSure_: You know, that’s the last thing I expected to hear. You really think a joke’s going to make a difference?
Well, humor’s a good way to break the ice with folks. It’s not everything, sure, but one thing leads to another, and then I just might find someone to team up with.
I’d rather have an awkward moment than end up dead in an anomaly 'cuz there was no one to get me out. That’s my take on it, anyway.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_BadJoke_640: Here's a tip: a joke is funnier if you don’t forget the ending.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_Bye_60859: I’ll pass. You’re on your own here.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_Bye_60860: Got it. I won’t bother you.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_ChangedYour: You changed your mind? Will you help me with that joke?
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_ILeave_6405: I don’t have time for this. You can save the ending for some other time.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_JokeYes_640: Sure, I’ve got a couple of jokes up my sleeve. Let’s give it a shot.
Great! Here’s the plan: I’ll go join the guys, and you head up to the attic by the fire. Once you’re up there, we’ll get in touch over the radio. Let’s do this!
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_Joke_64045: The vet yells, “Hah! So they were bullshitting me about that anomaly!” Even I know that one. It’s an oldie.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_No_64096: I got no time for this, sorry. Gotta go.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_SphrotHelp_: Oh, man… look, stalker, I’m trying to get in good with this group, but we just ain’t clickin'. I’m sure you’ve figured out why.
Give me a hand, would ya? How about this: I’ll go over to the guys, and you’ll whisper a joke to me over the radio. You seem like you've been around the block — you probably know a ton of 'em.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_Yes_60855: All right. So there’s two stalkers, one vet, one rookie. Uh, how does it go again?
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_Yes_60856: Oh yeah! The vet turns to the rookie and says, “You see that tree? Go over there, but real slow.” The rookie's all jittery as he walks there, and then the vet yells…
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Intro_Yes_64044: Wait, what does he say? Hold on, I got this...
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_BarBanditsDo: “So the other bandits can tell them apart from the zombies.”
The bartender goes, “How else could the other bandits tell ’em apart from the zombies?”
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_BarBanditsHi: “Because when they drink, they gotta toast to all of their dead kingpins.”
The bartender goes, “’Cuz imagine pouring one out for every one of their dead kingpins.”
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_BarBanditsSi: Because, uh… they’re from Garbage! Garbage is stinky! Get it?
I think I’ve heard that one before. All right, Sprat. We’ve had enough.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_BarBandits_6: “Why do bandits from Garbage always reek of stale booze?”
Uh… “why do bandits from Garbage always reek of stale booze?” “I dunno,” the stalker says, “Why?”
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_BarNoonBoat_: “You don’t. The Monolith's calling him to rock bottom.”
The bartender goes, “You don’t. The Monolith's calling him to rock bottom.”
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_BarNoonShoot: The bartender replies, “Well, you can start by taking your foot off his head.”
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_BarNoonSilen: Uh, how did it go again? Right! “You shoot him to put him out of his misery!”
That sucked! I sure hope you’re quicker with your gun than you are with a joke, Sprat.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_BarNoon_6086: “How do you save a Noontider from drowning?”
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_BarNoon_6484: Uh… “how do you save a Noontider from drowning?” “I dunno,” the stalker says, “How?”
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_BarSuccess_6: Ha, not bad. Well, what are you waitin’ for? Take a seat. I might not be a bartender, but I can fix you a drink.
Sure, go ahead and pour me one. Just give me a minute, I’ll be right back.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_Bar_60864: A stalker walks into a bar, and the bartender asks him…
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_Bar_64839: So a stalker walks into a bar, takes a seat, and the bartender asks him…
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_HospitalDiff: “An onion? When I cut into an onion, I cry!”
“When I chop up an onion, I start cryin'!”
And, uh… the death truck? The truck’s about 150 pounds heavier!
What’s the difference between you and a sober Duty guy?
The Duty guy is still funnier.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_HospitalPati: “It’s the Sultan. So watch your bedpan — he’s always out to steal other people’s vessels!”
“So keep an eye on your bedpan — he’s always tryin' to steal other people's vessels.”
“Uh, yeah… um… it's a chimera!” Sidorovich is taken aback. “What happened to it?” The doctor replies, “It's sufferin' from split personality disorder!”
Seems like I’m gonna be the first stalker in the Zone to die of sheer boredom.
“It's a Bloodsucker.” Sidorovich is taken aback. The doctor explains, “It's having liver pains. It really needs to change its diet — stalker blood is 90% vodka!”
“It's a Bloodsucker! It’s having liver pains.”
“It should really consider changing its diet — stalkers have more vodka than blood runnin' through their veins!”
“Apologies in advance, but your neighbor in the next room…”
“Don’t worry, but your neighbor in the next room…”
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_HospitalSile: “Well, I, like, saved your life, but I’m not about to play the good Samaritan. So you owe me one.”
“Ahem... so just do a couple of tests, and we’re square…”
“Oh my, not those tests! I was talkin' about a psi-field test!” Get it?
Yeah, we get it. So what? We’re not wasted enough to find this stuff funny. Give us some space, okay?
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_HospitalSucc: Hey funny man, how about you tell that to Sidorovich’s face? Ha! Take it easy, we’re just messing with ya. Come sit with us. How about a shot?
Sure, go ahead and pour me one. Just give me a minute, I’ll be right back.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_Hospital_608: Sidorovich ends up in the hospital. And the doctor says…
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_Hospital_648: “So Sidorovich ends up in the hospital. The doctor walks in and says…”
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_ReadyOrNot_6: You all set? Let’s get started.
Hey, guys! You wanna hear a joke?
Uh-oh. Our resident comedian is at it again.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_Silence2_609: And so, um, the blind dog stands on its back legs to raise a toast…
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_Silence2_648: Ahem... so it tries to make a toast, but ends up stumbling and spilling booze all over itself. Everyone’s cracking up, and the dog…
“And the dog just stands there muttering something stupid. And then it hits us — it’s Sprat!”
Hey, funny man! Got any magic tricks up your sleeve? How about a disappearing act?
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_SilenceBarte: “You’ve had enough, Flesh. You’re drunk as a skunk.” And the Flesh goes, “Stop trying to control me!”
“That's it for you, Flesh. You're drunk as a skunk.”
And the Flesh is like, “Stop tryin’ to control me, man!”
“This is the last one.” The Flesh drinks more and falls, the dog quotes Faust, “the spirit is willing but the Flesh is weak.”
“You’ve had enough, Flesh. This is the last one.” The Flesh still drinks another one and falls under the table.
And the dog is like, “And Faust told me — the spirit is willing but the Flesh is weak.”
Uh, he says, like... “Just don’t swipe the blind dog's booze again, okay?”
And the dog’s like, “Oh, now I got it! And here I thought you were just waterin' down my hooch!”
We ain’t wasted enough to find that funny, man. Beat it, Sprat.
And the bartender’s a Controller. It eyes the Flesh’s empty glass and says…
And the bar is run by a Controller. It glances at the Flesh’s empty glass and says…
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_SilenceFlesh: The blind dog gets up and goes, “Okay, that's enough drinking for tonight!"
So, um, the blind dog, like, says to it, “Are you? You know, I can’t see any difference.”
Is that supposed to be funny?
So the blind dog offers him some advice: “Just rub your snout, you’ll feel better.” The Flesh replies, “How? I’ve got no hands.” The dog goes, “Whoa, I didn’t see that coming.”
“Try rubbing your snout, that’ll sober you up,” the dog says.
“But how? I’ve got no hands,” says the Flesh. And the dog’s like, “Oops, didn’t see that one coming…”
And the Flesh says, “Damn, I’m so wasted. I feel like such a pig.”
The Flesh is like, “I’m so wasted. I feel like such a pig!”
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_SilenceSucce: Hey, that wasn’t half bad! So whatcha waitin’ for? Got any more jokes up your sleeve? If not, come join us for a drink.
Sure, go ahead and pour me one. Just give me a minute, I’ll be right back.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_Silence_6093: Ahem, anyway… so, picture this: a blind dog and, um, a Flesh are sitting in a bar.
sid_phrase_EQ55_Dialog_Joke_VacationSile: Uh… “I’m thinking of going on vacation. Any guesses where I’m heading?”
“Prypiat. I really love fishing, you know. And they say you don’t even need a rod to catch a fish in Prypiat. They just stroll right out of the water.”
I wish you’d catch a decent joke for a change, Sprat. Now give us some space, would ya?
sid_phrase_EQ55_leha_styr_0_BusyTopic_1_: No, no, can’t talk right now.
sid_phrase_EQ55_leha_styr_0_InfoTopic_1_: Are you kidding me? We’re in the Cordon, man! Nothing ever changes here. Zalissya’s where all the action is, if the rumors are true. But here… well, you can see for yourself.
sid_phrase_EQ55_lena_sprot_0_DefeatComme: I’m hurt! I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_EQ55_lena_sprot_0_InfoTopic_1: You’re asking the wrong guy. I’ve only been here a couple of days. Well, I guess Sidorovich knows my nickname now. Or maybe he was just listing all the fish he knows.
sid_phrase_EQ55_sana_sajga_0_DefeatComme: I’m down! I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_EQ55_sana_sajga_0_InfoTopic_1: I swear I saw Sidorovich leaving the bunker, but no one believes me. They say it’s too much of a miracle, even for the Zone.
sid_phrase_EQ55_urka_plut_0_InfoTopic_1_: I’m sick of those old-timers, stalker. “The Cordon ain’t what it used to be… back in the day, ten years ago… and then Strelok… yadda-yadda-yadda.” I should’ve just gone to Zalissya.
sid_phrase_EQ57_BorodulinUpset_Upset_260: Shit! My whole hunt is ruined now!
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_BorodulinCallSki: Freedom it ain't, but a dead Flesh'll do in a pinch. Come over here.
Hey! March your ass over here, private.
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_BorodulinCallsFl: Come on, mutants! The Colonel’s about to pump ya full of lead!
Nice report! We’re gonna butcher ’em like cattle. Hey! Over here, you freaks!
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_BorodulinLike_Go: Damn, that feels good! I haven’t had that much fun since Prypiat, when we nailed those Freedom bastards one by one… you alive over there? Good. Now we can talk.
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_BorodulinProvoca: Look like you've got Freedom-style balls — little shriveled-up things. You think you can get to Roosevelt uninvited? Well, be my guest. I could use a laugh.
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_BorodulinRadioCa: Where are going? Come back here this instant! No dead Fleshes, no Commissary for you!
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_BorodulinSongLon: Everyone’s got icons, but Freedom – they’ve got coupons!
They failed to take the Zone by force, so now they sell their ass, of course!
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_BorodulinSongSho: Freedom members got no spine, and they smell like filthy swine!
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_BorodulinStartSk: Ready or not, I’m coming to get ya! Let’s have some fun!
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_BorodulinTalkToM: What are you ruminating about over there? Need a special invitation? Speak up.
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_BorodulinUpset_1: Shit, my whole hunt is ruined now! Still, a real Duty member never leaves empty-handed. Come over here, private!
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_EscortLeavesWhil: Where do you think you’re going, you chickenshit civvy?
What is it, private? We’ve got mutants to shoot!
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_LetsHuntLater_Le: An Emission’s about to begin. If you wanna go hunting with the Colonel, come back later.
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_RadioCallReward_: Here’s your reward, private. That was a hell of a hunt!
sid_phrase_EQ57_Comment_SkifBrokenRules_: What in tarnation?! I’m the one doing the shooting here!
sid_phrase_EQ57_Dialog_BorodulinAfterQue: What can you tell me about Duty, Colonel?
The Duty I knew is all but gone. Now they're just the Ward's lapdogs… but at least those dogs still get sicced on bad guys instead of just carrying Korshunov’s slippers in their mouths.
Why do you hate Freedom so much, Colonel?
'Cuz they’re pussies. Only pussies would gut rookies who haven’t even got a whiff of the Zone yet.
If I'd been at Rostok back then, Myklukha wouldn’t have gotten shit.
sid_phrase_EQ57_Dialog_BorodulinOffersTo: How about this, Colonel: you get your hunt, and I get some information. I need to get into the Commissary. Quietly. I hear you know the place like the back of your hand.
Ha, I used to have every rodent out there lining up to report to me. until that bastard Roosevelt… But that’s none of your business.
You want information, load up your boomstick. We’ll see if you’re fit for anything beyond wiping Freedom’s asses.
What’s up, private? Feel up to shooting some mutants with the Colonel? Good, good.
Wanna hunt some mutants with a real Colonel from Duty, private?
Then get the hell outta here.
I know some Duty members. You don’t look like them.
Yeah, sure thing. If you haven’t served, then shut yer trap. Everybody in Duty knows me.
So, are we gonna hunt us some mutants, or what?
sid_phrase_EQ57_Dialog_BorodulinReward_G: Impressive! You just made my day. Now, about the Commissary. Use the pipes to get inside quietly. They go all the way around the building.
Climb in through the bathroom in the courtyard. Then get on the balcony, and you’re in. Don’t fall for Roosevelt’s sweet talk, he’s an asshole.
sid_phrase_EQ57_Dialog_BorodulinReward_R: Remember, you’re only alive because I wanted it that way. The Colonel never misses. The Colonel takes care of his men!
sid_phrase_EQ57_Dialog_BorodulinReward_V: Anything I should know about the Commissary?
Nowadays it’s a run-of-the-mill criminal hangout, except that they shoot a little better. It takes time to piss that Duty training away.
sid_phrase_EQ57_Dialog_BorodulinReward_w: A friend of mine — my best friend, the bastard. He and I used to give Freedom hell back in the day.
Until the Ward got us in a choke-hold with their fucking armistice Treaty, anyway. So we ended up here, at the Garbage. This place... the air here turns people into trash.

Then the power went to Roosevelt’s head, and he kicked me out. Said I was too drunk. So what? Those Freedom sons of bitches are living their best life, and we’re stuck here hunting those Brood scum! Why shouldn't I get loaded?
sid_phrase_EQ57_Dialog_BorodulinTalkLate: Come back later... unless you wanna die in the Emission.
We can chat once we’re done hunting.
sid_phrase_EQ57_Dialog_BorodulinWantsMor: Okay… since we’ve got nothing to shoot at, here’s an idea.
I'll give you some time to hide your ass, and then I start shooting. Survive for one minute, and you’ll get your Commissary pass.
Did you grow some balls, or what?
Missed it, sorry. I was too busy saving your ass.
Shut up, you snot-nosed little puke! Who do you think you’re talking to?!
Did you see that? My whole damn hunt is ruined now…
I’ve got a better idea: you do the running, I do the shooting.
You asshole! I’m gonna get you!
Are you nuts? I’m not about to get myself killed, Colonel.
Think you can ruin my fun now? Fuck no!
Remember, Colonel, I need information about the Commissary.
Soldiers who hide behind senior officers don't deserve squat.
You couldn’t hit the broad side of a barn.
Shut up, you snot-nosed little puke! Duty never misses!
That’s what you promised me last time, but here we are.
Duty’s word is stronger than a Burer’s head. Be a good sport, and you’ll get yours.
So, how about it?
You know what? I ain’t done shooting yet! These mutants might look scary, but they suck as targets.
How about you entertain me now?
I'll give you some time to hide your ass, and then I start shooting. Survive for one minute, and you’ll get your Commissary pass.
Did ya see that? Watch and learn, private!
Sure thing. You can’t hit anything anyway, Colonel.
We’ll see about that. I’m counting to three.
sid_phrase_EQ57_Dialog_SkifRaidBorodulin: Roosevelt — anything I need to be concerned about?
Well, he’s a better shot than I am. If you catch him off guard, he might be willing to talk.
Anything I should know about the Commissary?
It’s a run-of-the-mill criminal hangout… with a little more discipline, that’s all. Roosevelt keeps drilling 'em.
I need a safe way to get into the Commissary.
You can use the pipes to get inside quietly. They go all the way around the building. Climb in through the bathroom in the courtyard. Then get on the balcony, and you’re in.
Here you go, Colonel. Get well.
You’ve got your vodka, Colonel. That’s good enough for you.
Fuck! Why? I didn’t even hit you!
I’m going to ask you one more time, Colonel…
At least gimme a medkit. I’m dying over here!
sid_phrase_EQ57_polkovnik_borodulin_0_De: I need a medkit on the double, private!
sid_phrase_EQ57_polkovnik_borodulin_0_He: Hey there. That was one hell of a hunt, but I’m busy now.
sid_phrase_EQ57_polkovnik_borodulin_0_In: I’m here to give orders, not gossip. Flapping your gums doesn’t win wars, private!
sid_phrase_EQ57_polkovnik_borodulin_0_Pe: That’s enough questions. A Duty Colonel answers to no one.
Colonels don’t wander around the Zone alone…
That’s none of your business. Now run along, private.
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_BanditsCallSkif_: Hey, you! Whatcha doin’ out there?
Come over here. Let’s have ourselves a chat.
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_BanditsScreamIfS: The chump’s runnin' away! Get him, boys!
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_BanditsWait_1_55: Why don’t we just kill them and get outta here?
No way. There’s got to be something of value in that stash.
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_BanditsWait_2_55: What if he grabs the loot and takes off?
Don’t worry. I can handle this.
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_FedkaDirectToFar: Hey! Not that pigsty, the one across from it.
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_ShapkaCommentSta: Fuck! Why the hell’d you take him out? You’re history!
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_ShapkaGoSearch_S: Go on, keep looking. A man’s only as good as his word, right?
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_ShapkaThinkWhatT: Shit, Shapka… you clocked him pretty good there...
Yeah, looks like he’s gonna snuff it. So what do we do now? How do we find his stash?
I’ll check his pockets. Bet he's got somethin' on his PDA.
Fuck, another stalker… What are we gonna do now?
Chill. He’s gonna fix our little problem here. These stalkers know their stashes.
What the fuck is he doing there? What if he finds the stash?
All right. Lock and load, boys.
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_ShapkaThisStalke: Hey, hands off our buddy! Go find his stash instead.
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_VovcikDuringFigh: We'll talk after we kill the bastards!
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_VovcikEnd_vovcik: I'm fine... more or less. A little rest, and I’ll be good to go.
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_VovcikSendToShap: You got any questions, talk to Shapka.
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_VovcikStartFight: Let’s get these pieces of shit!
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_ZekaDirectToShap: Talk to Shapka. He’s the boss.
Do I have a stutter? You got any business, you talk to Shapka.
sid_phrase_EQ60_Comment_ZekaPlayerKillSh: That prick just iced the boss!
sid_phrase_EQ60_Dialog_ShapkaExitDialog_: So what are you doing here? Keep on looking!
sid_phrase_EQ60_Dialog_ShapkaTalkWithPla: Hey there, stalker-boy. I got a job for you. Easy-peasy.
Why did you attack that stalker?
What do you care? You wanna join him?
Calm down, Fedka. Can’t you see he’s just concerned about his fellow loner?
If you help us, we’ll let the little bitch go.
Fine. But I get half the loot.
Of course you do. As soon as you find the loot, bring it here.
You think you can just walk away?
I've got a better idea: you pack up and leave, and I don’t hurt you.
Fuck… another guy who don't see reason.
Looks like we gotta teach this one a lesson too.
That's not my kind of job. So long.
What do I need to do?
We’ve been watching this creep for a week. He’s got a stash in the pigsty. We turned the place upside down, but didn't find squat.
You stalkers are good at this stuff. Find his stash, and we'll split the loot. Sounds good?
sid_phrase_EQ60_Dialog_SkifHelpVovcik_no: Hold on, I’ll go get you a medkit.
sid_phrase_EQ60_Dialog_StalkerSayThanks_: Why didn’t you just tell those thugs where your stash is?
If I did, they’d have killed me on the spot.
There's nothing of value in there. Even if they didn’t off me right away, they’d have done it afterward out of sheer spite. So I was trying to stall for time.
I guess I was hoping for a miracle, some kind of divine intervention from the Zone… and in the end, that’s just what I got.
Thanks again. Check my stash – something there just might come in handy.
How did those thugs get you, anyway?
They were following me, I guess. Caught me when I was checking on the stash. They used some… enhanced interrogation techniques on me.
Thanks, man. They’d have put me down like a dog if not for you. I’ve got a stash in this pigsty here. It's all yours.
I’ll throw some coupons your way too. Everything I’ve got. Seriously, I owe you one.
sid_phrase_EQ60_fedka_splint_0_BusyTopic: Are you blind or something? Get lost.
sid_phrase_EQ60_fedka_splint_0_InfoTopic: Do I know you? No. So get lost.
sid_phrase_EQ60_vitek_sapka_0_DefeatComm: Fuck, so much blood… I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_EQ60_vitek_sapka_0_InfoTopic_: If you need protection or you wanna do a hit on somebody, lemme know. I’ve got two good guys here — we can handle anything.
sid_phrase_EQ60_vovcik_0_InfoTopic_1_1_5: When I came to the Zone, I thought I'd miss Mainland life — the amenities, the entertainment…
But you know what? I don't! Who needs gadgets when your adrenaline is pumping and every day feels like it's your last?
sid_phrase_EQ60_zeka_lysyj_0_BusyTopic_1: Unless you want your ass kicked, back off.
sid_phrase_EQ60_zeka_lysyj_0_DefeatComme: Fuck, it hurts! I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_EQ60_zeka_lysyj_0_InfoTopic_1: If you got business, speak up. Time is money, dude.
sid_phrase_EQ60_zeka_lysyj_0_ResumeComme: What was I saying? Oh yeah...
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_BoryaAgr_1_52200: You messed up our deal, asshole! You’re done for!
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_FirstBanditIfSna: Shit... you got a sniper? You’re dead, motherfucker!
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_HobotFindBackpac: He screwed me after all… I’d bring him back to life and shove more lead down his throat if I could!
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_HobotIfSkifLootD: I’m gonna loot your corpse myself!
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_HobotSupport_1_4: Nobody asked for your help. Now scram. I’ll give you a minute, and then whatever happens next is on you.
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_IfGoAway_comment: Hey, Fly. Why the hell did you point that gun at us when the stalker showed up, huh?
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_IfGoToBackpack_c: You! Stay away from my shit!
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_IfStartShoting_c: What the hell? Fuck 'em up, bro!
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_IfStay_comment_2: Looks like he just don't get it.
Guess we’re gonna have to explain it to him. Right, boys?
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_MuchaSupport_1_4: Who the hell are you, punk? I don’t know you. But the deal’s been queered, and somebody’s gotta pay.
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_MuhaEmission_1_4: Hold on. An Emission? Talk about bad timin’. We gotta settle this quick.
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_MuhasBanditFight: You screwed up the deal! Now you’re fucked!
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_SecondBanditSnay: It’s an ambush! You’ll pay for this!
sid_phrase_EQ62_Comment_UkolFindBackpack: So the pricks tried to screw us!
sid_phrase_EQ62_Dialog_BanditsTalking_ta: Nuff beatin’ ’round the bush. First you gimme the dough, then you get the goods. Now cough it up.
Listen up, kid – don’t gimme that shit. I know your type. You’ll get it when I get my guns.
Hey… We had a deal, and that ain't it. I don’t get it. You tryin’ to fuck me over?
You don’t need to get it. “Getting it” takes effort. Just do what I say, and you’ll get your cut.
This is total BS! You think I’m a sucker or somethin’? I knew it. This ain’t workin’ out, boys. The deal’s off.
What did you just say? I oughtta kick your ass!
sid_phrase_EQ62_Dialog_GosaUkol_Blank_1_: That was pretty badass, steppin' in like that.
sid_phrase_EQ62_Dialog_HobotBlank_1_4328: You go your way, I go mine. You get the hint?
sid_phrase_EQ62_Dialog_IfPlayerWasSeen_f: Okay, take it easy, Trunk. Who’s this clown? Another one of your boys? Why'd you bring him here? Are you tryin’ to screw with me?
Don’t be an asshole. I’ve never seen this prick before in my life. Hey, stalker, you with Fly?
sid_phrase_EQ62_Dialog_IfPlayerWasSeen_s: What are you guys doing here?
None of your business. Get outta here while you still can.
sid_phrase_EQ62_Dialog_IfPlayerWasSeen_w: You're outnumbered, so I thought I'd give you a hand.
Lookin' for some wet work, eh, punk? I think that can be arranged.
Fly’s got the upper hand, and I always side with the winner.
Hey, it’s gettin’ a little hot in here…
I'm just passing by. I don’t give two shits about your beef.
sid_phrase_EQ62_bora_sina_0_InfoTopic_1_: When I make it to the top, everybody’s gonna tiptoe around me. I’ll clean this place up. My bros are gonna be livin' the life! Uh... just don’t tell the boss I said that, 'kay?
sid_phrase_EQ62_bora_sina_0_ResumeCommen: What were we talking about again? Oh yeah!
sid_phrase_EQ62_gosa_ukol_0_InfoTopic_1_: Don’t pull your piece out unless you’re gonna use it or clean it. Ain't no chicks to impress around here. Nobody gives a shit.
sid_phrase_EQ62_hobot_0_InfoTopic_1_1_55: If you wanna snatch some decent loot without getting your hands dirty, nothing beats a good old-fashioned stickup by an anomaly.
Stalkers are always exhausted when they come outta them things. It’s like takin’ candy from a baby.
sid_phrase_EQ62_hobot_0_ResumeComment_1_: Eh, wait… oh yeah, that’s it.
sid_phrase_EQ62_misa_muha_0_BusyTopic_1_: Back off, kid. I’m real busy.
sid_phrase_EQ62_misa_muha_0_InfoTopic_1_: I found a fourth eye on a Flesh. Under the tail, heh-heh-heh.
sid_phrase_EQ62_misa_muha_0_ResumeCommen: Eh… what was I talkin’ about? Oh yeah!
sid_phrase_EQ62_tarhun_0_BusyTopic_1_433: Are you blind? I got no time for you.
sid_phrase_EQ62_tarhun_0_InfoTopic_1_1_5: You oughta listen to smart people instead of running your mouth. They know way more than you.
sid_phrase_EQ62_tarhun_0_ResumeComment_1: Hold on… it’s right on the tip of my tongue… right!
sid_phrase_EQ65_Comment_PiavkaFalse_1_60: I’ll walk it off a little and then head for the village.
sid_phrase_EQ65_Comment_PiavkaTrue_1_602: Thanks for the warning, man. I won’t go anywhere near the Rookie Village from now on.
sid_phrase_EQ65_Dialog_PiavkaAgain_1_602: Yeah? You got something to say?
sid_phrase_EQ65_Dialog_PiavkaAgain_Trait: I found his PDA. Sidor suspected you of trading with the military behind his back, so Moose was going to kill you.
Shit! So that’s why he was so damn eager to keep me company! Well, serves him right then.
And Sidor can go fuck himself. He “suspected” me, huh? Every damn sucker who does business with him wants nothing more than to jump ship!
Okay... thanks for telling me, stalker. I’m gonna get as far as I can from the village... as soon as I pull myself together.
sid_phrase_EQ65_Dialog_PiavkaAskHelp_1_6: Help me, man, I’m gonna die here!
sid_phrase_EQ65_Dialog_PiavkaAskHelp_No_: No can do. Don't have a medkit.
Please don’t leave me! Moose had one on him... search him...
sid_phrase_EQ65_Dialog_PiavkaMainDialog_: Whoa, thanks, stalker. I thought I was gonna bleed out there. “Quick stash run,” my ass. Easy-fuckin’-peasy...
I shouldn’t have taken Moose with me. Fuckin’ mutants... I couldn’t save him...
How did the boars get you so bad? You don’t look like a rookie to me.
Yeah, it was stupid, I know. Moose distracted me. Started asking me about... well, things... it doesn’t matter. All that matters is I didn’t see 'em coming. And that’s when they got the jump on me.
But it’s not my place to complain. My partner got torn to pieces. And he didn’t even need to go, he was just keeping me company...
It’s not your fault. Sorry, I gotta go.
I sent you the coordinates to a stash. Thanks for saving me.
I found his PDA. Sidor suspected you of trading with the military behind his back, so Moose was going to kill you.
Shit! So that’s why he was so damn eager to keep me company! Well, serves him right then.
And Sidor can go fuck himself. He “suspected” me, huh? Every damn sucker in his crew wants nothing more than to jump ship!
Okay... thanks, stalker. Here are the coordinates for a stash. Take it. I’m gonna get as far as I can from the village... as soon as I pull myself together.
sid_phrase_EQ65_Dialog_SidorovichReward_: If you’re expecting Moose, he’s won’t be coming. As for Leech... well, you don’t have to worry about him either.
All right. Take this for your trouble. And keep it under your hat, okay?
sid_phrase_EQ65_piavka_0_InfoTopic_1_1_6: They say Sidorovich had a beef with Gaffer over poaching his clients and stalkers…
But I don’t think it's Gaffer's fault. It’s just the free market's, uh... oh yeah! Invisible hand. That's the ticket.
sid_phrase_EQ66_Comment_LihacDontYouHear: Are you deaf or what? Get out of here while you still can!
sid_phrase_EQ66_Comment_LihacGoAway_GoAw: Hey! You! Back off! That’s my loot! I was here first!
sid_phrase_EQ66_Comment_LihacLastWarning: One step closer, and you’re dead!
sid_phrase_EQ66_lihac_0_InfoTopic_1_1_56: Word is, there’s a real nasty mutant roaming around…got this superpower of boring folks to death with his dumb-ass questions!
sid_phrase_EQ67_Comment_CallSkif_skif_he: Over here, stalker! I need a medkit…
sid_phrase_EQ67_Comment_ForCombat_kot_ko: Son of a bitch! I’ll make mincemeat outta you!
sid_phrase_EQ67_Comment_YuraAskForMercy_: Why the fuck did you patch me up earlier then, huh?
sid_phrase_EQ67_Comment_YuraForEmission_: No time to chat. We’ll talk after the Emission’s over.
sid_phrase_EQ67_Comment_YuraMumbling_Not: You’re not just gonna ditch me here, right, stalker?
sid_phrase_EQ67_Comment_YuraMutters_yura: They killed everyone… everyone… nobody made it…
It’s the Monolith… we’re fucked… I need to get outta here…
sid_phrase_EQ67_Comment_YuraSaysAboutMon: Thanks for saving me. Feel free to check the goods we brought for the deal. Take whatever you need. I’ll hit the road as soon as I get better.
sid_phrase_EQ67_Dialog_WithYuraAboutMedi: I don’t have time for this, stalker.
No, but I can look around for one.
Our medic’s gotta be around here somewhere. He must have some on him.
Help me! Got a spare medkit?
sid_phrase_EQ67_Dialog_WithYuraAboutMedk: I have to go. Get well.
I see a lot of bodies. What kind of camp was this?
It wasn’t a camp. Just a spot remote enough to meet up with some gangster clients.
We shared a bottle and had a productive conversation… could’ve been a great deal if not for… this.
I met up with my pals to talk shop when we spotted some figures in the distance.
A moment later, I’m lying here bleeding. You know who it was? The Monolith. Last time I saw them, we were still stationed at the Military Depot.
Back then, those whackjobs mostly stuck to the center of the Zone. If they’re roaming all over the place now, we’re screwed, man. We need to get the fuck outta here!
sid_phrase_EQ67_ura_kot_0_BusyTopic_yura: I can’t talk right now, dude.
sid_phrase_EQ67_ura_kot_0_InfoTopic_1_In: I thought Noon were decent folks. They were in a tough spot, not well liked in the Zone, and had nowhere else to go.
Looks like I was dead wrong.
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_AfterPassGood_we: All right, stalker! Get over here.
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_IfShootWithoutOr: What’s that noise? Is it a stalker?
Right, he's doing it for us!
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_KubrakAfterShoot: Talk to Zhyvotko about your pay.
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_KubrakWhenWeFail: Stalker! Get them off our backs!
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_Kubrak_Interact_: What are you waiting for? Are you gonna shoot or not?
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_OrderToShoot_ord: Enough bellyaching, Zhyvotko. We’ve been ordered to shoot these creatures.
