How the hell is this the Ward’s job? Can’t we leave this crap to Duty or something?
Don’t ask me. We have to follow Captain Shkarlat’s orders.
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_SkifTooFar_1_FF_: Where’d you go? Eh, whatever, here’s your reward. The Ward always follows through.
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_after_fail2_we_w: You’re no help. We did the job on our own.
Don’t expect to get paid for this!
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_if_Zivotko_dies_: That’s it, stalker! You’re a goner!
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_if_shoot_without: Look, Kubrak! The order’s been carried out, and with no ammo wasted!
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_when_pass_by1_he: Get over here, and let’s talk!
Hey, Stalker! You wanna earn some quick cash?
sid_phrase_EQ68_Comment_when_pass_by3_we: We can handle it on our own, Zhyvotko. Get in position.
sid_phrase_EQ68_Dialog_KubrakZivotkoAfte: Nice shooting, stalker. I’m getting a sense of your background now.
So why'd you decide to chase after mutants instead of serving?
And you must be thrilled with your duties, offloading the mutant-killing on me just like that? At least I get to shoot because I want to, not because I’m ordered to.
Smartass. Fine, here’s your hard-earned money.
I’ve got my reasons. They’re no concern of yours.
I couldn’t care less either way. Here’s your hard-earned money.
I’ve worked with the Ward before. Say hi to Zotov. He owes me one.
Zotov? Fuck… Here’s your money. Don’t tell the captain you saw us.
sid_phrase_EQ68_Dialog_ZivotkoOffersToHu: The critters are right in front of the house, loner. My partner’s got an eye on them as we speak.
Did you catch that, Kubrak? Let’s see if this stalker can handle the heat.
I’ll think about whether it’s worth my time.
You’ll get paid to do stalker work, what’s there to think about?
You gonna trust a stalker with this job?
You think he can’t handle it?
Why don’t you do it yourself?
We’re supposed to keep SIRCAA secure, not waste ammo on mutants.
We’re supposed to follow orders, too.
Getting on the Ward’s good side is a reward in its own right, and you’ll make good money too.
Feel like shooting those mutants on the hill? We’ll make it worth your while, of course.
sid_phrase_EQ68_rad_kubrak_0_CallPlayer_: Hey, stalker! Over here! Let’s talk.
sid_phrase_EQ68_rad_kubrak_0_InfoTopic_1: If you’ve got an order, it needs to be carried out. The higher-ups probably don’t need to know exactly how you do it.
sid_phrase_EQ68_radovoj_zivotko_0_Defeat: Shit! Oh, shit! That shouldn’t have happened!
sid_phrase_EQ68_radovoj_zivotko_0_InfoTo: I don’t get why stalkers keep coming to the Zone. Do they just love wading through shit in worthless gear?
sid_phrase_EQ68_radovoj_zivotko_0_Resume: All right. Let’s get back to it.
sid_phrase_EQ70_Comment_DimonDoorClosed_: Find your own place! I’m not letting those monsters in!
sid_phrase_EQ70_Comment_DimonDoorOpen_B_: Hey, mutant killer! Come over here, let’s have a chat.
sid_phrase_EQ70_Comment_DimonForEmission: Damn, those Emissions creep me the hell out!
sid_phrase_EQ70_Comment_DimonSayLastWord: There’s nothing to talk about. I’m about to leave. You should do the same.
sid_phrase_EQ70_Comment_DimonWalkToDeadB: All right, stiff. Let’s see if you’ve anything good on you.
sid_phrase_EQ70_Comment_SkifShoutsDimon_: What the hell was that, man? Are you nuts?
sid_phrase_EQ70_Dialog_WithStalkerCameOu: That must have been a tough call.
Nah, not really. Save yourself and trust no one, same as always. Safer that way. See you around, stalker.
I’m judging you.
Yeah, it’s every man for himself out here. You’re alive. That’s all that matters.
That’s what I’m talking about! If you don’t get it, you’re toast. By the way, you should go see what he had on him. He won’t be needing it anymore.
No one, I guess.
That’s what I'm talking about! Good luck, stalker.
You could have let me in, you know. Or helped me with the mutants.
Yeah, right… You’re a pro, huh? A pro doesn't want anybody getting in his way, am I right?
Just to be clear, you were scared of the Fleshes, right?
You think this is funny? Do you have any idea how much Mykolayich charges to treat people?
I’m not gonna waste all my loot on doctor’s fees ’cuz my buddy’s a moron.
Did you see that? Creepy, huh? I thought I was gonna get stuck in this shack. Either that, or end up like that guy over by the barn.
Time will tell who’s right and who’s wrong.
Nah, I don’t believe in that bullshit. So long, stalker.
What happened here?
Well… my buddy and me were on our way from the spot where we’d hidden our stash. He falls behind, and then all the sudden I hear him running up to me, screaming something about mutants.
So I run into this house, and the stupid bastard starts pounding on the door… Do I look like an idiot? Opening that door would’ve been suicide!
No time to chat. So long.
Well, good luck then. Take care.
So you slammed the door in your friend’s face? He’s dead because of you.
He’s dead ’cuz he was as dumb as a sack of hammers. And even if it was my fault, why should I feel sorry for him? We’re in the Zone. Who’s gonna judge me?
sid_phrase_EQ70_dimon_strateg_0_ByeTopic: Yeah, good luck and all that jazz…
sid_phrase_EQ70_dimon_strateg_0_CallPlay: Hey, stalker. Come over here! Let’s chat.
sid_phrase_EQ70_dimon_strateg_0_DefeatCo: That hurts, you son of a bitch!
sid_phrase_EQ70_dimon_strateg_0_HelloTop: Whoa, look who we got here!
sid_phrase_EQ70_dimon_strateg_0_InfoTopi: Hey, I got a new job after we met at the Poppy Field. My new one’s way more profitable.
Yeah? What are you doing now?
I’m a rescuer. I find rookies and save them in exchange for a portion of their loot. If they say no, who knows what might happen to ’em, right?
A rescuer, huh? I dunno, you sound like a run-of-the-mill bandit to me.
Just lookin’ for a certain guy. I need to have a little chat with him. He thought he could trick me, but he’s got another thing coming.
sid_phrase_EQ71_Comment_RunAway_1_53205: H-huh?! What the hell are you doing here, man? There’s a mutant out there! Get outta here! You’re gonna get me torn to pieces!
sid_phrase_EQ71_Comment_SeesMutant_1_527: Fuck, fuck, fuck! You brought that thing here! I’m dead!
sid_phrase_EQ71_Dialog_TalkWithMelkij_Be: Yes. I took care of the creature.
Damn, that was a close one. Thanks for not bailing on me.
Here, take this. It’s not much, but it’s all I’ve got.
I took care of the creature.
On your own? Whoa… I thought I was a goner.
Here, take this as a token of my gratitude. I don’t have much, but I won’t let you leave empty-handed.
sid_phrase_EQ71_Dialog_TalkWithMelkij_Bl: What the hell are you doing here?
I was heading south. I wanted to get some practice shooting Fleshes. It’s my first time out on my own.
Guess I wasn't ready to leave Zalissya just yet. I should go back and listen to the old-timers, learn more about the dangerous areas.
sid_phrase_EQ71_Dialog_TalkWithMelkij_By: I’m gonna get going before something else decides to come after us.
You’re right, we should get the hell out of here. Thanks for bailing a rookie out, man.
sid_phrase_EQ71_Dialog_TalkWithMelkij_St: Are you alive? So where’s… did you take down the mutant?
H-huh?! What the hell are you doing here, man? There’s a mutant out there! Get outta here! You’re gonna get me torn to pieces!
Oh, no! Are you seriously gonna fight a mutant in here? It’s gonna rip me apart! Get that thing away from me! Please!
sid_phrase_EQ71_Dialog_TalkWithMelkij_Wh: Why weren’t you there to help when I was dealing with the mutant?
I was afraid I’d run out of ammo. You could’ve turned on me once you were done with that thing.
I may be new around here, but I’ve seen some shit. My first partner ditched me and ran off, and the second one almost did me in!
Turns out, there are way fewer trustworthy people in the Zone than artifacts.
sid_phrase_EQ71_kiruha_melkij_0_DefeatCo: I’m keeling over! I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_EQ71_kiruha_melkij_0_InfoTopi: Have you met the Ward? Those guys mean business. They’re not fond of stalkers, sure, but their gear is top-notch! If I had some of their stuff, I’d rip the tentacles off that Bloodsucker!
sid_phrase_EQ73_Comment_GuronRadioCall_c: Come in! It's Huron. Is Gonzo with you?
What the hell… are they drunk or something?
sid_phrase_EQ73_Comment_GuronRadio_radio: Can anybody hear me? Come in!
sid_phrase_EQ73_Dialog_GuronRadioCall_So: Well, it looks like something went wrong. If you can’t talk right now, or don’t feel like it, come to the Slag Heap, and we’ll have a chat.
sid_phrase_EQ73_Dialog_GuronRadioCall_Th: If you find the crate and deliver it to the Slag Heap, I’ll pay you well.
sid_phrase_EQ73_Dialog_GuronRadioCall_Un: I have no idea what’s going on here.
sid_phrase_EQ73_Dialog_GuronRadioCall_ab: He was in the Brood for a long time. The only thing he had left from Freedom was his suit. Guess there must be a rift between the Shah’s people.
But that’s got nothing to do with us. All I care about is my shipment. The only Brood guy the Dome was buddies with was Docent. He might know something about my stuff.
sid_phrase_EQ73_Dialog_GuronRadioCall_al: I don’t know who Gonzo is, but everyone here is dead.
I see… so that’s what happened to him.
sid_phrase_EQ73_Dialog_GuronRadioCall_an: You’re not from the Brood. Where’s Gonzo? What’s going on?
sid_phrase_EQ73_Dialog_GuronRadioCall_g_: Listen up, stalker. My courier Gonzo was supposed to deliver a shipment to the Brood. That gang’s full of scumbags, and their boss the Shah is the worst of the bunch. He’s not so crazy about people losing his stuff.
Take a look around. See anything interesting?
If Gonzo doesn’t have my shipment on him, that means it was taken by whoever killed him and those Brood guys.
sid_phrase_EQ73_Dialog_GuronRadioCall_ha: I found a PDA on a dead Freedom member. Edik the Dome. You know him?
sid_phrase_EQ73_Dialog_GuronRadioCall_no: Take a look around. I bet you can find some clues that'll lead you to the package.
Nothing special — other than a pile of dead bodies, of course.
So go and search carefully. I bet you can find some leads.
sid_phrase_EQ73_Dialog_GuronRadioCall_re: I’d rather not get involved. I don’t like this one bit.
Well, suit yourself. If you change your mind, look for me at the Slag Heap.
sid_phrase_EQ73_Dialog_GuronRadioCall_ta: Got it. I’ll try to find it.
sid_phrase_EQ74_Comment_AfterDialog_1_55: I just need some time to collect my thoughts.
sid_phrase_EQ74_Comment_CloseKillPolterg: Oh my God… is that thing dead?
sid_phrase_EQ74_Comment_ComeBack_1_55727: Where are you going? Don’t leave me here, please!
sid_phrase_EQ74_Comment_DistantKillPolte: Are you all right? Did you take care of the mutant? If so, please come over here.
sid_phrase_EQ74_Comment_Emission_1_55691: Oh, no! Just what I needed…
sid_phrase_EQ74_Comment_LostInLabyrinth_: Help! I’m here, in the middle!
sid_phrase_EQ74_Comment_MoveReaction_1_5: Stop! This thing reacts to movement!
sid_phrase_EQ74_Comment_RadioCall_1_5569: I need help! I’m stuck in the middle of the car dump! I can’t get out! Somebody, please, help me!
sid_phrase_EQ74_Comment_UnicHelloTopic_1: It’s great to see you. I finally made it here, and I owe it all to you.
sid_phrase_EQ74_Comment_WhatDoIDo_1_5569: Oh God, what do I do now?
sid_phrase_EQ74_Dialog_WithZitnicenko_Fi: Yes. A warning would’ve been nice, by the way.
You’re right… I apologize. It’s just… I was afraid you wouldn’t help me if I told you about the Poltergeist.
I hope you’re not upset. Please accept this modest sum as a token of my gratitude.
Relax, the mutant's been dealt with. You’re free to go.
Thank you! To be honest, I’m not really sure where to go now…
But I won’t keep you any longer. Again, thank you very much.
sid_phrase_EQ74_Dialog_WithZitnicenko_Fo: Gather any supplies the other scientists had with them, stay put, and wait for evac.
All right, I’ll do my best. Thank you for your help.
Go to the Slag Heap. Stick to the roads. If you run into bandits, give them everything you've got. If it’s mutants, run like hell. Once you get there, hire a guide. Don't haggle.
Roads, bandits, guides… I’ll try to remember.
Thanks for your help. Hopefully I’ll see you at Malachite next time.
sid_phrase_EQ74_Dialog_WithZitnicenko_Op: I won’t keep you any longer.
sid_phrase_EQ74_Dialog_WithZitnicenko_Se: When you ask for help, don’t keep people in the dark. That kind of thing can get you shot.
Of course. I understand. I’m glad you were the one who saved me. I won’t keep you any longer.
You’re a scientist, right? What were you doing here?
My group and I were studying an anomaly nearby. We came here to take a break — we didn’t want to run into any bandits. This is Garbage, after all…
But then we stumbled upon the Poltergeist. It didn’t reveal itself immediately. We made it all the way to the middle of the junkyard... and that’s when it started pelting us with debris.
Everyone ran for their lives, while I was paralyzed with terror. In the end, that's what saved my life. You can’t imagine what that mutant did to the others.
sid_phrase_EQ74_Dialog_WithZitnicenko_St: Did you… did you kill the mutant?
sid_phrase_EQ74_Dialog_WithZitnicenko_Th: Relax, that mutant is gone. I have to get going.
Yes, of course. Thank you again. I won’t keep you any longer.
Someone’s coming to pick you up?
Of course. I'm sure Malachite will send a squad to pick me up. I’ll let my supervisor know what happened.
Oh my God… I hope he’s not still holding a grudge against me. If he doesn’t send help, I’m done for…
sid_phrase_EQ74_aspirant_zitnicenko_0_In: I don’t know about the Zone, but there have been some changes at Malachite. I managed to recover a couple of interesting soil samples from anomalies in Garbage.
Professor Ozersky appreciated my efforts, and now I’m in charge of the geological research lab. I owe my success to you.
sid_phrase_EQ75_Comment_BynyaGoToHubWith: Thanks for your help. You're a decent guy. That's a rare sight around these parts.
sid_phrase_EQ75_Comment_CallPlayer_a_281: Shoot… well, this is just great. How am I supposed to fish it out now?
sid_phrase_EQ75_Comment_PickedUpGun_nott: Hey, that’s mine, man! I just dropped it!
sid_phrase_EQ75_Comment_PickedUpGun_talk: Whoa, nice catch! Now bring it over here.
sid_phrase_EQ75_Comment_RanAwayWithGun_W: Hey! My gun… it's gone. I guess you're right at home here, stalker. This place is full of garbage like you.
sid_phrase_EQ75_Dialog_AfterEQ75_ifdontr: You're still alive without a gun, huh? Nice.
A man can always buy another gun, Skif. But he can’t buy his honor.
sid_phrase_EQ75_Dialog_AfterEQ75_ifretur: Good as new! A little grease and a good cleaning works wonders.
sid_phrase_EQ75_Dialog_BynyaAskHelp_What: Aw, man… shoot… what am I supposed to do now?
sid_phrase_EQ75_Dialog_BynyaAskHelp_agai: So, can you fish out my gun?
sid_phrase_EQ75_Dialog_BynyaAskHelp_firs: I lost my rifle in the trench, and I can’t retrieve it. Would you help me, bro?
sid_phrase_EQ75_Dialog_BynyaAskHelp_help: All right. I’ll pull it out for you.
sid_phrase_EQ75_Dialog_BynyaAskHelp_why_: Why won’t you retrieve it on your own?
Too many rads to go there naked. And all of my gear is back at the tech’s. Man, help me, would ya?
sid_phrase_EQ75_Dialog_PlayerHaveTheGun_: I see… I guess you’re right where you belong, stalker. This place is full of trash like you.
I don’t see your name on the gun. Guess it’s mine now.
Right. That’s why the gun is mine now.
My gun. Did you get it?
Thanks so much, bro! It sure sucks being in the Zone without a gun.
Decent folk are a rare sight here at the Garbage. You’re gonna have a hard time.
sid_phrase_EQ75_byna_0_BusyTopic_bynya_b: Don’t you pester me now, I’m busy!
sid_phrase_EQ75_byna_0_DefeatComment_byn: Damn it to hell, it hurts!
sid_phrase_EQ75_byna_0_InfoTopic_1_bynya: There’s not much here. Only trash. And that includes the people… present company excluded, of course.
You want some advice? Don't trust anyone around here, and you’ll be good.
sid_phrase_EQ76_Comment_WhenOnTop_1_FF_2: Holy shit, another one! Can you see the CNPP from up there?
sid_phrase_EQ76_vasa_strih_0_HelloTopic_: Nice spot for a smoke, eh?
sid_phrase_EQ76_vasa_strih_0_InfoTopic_1: What do cranes and Wardens have in common? They both look down on you!
sid_phrase_EQ76_vasa_strih_0_InfoTopic_2: I've been afraid of heights my whole life, you know. Even sitting on a high stool used to scare the shit outta me, to say nothing of rooftops. But now… I’d climb anywhere just to avoid the boss.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Comment_AfterFinalDialog: Run along, would ya? What’s there to talk about, huh? The scenery? I’d rather skip that.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Comment_AfterFirstDialog: Come on, get moving already… I gotta go too. Just need to catch my breath.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Comment_CallPlayer_Call_: Did they build all this crap just so I could fall off of it?! Fuck! Didn't they realize it'd get rusty after all these years?! Zero thought for the future…
sid_phrase_EQ77_Comment_IfDontTalkWithDa: Are you sure you want to go up there? I fell once already. You could end up breaking something.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Comment_NearCache_a_4312: Had a good look around? Pretty nice, eh? Now get down from there!
sid_phrase_EQ77_Comment_PlayerOnTheBridg: Where are you going? Stop! Stay away from this rusty piece of crap!
What are you doing out there?
sid_phrase_EQ77_Comment_PlayerRunAway_a_: Hey! Where the hell are you going, asshole?!
sid_phrase_EQ77_Comment_StartClimb_a_432: What, seriously? You wanna walk around with a big bruise on your ass too?
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Cache_Cache_56967: So you found it… All right, let’s make a deal. We'll split it evenly and go our separate ways.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Cache_Ok_56968: Agreed. Just let me get down from here first.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Cache_Ok_56969: I’m glad we understand each other.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Cache_empty_56972: There’s nothing to split. The stash is empty.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Cache_empty_56973: You think I’m stupid? I filled that stash with loot myself! Trying to trick me, are you? You really shouldn’t have done that.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Cache_notok_56970: Finders keepers. Whoever finds a stash gets to keep everything.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Cache_notok_56971: Too bad. You should’ve taken my offer.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Cache_really_5697: So this is your stash? That’s why you tried to climb those beams, huh?
You got me. So let's just split it and go our separate ways, okay?
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_FinalCache_notok_: I don’t feel like sharing with you anymore.
You think you’re clever, huh? Well, you’re wrong. Dead wrong.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Speech_bye_56989: All right. I gotta go. So long.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Speech_go_away_56: Nothing. I guess I’ll get going now.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Speech_help_56986: I’m not gonna say no. Thanks.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Speech_need_to_go: It's amazing enough to risk a fall from way up there?
Now that I've tried it, no. It’s definitely not worth it.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Speech_only_56983: You mean you climbed up there just to enjoy the view?
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Speech_only_56984: Well… those vast expanses of nature untouched by human hands, dilapidated machinery… sounds pretty romantic, right? Or so I thought.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Speech_what_56978: Why the hell are those beams so slippery? You can’t climb ’em. Can’t even stand on 'em.
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Speech_why_56979: So why'd you climb up there in the first place?
sid_phrase_EQ77_Dialog_Speech_why_56980: The view is amazing. You can see the whole Zone from up there.
sid_phrase_EQ77_darvin_0_InfoTopic_1_Dro: Fine, I guess. It took a while for the bumps and bruises to heal after I fell off the bridge. The doc said I was lucky I didn’t have any broken bones. With all that rust, I could’ve croaked easily.
So I won’t be climbing up high to enjoy the scenery any time soon. Too risky.
sid_phrase_EQ82_Comment_EfimIfSkifIntoTr: I'm all outta ammo! Put the damn thing down!
sid_phrase_EQ82_Comment_EfimKillHer_1_29: Thanks, man! Come over here, we'll have a chat.
sid_phrase_EQ82_Comment_EfimScreams1_1_2: What's the matter, can’t squeeze through? How about you try a little harder, you son of a bitch!
sid_phrase_EQ82_Comment_EfimScreams2_1_2: Hey man, can you help me? Shoot this damn thing!
sid_phrase_EQ82_Comment_Sniper_1_58894: Were you the one who put that damn Flesh down? If so, thank you!
sid_phrase_EQ82_Dialog_SkifEfimThanks_My: Why didn’t you shoot it yourself?
I’m empty, man. I was coming back from a run when the damn thing jumped me. Wasted my last few bullets on it and missed!
Hey, got any spare ammo? I’ll pay you!
sid_phrase_EQ82_Dialog_SkifEfimThanks_Sh: Always? I take it this isn't your first time running from a Flesh?
Nope. I don’t know what they see in me, but I get attacked every damn month! This one today was on its own, but last week there were three of them at once! The Zone has a weird sense of humor.
sid_phrase_EQ82_Dialog_SkifEfimThanks_am: I can spare some 12 gauge shotgun shells — just what you need for Fleshes.
Thanks, bro. Now I can drive those damn Fleshes away.
I can give you a magazine for an AK. It should be enough as long as you don’t shoot at crows on the way.
Thanks, bro. Now I can drive those damn Fleshes away.
I’ve only got a 5.56 magazine to spare.
Thanks, bro. Now I can drive those damn Fleshes away.
sid_phrase_EQ82_Dialog_SkifEfimThanks_by: Sorry, I don’t have any ammo to spare.
Okay. Thanks for your help anyway. I guess I’m gonna try to get to Rostok.
Okay, bye. I have to go.
Hey, got any spare ammo? I’ll pay you!
sid_phrase_EQ82_Dialog_SkifEfimThanks_th: Thanks for helping me. I've been stranded here for a while now.
Those damn Fleshes are always so clingy! I wish women hounded me like that.
sid_phrase_EQ82_efim_0_InfoTopic_1_1_589: Oh, same old... Damn Fleshes keep chasing me, I keep stuffing all my pockets with ammo. I learned my lesson...
sid_phrase_EQ84_Audiolog_CrazyLot_Audiol: I’m making this recording… so I won’t forget.
My name is Vaska Lot. I just came from Scar, and now I'm heading to… heading to… where? Shit… everything’s so blurry.
I’m lost. I dropped some stuff along the way so I’ll know if I’m going in circles.
My name is Vaska Lot. I just came from… fuck, I already said that.
Phantoms… Phantoms… so many of them… make them go away… go away...
sid_phrase_EQ85_Audiolog_LastTalk_1_5373: O ye of little faith… shit, it’s gotta be around here somewhere!
Look at the sky, man! There's an Emission coming! Get down, or we’re outta here!
sid_phrase_EQ85_Audiolog_LastTalk_1_5374: God damn… Leave him, guys. We gotta move.
sid_phrase_EQ85_Audiolog_LastTalk_1_FF_5: Are you fuckin’ nuts, Stefko?! Get down, now! Forget that Monolith stash! We've been had — there’s ain't shit up there!
sid_phrase_EQ88_Comment_OsaIDidntAskForH: I didn’t ask for your help, and I’m not gonna pay for it!
sid_phrase_EQ88_Comment_OsaIfSkifSaw_1_4: I owed him a fortune, but the fucker wouldn’t let me pay him. "Come on, double or nothing," he'd say.
sid_phrase_EQ88_Comment_OsaIfSkifSaw_1_5: How was I supposed to pay him back when he was always cheating? I couldn’t even catch the bastard in the act!
sid_phrase_EQ88_Comment_OsaLastRepeat_1_: I gotta quit gambling. If your buddies are all cheats, you're gonna be in debt to them for the rest of your life.
sid_phrase_EQ88_Comment_OsaThreatsSkif_O: Hey, you! Leave his backpack alone. It’s all mine!
sid_phrase_EQ88_Comment_SpichkaClaim_Spi: Tails, you lose! The artifact is mine!
You’re cheatin’ again! Gimme a mulligan!
Cheating?! I don’t even have to cheat with a moron like you! You’re dumber than a pile of rocks!
sid_phrase_EQ88_Comment_SpichkaIfSkifHel: He’s no Wasp! He’s a fucking rat, that’s what he is!
sid_phrase_EQ88_Comment_iNeedThat_Reshka: Then I’ll take the artifact from your corpse, asshole!
sid_phrase_EQ88_Dialog_SpichkaAfterEQ88_: I just about shat myself when I heard those shots behind my back. Son of a bitch… thanks, stalker.
“Thanks?” That's all I get? I saved your life, man.
Fair enough. Here’s some coupons. It’s all I got.
Don’t turn your back on people like that again. Not in the Zone.
sid_phrase_EQ88_osa_0_BusyTopic_busy_343: This ain't the best time for a chat.
sid_phrase_EQ88_osa_0_InfoTopic_1_info_3: Hey, I quit gambling, ya hear me? That felt like the worst hangover ever.
But I’m not one to give up. I had got enough to get me some gear and a piece. Even paid off my debts. Wasp’s got a nasty stinger now!
sid_phrase_EQ88_spicka_0_CallPlayer_1_FF: Over here, stalker. Let’s have a chat.
sid_phrase_EQ88_spicka_0_HelloTopic_hell: Good to see you! If it weren’t for you, Wasp would’ve taken me down.
sid_phrase_EQ88_spicka_0_InfoTopic_1_Inf: The less excitement you have, the longer you live. Hell, I almost got killed over a lousy artifact. And I thought Wasp was my friend…
sid_phrase_EQ93_Comment_KiruhaSemaDisput: What’s wrong with being a loner, Kiryukha? You get to shoot mutants and collect artifacts without anybody pushing you around.
Jesus, Pugach… Back on the Mainland, you wore those shoes from your graduation for five goddamn years, and you’re content with small-time jobs here too. We’re getting nowhere!
All right. Then let’s join Duty or Freedom. Just not the Ward!
sid_phrase_EQ93_Comment_KiruhaSemaLeaveA: That’s it. I’m going to the Chemical Plant tomorrow!
sid_phrase_EQ93_Comment_KiruhaSemaLeave_: I’ll text that Warden. Ask about any openings.
I’m sick of your obsession with the Ward! Why don’t you try texting a girl instead?
sid_phrase_EQ93_Dialog_AboutClans_about_: What can you tell me about Duty?
For soldiery types, they’re all right. They sure do love shooting mutants. Stalkers get a kick outta that too. Right, Kiryukha?
Duty’s been shooting mutants for ten years now, and the mutants are still around, and in the same numbers too... unlike the Duty guys themselves. Now the Ward... they mean business!
They used to want to give the Zone’s riches to the world outside. Now they run a store in Rostok. Those sellouts have turned into petty traders!
Not that petty if you ask me. Their boss Myklukha invented coupons, and now they’re the backbone of the entire Zone. Freedom is in charge now!
They’ll only be in charge for as long as it benefits the Ward.
What can you tell about the Ward?
As far as I’m concerned, they’re nothing more than crooked cops.
The Ward are real pros. They set everything straight as soon as they got here. And their gear is top notch!
Then what the hell would they need you for?
Hey, I’d make an awesome Warden! I’ve almost got one of ‘em to sign me up.
sid_phrase_EQ93_Dialog_AboutClans_no_458: See, Kiryukha? Not everyone’s champing at the bit to join the Ward.
sid_phrase_EQ93_Dialog_AboutClans_start_: What do you think, stalker? Would you join the Ward?
You’re getting ahead of yourself again, Kiryukha. The guy could be new to the Zone. If you don’t know about these groups, feel free to ask.
sid_phrase_EQ93_Dialog_AboutClans_tell_a: You wanna hear about the groups?
sid_phrase_EQ93_Dialog_AboutClans_want_v: What do you think, guy? Would you join the Ward?
sid_phrase_EQ93_Dialog_AboutClans_yes_45: I’ve seen the Wardens in action. I’d work with them anytime.
sid_phrase_EQ93_kiruha_drajv_0_InfoTopic: You can’t make it in the Zone all alone. You have to choose a side. Trust me, you wanna stick with the strongest group out there.
sid_phrase_EQ93_sema_pugac_0_InfoTopic_3: Don’t bother chasing after every artifact in the Zone. Take what you can carry and leave the bigger stuff for the larger groups.
sid_phrase_EQ97_Comment_BespredelNoMore_: You’re back, huh? Lost something, did you? Oh, right! You lost your chance to become a legend, you pansy!
Don’t say a word. That’s enough.
sid_phrase_EQ97_Comment_Bespredel_CallPl: Easy there, I’m a friendly! Wanna grab some loot, Stalker?
sid_phrase_EQ97_Comment_Bespredel_End_wa: I’m gonna wait for the chimera to come back. You’d better leave.
sid_phrase_EQ97_Comment_Bespredel_Fail_f: What part don’t you get? I don't want nothing to do with you!
sid_phrase_EQ97_Comment_Bespredel_GoAway: Scared, huh? You going back to your mommy? Fine! Get lost, loser.
sid_phrase_EQ97_Comment_Bespredel_NearLa: Hey! You hear that? It’s over there.
sid_phrase_EQ97_Comment_Bespredel_SkifFa: You’re awfully fond of your food, I see.
What are you… dammit, I told you to throw your food away!
sid_phrase_EQ97_Comment_Bespredel_Whatt_: Where the hell are you going? I told you to stay close!
sid_phrase_EQ97_Dialog_Bespredel_Khimera: Well, what are we gonna split now? There aren’t any artifacts here.
What the hell! Where’s my chimera?
Hey man, what the fuck are you doing? The chimera is mine!
What the hell? There was supposed to be a chimera's lair here! It’s up high, there are fuel barrels all around it… just like my teacher told me.
So long, stalker.
See you. You better remember my name, ’cuz I’m gonna be a freakin’ legend one day!
You really thought you’d get it right the first time? As Lex the Legend says, mistakes are good. The Zone itself is the result of a mistake, and it’s pretty damn cool!
But mistakes don’t make you any money, that much is true. Come to the Flea Market, and I’ll introduce you to my teacher. He’s the epitome of stalker success.
I know that guy. He's a fraud. Always bullshitting rookies about the Zone and the secrets of stalker success.
You’re just jealous he gets to be the Legend of the Zone, while you’re a nobody!
I’ll deal with that chimera one day! I’m not the type to give up easily, unlike some people!
Beat it already. I don’t need a partner like you.
Need any more help from me?
So you can ruin everything again? No way, man.
Looks like you could use some training… when you get to the Flea Market, talk to Lex the Legend. He can help you get to my level.
Teacher? More like the ramblings of a madman.
Watch your mouth! Do you even know who you’re talking about? I'm talking about Lex the Legend! He went to the center of the Zone with Strelok!
You’ve got some nerve, ruining everything like that! You went in on your own and spooked the chimera!
Tell me about him. What does he teach?
Hold on there, partner. I’m not giving away his special teachings for free. As the Legend says, there's nothing more valuable than hard-earned experience. You catch my drift?
Anyway, just come to the Flea Market and see for yourself. For the right price, he can teach you how to keep mutants from catching your scent.
Well, that’s it. Go get your learn on. I’ve got a chimera to kill.
sid_phrase_EQ97_Dialog_Bespredel_NearLai: We’re getting close. Got any food with you? You’ll have to throw it away.
My backpack’s empty. I don't have any food.
Okay, we’re ready now. Stick close to me, and try to keep quiet. The lair's up there, at the top.
If you say so. Gimme a sec.
Think about it. With them two heads, a chimera’s got one hell of a sense of smell. I've got something to cover our scent, but it won’t work on the food. The smell's too strong.
sid_phrase_EQ97_Dialog_Bespredel_StartKh: Oh, it’s you again. Changed your mind, have you? Kill the chimera and get the artifacts. We’re gonna hit the jackpot!
Hold on. How come there are artifacts in the nest?
What, you don’t know? Chimeras are like magpies — they steal anything shiny and take it back to their nests. And artifacts sure are shiny.
You don’t want to be famous all over the Zone? Fine, that’s your choice.
Deal. But we split the artifacts evenly.
Evenly? Why? You don’t get it, do you? You can’t kill the chimera without my help! I’m the one who knows the secret!
Fine, whatever. Let’s just do it before someone else kills the creature.
Tell me about this chimera. What is it, anyway?
It's the most powerful mutant in the Zone. If you pass the chimera test, you’re no longer a rookie. That’s what my teacher said, anyway.
The two-headed brute loves two things: food and the smell of gasoline. It tends to make its lair near fuel barrels.
I know a couple more secrets about it, all from a reliable source. Just follow my lead, and we’ll get this thing done in no time.
I've a job for ya. Ten minutes tops, and we’re done. Unless you chicken out, of course.
I’ve found a real chimera’s lair. It’s on the top of a hill, not far from here. And I know a secret way to take it down.
The plan is simple, so just follow my lead. We'll take down the chimera, then split the artifacts in the nest seventy-thirty.
sid_phrase_EQ97_bespredel_0_InfoTopic_1_: Once I get real good at this, I’m gonna sell stuffed mutants back to the Mainland.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Comment_Amalgama_Closer_: I’m over here. Just a few steps away!
sid_phrase_EQ98_Comment_Amalgama_Here_A_: Hey, you there! Over here, dammit! I’m stuck!
sid_phrase_EQ98_Comment_Amalgama_Left_A_: Don’t you walk away from me, you Flesh-fucker! I’m gonna die over here, man!
sid_phrase_EQ98_Comment_Amalgama_TalkLat: Dang, that was intense! But I’ll be all right in no time. Stay in touch – maybe we can do it again sometime soon. You never know when my anomaly sense might come in handy.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Comment_Amalgama_TooLong: You know the way, right? Right?
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_Final_A_: Man, I thought I was gonna die of old age in that damn anomaly!
Meeting you was a real stroke of luck – almost like when I met my teacher.
If you ever swing by the Flea Market, gimme a holler. I’ll introduce you to my teacher. Maybe he’ll take you under his wing.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_Final_By: I did what I could. Gotta go now.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_Final_Ch: If you ever change your mind about Lex the Legend, drop by the Flea Market. I’ll put in a good word for you, and maybe he’ll take you under his wing.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_Final_Di: He sent you into that anomaly empty-handed. He almost got you killed.
Nah, man, that’s on me. I figured my anomaly sense was gonna kick in right away. I should’ve taken my bolts, at least.
So cut the Legend some slack, it ain’t his fault. I’m the one who needs to slow my roll.
All right, well, thanks for helping me out. I hope we see each other again sometime.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_Final_Kn: Yeah, I know the guy. He’s just a windbag pretending to be a seasoned veteran.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_Final_Li: There’s no such thing as an “anomaly sense.” And hunting Snorks with your bare hands? That’s a one-way ticket to the grave. Your teacher is full of shit.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_Final_Ne: Got it. Still, swing by the Legend’s place if you’re around. I’ll put in a good word for ya.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_Final_No: Oh, come on! He’s the real deal, man. He’s got tons of students! Anyway, I’m sure they call him the Legend for a reason. People wouldn’t pay for his advice if he was all talk, right?
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_Final_S_: I think I've earned a reward, don't you?
Sure thing. I can offer you some money, or maybe an artifact. It’s not exactly hot shit, but it’s all I’ve got.
You know what? You keep it.
Really? You’re a goddamn… good Samaritan or something. That’s the word, right? Respect, man. I can’t thank you enough.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_Final_Wh: Why didn’t you just walk out of the anomaly on your own?
He’s Lex the Legend! He’s tough as nails. He can even take Snorks down mano a mano! His anomaly sense is so sharp, he doesn’t even need a detector!
You know, most seasoned stalkers just brush you off when you ask ’em for help. But Lex is always there for you. He ain’t stuck up or nothin’.
You guys really gotta meet each other. Come to the Flea Market, he’ll teach you everything too. First lesson’s on the house.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_First_A_: You’re my fucking savior, man! God, am I ever glad to see you! Get me outta here!
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_First_S_: One step at a time, my friend. One step at a time.
Yeah, right. No fuckin’ way I’m staying here. I’m going with you.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_First_St: See, here’s the thing… My teacher said I gotta work on my anomaly sense. Then I can trust my gut instead of relying on some fancy gear.
So I listened to my gut and went after an artifact. I even left my bolts at the camp. You think it worked? No fuckin’ way, man!
I spent hours searching for that damn artifact. I was tired as hell and about to turn back, and that’s when my anomaly sense shat the bed on me. That’s how I ended up getting stuck here.
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_First_Wh: Why don’t you just walk out of here on your own?
sid_phrase_EQ98_Dialog_Amalgama_LetsGo_l: Come on, lead the way. I know we can do it!
sid_phrase_EQ98_vova_amalgama_0_BusyTopi: Not right now. Can’t you see I’m busy?
sid_phrase_EQ98_vova_amalgama_0_DefeatCo: Help! I’m gonna snuff it, man!
sid_phrase_EQ98_vova_amalgama_0_InfoTopi: I think I’ll try going to Prypiat in about a week. The Legend told me how to get past the Boundary!
sid_phrase_EQ98_vova_amalgama_0_ResumeCo: So, where were we? Oh, right.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_BusyTopic_2_1_: I got no time for this.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_BusyTopic_4_1_: Can't tell you anything unless I'm ordered to.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_BusyTopic_6_1_: Whatever the question was, the answer is: none of your business.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_BusyTopic_7_1_: I’m not reporting to a loner.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_BusyTopic_8_1_: I wasn't ordered to talk to you.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_CallPlayer_2_1: Come over here. We need to talk.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_InfoTopic_10_1: After my first fight against Fleshes, I couldn’t even look at canned meat for a week.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_InfoTopic_1_1_: I was trained to fire my rifle, and that’s what I do. It doesn’t matter who I’ve got in my sights – human or mutant, I’ll take ’em out.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_InfoTopic_2_1_: My job is to follow orders. The rest is none of my business.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_InfoTopic_3_1_: I have a lot of sympathy for the people who live in the Zone. Or the stalkers, for that matter. This whole thing... it shouldn’t even exist.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_InfoTopic_4_1_: Don’t let the Zone get in your head. I’ve seen guys lose their minds here. That’s some scary shit right there. The kind you wouldn’t wish on your worst enemy.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_InfoTopic_5_1_: What the scientists do is no concern of mine... as long as they don't do their experiments on me.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_InfoTopic_6_1_: As the saying goes, keep your feet warm and your head cool. And keep a loaded pistol at the ready while you're at it.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_InfoTopic_7_1_: Having to serve in the Zone is one thing, but staying here for the thrill of it? Clothes that don’t fit you, shitty weapons, no food... where’s all the fun? I just don’t get these stalkers…
sid_phrase_General_army_0_InfoTopic_8_1_: If you were a bandit, I wouldn’t even talk to you. I’d put a bullet in your head, and that’s that. That's the only way to deal with those scumbags.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_InfoTopic_9_1_: The only nice thing about the Zone a smoke before lights out.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_Infotopic_Conc: Too many casualties, too few new recruits... at this rate, there won't be any more Duty soon.
Voronin and Zulu are at each other’s throats. That’s not good.
I can see where the general's coming from. He doesn't want to risk his men’s lives if he doesn't have to.
I’m always so goddamn tired... and so fucking bored! But I guess we’re doing the right thing here... right?
Korshunov only needs us to guard the Cooling Towers. We’re nothing more than watchdogs to him. And Voronin doesn’t wanna listen.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_Infotopic_Corp: I don't buy it with the SIRCAA guys. If scientists need that kind of protection, something's up.
To be honest, the loners would have a hard time here without the orders from the Mainland. If you’ve got coupons, those guys can get you pretty much anything.

Stay quiet, keep your head down. Before going out, jump up and down a little. Check your pockets and tighten up your knots. Prypіat likes it quiet. Keep it down, and you might live to see another day.
When stalkers start giving you a hard time, all you gotta do is point a rifle at 'em, and they're long gone. But if mutants show up, you gotta waste a fuck-ton of ammo.
You know what I could use? Some of that Warden gear.
What's the deal with the scientists working in the field? They oughtta stay in their labs, not poke around Project X.
I wasted two full mags on those freaks just yesterday! Given how tight our supplies are, those mutants are getting way too expensive!
I don’t even remember the last time we got resupplied. I’ve been waiting for new boots for two months now! And don't even get me started on the guns...
I wish some of those Duty guys would step up and do our job for a day or two. They’d get to do what they love, and we’d save some ammo. It's a win-win.
There are some benefits to serving here, though. We get to raid places regular stalkers could only dream of.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_Infotopic_Duty: The Ward’s got some premium-ass weapons and gear. If they'd helped us, the Zone would be mutant-free by now.
But, of course, Freedom’s agreed to a truce. War’s bad for business, right? What I don’t get is why we agreed to it.
Give us some Ward weapons, and we’d rid the Zone of mutants in no time! We'd kick some Freedom ass, too…
They say they love the Zone, right? Why stay out of anomalies then? Go drink your vodka with Bloodsuckers or crack stupid jokes with Controllers. How about that, huh?
I don’t get you loners. You live hand to mouth, take dumps in the bushes, everybody’s out to rob you or take you down.
That’s why I joined Duty. Too much drill bullshit, but the food's good, kit's decent, and… well, you don’t have to fight mutants on your own, right?
Those hippies from Freedom have killed so many of our men… and now we gotta be all buddy-buddy with ‘em? Trust me, if it wasn’t for Voronin’s orders…
Those Freedom guys are here for the coupons. Duty fights because it's a calling. We’re not leaving until the whole Zone is cleared out, every last mutant.
We've got our hands full. So damn many monsters to kill… whatever, we'll get 'em!
How come new kinds of mutants keep showing up? We’ve been killing those fuckers and got nowhere. Zulu’s right. Enough sitting on our asses — we need to do something!
I thought hell was the place you're supposed to go when you die. But here we are, alive and kicking. For now.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_Infotopic_Himz: I went on a clearing mission the other day. Culling the local endemic fauna, you know? It’s an easy job, but I always have a hard time recovering... I can’t eat, and everything smells like blood.
One of you stalkers reminded me of my grandpa the other day. We arrested him for sneaking around someplace he shouldn’t have. And guess what he had for a weapon — an old Berdan rifle!
It was just like the one my gramps used to hide in the hay barn. How do you guys even survive with this shit?
I’m so fed up with the Zone. I’ve never been so homesick in my life. And I can’t even call my family — we’re not allowed to use phones until the end of our contract.
Okay, I’ll tell you... You've got a badge, so you must have gained Korshunov’s trust, and that's no mean feat... Anyway, our sources in the Zone say there are some guerrillas out there now.
They've got good gear and a decent understanding of tactics. But, most importantly, they’re technically savvy. After each encounter with them we find parts from the old labs…
Oh, plenty of new exciting stuff every day! We beat up stalkers, we bash mutants, and we never push pencils, unlike the IPSF or Duty.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_Infotopic_Ikar: It was so easy in the Guardian Program. You shoot mutants like clay pigeons and put notches on your belt.
But here you don’t know your enemy sometimes. You just get this gut feeling that you have to shoot.
One of our patrols saw this brainwashed guy the other day... he had deep cuts all across his face, from his eye to his chin, as if a cat had scratched him.
But that'd be a really big cat... the last thing we need is a Bayun on our hands.
Have you seen those two ships in Zaton? One belongs to stalkers, the other — to the bandits. We leave them be. They're too busy killing each other, so we don’t bother.
Those eggheads have it so simple on paper: mutants, anomalies, risks and outcomes, figures and probabilities...
But in the field, your only certainty is that something's gonna go terribly wrong.
Why are there so many dogs here? Where do they come from, and in packs, too! No, really, you might need a machine gun to handle them. What do they even eat here, frogs?
sid_phrase_General_army_0_Infotopic_Merc: The loners keep whining about the Zone, but they don’t seem to be in a hurry to get back to the Mainland. I'm outta here first chance I get. Had it up to here in the Zone.
I don’t care whose fucking nickname is listed in the order. I’m not an attorney. Not even a damn judge. I carry out the sentences.
I feel like I’m running from something even when I’m just sitting there. I wonder if everyone in the Zone feels the same way…
sid_phrase_General_army_0_Infotopic_Mili: If I’d known beforehand what kind of shit was going on here, I would’ve wiped my ass with that contract. But at least no one’s pestering me about marching drills.
The sounds in the Zone… that’s the hardest part to get used to. Can’t say which ones creep me out more, the quiet sobbing or the screaming.
Here in the Zone, your only friend is your gun. Take good care of her, and she'll never let you down.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_Infotopic_Vart: You stalkers look down on the Noontiders because they’re not in their right mind, but what about you guys? At least the Noontiders have nowhere else to go. What are you sticking around for?
Mutants and bandits are just trash waiting to be taken out . Just brainless pieces of shit begging for a bullet in the head.
I thought I was gonna hang out at SIRCAA and keep the eggheads safe. Instead, I gotta shoot all kinds of freaks. I’m pretty used to the people, but the mutants… no way.
A real soldier can adapt quickly to any environment. And I’m a top-notch soldier. The Ward accepts nothing less.
I should've read my contract more carefully before I signed it...
They guaranteed payment if you're killed in action. Then the fine print said there's no payment for “non-combat losses caused by the anomalous effects of the Zone”. Which can be pretty much anything.
I’ve been on a dozen of these missions. Some of 'em could make a decent movie... too bad I signed an NDA.
You know how I got into the Ward? Didn’t ask stupid questions.
20-mile run in full gear — yes, sir. Fighting three dudes with knives, unarmed — roger that. Shoot that creep — thank you sir, may I have another?
Wardens don’t think twice. They act.
I trust anyone who's got my fucking six, stalker. Those buddies of yours would put a bullet in your head or throw you to the mutants the moment they find out you got some good loot on you.
We’re the Zone brotherhood. You're the vandals. Think about it.
You should be glad the Ward came to the Zone. Without us, you would've all killed each other over a bunch of shiny pebbles.
The only thing the Ward can’t control are the anomalies. But it’s just a matter of time, trust me.
Some of the factions weren't too happy when the Ward came to town. But what are they gonna do about it? Their weapons and uniforms belong in a museum, next to the dinosaurs.
A lot of people didn't like the new rules at first, but they realized pretty quickly that the Zone needs a firm hand. We can bring order to this place faster than Duty ever could.
What really sucks about the Zone is the food. The rations are barely edible. But the stalkers are still willing to kill each other over that crap.
I've been jumpy as fuck. I almost fired at a pal yesterday. He came around the corner outta nowhere – I thought he was a Bloodsucker. At least my reaction time's still all right.
You can fight each other all you want, stalker, but the moment you cross the Ward - we'll put you down like a dog. It's the law, and I wouldn’t advise anyone to break it.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_Infotopic_Yano: The bandits are fighting among themselves, the stalkers are clashing with the Ward… this place is rotten to the core. No one's ever gonna find peace here, Treaty or no Treaty.
How good your gear is definitely matters in the Zone. But how good your partner is matters even more. I know my pals are never gonna shoot me in the back. Can you say the same about yours, loner?
It wasn’t easy for me to get used to the Zone. Now I can’t imagine serving on the Mainland. I’d be bored to death over there.
I’ll tell you a little secret — a soldier’s secret. If you don’t smoke, you die sooner. You know why? 'Cuz you keep on working while the other guys are taking smoke breaks.
You think it's mutants and anomalies that kill you? Hell no! Stupid jobs and the commander who assigns 'em to you, that’s what gets you killed.
So I was out at night, and I heard a cat. I figure I should go get it before something eats it. So I’m, like, “here, kitty, kitty,” and he keeps running through the bushes, meowing his brains out.
I chased after him for half an hour, almost got into an anomaly… and I couldn’t even see the little prick!
sid_phrase_General_army_0_MutantLootBig_: You bought me half a suit, mate!
sid_phrase_General_army_0_MutantLootSmal: Folks will pay for all sorts of crap…
sid_phrase_General_army_0_NPC_Chatter_Gr: What are you gonna do when you get back to the Mainland?
Write my memoirs. Just keep watch, will ya?
Can you believe this wind?
Yeah, the weather's been crazy.
So what are we gonna do after we clear the mutants outta the Zone?
Guess we’ll find out... if we live long enough.
I’m bored outta my skull here!
Then clean your weapon. You're gonna need it.
How long have you been here?
I dunno. Who's counting?
I’m used to everything now… but those anomalies still give me the creeps.
Yeah, bullets won't help you against those things.
I wonder what kinda research they're doing at SIRCAA...
Who cares? As long as you aren't the test subject.
Do you even remember what life was like without mutants and anomalies?
It feels like a million years ago. Like it wasn't even real.
What was the first mutant you ever bagged?
Honestly? I can’t even remember. I’ve killed so many of 'em, but they just keep coming.
Enough with the sneezing, private! You can get sick back on the Mainland.
A year here oughtta count as two. Three, even.
I need some leave!
I’m sick of standing watch. Wish I could get some sleep.
Once I’m back home, I’ll forget the Zone like a bad dream. If I make it back at all…
Five minutes to kill a mutant, half a day to clean your uniform afterwards…
Whenever I’m on duty, that's when the weather gets crappy!
The more you clean up, the messier it gets!
The more freaks we kill, the more keep coming. What the hell's going on?
I’d rather die in combat than get ripped apart by a mutant. At least I’d get a proper funeral…
I’m sick of canned food! I don’t even know what they put in that stuff!
You can’t let your guard down. The last guy who did is probably still somewhere in these trees…Well, pieces of him.
I need to hang on. This tour’s gonna be over soon.
I hate this fucking place.
I'm so tired…
Same shit, different day…
sid_phrase_General_army_0_NPC_Chatter_Ho: Heard a loner was trying to get through an IPSF checkpoint.
Straight on, headfirst, no second thoughts. His gear didn't look rookie, either.
No matter how long they interrogated him, he just kept begging. Saying, let me back into the Zone: there's no Mainland outside that Perimeter.
Better stay away from abandoned checkpoints on the old Zone border. About a year ago, this rookie dude lost a bet and had to spend a night there.
Some night it was.
We came back for him in the morning, and there he was, hanging on his new belt.
And the weirdest thing was, his uniform was right there beside him, folded into perfect squares, and his PDA was playing a song - a cheerful song, damn it.
Still can't get it out of my head.
A fellow soldier participated in a field experiment: they put some gizmos on his chest, and he had to stand still with those gadgets on at several places, down at the Burnt Farmstead.
He got a huge paycheck back then, we thought he got out of here. And then we ran into him, not so long ago. He was running. All skin and bones, didn't even look human.
I only recognized his voice. "Sorry, I can't stop" - and he took off.
Where he's serving now - nobody knows.
They say the Perimeter's full of mutated beasts, nothing more. The real mutants, the ones…made of humans - won't stick their mutts in there.
But that's a thing of the past. My pals from different posts say sometimes the big ones get close enough to the border.
Chimeras, burers, controllers. And, get this, they're quiet, they never attack - they just creep closer and stand there with a blank stare, and head back.
As if…waiting for something.
Remember, I told you nothing.
Quiet down now.
It's against the rules, but I'll tell you…
I overheard the folks on duty talking…
Believe it or not…
I'm gonna tell you something that will blow your mind.
Forewarned is forearmed. So get ready.
Some years ago, I wouldn't have believed it myself, but…
Okay, I'll tell you because I gave my word. But don't you dare interrupt me.
I hate this place.
Here's to another recurring nightmare…
Bollocks.
Watch it. Brass doesn't like this kind of stories.
Couldn't come up with a better bullshit story?
Save this crap for scaring off loners.
Every time I'm on duty, it's somebody's freaking time to shine.
I don't like this…
Who's gonna believe it?
sid_phrase_General_army_0_NPC_Chatter_Jo: One stalker says to another, “Hey, let’s have a pet Flesh at the base.” His friend winces. “No way… think of the filth and the stench!” The first one says, “It’s okay, the Flesh’ll get used to it.”
A soldier wakes up in the infirmary after a mission and asks, “Where am I, doc?” The doctor says, “Don’t worry, you’re in a hospital room. Mostly. Two hospital rooms, technically.”

Morning formation, commander's losing his shit: “Where's the third fucking squad?!” The lieutenant whispers, “Remember how you said anyone who gets eaten by dogs shouldn’t bother coming back to base?”
A commander asks his recruits, “Where should a bandit keep his bullets?” They say pouch, pocket, mag. “Wrong!" he corrects 'em. "A bandit should only keep a bullet in the back of his head!”

An anomaly mission AAR: “Told you not to go overkill! The orders were clear: boots on the ground! No guts hanging from tree branches, no heads lying in the shrubs! Just. Boots. On the goddamn ground!”
A commander comes up to a soldier on watch: “How’s your shift going, soldier?” “It ain’t goin’ nowhere, sir,” the soldier replies. “It don't got no legs!”
SIRCAA scientists have developed a new medicinal herb native to Chornobyl. Its curative properties are so potent, it can mend open fractures… the only problem is, you gotta catch it first.
A soldier's busting his ass tryin' to keep up with stupid orders. The lad starts whining, “Sir, I’ve been on my feet all day, I'm beat!”
“Then lie down and give me 50 sit-ups, on the double!”
A soldier reports, “We apprehended an unusual stalker during the sweep. He resembles a human, walks upright, and seems to have rudimentary speech. Got one word out of him so far, "Loot! Loot! Loot!'”
A soldier asks two stalkers which anomalies are the most dangerous. One says, “Burners — anything that falls into one burns to ash!” The other says, “No way, Whirligigs — they'll tear you to shreds!”

The soldier scoffs, “Hah, that’s nothing! A whole truck of canned meat disappeared from our warehouse. We’ve been searching for it for a whole week! It vanished into thin air — now that’s an anomaly.”

An old-timer’s showing a rookie around the Zone. “It’s real quiet here. No bandits, no patrols,” he says. “I've heard scary stories about the Zone, but it actually seems pretty nice," the rookie says.
“'Course it does,” the old-timer replies. “A chimera scared everybody off.”
Some bandits are talking by the fire. “I was born in the year of the tiger,” one boasts. “That’s why I’m so tough.” The other says, “I was born in the year of the snake, so I’m nimble as fuck.”
The third one mutters, “While yo' asses were bragging, I cleared out all yo' stashes. Guess what year I was born.”
A commander is instructing his men near a mutant lair. “If you spot a Poltergeist, aim for its legs,” he says.
“Commander, there’s one headed straight for us, but it doesn't have any legs,” a soldier reports. The commander replies, “Oh, that’s ’cuz I already shot ’em off.”
A soldier ends up in the infirmary. The doctor asks, “How did this happen? Your arm’s broken in three places!” “Please don’t tell my commander,” the soldier begs. “He told me to stay in one place.”
Two Wardens talking. “I’ve been guarding SIRCAA for three months now,” says the first. “What’s it like?” asks the second. “It’s a regular three ring SIRCUUS.”
In a deep, dark city, in the deep, dark Zone, there’s a deep, dark house. Inside, in a deep, dark room, is a bunch of stalkers... ’cuz they can’t figure out how to change a light bulb!

A gang walks by looking for trouble, a soldier lures them into the bushes. Their boss sends a guy to handle it. He goes into the bushes, vanishes. He sends more – two, five, ten – all gone. Go figure.
Screaming, gunfire, blasts, then a young punk jumps out and goes: “Boss, it’s an ambush! There's two of ’em!”

A soldier goes to the doctor. “I’ve got two problems. First, I don’t have much to say. Second, what I say is kinda random.” The doctor says, “Can you give me an example?” The soldier goes: “Probably.”
Two soldiers chilling out, chitchatting. “I saw one yesterday: torn gas mask, dirty gun, talking gibberish, crawling around on all fours.”
“Whoa, you saw a Snork?”, his pal asks. First one goes: “Nah, just a stalker stumbling out of a bar.”
Wait for it, guys! Here’s a good one!
Permission to raise spirits?
Ah, wait 'till you laugh your asses off when I tell you some home base shit — fucking hilarious!
Meh, I heard that one back in boot camp.
Hilarious. Funny as an extra shift.
Stupid pranks among our ranks...
sid_phrase_General_army_0_NPC_Combat_Act: Pin them down. I’ll go around them!
I'm going around. I need cover!
Cover me while I flank them.
Flanking the enemy. I need cover!
We've got a man down here!
What are you firing at, soldier?
We got a man down here!
I’m gonna make a run for it. Cover me!
Hold them down! I need to reload!
sid_phrase_General_army_0_NPC_Combat_Ene: The enemy is retreating. Good work!
Cease fire! The enemy is retreating.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_NPC_Combat_Sea: No enemy in sight. At ease!
sid_phrase_General_army_0_NPC_Combat_Thr: Heard a noise. I’ll check it out.
He must be close by. I’ll check it out.
Come out with your hands up!
sid_phrase_General_army_0_NPC_Combat_Wou: Hold on, pal. I'll be right with you!
sid_phrase_General_army_0_NPC_Emission_L: The Emission is over. Back to your posts!
An emission is coming! Take shelter!
sid_phrase_General_army_0_NPC_Interact_N: What are you doing here, stalker?
sid_phrase_General_army_0_NPC_Interact_S: Take any questions to my commanding officer.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_TradeTopicBadR: Don't expect much. This isn't a supermarket.
sid_phrase_General_army_0_TradeTopicGood: You did the right thing coming to me!
sid_phrase_General_army_0_TradeTopic_1_5: I only got the good shit.
sid_phrase_General_bandit_0_BusyTopic_7_: Big mouths don't make bosses outta chumps.
sid_phrase_General_bandit_0_NPC_Chatter_: A buddy of mine saw someone get in a Whirligig again, on the road to Rostok. Some rookie, burst like a plum - right next to him.
So, my buddy, he's just standing there, frozen, and the chump is, like, dripping down him...
Tried everything, washed his face with water, with vodka… Still, every time someone opens a can of grub, he gets this feeling, crawling down his spine…like, for real.
Hey yo, now shut it and listen up.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_BusyTopic_1: Where do you think you're going, mate?
What you peepin’ at? I don't know nothing.
You're too small of a fish to yap with me.
I don't give a rat's ass.
Shut your trap, we can chat later.
Piss off, I’m not in the mood for a chinwag.
Big mouths don't make bosses outta chumps.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_BusyTopic_2: Back off. We can talk some other time.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_BusyTopic_3: I sure don't need some dipshit talking to me about nothing.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_BusyTopic_6: Chatting to you lot gives me a bloody headache.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_BusyTopic_8: Chit-chatting's on the dinner menu, not now.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_BusyTopic_9: Do I look like a radio?
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_CallPlayer_: Get your ass over here, stalker.
Chop-chop, let's have a little chat.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_General_ban: The Brood folks were yapping about how the Shah got rid of chumps before word got out.
If he had it out for some loser, he'd make him stash some shit somewhere, like, to test him, or whatever.
And the way to the stash was through radioactive waste. Folks got no gear. How'd they know where the rads at? No color, no smell.
So they'd be running through the nastiest of places with their tongues out, zero clue they're good as dead.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_InfoTopic_1: More and more cops come here every year. Different kinds, but they're all the same.
Life’s good. The boss respects me – he got me a new gun, and my jacket’s fresh off some chump. It could be better, sure, but it could be way worse too.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_InfoTopic_2: Fuck, man... I came to the Zone to get away from the cops. Turns out the place is crawlin’ with them!
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_InfoTopic_3: Can’t remember the last time I had decent food. Loners don't even have any, others are too fucking tough to handle.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_InfoTopic_4: Nice trick, these coupons. Now Freedom’s got the whole Zone by the balls. Should’ve stuck with 'em... I’d be swimming in dough now too.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_InfoTopic_5: Shaking a chump down is an art. Not a total rookie — they got nothing to loot. Not too experienced either — those guys got some badass heat.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_InfoTopic_6: If there’s natural pest control, we’re the Zone’s pest control. We take what’s left behind and finish off the ones who suck at running.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_InfoTopic_7: Steer clear of mutants. You’ll just waste your ammo, and they don’t got any loot on 'em.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_InfoTopic_8: Those stalkers are a pain in the ass. You fuck your fists up grilling them, and their stash turns out to have a couple loaves of bread and a can of meat.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_InfoTopic_9: Fuck... this is the Zone, dude. It’s every man for himself. The math is simple: it’s better to keep all the loot than to divvy the spoils up between the two of us.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_Infotopic_S: People scratch all kinds of shit on their guns. Headcounts, sweethearts, dates they came to the Zone… one even had a prayer! Didn't save that loser, ha.
Buddy of mine had a Warden gun! Maybe the boss'll get me one too, if he knows how to get 'em, right?..
Sultan's been sitting on his ass since he took over Skadovsk. Shoulda been harder on Beard. Why the hell is he cutting him slack?
We’re sorta like Robin Hood, ya know? Take from the rich, give to the poor. And since there ain’t no one in the Zone poorer than us, we get to keep everything, heh heh.
Rumor has it there was this nutjob, Noah. Wandered the swamps with a pet pseudodog. Hey, maybe it’s true. This place is full of crazy-asses.
So one night I was drinkin’ by the fire with my pals, and I noticed one of them skulkin’ in the shadows like he’s mad or somethin’.
So I go up to him to ask what happened, and guess what — it’s not my pal, it’s a fuckin’ zombie! Good thing I had my gun.
You can hear all sorts of sounds in the Swamps. But if you hear someone repeating some phrase like a broken record, run. That’s a fucking Bayun all right.
Back in the day, me and the boys used to clash with Duty almost every day. Just like how we used to brawl with the city folk in my old village. Good times. Then the Ward got too fucking scary.
Well, even the Ward is lying low now. You hardly see them outside of Icarus. I wonder if they're planning some shit, or if they're scared shitless too...
They say Beard's dreaming of getting the Skadovsk back. I say let him dream. The Sultan might just get the Shevchenko too while he’s at it.
I left the Mainland 'cuz I wanted to be free. Well, I'm free now... but no matter where you are, life sucks ass if ya got no coupons.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_Infotopic_T: Man, remember the last Emission? I thought the Slag Heap was gonna collapse on itself. I mean... holy shit!
Everybody dug down as deep as they could, diggers and crooks alike. This is it, I thought. Well, we’re still alive and kicking, as you can see.
Thugs just went off the rails. Before, they used to open up with small talk when they were out to rob you blind. Now the bastards just shoot you in the back.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_MutantLootB: I'm busting my ass, and they'll still pay me jack shit.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_NPC_Chatter: I wanna get some of that dope vodka from the Depot. Good shit!
Sure that's the real stuff? That "dope" canned meat you got last time sure gave me a dope three-day wet fart!
Wanna buy a Rodent?
I’m sick of your shit!
Everybody says they’re sick of my shit. Why won’t you buy a Rodent for a change?
It happened the first time I was in juvee...
Oh man, this is gonna be a real long story!
I’m fucking starving! Zone chow sucks, I want some real food.
Guess you ain't that hungry then.
I’m starvin'. My stomach is growling!
Shoulda aimed at that loser better. We coulda taken his stuff.
Wish I had a shot of vodka right now.
A shot? How about a whole bottle?
Why so quiet? Who died?
If you don’t shut up, it's gonna be you.
So I get into the cave, three Bloodsuckers inside…
Last time yo' ass said it was two!
Ever thought of pissing back off to the Mainland?
Nah. Only ones waitin’ for me there are the damn cops.
Little birdie told me the Ward's selling guns on the side!
Those fucks won’t even sell their toys to other pigs, we wouldn't get shit.
I need to check my stashes, make sure no one stole my shit.
When I get me some guns, I’ll have a gang of my own. Why not? I’d make a helluva kingpin!
Man, I really need a new piece…
How long have I been in the Zone? Two years? Maybe three?
I wonder how my mom’s doin’…
Now where the fuck did I put my stuff?
I'm a lucky goddamn charm, even here in the Zone.
No loot to sell, not a single sucker crossin’ the Perimeter… I'm so damn hungry!
The chumps are gettin’ poorer these days. No loot to shake 'em down for.
Anybody ever tried eating a Rodent? I wonder…
I really need some vodka! My throat's killin' me…
Fuck these rags! Wind’s goin’ right through it!
All pigs are the same. Won't leave us decent folks alone.
I shoulda killed that loser! I’d be all kitted out now.
Fuck, my teeth hurt like a son of a bitch. Ain't there an artifact to make it go away?
Some chump's going home after a rumble, just messing about. And right in freaking front of him - bam! - a scientist.
Waving his hands in the air, screaming, "stop, stop!" So he stops, just standing there. And the scientist is - boom! - gone.
Only a lab coat left of him. Covered in blood.
You know what the weirdest thing is? The coat doesn't say SIRCAA, or even Malachite, - it says MDST, whatever that is.
A buddy of mine saw someone get in a Whirligig again, on the road to Rostok. Some rookie, burst like a plum - right next to him.
So, my buddy, he's just standing there, frozen, and the chump is, like, dripping down him...
Tried everything, washed his face with water, with vodka… Still, every time someone opens a can of grub, he gets this feeling, crawling down his spine…like, for real.
Some chump's going home after a rumble, just messing about. And right in freaking front of him - bam! - a scientist.
Waving his hands in the air, screaming, "stop, stop!" So he stops, just standing there. And the scientist is - boom! - gone.
Only a lab coat left of him. Covered in blood.
You know what the weirdest thing is? The coat doesn't say SIRCAA, or even Malachite, - it says MDST, whatever that is.
The Brood folks were yapping about how the Shah got rid of chumps before word got out.
If he had it out for some loser, he'd make him stash some shit somewhere, like, to test him, or whatever.
And the way to the stash was through radioactive waste. Folks got no gear. How'd they know where the rads at? No color, no smell.
So they'd be running through the nastiest of places with their tongues out, zero clue they're good as dead.
Hey yo, now shut it and listen up.
Just telling you what I know, that's all. Here it is…
So, here's this thing I wanna tell ya.
I heard this wicked thang…
Shut y'alls traps now, this shit's for real.
Now, listen up and quit yapping. Or the Zone's gonna get you.
Keep your ears open! I'm not gonna repeat this.
Who wanted to hear the story? Here it goes…
I remembered the craziest thing yesterday…
All kinds of weird shit here.
Fuck me…
Cut the bullshit!
Enough of this crap, gives me the creeps.
Shit, I need a drink now.
That's some royally fucked-up shit!
Why the hell did you remember that?
Heard this three times, still freaking spooky.
Hey yo, knock it…off, damn it.
Scientists has discovered a new type of mutant in the Zone. They call it “a false chump.” Meaning it looks like a chump, it walks like a chump, but there’s nothing to shake out of it.
I heard the Sultan got a blood transfusion from Beard. That’s way more vessels for Beard to bitch about!
So the gang take a new guy in and tell him, “That loser over there's Misha the Dumbass. If you say ‘Hey Misha, you want a hundo coupons or a grand?’ he always takes a hundred. Wanna try?”
New guy asks him, Misha picks the hundred. “You know they call you Dumbass, right?” “I don’t give a fuck. They get a laugh, I get a couple grand a month”.
A stalker calls his pal. “I need help. I’ve got this tooth problem.” His pal is like, “Maybe you shouldn’t bite what you can’t chew.” He says, “Tell it to the thing that’s got its teeth in my ass!”
A bandit gang goes to the Wish Granter. One of 'em says, “I wanna be a kingpin!” So he becomes a kingpin. Another one says, “I wanna be a bigwig at the Slag Heap!” So he becomes a bigwig.
The third one says, “I want the whole Zone to respect me! Everybody should praise me every time they sit down to eat!” So he becomes vodka.
One bandit asks another, “What do you think of Tolyan? He solid?” “He's tough all right. Got some badass gear, dope gun, but all the rest gone soft. That’s acid for ya.”
Two pals are searchin' their stash. “Hey, we had a bottle of vodka! Where is it?” “I had to use it on my wound.” “Bullshit! I see no wound!” “No shit! My feelin's were hurt and you ain't got none!”
So the boys are shaking down a chump. All shitty clothes, gear's held together with duct tape, nothin' in his bag but an ID. They look at it and read: “Malachite.”
A guy says to the bartender, “You've got a dead cat right by your door!” “How do you know it's dead?” asks the bartender. “I pissed in its ear,” they guys says.
“Why would you take a leak on some poor animal?!” the bartender cries. “No, I said ‘psst’ in its ear, and it didn’t move.”
A bandit bumps into a soldier in the Zone, homie goes like, “Wuss wron' with your duds?” The soldier looks down. Everything is fine — uniform is clean, belt is tied, shoelaces, too...
“Oh, I know!” the bandit says. “You're missin' a standard-issue slug between yo' eyes!”
Two pigs on a stakeout. One says, “I'm a Taurus. That's why I’m so strong and stubborn.” The other says, “I’m a Saggitarius. That's why I never miss a shot.”
And their boss says, “Well, I’m a Gemini. That means I'm gonna start jamming eyes if you don't stop your yappin’!”
A bandit is chewing his homie out: “Why yo' ass always come to every shootout wasted? How the hell can you shoot straight?”
And he's like, “Who needs to aim when ya see ten guns?!”
One bandit says to another, “That's a wicked dope jacket! Where'd ya get it?” “Ah, picked it up. Ya know, had to shoot a loser's ass first, then just picked it up...”
Couple 'a' folks from differen' gangs yapping, “Homies say ya got trouble with yo' grub?” “Naw," the other says, "we got trouble with NO grub. When we got grub, we golden!”
Some bandits are setting up camp. One says, “We gotta put a guy on lookout so nobody ganks our stash.” And another one says, “Who’s gonna gank it? We’re all here!”
A guy walks into a bar, orders ten shots of vodka, and slams them back one after another. The bartender asks, “Why are you drinking so fast?” “You’d be drinking fast too if you had what I got.”
“What do you got?” says the bartender. “Half a coupon,” the guys says, then runs out the door.
A Freedom dude and a Duty dude walk into a bar. Well, the heart wants what it wants.
A bandit comes to an IPSF checkpoint. The officer shouts, “Halt! Who's there?” The bandit shoots him and yells, “Halt! Well, jus' me now, bruh!”
A bandit catches a magic goldfish and says, “I want to hide my loot so well, no one'll ever find it”. “Done,” says the fish. “You sure ain't nobody gonna find it?” the bandit asks.
“Yes,” the fish says firmly. “You sure as hell won't. It's deep in Shah’s stash now.”
I bet my ass you never heard this one!
Hey! When I tell a joke, you jackasses listen!
Nothin’, eh? If you don’t laugh at that one, you’re a cop!
Well, that’s funny. I mean, kinda.
You call that a joke?
Damn, you’re good!
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_NPC_Combat_: Fuck, cover me! I gotta move!
Whatcha doin’? Get ‘em from the rear!
Keep ‘em pinned, I’m headin' straight up their asses!
Fuck him up, I’m comin’ in from behind!
Didja see that? I got one!
Best of luck, off you fuck!
I’ll get 'em from the side! Take cover!
Who are you shootin’ at, fuckface?
Got a little present for you!
Shoulda kept your head down, moron!
Keep shootin’! I’ll make a run for it!
Gimme some covering fire! I gotta relocate!
Keep 'em pinned! I'm on the move!
Cover me, boys! I’m all out!
Keep those fucks pinned! Gotta reload!
I found the son of a bitch!
Fun's over. Chill for a bit.
No chumps in sight. Chill out!
Nobody here. Put down your gats.
Didn’t wanna get it dirty anyways.
Ain't no one here. Chill, boys.
Good. We get to hang onto our slugs.
Head on a fucking swivel, y'all!
The fuck are you waitin’ for? Find him!
I owe you big time, brother.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_NPC_Emissio: The Emission’s all shat out! Let’s go!
We got an Emission coming, guys!
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_NPC_Interac: I was just in the mood for a chat.
Get that toy gun outta my face.
You wanna talk, put the piece down.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_NPC_Peacefu: Where you off with that stiff?
The fuck are you doin’, dude?
I’m just gonna inherit it, bro…
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_TradeTopicB: Sup? In a pinch, are ya?
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_TradeTopicG: I can sell ya anything I’ve got, no problemo.
sid_phrase_General_bandits_0_TradeTopic_: I could find some stuff for ya, if ya got coupons to spare.
sid_phrase_General_freestalkers_0_BusyTo: Make yourself useful, man.
Maybe later.
I’m not in the mood.
Nothing personal, I’m just busy.
Don’t you have anything else to do?
Would you be so kind as to bugger off?
Oh, for fuck’s sake, leave me alone.
I beg your pardon, but now is not the best time.
I'm not looking for trouble.
You might want to find other interlocutors, stalker.
Bad timing, man!
I have no time for idle chat with you.
We could talk some time later.
As if I wasn’t busy enough...
It’s shitty enough without your chit-chat.
Keep your distance, stalker.
Stay away, loner.
We’ve got nothing to talk about.
Some other time, all right?
If you want anecdotes, go sit by the fire.
I’d love to talk but I’m not really feeling like it.
I’d rather shut it. The Zone loves silence.
Save your breath.
I don’t like idle chatter.
As if I didn't have enough on my mind…
Go bend someone else’s ear.
sid_phrase_General_freestalkers_0_InfoTo: Rule number one: keep your mouth shut. I knew a stalker who bragged about an artifact he stole from a stash. The guy sitting next to him happened to be the owner of that stash. It didn’t end well.
You can get used to anything with enough time. Anomalies and artifacts, monsters and bandits. You end up feeling like the Mainland doesn’t even exist. Nothing but the endless Zone out there.
As far as the local wildlife goes, we’re pretty fortunate. What could mutate into monsters here? Boars, dogs… a cat, maybe. Imagine if we had elephants. Or rhinos. It’d be a mess…
Freedom sold out, man! Whored themselves out for a bunch of shiny trinkets. Our stalker freedoms are a thing of the past — if we ever even had ’em to begin with.
What if the mutants are just pissed off ’cuz we keep shooting at ’em? I can’t stop thinking about it…
When a scientist offers you a job, think real hard, then tell him to eat a real hard dick.
They don’t give a shit about our lives. Experiments are all they care about. If something goes wrong and you die horribly, the scientists couldn’t care less.
Why do people have this stupid need for order? Why do we need some dickhead telling us right from wrong?
I came to the Zone to get away from all that crap. If I wanna die under a bush, that’s exactly what I’m gonna do. And nobody’s gonna stop me!
Our guys don’t know how to take it easy. Get a couple of drinks in ’em, and they start yapping about who got mauled by mutants or anomalies, all the wild shit they’ve seen… bo-ring!
In this business, your gear has to be durable, but not too heavy. A stalker’s gun isn’t the only thing that keeps him safe — being a fast runner does, too.
When you get back to camp after two weeks of kicking shit all over the Zone, and there’s a slice of fresh bread and a real bed waiting for you… now that’s real happiness!
Zone life might seem rough at first, but once you get used to it, you'll never want to leave.
Not sure I can stand another day like that… I haven’t had much luck lately. The Zone’s punishing me. I wish I knew why…
A stalker is only as good as his weapon. An experienced loner spares no coupons on his gun because it feeds him.
Anti-rads, pills, it’s all nasty chems. But a glass of good ole vodka's the real remedy.
This is a strange place. Full of artifacts and mutants... But finding a real friend is mission fucking impossible.
The Zone's a scary place. Not because you get to face mutants or anomalies, no. It makes you face yourself. And then you gotta live with whatever yourself is.
They're an odd bunch, those factions. Trying to divvy up the Zone... as if humans get to decide who owns it.
People have all kinds of reasons to escape from the Mainland… and then the Zone shows them for what they are, and that’s that. They can’t escape from themselves.
Folks come to the Zone either looking for something or running from something. But when they stay, they stay for the Zone itself.
The Zone will never let you go, man. You're definitely going home and then there's always one more thing you gotta do...
sid_phrase_General_freestalkers_0_Infoto: Mutants steer clear of this place. They used to hound us, but then we gave 'em what for. Spent two days dumping all their corpses into anomalies before they started stinking up the place.
I’ve been thinking: what if there’s no Mainland at all? What if it’s just a fantasy we’re all clinging to so we don't lose our last hope in the Zone?
Stalkers say SIRCAA’s working on some pills that restore your memory. I’d give anything for that. I’d volunteer to test the stuff if they'd have me.
I wanna go home. Wish I knew where my home was, though… but it’s not here, that's for damn sure.
