My memory ain't what it once was... oh yeah, now I remember!
sid_phrase_RookieVillage_Hub_vita_ded_SC: I’ve had the worst luck lately. The Zone is punishing me for something, and it ain't even telling me why...
I haven't been getting a lot of sleep lately. I wake up every time I hear a noise thinking it’s those zombies — they’ve killed all the sentries, and now they're coming for me.
sid_phrase_RookieVillage_Hub_volk_0_Hell: I owe you a punch in the face, but whatever. What do you want?
Hiya, stalker! What brings you here?
Okay, you’re here, so let’s talk.
sid_phrase_RookieVillage_Hub_volk_1_Busy: Why don’t you go without me this time, all right?
sid_phrase_RookieVillage_Hub_volk_1_ByeT: May the Zone protect you, my friend.
sid_phrase_RookieVillage_Hub_volk_1_Info: I’ve got my own score to settle with the Ward. One of their snipers got me deep in the Zone and used me as bait for my own squad. Picked them all off, one by one.
But I’ll find the bastard sooner or later. And it'll be either him or me.
Isn’t it a pleasure to watch the Ward now? Got their tails between their legs, like kicked blind dogs. Maybe they’ll finally learn to treat the Zone with respect.
sid_phrase_RookieVillage_Hub_volk_1_Meet: Well, the situation is pretty much the same everywhere: either folk are trying to shore up their defenses before Monolith arrives there, or they're already a pile of corpses.
So I don’t recommend going anywhere right now unless you really, really have some place to be. And make sure you double your ammo before you go out.
I won’t be checking your ammo, of course. Or giving you any of my own.
I’d rather not risk it. I gather information. I prep. Then everything goes as planned, nice and smooth.
The Cordon is the best place to learn the ropes. But do those rookies listen to me? Nope. They all wanna get to Prypiat right away.
I’m fed up with the Zone's charms. Where I am is where I wanna be. I don’t give a damn about the great unknown.
sid_phrase_RookieVillage_Hub_volk_1_Trav: If you're gonna pay, let’s go. Your coupons - your decision.
Name the place and hand me some coupons. As a show of good faith.
I can get you where you want… for the right price.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_Audiolog_Forgotten: Hey Myklukha, Chill and I found a dope-ass spot. It'd make an awesome smuggling route!
Chill told me already. Your “dope-ass spot” is in Garbage. According to the Treaty, it's neutral ground. We're not making a move on it.
It’s certainly tempting, but it’s not worth violating the Treaty for.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_Audiolog_Medic_1_6: I’ve got a dead body here, Myklukha. As far as I can tell, he looks like Duty. What should I do with him?
What? Was he killed here, on our turf?
No, he came from the bar. Looks like he had too much to drink. I could do an autopsy, of course…
Nah, never mind then. I figured it was our boys did him in, and now the Ward was gonna come poking around.
I’ll get somebody to deal with the stiff.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_1_GCA_1_61768: You should try searching for artifacts like everyone else. All you do is sit around and flap your gums.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_1_GCA_1_61769: Nah, dude, that’s so last century. I wanna make a living using my brains, like Myklukha.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_1_GCA_1_61770: Having brains in the first place would be helpful.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_1_GCA_1_61771: As if you know anything! I’m Myklukha’s right-hand man. I suggest you show some respect!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_2_GCA_2_61772: Well, here’s to a world free from the Zone!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_2_GCA_2_61773: And here’s to the Duty boys and their lack of imagination!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_2_GCA_2_61774: You Freedom folks have too vivid of an imagination – just look at Screw. Somebody’s gotta keep their feet on the ground!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_2_GCA_2_61775: And that somebody is you? You barely ever leave this bar, buddy. No one could see straight after that much drinking.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_2_GCA_2_61776: It's a figure of speech. Some of my best years in the Zone were spent right here at this bar. They just might be the best years of my whole life.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_2_GCA_2_61777: I wasn’t there back in the day, but I get it, dude. Here’s to better times!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_3_1_61864: I spotted a rat, Myklukha. He’s been showing his ugly mug around the Chemical Plant.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_3_1_61866: I don't give a damn about the Chemical. I’ve been leaking false intel to that snitch myself. But if you've been sniffing around the Cement Factory lately…
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_3_1_61867: What’s up with you, Myklukha? I'm on your side, dude...
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_3_1_61868: You keep an eye on him. It’s not like he’s got anywhere to go. No one likes snitches.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_4_1_61869: Here’s to Polovyn… no clinking glasses on this one.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_4_1_61870: He seemed like a decent dude. We were just having a few drinks, and then he glanced at his PDA and turned into a different person. “You rats snatched Rostok from us!” he yelled. “And now you’re doing it again!”
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_GCA_4_1_61871: I was just trying to get him out of here, trying to calm him down. And then he pulled his gun out, and…
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_HubClose_HubClose_: Shots fired in Rostok! We’re locking it down!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_10_PropT: Wash your hands before eating, stay hydrated, and get at least eight hours of sleep. Come see Dr. Kyrylov for more obvious... I mean priceless advice!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_11_1_618: The Zone is all about stalkers. And what are stalkers all about? Freedom! Embrace the stalker way of life and join Freedom!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_12_1_618: Duty's got drills, we’ve got fun! Duty’s got jealousy, we've got coupons! Duty wants to destroy the Zone, Freedom wants to make it a better place! We can't let Duty have it their way!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_13_PropT: It’s time to put Duty in their place!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_14_1_618: If you cherish a life of freedom among peers, come join our faction. You’re welcome anytime, day or night, 24-7.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_15_1_618: The Zone is offering you an opportunity to join the finest stalker clan out here. Don’t miss out on this chance to become a part of Freedom. You’ll be appreciated and welcomed, whoever you are.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_16_1_696: Arena is open 24/7! It doesn’t matter if you bet on them or they bet on you. What matters is victory!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_1_PropTo: Everything good in life comes with a price tag. Don’t forget about the joining fee, folks.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_2_PropTo: Rostok is the best place to spend your coupons!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_3_PropTo: “Money can’t buy happiness.” That's what guys with no coupons say. But here in Rostok, you’ll find everything you need!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_4_PropTo: No tyranny, no oppression! Peace and harmony under the Treaty!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_5_PropTo: If you’re looking for a place to rest and eat.
A place for a good talk and decent drinks.
Come to the 100 Rads bar! New clients are always welcome!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_6_PropTo: Freedom extends a warm welcome to anyone the Zone has led our way — even Duty members!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_7_PropTo: Artifacts and gear, excitement and entertainment… if you’re looking for some, you’ve come to the right place!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_8_PropTo: We’re the ones who came up with coupons! So that now you can get anything the Zone has to offer!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_PropTopic_9_PropTo: We’ve got so much stuff here, it takes three merchants to sell it all! Come on by and check out their goods!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_aleks_fraj_0_BusyT: Back off, dude! Can’t you see I’m busy?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_aleks_fraj_0_ByeTo: Just come over when you've got something to say.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_aleks_fraj_0_Hello: Whoa, nice to see you, man!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_aleks_fraj_0_InfoT: I’m friends with the boss, bro. I’m totally in the loop.
I don’t know the exact share that goes into Myklukha’s pocket from each deal, but I’d bet he gets a cut off every transaction.
Get lost. No more free news for you.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_aleks_fraj_0_chatt: Everything in the Zone has always been up for sale. I was just the first to start selling information.
If you wanna do well in the Zone, try to limit your trips outside. And if you’ve got wits, you don’t even need a gun.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_amsterdam_0_chatte: You share everything you have in Rostok with a Duty member, and it turns out he wants Rostok itself.
I don’t really mind the Duty folks in Rostok. There’s plenty of room for everyone.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_barmen_0_ByeTopic_: Drop by again. We’ll have some drinks.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_barmen_0_InfoTopic: I have no idea how Myklukha did it, but he’s assembled quite the crowd at the Freedom base. We even got some Duty regulars around here.
They’re either here for a trip down memory lane or because I give them such great discounts.
I used to think that I had to keep this bar running as a sort of obligation to Duty. But then I realized I just cared about the bar itself, no matter who hung out here.
And as long as the Treaty was in effect, plenty of folks didn’t care who they shared a drink with either.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_barmen_0_Meet_2_Me: Did you hear the news? Freedom and Duty are at it again.
Now I gotta sit here and wait for Duty to storm in, take Rostok back, and execute me as a traitor.
But for the moment, it’s mostly just threats, and I've still got work to do. So what’s your poison?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_barmen_0_Meet_Meet: I’ve been here since the days when Duty ran the show. When Freedom took over Rostok, they offered me a chance to leave. I figured it was my duty to keep this bar running.
It’s been working out okay so far, as you can see. Sure, the regulars can get a little rowdy, but customers keep coming in. So I ain't complaining.
So, are you here for a drink, or something else?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_barmen_0_TradeTopi: Since we’re friends and all, in a manner of speaking…
I’ve got a solid selection, plenty to choose from.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_bereza_0_BusyTopic: Can’t you see I’m busy here?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_bereza_0_HelloTopi: Keep in mind that I don’t sell junk, and my goods don't come cheap.
A regular is the best advertisement for my goods. Welcome, friend!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_bereza_0_InfoTopic: The fighting between Eugene and Ragman is getting worse than anything Freedom and Duty ever saw. Those peddlers are never gonna make peace, not even if Korshunov shows up here with a Treaty.
No one in Freedom wanted to pick another fight with Duty, but now that they started shit, Myklukha’s gonna find a way to profit from it.
Word is, that blind Monolithian boss got killed at the Duga. No one’s gonna miss him. Won’t bring anyone back, though…
You should’ve seen the fuss round here after SIRCAA screwed us over. There was a huge crowd, and everyone wanted a piece of Monolithian gear.
And I’m, like, what about the fucking Monolith? Then I found out what happened, and… Yeah, we’re all screwed now. I’d splurge on gear if I were you.
Between us… I had some business with a guy from Wild Island. Weird dude, but not in a bad way. Thinking of him running around with a blank stare, screaming “Monolith”, gives me the creeps.
Wouldn’t want to be near Yaniv when Monolith stormed in. Deggy and his guys held their ground, sure… because that wasn’t really an assault op. Went right through their lines. Hell knows what for.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_bereza_0_Meet_2_me: I don’t like what’s going on in Rostok right now, pal. War means death, and I came too close to that once. I’m not in a hurry to get back there.
But I can’t just up and leave, you know? The guys here need all my supplies.
So, are you gonna try something on?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_bereza_0_Meet_Meet: Hey there, friend! I can hook you up with some top-notch protective gear.
We’ve got our share of reckless folks around here, and a lot of them owe their lives to my merchandise. Heck, I wouldn’t be standing here talking to you if not for my own body armor.
If there’s one thing Myklukha and I see eye to eye on, it’s that you shouldn’t save on money or time when it comes to quality protection. So take your time.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_bereza_0_TradeTopi: My patience is wearing thin. Choose quickly.
We’ll find the right one for you. Your life’s on the line, after all.
The best defense is good protection. What are you looking for?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_den_krasnov_0_ByeT: All right. I’m gonna stay here.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_den_krasnov_0_Hell: I don't get paid to talk, but you gotta keep yourself entertained somehow, right?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_den_krasnov_0_Info: Myklukha might seem to have lost his edge. He’s a merchant now, not a fighter, and he’s turned Freedom into a gang of smugglers. He doesn’t even carry a gun anymore.
But, based on my expertise, it takes confidence to walk around the Zone unarmed. Being sure you'll be safe.
And Myklukha isn’t the type to risk his safety just to show off.
War always comes down to money. And who controls the coupons in the Zone? Either way, Myklukha wins.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_den_krasnov_0_chat: There’s gonna be more work now. More money, too.
You gotta hide in plain sight. No one’s gonna spot you that way.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_kirill_antonovic_0: Your timing couldn’t be worse!
If you don’t look after yourself, there’s not much I can do.
Take care of yourself.
Take care.
Prepare yourself. This is going to hurt.
You're in perfect health.
You’ll be all right. Trust me, I’ve seen worse.
Okay, tell me what the problem is. It's okay, I'm a doctor.
Well, what is it?
I hope it’s nothing serious.
What seems to be the problem?
The Zone is full of health risks. It has mutants, anomalies, Emissions… but, believe it or not, neglecting basic personal hygiene can be just as deadly.
Forgot to wash your hands after tangling with a mutant? Say hi to gastroenteritis! These folks will brag about bullet wounds all day long, but they're too ashamed to discuss gastrointestinal issues.
The odds of dying in the Zone are high enough already. If Freedom and Duty go against each other, I shudder to think how many lives I won’t be able to save.
I'd just persuaded Pike to listen to his body and reduce his tobacco and alcohol consumption…
Then they brought him in with three bullet holes after a run-in with Duty. He barely held on for half an hour.
I don't understand why everyone here seems so eager to die. What could be more valuable than life?
Good day... or perhaps not so good, if you’re in need of a doctor’s appointment.
I have no complaints about the availability of medications, and my patients certainly can’t complain about my expertise.
Rest assured, I’ve got both covered. Or have you stopped by to distract me from my duties?
I take it vodka isn’t the panacea it once was?
Is there something specific you need, or are you just browsing?
Choose wisely.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_kola_amsterdam_0_I: We made the right call by making peace with Duty. Our victory in Rostok was almost bloodless. Why give them more reasons to move against us?
And if they've got an issue with mutants, let 'em deal with it. It just might make things easier for the rest of us.
I liked Duty better when they were just killing mutants. Why’d they have to go and ruin everything?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_laguha_0_ByeTopic_: If you need any help, you know where to find me.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_laguha_0_InfoTopic: If there’s anyone who knows their way around the Zone, it’s Myklukha. The man’s been to Prypiat itself! Somehow he and his crew made it past the Brain Scorcher. That really put him back in the game.
Factions, shmactions — in the end, folks are mostly worried about their own asses. Not everyone’s eager to take a bullet for their beliefs. They’d rather slip away somewhere safe.
And the Zone’s got plenty of hidey-holes.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_laguha_0_Meet_2_Me: It’s about time we stopped playing nice with Duty. The moment Korshunov looked the other way, they decided to stab us in the back.
So I’ve got a lot of work to do. No time for sitting around.
So, are you going or not? Think fast.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_laguha_0_Meet_Meet: You look like a reasonable guy, so I’ll make myself clear: don't come to me until you’re all set to go, and keep your contemplations to yourself.
Every so often, some stalker strolls in here looking for useless chit-chat. “Have a seat,” he’ll say. “Let’s have a talk.” What’s the point? I’ve got work to do.
So, where are we going? Or are you one of those chatty guys, too?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_laguha_0_TravelTop: Let’s see just how far you can go.
I can’t promise you a red carpet, but I’ll do my best to keep you safe.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_mikluha_0_ByeTopic: Here in Rostok, we value every customer.
You’ll find plenty of stuff here to keep you busy.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_mikluha_0_CallPlay: Get over here for a sec.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_mikluha_0_Emission: Okay, there’s an Emission coming. Find shelter!
The light show is about to kick off!
It's over, folks. Time to get back to business and pleasure!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_mikluha_0_HelloTop: I've seen my share of unpleasant folks in this place. Speak up.
I’m pleased that fate brought you here as well!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_mikluha_0_HubInfo_: This place used to serve as a boring Duty base. But now, all roads lead to Rostok. They bring us weapons, gossip, entertainment — everything! We’ve got three merchants running shops here!
It doesn't matter which badges you wear or where your loyalties secretly lie. Everyone’s welcome to share a drink with the others.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_mikluha_0_InfoTopi: If you ask stalkers what matters most in the Zone, they’ll go, like, guns, experience, luck…
The catch is, none of these actually work without coupons. My group spent a month right at the center of the Zone with the Scorcher on, and we all made it out alive.
You know why? I didn’t go cheap on gear. Without it, all the experience, firepower, and luck in the world wouldn’t have been worth a damn.
Duty’s been waging war against the Zone for years now, and they still haven’t diminished it one bit. They tried taking on Freedom, and Rostok is still ours.
They just can’t seem to understand that in the Zone, real power no longer resides with whoever waves their guns around the most.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_mikluha_0_Meet_2_M: I always used to say that everyone is free to do as they please, but I never expected Voronin to treat my words as a call to action.
The old man thinks he can turn back the clock, but I’ll have to break it to him gently. His wish ain’t coming true, not even with all the coupons in the Zone.
Now that Duty is acting up again and the Ward doesn’t seem to care about the Treaty anymore, we’re going to follow through and finish what they started.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_mikluha_0_Meet_Mee: You must be new around here. Allow me to introduce myself. I’m Myklukha. Welcome to Freedom’s turf, the freest of all free markets.
We have no interest in conquering the Zone — we just humbly accept whatever gifts it bestows upon us. And if you know how to ask, it can give you a great deal.
Embrace the Zone, and it might just embrace you. Everything you’ve ever dreamed of, you'll be able to get.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_mikluha_0_NPC_Comb: And what if I go around?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_mikluha_0_NPC_Peac: What the fuck is this shit? Get it outta here!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_mikluha_0_RestoreR: Is there a way for me to bury the hatchet with Freedom?
In Rostok, you’re free to do as you please.
If that’s what you want, my job is to name a price.
I need to think about it.
In the business world, a slow response often comes at a higher price.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_semen_danilyc_0_In: Good gear is everything in our line of work. Here, you’ll find some of the best stuff in the Zone. The Ward might have better gear, but it ain't for sale.
I’ve heard about bandits in Zaton with brand new Warden guns, but there’s all kinds of rumors going around Rostok, so take it with a grain of salt.
I used to like it here. Land of the free. Nobody cared who you were or where you came from. Now it’s all about which side you're on and who your friends are…
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_semen_danilyc_0_Re: We weren’t quite done, were we?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_semen_danilyc_0_ch: None of us were fond of the Wardens, but at least they brought some order. Now we’ve got war everywhere.
Eugene’s got a beast of a gun. I bet I could even take on a Controller with it. But, honestly, why the hell would I do that?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_serz_polovin_0_Inf: Folks around here often claim that Myklukha can turn shit into gold. Well, it looks like his superpowers didn’t quite work on Shah.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_serz_polovin_0_cha: I used to come here for the drinks. Now it’s the good company that brings me back.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_starevsik_0_BusyTo: Does it look like I’m in the mood for a chat?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_starevsik_0_ByeTop: Run along, loner. I won’t keep you.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_starevsik_0_HelloT: Did Eugene send you here to scare my customers away?
You made the right call coming here.
Stick with me, and you’ll get some premium goods.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_starevsik_0_InfoTo: You think I can’t see everyone staring at me all the time? Talking behind my back? Like I’m a total buzzkill or something.
Myklukha invited me here himself, and as long as my shop brings in the dough, he’s okay with me. Everybody else should just shut up and mind their own business.
I don’t give a damn about their turf wars. The more they kill each other, the more weapons I get.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_starevsik_0_Meet_2: Nobody really expected the Freedom-Duty deal to last forever. The only constant around here is Eugene’s jealousy of my business.
He’s got his own supply issues, but he’s always eyeing my shop, always trying to scare my customers away.
You better stay away from him. I’ve got quality goods, tried and tested! Check it out!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_starevsik_0_Meet_M: First time here? Honestly, I couldn't give two shits. You made the right call by coming to me instead of Eugene.
Nothing good ever comes from dealing with him. He’d rip you off and probably slip some rads into your tea. He’s got no morals!
Me, I’m an honest trader. I sell whatever I get. Take your pick, it's all right there on the counter.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_starevsik_0_TradeT: Quit picking and choosing. Grab something already.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_surup_0_BusyTopic_: I’ve got no time for this! Leave me be!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_surup_0_ByeTopic_B: Move along now. Don’t keep me waiting.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_surup_0_HelloTopic: Get to the point. I’ve got other things to do.
Got issues with your gear? We gotta get creative here!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_surup_0_InfoTopic_: I often dwell on how to convey the true essence of the Zone through my work.
Should my perspective be as enigmatic and unpredictable as the Zone itself? Or do I need to be absolutely candid with my prospective audience?
Myklukha says that the more cryptic and mysterious a piece is, the better price it will fetch on the Mainland market.
I'd almost completed my life’s work, almost captured the essence of the Zone in a physical form… and now we’ve got another war.
You know what I realized? Struggle, confrontation, conflict... they all nurture art! It’s through these moments of antagonism that the true depths of existential dualism are revealed.
Yes, I had to begin anew, but now the truth feels closer than ever.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_surup_0_Meet_2_Mee: Now that the Treaty's been broken, I’m swamped with orders. Doesn’t leave much room for creativity.
You’ve got some tech to fix? Well, let’s see it.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_surup_0_Meet_Meet_: Here in Rostok, they consider me a technician, but that’s not entirely true.
My true purpose here is to craft a masterpiece that captures the genuine essence of the Zone in all its dreadful splendor. I won’t spoil the surprise; you’ll witness it firsthand soon enough.
In the meantime, I enjoy fixing things as a sort of hobby. To be exact, I restore them to their original state of harmony, where they can function at their absolute best.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_surup_0_UpgradeTop: I hope you brought something worthwhile.
Let’s see what kind of masterpiece we can create.
Will your item remain the same when I’m finished with it, or will it undergo a complete transformation?
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_udzin_0_ByeTopic_B: Even Ragman wouldn’t be thrilled to see you.
I can get some more goods. Come back later.
Don’t even bother going to Ragman.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_udzin_0_HelloTopic: The folks I have to do business with…
You’ve made the right call choosing me!
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_udzin_0_InfoTopic_: That lousy drunk Ragman is trying to pull one over on me. He's never seen profits like mine, not even in his wildest dreams, and he’s green with envy. I wish I could strangle the little prick.
You know who Ragman's last customers were? Guys from Duty! If you think it’s worth doing business with that rat, think again.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_udzin_0_Meet_2_Mee: When the factions are fighting, it’s great for business. The demand for our goods is through the roof. Restocking can be a challenge sometimes, but it's nothing we can't handle.
Ragman has it easy, of course — the guns he sells are still smoking. I suppose old habits die hard. Hopefully that drunk'll meet the same fate soon enough.
Take a look at my merchandise. I’ve got quite a selection to choose from.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_udzin_0_Meet_Meet_: I’m not used to seeing new faces around Rostok. Folks looking for quality gear tend to pay me a visit.
Of course, if you don’t mind scrubbing a bit of blood off a gun, you can get one from Ragman.
But you strike me as the kind of man who won’t settle for second-hand junk. Well, that makes two of us. Go ahead and see for yourself.
sid_phrase_Rostok_Hub_udzin_0_TradeTopic: I have options to suit every budget.
What can I get you, gear or guns?
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_BanditsCombat_Ba: Shoot at his feet! I want to kill him with my own two hands!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_BanditsStillStan: Lummox, you bastard! I’ll cut you up! Where is the stash?
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_BanditsToValenok: Lummox, you bitch! Don’t fuck with me! My patience is running thin!
Screw you! Screw you all! Come on. Who’s gonna be first?
Shut up, you pussy! This sucker screwed you out of your money!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_FugasBeforeValen: The fuck are you waitin’ for, loner? Do what Dope said.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_GrishaAfterFinal: I’m screwed… either I pay off all my debts, or I gotta leave the Lesser Zone for good.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_GunRaise_Valenok: Put the gun away! Then we can talk!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_HurryUp_hurry_39: Hello, loner! Did you fall asleep or what?! Grab the loot and drop down, pronto!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_InfoRecd_Cache_3: Whoa! He spilled the beans. Are you scared of heights, loner? Nah, I don't give a damn. Get up to the tower and grab the stash. Now!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_Interact_Tower_3: Up you go, buddy. Don’t make Dope mad.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_JumpOff_Combat_3: Hey, are you screwing with us? Dimon, the loner’s taking a piss!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_NishtiakReminder: Wake up, loner! Get up the tower, now!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_SkifGoOut_1_5052: Are you a little slow in the head, buddy? Get in there and have a chat with him!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_SkifWaitsAtTheDo: Trying to box me in, eh?
Screw you! You ain’t gettin’ me!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_ValenokKilled_Mi: Are you nuts? Did I ask you to kill him? Fuck! You’re a goner!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_ValenokShame_ItI: Eh… That’s a shame. Whatever, I’m not going back to that bar…
So long, stalker. See you around.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Comment_ValenokWhisper_w: Come on, stalker. Dope ain’t gonna let us go. You’ve got a clear shot. Take ‘em out!
sid_phrase_SQ01_DIalog_HelloAgain_HowIsD: Should be fine, I guess. Still hasn’t paid me back, cheeky bastard. Wanna have some fun and shake the asshole down?
sid_phrase_SQ01_DIalog_ValenokSide_Debts: Looks like you owe money to half of the Zone.
Hey, it’s not what you think! I had a plan — a good one. I just didn’t have enough resources.

I’d have to run errands for Hamster and Gaffer for months to save up for a decent gun and a detector. That’s too long. I couldn't wait forever to get a real job, you dig? And then I’d pay everyone back!
sid_phrase_SQ01_DIalog_ValenokSide_Thank: Thank you, stalker. I owe you one.
sid_phrase_SQ01_DIalog_ValenokSide_Warlo: Pay up your debt to Warlock first. He promised me a cut.
Eh… Well… I was going to pay him back, honest…
Now? Fair enough, that’s the right thing to do.
Done, I sent the coupons. Both yours and Warlock’s.
sid_phrase_SQ01_DIalog_ValenokSide_WhatW: This Dope, he’s a real psycho. I paid him back, you see? A couple of days late, sure, but I did!
And now he and his gang are pushing me around. The debt doubles every day, he said. Like them thugs could count to three!
So I thought I’d climb the tower and gun them all down. Just got a new scope to try out. Too bad I didn't have enough time.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_AboutValenok_Case: Care to tell me more about Valik Lummox?
The kid owes me – that’s all you need to know. Help me shake him down, and you’ll get your cut.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_BanditsToSkif_Cat: Chill the hell out already, I got it.
Good boy. Stay away from the door, or Lummox'll blow your head off. There’s a hole in the wall where the tower is. You two'll have to chat through it. I'll keep an eye on you.
Because I say so! No funny business, loner. You don’t want to piss me off.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_BanditsToSkif_Deb: You’re not the only one Valik Lummox owes money to. I have come to collect his debt.
Why should I give a damn, buddy? First you take care of my problem, then you can take care of yours. Get it?
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_BanditsToSkif_Don: Whatever. As you wish. No bloody problem. See ya around.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_BanditsToSkif_Fav: Hey you, loner! Come and help some good fellows, make yourself useful.
A dude who likes free stuff, Valik Lummox, barricaded himself in that shack. Owes me a big pile of dough. And instead of paying up, he’s poking me with a gun!
Go and have a nice talk with him, would ya? Calm him down. Make him tell you where his stash is. Got it? Cause I’m about to have a fucking meltdown!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_BanditsToSkif_IfD: And if I don’t? Whatcha gonna do about that?
Why don’t you try it? Come on, humor me. I just love it when people try to mess with me. Right, fellas?
See, buddy? You get what I mean?
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_IncomingCall_Warl: Come in! I just got money from Valik Lummox. Tell the little shit I said hi. Maybe I’ll pour one for him later if he won't be an asshole.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_NoHabar_catch_394: I’ve got a bullet for ya, would that do?
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_NoHabar_habar_394: Come on, mountaineer, lay out the artifacts, quick!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_NoHabar_nohabar_3: There were no artifacts in the cache.
You sketchy piece of shit! Wanna take it all, don’t ya? Get him, boys!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_TakingQuest_DebtA: How much does he owe you?
Plenty. He failed to pay up after a wild night. For some supplies before that, too. And he doesn’t seem to give a damn. Knows I’m not gonna make a fuss about it.
It’s not about the money, really. The kid needs to learn the ways of the Zone. The sooner he learns, the longer he lives. Maybe.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_TakingQuest_DebtF: What kind of man is this Valik Lummox guy?
He’s new to the Zone, but he already made a name for himself. He’s one sharp asshole, not afraid of risks, always full of wild plans. Kinda liked the guy, thought he would go far.
He went too far. Got himself a new gun, and I’m still moping about how to set him straight.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_TakingQuest_ImIn_: I saw him just a couple of hours ago. He headed north, towards the water tower.
I don’t want his blood on my hands, though. Just scare the kid – shake him down and get my money, and that’s it. Twenty percent is yours.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_TakingQuest_Job_3: I don’t feel like running errands. Got anything good?
You still smell like the Mainland, tough guy. Feeling bold and audacious already, huh?
All right. There’s a guy, kinda like you, who owes me some coin. His name’s Valik Lummox. And I need my money back.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_TakingQuest_NotFo: Sorry, Warlock, but I’m not concerned about your debtors.
Well, you should be. You're getting a cut, right? Now, if you think about it, Valik Lummox owes you some, too.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_ValenokIsDead_Art: Here, take this. As payment for his debt.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_ValenokIsDead_Eno: That’ll do. You’re an honest guy. I can respect that. By the way, your cut's on your PDA.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_ValenokIsDead_Kil: I have bad news. Valik Lummox is dead.
Damn. That kid was all right… Stupid, but all right. Guess I won’t be seeing my money now.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_ValenokIsDead_Tak: Here, take this. As payment for his debt.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_ValenokIsDead_Was: It’s not my fault you lend money to morons. He was begging to get himself shot.
Another tough guy, eh? Don’t even try it with me. Hit the road, there’s no pay coming for you.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_ValenokTension_Ca: They want your stash. Just tell me where it is.
I might be new to the Zone, but I’m not stupid. As soon as I tell you, they’ll kill me…
Damn it. That’s one hell of a mess I got myself in, right? Okay. Listen here.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_ValenokTension_Le: No need to shoot. I’m leaving.
And take your buddies outta here! You ain't getting Valik Lummox that easy!
Easy there. I just want to talk.
Are you nuts, man? I’m kinda busy here, you know! If I drop my guard for a second, these thugs will do me in!
If I’m going down, I’m taking at least one of them with me!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_ValenokTension_Pl: The stash is at the water tower, at the very top. You’ll know what to do once you're up there… hopefully. Don't get into an anomaly on the way.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_ValenokTension_Tr: You think I don’t have it in me? Piss me off, and I’ll show you!
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_ValenokTension_Wa: Are you kidding me? Fine, get in line! It’s not like you can kill me twice.
You want me to pay him back? All right, listen up.
sid_phrase_SQ01_Dialog_ValenokThanksAndA: Thanks for stepping in. Come over here, would you?
sid_phrase_SQ01_dima_nistak_0_InfoTopic_: If you’re a decent guy, you can live large wherever. But if you mess with folks, try to screw them over... well, then someone's gotta put you in your place.
Sometimes that place is six feet under.
sid_phrase_SQ01_evgesa_odekolon_0_InfoTo: Them loners got a real attitude problem. Gotta get physical to get anything out of 'em!
sid_phrase_SQ01_feda_filon_0_BusyTopic_1: You got nothing else to do?
sid_phrase_SQ01_feda_filon_0_DefeatTopic: Help, guys! I’m gonna die over here!
sid_phrase_SQ01_feda_filon_0_InfoTopic_1: The boss gets some idea in his head, and then I gotta clean up the mess. It’s gettin' real old.
sid_phrase_SQ01_feda_filon_0_ResumeComme: I thought you pissed off already.
sid_phrase_SQ01_grisa_valenok_0_DefeatTo: Help me! I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_SQ01_grisa_valenok_0_InfoTopi: So many freaking bandits around… No wonder — I'd rather steal some stalker’s loot than rummage around in an anomaly.
sid_phrase_SQ01_grisa_valenok_0_ResumeCo: What? Oh, right, we weren’t done talking.
sid_phrase_SQ01_teha_karmannik_0_InfoTop: Loose lips sink ships. I ain’t wastin' my breath, especially with a loner.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Comment_EnterHouseMemori: I tell ya, he ain’t wakin' up. I’ve seen this before. Lots of times. Just leave him be. It ain't the worst death in the world. Sure is slow, though.
No. If there's no way to help him, I can’t just leave him here… not like this.
Why the hell did you bring him here? He ain’t gonna wake up.
Maybe we could wake him up with an energy drink…
sid_phrase_SQ02_Comment_HomeMemories_hou: Dammit, I’m so clumsy... gimme a hand here, Olexiy!
Leave the glasses, Nina. they’ll just break anyway.
We’ll put it in the root cellar, where the icon is.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Comment_IconMemories_ico: I just hope it all works out somehow…
We’ll get back home, and our Mitya…
sid_phrase_SQ02_Comment_MitaiIfBetrayed_: We've got nothing to talk about.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Comment_MitiayCallPlayer: Hi, stalker. Any luck getting my heirloom back?
sid_phrase_SQ02_Comment_MitiayCall_job_4: I’ve got a job for you, stalker.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Comment_PomorCallsToRemi: My offer about the Orthodox icon still stands. Drop by if you’re interested.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Comment_PomorRadioCall_c: Stalker, come in. If you’re heading to the Poppy Field, stop by for a chat.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Comment_SanaBeregMemorie: Finally, I have a moment of peace. No shooting, no running around, no goddamn mutants…
It’s so quiet here. So calm…
sid_phrase_SQ02_Comment_TreeMemories_mem: Mitya! What are you doing up there?
Psst! Get in, quick. We’re playing hide and seek. Wanna hide with me?
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_BuselTalkAboutMit: What were you two talking about?
That Mityay guy thinks everyone in Zalissya must be suicidal. Risking your life for something of value I can understand, but going to the Poppy Field after some old junk? Don’t fall for that crap!
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_AboutQu: Remind me, what do I need to get for you?
Bring me guns and ammo from the bodies scattered around the Poppy Field. I marked them on the map.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_Agree_5: Excellent. Then we shake hands, and you don’t mention my name anywhere. I marked the location of the bodies.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_Arrival: What are you doing in the Poppy Field? It’s a dangerous place.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_DeadBod: That’s a lot of dead bodies. How did they die?

When you fall asleep in the Poppy Field, you ain’t wakin' up. That’s what happened to these guys. Very unfortunate… or not, depending on your perspective. You can croak anywhere in the Zone. Here, at least you can die in peace.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_Field_5: I see you know your way around this place. What’s so dangerous about the Poppy Field?

It makes you drowsy, and there's no way to resist it. If you can’t hide indoors, an energy drink is your only chance to stay awake. In addition, the field messes with your brain and makes you hear things.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_FirstAl: A stalker named Mityay asked me to get a religious icon from a root cellar in the Poppy Field, so I went there and picked it up.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_GotWeap: I brought what you asked for, but I don’t need the coordinates anymore.
I see. You must be a good tracker if you found the root cellar on your own. Since you don’t need the coordinates, I’ll pay you in coupons instead.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_Hello_A: Still here? Look, it’s dangerous to stay in the Poppy Field.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_Help_51: A stalker named Mityay asked me to get a family heirloom of his. A religious icon. It should be somewhere out there in the Poppy Field, in a root cellar.
I’ve seen a root cellar there. But if you want information, you’ll have to pay for it. If you’re short on coupons, you can work it off.

Otherwise, you can look for it on your own. It’s not gonna be easy, mind you. I scoured the entire Field up and down before I came across that cellar. Doubt you’ll fare any better. So, what do you say?
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_Instruc: If you start feeling drowsy, slug an energy drink. If you’re out of drinks, head right back. And stay away from petals — they can knock you out right away. Good luck.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_Interes: Look, why take that icon to Zalissya? Give it to me, and I’ll give you a gun. A special one. Its former owner must’ve built it himself. You can’t get stuff like this anywhere else in the Zone.
Speaking of which, I don't much feel like going after that icon, but if you can get it, I’d be willing to buy it off you.
How about a trade? Bring me the icon, and I’ll give you a gun. A special one. Its former owner must’ve built it himself. You can’t get stuff like this anywhere else in the Zone.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_New_Arr: So why did you come here, anyway?
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_NoDeal_: I had a deal with Mityay, and I’m going to follow through with it.
You’re wasting a good opportunity. I dunno what Mityay offered you, but you’ll never go wrong with a gun.
Here’s some advice for you: don't give in to sentimentality. That shit doesn't belong in the Zone. It’s every man for himself in here.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_NoWork_: I can find it on my own.
Think you can handle it? Well, good luck then. If you can’t find the root cellar, stop by. I’ll be staying here for now.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_No_5168: Too bad. If you change your mind, I’ll be staying here for now.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_Order_5: I got a job from a merchant from Rostok, and I need more guns and ammo. Look, I marked the bodies in the field I haven’t searched yet. Bring me what I need, and I’ll give you the coordinates for the root cellar.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_Pay_513: I’ll just give you the coupons.
Suit yourself. I’ll send you the coordinates. The root cellar’s on the other end of the field.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_QuestAv: Finding that root cellar turned out to be more difficult than I thought. Does your offer still stand?
Sure. You can either buy the root cellar coordinates with coupons, or do some work for me.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_What_51: What about you? What are you doing here?
I live here. And I work here too. Lots of people come to the field unprepared, and some of them stay here forever. I collect the stuff they won’t be needing anymore.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_Work_51: I’d rather keep my coupons. How can I work it off?
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_YesDeal: Smart move. You’re a born stalker, I can tell. The Zone is for folks who can put their own interests above those of others.
Don’t worry about the icon. I'll find a good home for it.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MeetPomor_YourWea: Here's what I got from the bodies.
Good. I sent you the coordinates. The root cellar’s on the other end of the field. Remember the rules, and you’ll make it there no problem.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MitiayFinishQuest: I found your icon. Here it is.
I guess I didn’t come here for nothing after all. Now I’ve got something from my old life back. Thanks for the help, stalker.
The icon is in the Poppy Field. I can’t get it.
How can I ask other people to do something I can’t?
Maybe it’s a sign. I shouldn’t have asked someone else to do this. It's something I need to do on my own.
I sold it to Pomor, a guy from the Poppy Field. He paid me more.
What would this Pomor guy want with my icon? It’s not an antique or anything. It has no value to anyone but me!
As for you, stalker… I just hope what you did will come back to haunt you everywhere you go in the Zone. Stay away from me.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MitiayFluff_fluff: I know it’s dangerous, but I’m offering you good money here!
Sure you are! No way, man. Find yourself some other dope willing to march into certain death.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MitiayStartQuest_: Hi there. Did you want something?
Welcome to the area, stalker. I’ve got a job for you, but I should warn you, it involves going to the Poppy Field.
The Poppy Field? What’s that?
One of the Zone’s most infamous wonders. Lots of people are drawn there, but few ever leave. As soon as you walk into the field, it saps your energy, making you weak and drowsy.
That’s where our farmstead used to be, before the accident. I guess it’s probably still there, but you’d have to be nuts to settle down in that place.
Remind me about your job again.

You need to retrieve my family heirloom from the Poppy Field. My parents left it in the root cellar during the evacuation. I’ll pay you the price of an expensive artifact. I tried to get it on my own, but couldn’t…
Is this the icon you were looking for?
Oh… yes, it is! Thank you, stalker. Here’s your money.
So I didn’t come here for nothing after all. Now I’ve got something from my old life back.
Did you find your icon?
No, I couldn’t do it. But you can help me. The deal’s still the same: find the root cellar in the Poppy Field, grab the icon, and bring it to me.
I’m not interested in this job.
I see. I wouldn’t go anywhere near the Poppy Field, either.
Do you know the root cellar’s coordinates?
Sorry, I don’t. I know the root cellar’s somewhere out there in the Poppy Field, but that’s it. Everything’s changed so much…
Why can’t you go look for the icon yourself?
I tried, but the moment I set foot in the field, I started feeling so groggy I could barely stand.
And then I started hearing voices – some I’d never heard before, others of those long gone…
I can’t remember how I managed to get away... but I’m never goin’ back there again.
All right. I’ll bring you the icon.
I'd really appreciate it. Remember to stock up on energy drinks, though. The Poppy Field isn’t that big, but you can get lost real easy.
What kind of job did you have in mind?
When my parents and I were evacuated after the accident in ’86, we left a family heirloom in the root cellar. An old Orthodox icon.

My mother... she kept talking about it until the day she died. I need to find it. I wanna have at least somethin’ to remember my family by. Bring it to me, and I’ll pay you the full price of an expensive artifact. I couldn’t get it on my own…
That’s all I wanted to know.
I hope it was helpful.
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_MitiayTalksOfTheP: Do you remember anything about the disaster in '86?
A little. I remember the distant sound of an explosion in the middle of the night. A glow over Prypiat. The evacuation was a mess. We had to leave everything behind. I can’t remember the trip itself.
That’s for the best, I guess. It hurts thinking about it all. “You’ll be back home in three days,” they said… but there was nowhere to go back to.
You said you lived here before the accident. Tell me more about that.
What do you want to know?
What was your life like after the evacuation?
I’ll give ya three guesses, and the first two don’t count. I doubt it was a life of joy that drove you to the Zone, stalker. Well, it was the same for me.
I used to hope I’d get to see my old house one day, savor my childhood memories… I was a fool.
This Zone, Skif... everything about it is wrong. This is a place that shouldn’t be.
Tell me about your life before the Chornobyl incident.

Everything was just normal, no anomalies or anything. No one died because of wildflowers, the dogs didn’t try to eat us for breakfast, and our pigs looked like proper pigs, not the… things that you find these days.
I had lots of friends. More than I ever had afterward. We had a house of our own, not an apartment. After the incident, we couldn’t save up enough to buy our own place again.
But, most importantly, my parents were alive and well. Unfortunately, you can’t appreciate these things as a kid…
sid_phrase_SQ02_Dialog_PomorBuysIcon_Spe: Have you thought about the icon? Do you wanna trade, or not?
sid_phrase_SQ02_mitaj_0_DefeatTopic_1_43: Help me, bud! I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_SQ02_mitaj_0_EmissionFirstMes: Find shelter, quick! The Emission's about to begin!
sid_phrase_SQ02_mitaj_0_HelloTopic_hello: Skif! I’m so glad to see you!
sid_phrase_SQ02_mitaj_0_InfoTopic_1_Info: I found my old stash a while ago. Can you believe it? I hid some stuff away forty years ago, way before the Zone ever existed.
I was a little kid, but I already had some stalker savvy about me… Ha, I wish I’d thought of stowing something useful in there...
sid_phrase_SQ02_mitaj_0_ResumeComment_1_: Oh, right. We ain’t done yet!
sid_phrase_SQ02_pomor_0_EmissionFirstMes: We’ll talk later... if we survive the Emission.
sid_phrase_SQ02_pomor_0_InfoTopic_1_news: The Zone likes it quiet, in every sense of the word. Tread lightly, don’t talk too much, and you just might live to a ripe old age.
sid_phrase_SQ02_vita_busel_0_BusyTopic_1: Hold on! Now’s not a good time!
sid_phrase_SQ02_vita_busel_0_InfoTopic_1: Here in the Zone, if a gig seems easy, it’s a fast track to the grave. You either pitch in for peanuts or bust your ass for coupons. And if they actually cough the dough up afterwards, then lucky you.
sid_phrase_SQ02_vita_busel_0_ResumeComme: So what were we chit-chattin’ about?
sid_phrase_SQ03_Audiolog_DevyatijPDA_Lab: Damn… may the Monolith keep you safe, Ninth. We had to leave quickly. You’ve come such a long way…
And I will do it again. I am going back.
Why? Don’t be stupid. You can’t hide forever. They’ll get you sooner or later. Life ain’t the same anymore.
Either you descend into lies and self-pity, living among strangers as a stalker… or you come and join us as a brother.
Tell me what do I need to do.
Put on our old armor. The gifts of the Monolith will guide you through places others cannot go. Trust me. I’ll send you the route.
May the Monolith light your way.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_DevatyjAfterPray: I heard you coming. You may approach.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_DevatyjOnDeadMas: He is beyond help now. The Monolith has taken him.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_DevatyjOnMastif_: I need a little time to get him back on his feet. A day of rest and proper care should suffice.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_DevatyjOnYouKill: But why?! I could have saved him…
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_DevatyjPrayer_pr: May your light shine down on the souls of the brave soldiers who gave their lives in service to your will.
Reveal the cunning plans of your enemies to us.
Give us the power to avenge our fallen brethren.
Those who are in eternal union with the Monolith can never be stopped!
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_Devatyj_CheckMas: I need to make sure Mastiff is all right.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_FlipAfterFight_a: Leave me alone, man. You got any questions, take 'em to Dew.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_FlipAfterMonolit: I don't feel like talking. I need to calm down.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_GorecAfterMonoli: We're gonna be heroes back in Zalissya…
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_MastiffAfterQues: Skif? I just wanted to thank you.
Whatever Lens says, if you hadn't believed the Ninth, I probably wouldn’t be standing here right now. Me and the Ninth, we talked for a bit. I never thought I'd meet a decent Monolithian…
I want to thank you in some way. Here are the coordinates to a stash. I’ve had my share of abandoned stashes for a while, but you might find it useful.
Skif? Lens says I owe you one.

Thanks for rescuing me. If not for you and the guys, that Monolithian would've sacrificed me to the Zone in a heartbeat. Or... I dunno, turned me into a zombie or something. Ugh, that’s some creepy shit right there.
I texted you the coordinates to a stash. It's my way of showing you my gratitude. I won’t be looting any old stashes anytime soon, but you might find it useful.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_RosaAfterFight_T: The Monolithian’s down. May he burn in hell.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_RosaAttacks_gran: All right, we're coming in. We have to gang up on him.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_RosaNotice_heyyo: Who the hell are you? Come on, get over here.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_RosaShotOnSight_: He’s up there! Kill the fucker!
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_RosaThreatens_Th: Hey, Monolithian! We know you’re there.
Look for the entrance. We gotta smoke the bastard out.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_StalkersFromAbov: Hold your fire! It’s a stalker!
You gotta talk to Dew. He’s in the back of the building.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_StalkersOutside_: Shit! There's some kind of a hole here... looks like we found the entrance.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Comment_SubotaDesperate_: Why don’t you come over here?
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_AfterRosaIsGone_M: Here, take this. I hope it can help you in some way, much like you have helped me. I will not be staying here for long. If you have any questions, ask them now.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_AfterRosaIsGone_S: I’m sorry it has come to this. But there was no other option.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_AfterRosaIsGone_W: Are you still here? Is there something else you wanted to ask?
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_AfterRosaIsGone_b: It’s time we went our separate ways.
You’re an unusual man. I will remember you.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_AfterRosaIsGone_m: You keep mentioning the Monolith. What is it?
To stalkers, the Monolith was the Granter of Wishes. To me and my brothers, it was God. But I hear its voice no longer.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_AfterRosaIsGone_w: I am going to my brothers on Wild Island.
There is no place left for us anywhere else in the Zone.
The loners say a lot of things about you. Who are you, really?
I am the Ninth. I used to be a Monolith soldier, but I have forgotten nearly everything. All that is left of my past is blurry visions… and the hatred of those who remember.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_DevatyjAfterHisPr: Are you looking for your friend, loner?
I took him here and treated his wounds. Don’t worry, your friend will live.
What did you do to Mastiff?
He was wounded. Badly. He didn’t stand a chance without my help.
I heard you saying some kind of prayer. What was that?
The Monolith’s prayer. It helps me concentrate. It's funny... I have forgotten how I learned to heal or kill, but I still remember the words of the prayer…
Why did you kill Mastiff’s men in the tunnel?
I didn't. They broke into the lair of a deadly mutant. It attacked them before I could kill it.
Even though I can't remember anything?
You're going to pay for all the people you've killed.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_DevatyjAfterRosaA: You're lying, and you deserve to die.
Monolith, make the scales fall from his eyes...
You could try talking them out of it. I rescued your friend. This is the truth. But is the truth really what they want?
I don’t want to get involved in this.
I understand. The other side of the building is clear. You should be able to escape unnoticed.
You should leave, stalker. I do not want to harm anyone, but these people are out for my blood.
You should leave this place. Or… you could help me. Talk your people into backing off. If they attack me, it will only end in more bloodshed.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_DevatyjHelps_YouA: May the Monolith light your way.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_LinzaGiveQuest_Di: What kinds of people are these diggers?
Where stalkers go out looking for artifacts, diggers look for junk: gear, old electronics… like dead stalkers’ PDAs. They can lead you to stashes full of useful loot too.
They peddle their junk on the Mainland, and sometimes here in the Zone. I can always use spare parts, so I work with those guys sometimes.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_LinzaGiveQuest_l_: I’m glad you're here. As a matter of fact, I do. A bunch of diggers who used to bring me all sorts of useful stuff have gone off the radar. I’m feeling a little uneasy about it.
Changed your mind, huh? I’m looking for the missing diggers. Can you find them?
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_LinzaGiveQuest_s_: What could have happened to them?
They were using the PDAs of dead stalkers to raid their stashes. It’s a dangerous job, you know. Bad places, traps… and besides, a stash might have more than one owner.
Suit yourself. If you change your mind, I’m not going anywhere.
All right. Where should I start looking?
I have the coordinates for their last outing. I told them to stay away from that tunnel. I knew it was a bad idea...
There were four of them: Max Saturday, Bedlam, Vasya Punk, and Mastiff, their leader.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_LinzaGivesAnswers: What do you need me to do again?
Not all of them. Saturday warned us in time… he didn’t make it then? That leaves Mastiff. We can still rescue him. At least I hope we can.
It’s all on your PDA, man! My guys were heading into the tunnel. Check the place. Find out how they're doing and why they haven't been in touch.
Go to the abandoned building where the Monolithian was spotted before. I need you to search the place. Mastiff could still be in there.
The group got wiped out. Mostly.
Yeah, I know. Saturday contacted me. We have to get Mastiff out. Dew is getting his men together, but I’m afraid they won’t make it in time… I need your help.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_LinzaGivesReward_: Mastiff’s group got wiped out. Mastiff himself was being held hostage by a Monolithian inside an abandoned apartment building. I made sure the Monolithian won’t cause any more problems.
Here’s your reward. You’ve earned it. To think how many people one crazy zealot could kill…
Mastiff’s group got wiped out, and Mastiff himself got knocked unconscious. A Monolithian took him to an abandoned house.
So Dew and his men didn’t go there for nothing! Saturday told him the same thing. I hope they can get to Mastiff in time…
Mastiff’s group got wiped out by a deadly mutant. Mastiff himself was rescued by a Monolithian and taken away to recover. Dew and his men came to kill the Monolithian. I had to intervene.
Listen up, Skif… you did what I asked, and I’ll send the coupons to your PDA. I don't want the rookies saying Lens doesn’t pay for his jobs.

But to think you sided with a Monolithian… they’re monsters, Skif. When I think about what they did in the past, it makes my skin crawl. The Gaffer’s been protecting Zalissya against the Monolith for years.
Sure, you haven’t been here that long, so you don't know about it all. But the others... they won’t understand. I sure as hell don’t.
Those bastards always take out our best men! The Gaffer lost so many men defending Zalissya from the Monolith back in the day… God rest their souls.

Back when the Scorcher was still online, the Gaffer used to clash with those freaks around Zalissya. It used to take five stalkers to bring down a single Monolithian. If you had any less, you were screwed.
You'd empty an entire magazine into one of them, and he'd just keep on coming. They don’t feel pain.
I saw Dew and his men on my way out of the Monolithian’s building.

I hope they make it back soon… thanks doing the scouting. I've sent the coupons to your PDA. You were smart not to go up against that Monolithian on your own. Your death wouldn’t have done anybody any good.
You did the right thing coming to me straight away. Going up against a Monolithian on your own is certain death. Thanks for doing the scouting. I've sent you the coupons.
I figured out what happened to Mastiff’s group.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaAfterFight_li: You should probably go talk to Lens. I think Mastiff used to work with him. Tell him what happened here.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaAfterFight_pl: And we’re gonna fuck this lousy place up.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaAfterFight_yo: Thanks for your help. That Monolithian wasn’t so tough after all, huh? I’ve seen better fighters in my day.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaArrives_deadm: You’re too late. I already killed him.
You did it all by yourself? Whoa, man.. you must be tough, going head to head against a Monolith soldier.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaArrives_knowm: I came here to find Mastiff.
Saturday asked you to come, huh? Good. He called me too, told me everything. He says that Monolith prick’s about to turn Mastiff into a zombie. Well, that ain't gonna happen!
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaArrives_noone: I already checked the building. There’s nobody there.
We’d rather double-check it. Maybe you didn’t look hard enough. If the Monolithian left the building, we’ll go after him!
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaArrives_r_hi_: What are you doing here?! There’s a Monolithian in the building! He killed Mastiff’s men and brought him here, and now he’s hiding like a rat!
We gotta put the fucker down. You can either get outta here or get in line. We're about to light this place up.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaArrives_rathe: Suit yourself. Just stay out of the way.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaArrives_retur: Good. So, what do you say?
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaArrives_withy: Great. We could use another gun.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaArrives_wrong: Saturday is wrong. The Monolithian didn't kill anyone. He rescued Mastiff.
What are you talking about, man?! He’s probably turning Mastiff into a zombie right now! Are you just stalling for time? You must be in cahoots with the Monolithian! Die, scumbag!
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_RosaArrives_youwr: I talked to the Ninth. He’s innocent.
You talked to the Monolithian, you fucking sicko?! Guys, he’s a zombie! Get him!
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_StalkersNotNow_La: You'd better ask Dew. He's in the back of the building. I’m basically nobody.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_SubbotaMeeting_Mo: There used to be a group called the Monolith, invincible zealots from the middle of the Zone. They supposedly guarded the Granter of Wishes… I thought it was just made up. You know, a tall tale to scare the rookies.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_SubbotaMeeting_Po: Sounds like your group was attacked by a mutant. A Poltergeist.
No way, man! It was that Monolithian! I saw it with my own eyes! He did this!
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_SubbotaMeeting_bb: Don’t worry about me. Go rescue Mastiff. I marked the spot where the Monolithian might have taken him on your PDA.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_SubbotaMeeting_by: But what about Mastiff? Look, I know where the Monolithian took him. That cursed apartment building, everyone knows about it. I’ll mark the spot on your PDA. Maybe you can help after all.
Hold on. I gotta rescue my friend. Please help me.
The Monolithian took him away. First he fucked us up, and then, when he saw Mastiff was still breathing… the motherfucker’s gonna turn him into a zombie…
I know the place he took Mastiff to. There’s a lot of nasty rumors about that cursed apartment building. Here, I marked it on your PDA. See if you can help.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_SubbotaMeeting_he: Fuck… all that just for some loot…
Sure, I can help. Do you know where the Monolithian took Mastiff?
Yeah. He's gotta be in the cursed apartment building. There’s a lot of nasty rumors about that place… here, I marked it on your PDA. Good luck, man.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_SubbotaMeeting_li: Lens sent me. He said he lost contact with your group.
I’m glad he still cares! You gotta help me, man. Rescue Mastiff. That Monolithian killed everybody, then took Mastiff away.
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_SubbotaMeeting_or: We were on our way to the stash. Business as usual. So we go into the tunnel, and there he is. He calmly turns toward us. His eyes are completely blank.
Fuck, I don’t know how he did it. In the blink of an eye, everything in the room just went up in the air and slammed against us. It happened so fast…
Bedlam got killed on the spot. I got thrown against the wall. That’s how I survived. Vasya… he died slowly. And Mastiff… the monster took him away. He’s gonna turn him into a zombie!
sid_phrase_SQ03_Dialog_SubbotaMeeting_wh: I got slammed against a wall. It’s all right, the doc can patch me up. The other guys had it worse. A lot worse.
sid_phrase_SQ03_devatyj_0_DefeatTopic_de: Hear me, Monolith… lend me your strength.
sid_phrase_SQ03_devatyj_0_EmissionFirstM: You have to find shelter. The Emission is getting close.
sid_phrase_SQ03_devatyj_0_HelloTopic_hel: The Monolith has brought us together once more.
sid_phrase_SQ03_devatyj_0_InfoTopic_1_in: The time when the Monolith will speak to us again is nigh. That’s what Faust says.
sid_phrase_SQ03_devatyj_0_InfoTopic_2_ha: I’m glad you’ve reached your goal.
sid_phrase_SQ03_devatyj_0_InfoTopic_2_in: I see you made it here after all. What do you think of this place?
Every place feels equally empty when the voice of the Monolith does not answer your prayers. But it is safe here. And I am no longer alone. My brothers are with me.
sid_phrase_SQ03_devatyj_0_InfoTopic_2_no: I sought solace, but there is none to be found on this island. My brothers are united no more. I can but pray that the Monolith will make us whole again... one day.
sid_phrase_SQ03_flip_0_EmissionFirstMess: It's a fucking Emission! If we don’t find shelter, we’re toast!
sid_phrase_SQ03_gorec_0_EmissionFirstMes: Find shelter. There's an Emission coming!
sid_phrase_SQ03_maks_subbota_0_EmissionF: No time to talk, an Emission's about to begin!
sid_phrase_SQ03_maks_subbota_0_InfoTopic: Folks around here are worse than mutants. If a guy’s lost his marbles, he’ll forget all about his buddy he shared his rations with. But you know he'll remember enough to kill that buddy on the spot.
sid_phrase_SQ03_mastif_0_EmissionFirstMe: We can talk after the Emission!
sid_phrase_SQ03_mastif_0_InfoTopic_1_inf: No clue. I got kinda rusty at workin' solo. Been raiding stashes with my buds for too long… now I'm gonna have to learn to go solo all over again.
sid_phrase_SQ03_rosa_0_DefeatTopic_defea: Argh! Help me, quick! Over here!
sid_phrase_SQ03_rosa_0_EmissionFirstMess: Are you blind? There's an Emission coming!
sid_phrase_SQ03_rosa_0_InfoTopic_1_info_: Some folks have started looting old stashes. It’s a dangerous business... and one unworthy of a true stalker, if you ask me.
sid_phrase_SQ03_rosa_0_InfoTopic_2_info_: Those Monolithians ain’t as tough as they say. I’d get some guys together and clear out Wild Island… too bad everyone’s scared shitless of 'em.
sid_phrase_SQ03_rosa_0_ResumeComment_1_6: All right. Let’s get back to it.
sid_phrase_SQ03_tola_bumerang_0_DefeatTo: I need a medkit, guys… I’m dyin’ over here!
sid_phrase_SQ03_tola_bumerang_0_Emission: Get to shelter, now! The Emission is almost here!
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_Radio_SoloveinDa: Shit just got real. I could use some help here. I found that collar that was making noise outta nowhere.
Turns out it’s no dog. That professor fucked me, man...
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiAfterNo_a: Whoa, sorry. Thought you were about to take off with it.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiCalls_A_3: Hey, buddy! Over here! You wanna make some money?
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiCollar_lo: Guess that’s it. Nice shooting. All right, now for the serious part. One of the dogs has a collar. We have to find it.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiCollar_no: Those things emit a lot of radiation. If you hear static, watch your step.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiFIndColla: Did you find it? Bring it to me.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiHelps_hel: Ha! Take that, you mangy cur!
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiJoke1_jok: Wanna hear a joke? It just came to me. Check it out.
How come Burers don't have any ID?
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiJoke2_jok: Oh, here’s another one! Why’d the Poltergeist lose weight?
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiLeaveOnGo: You took your time. I was about to go on my own.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiNoDogs_La: That’s it? Damn, I was just getting warmed up…
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiReach_psa: Here they are – the dog pens. They used to be the cowsheds, but I don’t see any cows here. Plenty of dogs, though.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiRobed_Lab: Hey, where are you taking that collar, Fido?
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_SoloveiTiredOfCh: Come on, stalker! We ain’t playin’ tag here!
sid_phrase_SQ04_Comment_Solovei_Woof_Lab: Woof, woof. That’s dog for “time to get to work.”
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_HubSoloveiDead_ab: Is there anything you can tell me about the guy who’s buying these collars?

Just a scientist I know. He doesn’t feel like driving all the way here from the Industrial Zone, so he asked me to do him a favor. He gets the collars, the stalkers get a job to do, and I get my cut. It’s a fair deal.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_HubSoloveiDead_an: All right, let me have a look.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_HubSoloveiDead_bl: I found one of these on a Bloodsucker.
So? You want a bonus or something? All right, fine. You got it.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_HubSoloveiDead_co: I hear you buy these collars.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_HubSoloveiDead_no: Hold on, I’ll bring them in a bit.
Just don’t take your sweet time like Nightingale, okay?
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_HubSoloveiDead_sb: Well, tell him not to come back. I’m not gonna go chasing after him.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_HubSoloveiDead_sd: Guess he had the last laugh, huh? I had a feeling he was gonna bite the big one someday. So where are the collars?
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_HubSoloveiDead_sl: Beats me. I don’t work with him.
Nice! You found out there’s a demand for these collars, and… finder keepers, right? Hand ’em over, and the money’s yours.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_HubSoloveiDead_ta: Good. I’ll send you the coupons.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_HubSoloveiDead_we: Where’s Nightingale? Why didn’t he come himself?
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_InfoSoloveiJokes_: What do you call a Bloodsucker that only drinks beer?
Okay, but this is the last one.
Why do Burers have so many dates?
All right, that’s enough. I’ve got work to do.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_SoloveiCollar_loo: Keep on looking. Work before play, right?
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_SoloveiFound_foun: Here! Hear that noise on the radio? That means the collar’s close by.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_SoloveiPrequest_H: So, wanna go shoot some dogs? The bet’s still the same: if you kill more than me, the money’s all yours.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_SoloveiPrequest_h: Sorry, I couldn’t wait for you. But the offer still stands. We’ll hunt a pack of blind dogs, and whoever shoots more of them gets the money.

How about a little wager, man? There’s a pack of blind dogs wandering about, and I’ve been hired to hunt them down. If you shoot more of ’em than I do, the money’s yours. If you don’t, it’s all mine. What do you think?
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_SoloveiPrequest_l: Try not to get lost this time.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_SoloveiPrequest_m: Why would you want to bet on this?
I’ve been chasing these dogs for days all by myself, and I’m bored to tears. I could use some company.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_SoloveiPrequest_n: Well, if you’ll find the time, I’ll find the dogs.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_SoloveiPrequest_p: A wager, huh? Let’s do it.
Let’s get going then – they could scatter at any time. Follow the trail.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_SoloveiPrequest_w: Who’s paying you to hunt blind dogs?
Scientists. Who else? They’ve turned me into a real hunter. Digging around in anomalies just isn’t my thing.
sid_phrase_SQ04_Dialog_SoloveiStartField: Don’t feel bad, I’m a natural born hunter. Here, have some coupons – for participation, if you will.
So, did the collar fit, or do you want a refund? You crack me up, man.
Hey, you’re the scourge of… whatever you’re the scourge of, I guess.
A sore loser, aren’t you? You shouldn’t have left. I would’ve paid you some anyway.
I don’t go around shooting dogs for free, after all. The scientists need their collars.
These dogs are all over the Lesser Zone… I’m getting tired of this crap. Sometimes a dog gets into an anomaly. Sometimes the static is loud and clear, but yet there are no dogs in sight. Not a one.
What do you think of this whole collar business? I don’t know what kind of freak puts them on dogs, but I’m the guy they hired to bring ’em back.
You’re one hell of a sniper, man! I didn’t expect a rookie to beat me. Well, the money’s all yours.
Keep your chin up, and you’ll be all right.
What do you know about these collars?
It’s some sort of science project. They wanna tame blind dogs or something… I didn’t get it. They give me rough coordinates, then I go track the hairless mutts down.
Actually… one stupid-ass dog wandered into an anomaly. If you can pull its collar out, I’m willing to pay you for it.
And if you wanna have some fun shooting, there’s another pack nearby. You’ll see.
Where do I find these collars?
I’m sending you the coordinates. If you recover any collars, bring ’em to Hamster. He’ll deliver them to the customer. I don’t like to stay in one place too long, you know.
sid_phrase_SQ04_solovej_0_BusyTopic_notn: I’m kinda busy here, man. No offense.
sid_phrase_SQ04_solovej_0_DefeatTopic_in: So much blood… I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_SQ04_solovej_0_EmissionFirstM: We’ll talk after we get though this crap.
sid_phrase_SQ04_solovej_0_InfoTopic_1_1_: Know what I think? Maybe I should tame a pseudodog. You can’t trust nobody in the Zone, but a dog is still a man’s best friend…
Until it decides to take a bite outta ya!
sid_phrase_SQ04_solovej_0_ResumeComment_: What were we chatting about, my friend?
sid_phrase_SQ05_Comment_Dozent_AliveBand: Stand down, boys. Leave this one alone. We had a deal.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Comment_Dozent_Deadbody_: What the hell is that?! Get that stiff away from me!
sid_phrase_SQ05_Comment_Dozent_Go_go_398: I’m going straight to the Mainland as soon as I finish my business here. Hopefully we won’t be seeing each other again.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Comment_OgurcikScrewOff_: Leave, stalker. I’m not gonna say it twice.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Comment_SurikScrewOff_sc: You’re lucky you made a deal with the boss. Get outta here.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Comment_TohaKubScrewOff_: Come on, take a hike already.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_DozentInBoilerRoo: Why did you risk moving against Shah?
Because the bastard screwed us out of our cut! He’s gone off his rocker with greed. Doing deals behind Freedom’s back is one thing — those suckers are there to get fleeced.
But now he’s lashing out at his own. The guy’s paranoid. He keeps our money for himself and shows no respect to any of us. Half the gang would love to get rid of him, but they’re scared shitless.
If you’re after the package, you can have it. I don’t want anything to do with it! It’s all the Dome and his stupid ideas. I knew he’d fuck it up!
Let’s make a deal, huh? I can explain everything.
You’re not getting out of here alive.
Then you’re gonna die too, you prick!
All right. Give me the goods and the info on Shah’s stash.
I knew we could figure something out. I sent you the coordinates for both.
A piece of advice, though: don't show that gun at the Brood bar. The Shah doesn’t look too kindly on guys who touch his stuff. He takes them to his office, then dumps what’s left of them outside.
No one was supposed to get hurt. The Dome and two of my men were supposed to come to the spot early and tell the courier the Shah had dispatched them to pick up the shipment.

But the courier must have suspected something. The deal was delayed, so the Dome had to stick around, and then the Shah’s men showed up. It was a mess. Now I just want to stay alive and get out of here.

I’d give you something, but the Shah didn’t pay us shit… oh! I know the coordinates for his stash! He’s got a special gun there, a nice one from the Mainland. Take it and the package and let me go. Deal?
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAfterRadio_N: I don’t usually work for nothing.

I wouldn’t expect anything less. All right, I don’t give a damn what happened to Gonzo. All that matters is the package he had on him. I don’t want any trouble with the Brood over their missing goods.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAfterRadio_a: You turn a job down, but it finds you anyway. Luck you, huh? So what’s up with Gonzo, stalker?
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAfterRadio_d: Gonzo was dead when I got there — just like everyone else in the house.
I take it he didn’t have my package on him. That’s too bad. The last thing I need right now is trouble with the Brood over lost merchandise.
Well, go back and search ’em. See if you can find any leads.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAfterRadio_r: I see. So what about Gonzo?
I was the guy you talked to on the radio.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAfterRadio_w: So you wanna make some money after all? Good. A dead courier is bad enough, but losing the Shah’s merchandise is completely unacceptable.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_Ang: Watch your tone if you wanna make a deal with me.
You’re right. That was rude of me.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_Los: A courier of mine went missing along with a shipment recently, so I’m a little on edge.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_Wha: Whatever. I’ll just find a job somewhere else.
Hold on, loner. Sorry, that was rude of me.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_abo: Beats me. Nothing good, I'll tell you that much. I don’t hire thieves or morons, so I doubt he sold my shit and got drunk somewhere.
What kind of shipment are we talking about?
A valuable one. That’s all you need to know.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_acc: I could try looking for your shipment.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_aga: Nope. I don’t want to lose any more shipments. I need to deal with the last one first.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_bye: All right, I have to go.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_g_c: The terms are still the same. Get me the shipment my courier failed to deliver, and I’ll reward you handsomely.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_goo: Remind me what we agreed on, okay?
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_gos: Gonzo — that’s my courier — last contacted me near the delivery place. The Brood’s got a lair there. I’ll mark it on your map.
Ask them if they saw anything suspicious. I really don’t want to explain myself to the Shah, the boss of the Brood. He’s got a screw loose.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_mop: See that mop in the corner? It's all yours. I can’t trust you stalkers with my merchandise. You either steal it, or die trying.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_no_: I don’t have time for this at the moment.
Then why the hell are you bothering me?
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronAsksHelp_svo: Talk to the Brood. They were the last ones to see Gonzo alive. Maybe they can tell you something.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronPDA_accept_3: All right. I’ll take the job.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronPDA_no_35009: That’s not the kind of job I’m looking for.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_GuronPDA_pda_3500: About that missing shipment of yours — do you still need help recovering it?
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_Guron_Complete_ab: You wanted me to find that shipment your courier couldn’t deliver.
Yeah, and I’m still waiting for it.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_Guron_Complete_co: Your courier is dead. I found the body.
That’s hardly surprising. Let me guess — he didn’t have the shipment on him, did he? Search the place where he was killed. There ought to be some leads there.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_Guron_Complete_do: I’ve got your goods. The job's done.
You’re a man of your word, I see. Well, so am I. Your coupons are on the way.
sid_phrase_SQ05_Dialog_Guron_Complete_pd: I think I know who ordered the hit on your courier. Everything’s on the PDA.
So what are you doing here? Whoever ordered the hit has my stuff. Go get it back.
sid_phrase_SQ05_docent_1_EmissionFirstMe: We’ll talk later... if we survive the Emission.
sid_phrase_SQ05_docent_1_InfoTopic_1_1_4: The Shah wants to run Garbage. He doesn’t understand that the Sultan runs the place because he appreciates his men and keeps order.
sid_phrase_SQ05_docent_1_ResumeComment_1: Hmm... what were we talking about?
sid_phrase_SQ05_serega_kalac_0_DefeatTop: Fuck, I’m dyin’ over here! Help!
sid_phrase_SQ06_Audiolog_StalkerInteroga: Al lright. A stalker, goes by the name “Peat.” Came out to the checkpoint, wounded. Asked the watch to give him some ammunition.
What the fuck are you talking about? You mean the old tunnel? It’s been closed since, like, forever. What passengers?
The code. I know the code. One…
Fuck, I think we've got a breach!
The passengers. They’re alive. They shouldn’t be.
Can’t you see he’s delirious? If he lives, he won't get farther than the village. If we need him, we’ll find him there. Come on, get moving, quick!
sid_phrase_SQ06_Audiolog_Zombie_Research: Now we’re getting power outages… as though the explosion and the collapse weren’t enough! And they said the tunnel could withstand a nuclear strike!
