I’m about to lose it, man. When there’s not an overload, there’s a shortage. And the rescuers are taking their sweet time…
It could be even worse in the lab. At least we’re alive here, but them… hell if I know.
I dunno, man… who turned all the lights on last night, eh? The holy ghost? I told them to use fewer lights because of voltage drops!
Now half of them are useless! And they call themselves engineers… fuck!
sid_phrase_SQ06_DialogMedAboutStalker_MS: Did he say anything at all? Is he conscious?
He’s delirious all the time. Keeps talking about some tunnel, then some numbers. Like the last thing he saw was a fucking math book.
sid_phrase_SQ06_DialogMedAboutStalker_Ne: Have any wounded strangers come through here lately?
Actually, yes. Some guys brought him in, right after the big Emission. They said he barely made it to the fence and collapsed there.
Somebody did a real number on the guy. Had a couple of gunshot wounds. Plus, he’s clearly not right in the head.
Sure, I removed the bullets, but it didn’t do him much good. I don't think he's gonna make it…
sid_phrase_SQ06_DialogMedAboutStalker_Ta: Would it be okay if I talked to him?
Come on in. He’s in the next room. But keep quiet, he just calmed down. He was thrashing around so hard he almost ripped his bandages off. I had to give him enough sedatives to take down a horse.
sid_phrase_SQ06_DialogTechAboutStalker_S: I’m looking for a wounded stalker. Have you seen one?
Why would he come to me? So I could dig bullets out of him with my pliers? This ain’t a movie. We’ve got amenities in here.
Check with our medic. Or go ask Sidorovich. He never leaves that basement of his, but he’s got eyes all over the Cordon.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_ExplorerAboutStal: Have you seen a wounded stalker around here?
I’m no shepherd to this flock. I don’t keep track of their comings and goings.
Better ask Sidorovich. Nothin’ at the Cordon goes on without him knowin’ about it.
That, or you could talk to our doctor, Whale. If your guy was fucked up real bad, he might have stopped by the hospital.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_SidorovichAboutTu: Why are you working with Quiet? What’s in it for you?
Maybe I just turned altruistic all the sudden. So I thought I’d teach Quiet the ropes.
With the Monolith gone, he’s like an empty vase. I can put whatever I want in him — loot, shit, whatever. Who am I to pass up an opportunity like that?
I'm not paying that. I’ll find Peat without your help.
Well, good luck with that, stalker.
Go get some fresh air. And bring me the goods already!
Quiet sent me. I’m looking for a psi-installation. I've got a couple of questions, since you're the one who wants it.
That’s a steep price… All right. so where do I find him?
The price is right. You can keep enough to get you a loaf of bread and some ammo. And I get my share too.
Your stalker is here, in the hospital with our medic. He’s been out for days, but he’s alive. For now.
That’s it. Now run along. Next time, bring me the goods.
Why are you looking for a psi-installation?
Curiosity killed the cat. If I placed an order, that means I need it. That’s all you have to know.
I need to find the stalker who went looking for the installation before me. Did he ever come here? Looking for help, maybe?
Now that’s a good question! Sure, I’ll help you find him. But it’s gonna cost you. Information has a price, you know. And that goes double for useful information.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_SidorovichEndQues: Here’s your psi-installation, as ordered. There's something broken in there, though.
Broken? This junk is worth less than a bunch of empty tin cans now.
Can’t Quiet hire someone who’s not as stupid as him for once?
I deducted the cost of the gift box. And a nice big ribbon, too. Plus, a bonus for Quiet. So yeah, it’s just about right.
A fitting wage for an easy-ass job.
I have your psi-installation. Good as new.
This is a piece of junk. It’s worthless!
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_Sidorovich_Buying: You’re charging too much for nothing.
If it was nothing, I’d charge you even more.
All right. I’ll pay. Where’s Peat?
He’s with our medic. Unless he kicked the bucket already.
How much do you want for your information about the wounded stalker?
You waiting for a sale or something? I don’t have those. As long as my goods are in demand, the price remains the same.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijAgain_NoAgai: Dammit, I’m shit out of luck! Maybe Strider was right. You can’t do any trading when everyone’s scared of you.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijAgain_Second: Have you sent anyone else after that psi-installation of yours?
Nah, the job's on hold. The customer's offering good money, but no one wants to take it. Why, have you changed your mind? You’re going to the Cordon, right?
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijAgain_WhereI: How did a psi-installation end up at the Cordon?
Who knows how all this stuff wound up in the Zone?
Sidorovich said there was an underground tunnel there. Rumor has it, it leads to some kind of a lab.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijAgain_Yes_51: There’s no such thing as too many coupons. I’ll find the thing.
Some of them didn’t believe I could make it. I told them, a little effort goes a long way!
All right, listen up. A stalker named Peat was looking for the installation before you. But now he’s missing. He could have been detained by IPSF.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijAgain_Yes_53: They've got an old checkpoint at the Cordon. Maybe you can pick up his trail there. By the way, if you find the installation, don’t bring it here. Take it to Sidorovich, he’s the one footing the bill.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijEndQuest_Bon: You’re getting a bonus too. That’s what he said.
Really? Guess that means I’m getting the bonus up front, and the rest later… that's an interesting way of doing business. I gotta try it myself sometime. Thanks. Over and out.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijEndQuest_Ill: Maybe he’s gonna pay me in installments… thanks. Over and out.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijEndQuest_Lie: Your buddy Sidorovich is a crook. You shouldn’t be dealing with people like him.
Really? He seemed so honest… well, you live and learn, right?
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijEndQuest_Rad: Skif, come in. This is Quiet. I just got a payment from Sidorovich. It’s… not very much. Did you get some too?
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijGiveQuest_Al: Is this the thing you were looking fo?
Right, that’s it! I knew you’d help me!
Still, you oughta stop by the Cordon. That was my deal with Sidorovich: I find the thing, and he pays for it.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijGiveQuest_De: All right. I’ll get you a psi-installation. Do you know where I can find one?
Peat oughta know. That’s the stalker who went looking for it before you. But he’s missing. He sent me a super weird message right before he vanished, though.
Something about the passengers who protect it, and the military having something that he wants. I asked around, and the only military there is the IPSF unit stationed at the old checkpoint.
I suggest starting there. By the way, if you find the installation, leave it with Sidorovich at the Cordon. That was my deal with him: I find the thing, and he pays for it.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijGiveQuest_Fi: Hey, stalker. I heard about you from the Noontiders. You’re an odd duck, they say. You've got no fear, but you're not squeamish either… oh, right, you’re here to talk business. Silly me.
So, here’s what I got. I need a portable psi-installation. Those things aren't allowed here.
But I know where to get one. At the Cordon. What do you say? Will you do it?
You had a job for me, right?
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijGiveQuest_No: I don’t want to get involved with that.
Huh? You really are an odd duck. Don’t you need coupons? Anyway, if you change your mind, I’ll be here.
You say the device is banned here. Why?
Ask Strider. He thinks Noontide should stay away from anything Monolith-related.
And he’s right, I guess. But that’s no reason to live in squalor when someone’s willing to pay good money for the pieces of our past.
Especially since I bet the old junk ain’t even working no more. But it’s good enough as a souvenir.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijGiveQuest_Ps: What kind of device are you looking for?
Looks like a lamp, but it doesn’t light up when you turn it on — it scorches your brain.
The stalkers say they used to find these things at our old altars back in the day.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijInvitation_I: One, two. One, two. It works, right? Check, one-two.
Oh, so you can hear me, huh? Good.
You wanna make some money? For both of us, actually. Go talk to Quiet. Oh, that’s me.
sid_phrase_SQ06_Dialog_TihijReminder_Rem: Remind me what our deal was about.
Hey, I know how that goes… sometimes you remember things, sometimes, not so much. Anyway, I need a psi-installation. You can find one at the Cordon.
The stalker who was tracking it down for me went missing. He could have been detained by Perimeter security.
They've got an old checkpoint at the Cordon. Maybe you can pick up his trail there.
sid_phrase_SQ103_AL_DiodFirstCall_1_8646: Skif, come in. I need your help with this lab. If you're up for it, I'm waiting at the Slag Heap.
sid_phrase_SQ103_AL_Miheyev_Kovalenko_Mi: I asked you to buy the sedatives a whole week ago! You still haven't managed to, and Nestor is sending five for processing today.
You're lucky I've got some stashed in my personal medkit. But next time, you're on your own!
And I'll make sure to tell Nestor everything! When I suggested we use the device for interrogations, we agreed on ten people per month. What happened then?
The numbers grew, the supplies got worse, and I barely have time for my personal project. I'm starting to get really tired of this!
sid_phrase_SQ103_QC_DiodFirstCall_1_8645: Skif, come in. I need your help with this lab. If you're up for it, I'm waiting at the Slag Heap.
sid_phrase_SQ103_QC_Diod_LastComment_Nev: No telling now whether I could've saved you with the right Emitter, boys.
sid_phrase_SQ103_QC_ScientistBusy_1_8675: Did you come here to chitchat, or to loot the laboratory? Get on with it!
sid_phrase_SQ103_QC_ScientistSkifNear_1_: It's only getting worse. First, I heard the dead talking to me, and now the zombies are attacking.
sid_phrase_SQ103_QC_ZombieInterrogation_: Let me go… Please. I… Don't know any more…
sid_phrase_SQ103_QD_ScientistWaiting_1_8: What are you waiting for? Big red button, remember?
sid_phrase_SQ103_QD_SkifMeetsScientist_C: The device was developed to lower the aggression of the zombified. Unfortunately, its emission causes severe hallucinations in ordinary people.

And this very side effect is what sparked the interest of one of the local kingpins. If the power is adjusted accordingly, whoever is under the effect of that emission will spill whatever you want to know.
Where their stash is, what they stole, who they killed… what else holds value in a stalker's head?
sid_phrase_SQ103_QD_SkifMeetsScientist_N: Your call. If you want to get out of here, press the button that restarts all the electronics. It will open the doors.
I don't have time for this. Good luck.
sid_phrase_SQ103_QD_SkifMeetsScientist_W: Reboot the Suppressor so I can extract the Emitter. It's the heart of the device. The rest of its parts are replaceable.
Find… the big red button and press it. That will restart the electronics and open all the doors. I know you can do it.
I'm listening. What do I need to do?
And who are you? What are you doing here?
Yes, that's the one. This device has great potential, and it could protect us from the zombies. But its previous owners turned it into a weapon against their own kind.
You can't imagine what could happen if it ends up in the wrong hands. That's why I want to get rid of it. And that's why I need your help.
Do you mean the Aggression Suppressor? Why do you want to destroy it?
If you can call it that. I wasn't really given an option to say no, so yes, I helped him finalize this device.
I won't bore you with the details. Let's just say I fixed the engineering side of the problem, and now it really is operational.
Who are you? Are you real?
sid_phrase_SQ103_QD_SkifMeetsScientist_Y: Asking questions. That means you're not a hallucination. That's good.
My name is Professor Mikheyev. I've been working here, developing a device that causes cognitive distortions. So it's not that easy to determine what's real and what's an illusion.
Now, that device needs to be destroyed, so it doesn't end up in the hands of someone like Nestor. Will you help me?
sid_phrase_SQ103_QD_SkifScientistFinalDi: Piece of friendly advice: stay away from the Iron Forest.
Thank you. Now, the Aggression Suppressor will no longer be used as a torture device.
The Emitter is yours. Good luck.
Nestor would have gotten the information out of them in less humane ways. Then killed them after anyway.
With Nestor, I regained access to the project that will solve the zombie problem for good. That will save many more lives than a low-life mafioso took.
Don't you feel sorry for torturing those people?
Very interesting. Now, give me the Emitter.
And what do you think you'll do with it? Sell it as scrap to buy yourself some ammo?!
If this is a matter of coupons, I can pay. I'll give you more than any amateur technician.
Not so fast. Give me the Emitter.
But now I'm working for people way up the food chain. Very soon, they'll get to the Iron Forest.
Without the Suppressor, people there are just food for the local fauna. So even if you got curious, better stay away from that forest, stalker.
You're not so different from my former 'boss'. Take it.
Let another Nestor fry someone's brains to find out the location of a precious vodka stash.
Yes… of course. Here you go…
Emitter or bullet to the head?
Couldn't you have started with that and named your price? Here.
Works for me. Send the coupons.
But now I'm working for people way up the food chain.
Couldn't you have started with that and named your price? Here.
If you really are working for serious people, share your profits, and the Emitter is yours.
And you thought the Suppressor components came from Diode in Garbage? I needed Nestor's protection to continue my work comfortably.
A little birdie told me that you were the one who suggested to Nestor that the Aggression Suppressor could be used for interrogations.
Done? I'm surprised… Well, congratulations, assistant. Mission complete. I have the Emitter, and I'll deal with it.
Thanks to you, the Zone will be a safer place. Now, you can take whatever you want from our selection. There has to be something valuable left.
So self-righteous now, are you? Don't tell me you never got your hands dirty in the Zone, stalker. How is a bullet any different?
I know what I've done, and why I did it. I bear the consequences. What about you?
You were the one frying people's brains.
sid_phrase_SQ103_QD_Skif_Diod_DidntTakeQ: Okay. What do I need to do?
Hell yeah! You need to find a device in the lab, the Aggression Suppressor. Then bring me its Emitter.
You can keep the rest of the goodies you find there.
You mentioned a job for me. Still need that Emitter?
sid_phrase_SQ103_QD_Skif_Diod_FinishQues: Fuck… I told you. I warned you that it's fragile! Whatever. What's done is done.
It's as good as broken. Had some trouble on my way here.
I got the Emitter. It's yours.
Shit… Should've gone there myself, not… Whatever. What's done is done.
Gave it to Mikheyev, its rightful creator.
Not surprised! But what matters is you're here now, lucky, and in one piece! And you got the Emitter, I hope?
Ah, damn. Skif… just out of curiosity… did you break it? Or sell it to someone on your way here?
Sorry, but I don't have the Emitter.
Fucking A! Knew I could count on you, Skif. You did me a real solid here.
Hope the lab had some goodies left. Then we're even.
So I went to your lab. Didn't like it one bit.
Why would they be mine? I made them an offer, just like you. They were adults. Taking jobs if they're up for it, sipping beers if they're not.
And you're right here! Handled it on your own, which means the job was doable. You just need to be smart enough about it…
Your diggers didn't get drunk or scared. They all died on the lower level.
sid_phrase_SQ103_QD_Skif_Diod_GiveQuest_: So you saw how they looted everything that wasn't nailed down. Even the wall tiles. Savages…
The one that's not too far, down south? Been there.
Eh, fine… Come back if you change your mind.
There's a device there, the Aggression Suppressor. I need a spare from it. The Emitter.
Nestor had business there. Shady business. Then diggers went down there… or didn't. But I never saw them again. Chickened out, got drunk, or whatever.
How do you know about that place?
Fine. Where should we start?
Let's just say Nestor doesn't need his stuff in the afterlife, unlike me. And I found an interesting note there. With a key card.
In the note, some professor is writing to Nestor about testing the "Aggression suppressor" in that lab.
I tried the key card, and it fucking worked! So the device has to be there. Turns out I'm not that dumb after all!
What makes you so sure the suppressor is on the lower level of the lab?
Now we're talking! Take the key card to get into the lab. Bring me the Emitter once you find it.
Just be careful you don't break it! It's no scanner in a sturdy case. You'll figure the rest out on the spot.
There's plenty of science stuff there. Merchants will be begging to buy it, and I only need one tiny spare. Help me out?
The lower level is the only one that hasn't been ransacked. Would you mind stopping by?
Not much to see there. Folks looted everything that wasn't nailed down. Even the wall tiles. Savages…
Not that I recall.
I can't right now.
Zombies. Turn it on, and they don't care about you anymore. They chill out and stay away.
No worries, though! It won't affect you. Well… at least, it shouldn't.
And whose aggression does this Suppressor suppress?
What do I get in return?
Honestly, not a single fucking thing. But I guess there's nothing good about places like that. Whatever the smartasses tested down there, it's better to look at it through a scope.
What do you know about this lower level?
What exactly do you need?
You said you had a job for me, a lab or something. Tell me.
Back when I used to work in Yaniv, the damn zombies made our life hell. We came across some blueprints of a device that could make them herbivorous.
So we decided to assemble it. But our emitter was made of odds and ends, and the only thing it managed to do was make more zombies.
And now I find out someone actually made the thing work! So I wanna see a working emitter, and figure out if it was the problem last time.
Why do you need the emitter? Want to sell it?
Do you have any work for me?
Just a sec. And keep your voice down – the locals are way too curious.
Got a delicate question for you. You ever been to the lab under the Factory on your stalker runs?
sid_phrase_SQ103_QD_Skif_Scientist_After: I don't feel like talking now, stalker.
Good to see you, stalker. My work on the Suppressor continues as planned.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Audiolog_JumperSOSAgain_: Can anyone hear me? The station was attacked… passed out, he’s getting worse.
Somebody, please help us! My coordinates are…
sid_phrase_SQ10_Audiolog_JumperSOS_Help_: Hello! Come in! Somebody, anybody, please!
Our station is under attack… hiding in the outhouse with one of my brothers… can’t wake him up… need help immediately! My coordinates are…
sid_phrase_SQ10_Comment_HogAndJumperWatc: Halt! Who are you? What are you doing here?
sid_phrase_SQ10_Comment_HogIfJumperIsDea: You shouldn’t have come here, stalker. Nothing personal.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Comment_HogJumperArgumen: So what am I supposed to do with you? Dubny said not to leave any witnesses.
We’re Noontiders. Just like Dubny. Are you really gonna shoot us?
All Noontiders are supposed to be at the base. What the fuck were you idiots doing out here?
sid_phrase_SQ10_Comment_HogSeesJumper_Se: Spotted two Noontiders. Need to check on their condition.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Comment_JumperGivesRewar: Bluish came to! You hear that? You did it! You killed the monster!
Thank you, stalker! I sent you the coordinates and the code to the stash. Take whatever you want… wait. Someone’s coming. Must be the help Dubny promised! I’ll go meet up with them.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Comment_JumperNoticesPla: Someone heard us! Hold on, brother!
sid_phrase_SQ10_Comment_SinajStillConfus: Sorry, stalker. Can’t talk right now. My head is killin’ me.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_DubnijTalkAfterQu: That wasn’t your job. I don't owe you shit.
Jumper and Bluish aren’t coming back to Noontide.
Too bad. But it’s their choice. And I’m not going to explain myself to a loner.
Your merc isn’t coming back. He failed. I was the one who killed the Controller. Now you owe me.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_HogWantsYouDead_H: A Noontider hired me to kill a dangerous mutant.
That’s true! And he did it! The thing’s dead!
Put your gun down. Who are you and what’s going on here?
Leave the loner alone! He killed the beast that drove my brothers insane!
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_HogWantsYouDead_S: Shut up. Did you really take out the Controller all by yourself? Thanks, I guess. You saved me a lot of time.
So here’s the deal: I don't want any trouble with Dubny — he always pays me triple. And his orders were clear: get rid of any witnesses, along with anyone who was under the Controller’s influence.
You can scurry back to your base, Noontider. But the stalker and the shell-shocked guy are out of luck.
Halt! Who are you? What are you doing here?
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_HogWantsYouDead_W: We’ll see who’s out of luck here.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_JumperGivesQuest_: Remind me what you wanted me to do again.
Find the key to the basement, then go downstairs and kill the creature that’s hiding down there. Please, hurry! I’ll give you a Monolith stash as a reward!
All right, I’ll deal with it. I’ll kill this creature... whatever it is.
For real? Thanks. That thing is hiding underground. Waiting. There’s a safe way to get down there, but only North has the key. He’s our supervisor.
He must be upstairs. Sometimes he climbs to the roof to get some fresh air. Go find him.
One more thing: there are a lot of our men inside. If it wasn't not for the thing downstairs, they’d do you no harm, but they’re out of their minds now, so take care.
It came out of thin air — and everyone at the station lost their mind. They were screaming. Shooting at each other. Only two of us made it out of there. That thing still got Bluish, though.
Enough. Quiet. Hush. Shut up. Shut up. Shut up!
I thought he’d get better if I dragged him away, but he’s getting worse!
Please kill whatever is hiding down there. I'm begging you. I… I’ll give you the code to the stash!
Shhh… (moans) no, stop! I don’t wanna hear it!
Stalker! Help! There's someone... something terrible down there!
I’m looking for an inductor.
An inductor? What the hell is that?
I think we've got a storeroom with some parts in it. It’s downstairs, by the showers. Maybe you’ll find your inductor there. But… that thing, it's downstairs too.
North, our supervisor, had the key to the basement. Last time I saw him, he was on the roof. But if you’re going underground anyway, please deal with the thing that's hiding down there if you can.
I’d rather stay out of this.
Sorry. I get it. It takes a lot of guts to go up against the unknown. But what I am supposed to do now?
I don’t think anyone’s coming to rescue us anymore…
Do you still need my help?
Yes! Dubny’s men never showed up. Can you go down and kill the thing in the basement? I’ll pay you well!
Tell me what happened here.
Bluish and I went out for a smoke break. Then we heard gunshots and screams coming from the station. Bluish rushed back, and I went after him. We didn’t get far before that thing... spotted us.
I felt like someone was peering into my mind, crushing it, whispering things… Bluish fell. He was ahead of me, so it hit him harder. I grabbed him and ran away.
I contacted Dubny right away — that’s our chief safety officer. “Leave Bluish there,” he said, “and get to the base. I’m sending help.” I’d never abandon Bluish, of course. But help never came.
What is this place? What are you doing here?
It’s a Waste Processing Station. We work here in shifts. Every… every Noontider must contribute to the common cause.
Look, I'll answer your questions later. Just help me kill that creature that's holed up in the basement!
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_JumperIsSad_Angry: So that’s what Dubny calls "help"... and he’s the one who thinks stalkers are assholes.
If he'd only sent five guys like you instead… thanks again, man.
We’re not going back to Noon. If I have to listen to Dubny ramble on about how he did the right thing and shit, I’m gonna barf. Bluish was right, we're better of leaving.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_JumperIsSad_GotIt: That’s all I wanted to know.
If you have any more questions, just ask.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_JumperIsSad_Monol: You must have some kind of connection to Monolith. Tell me about it.
Oh, you don’t know? Noon is Monolith. Or at least it used to be. We were controlled by the Wish Granter. We protected it from danger: stalkers, bandits, scientists… we… worshiped it, like a God.
None of us can remember those days anymore. But other people in the Zone... they remember. They say we were brutal murderers. Fanatics.
And then the Monolith went silent. Only Faust remembers its voice. He says we used to be happy. Well, we could be happy now, without making others suffer! All it takes is to live like humans.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_JumperIsSad_Stash: The stash you gave me was empty. Quiet had already looted it. When was the last time you checked it?
Sorry about that, stalker. We’re not allowed in there. Here, I sent some coupons to your PDA instead. Anyway, Quiet's all right. He’s done with Noontide – he’s a trader now. We should go join him.
Bluish wanted to leave for a long time, and I kept talking him out of it. Like, how can we let our brothers down? What about Dubny? Or Strider?
In the end, me and Bluish weren't the ones who let our brothers down. As for Dubny and Strider, they can go fuck themselves.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_JumperIsSad_TellA: Actually, our leader is Strider. He's the one who was gathering us from all over the Zone to bring us to Wild Island. Noontide is his creation.
Dubny is Strider’s right-hand man. He keeps Noon safe — from the rest of the Zone, from stalkers, from the Mainland, even from ourselves. Except it’s not working.
I bet that he had the best of intentions when he sent those mercenaries after us too. You saw how it went.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_JumperIsSad_TellM: Can you tell me anything about Noontide?
Sure thing, loner. Not like it matters anymore.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_JumperIsSad_WhatN: I used to believe we were doing the right thing: recycling waste, cleaning up the Zone...
But what good does it actually do? For us, none, that’s for sure. And the waste just keeps piling up. We’d be better off hunting for artifacts like everyone else.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_JumperOnTihijBase: Do you have any regrets about leaving Noontide? How do you like it here with Quiet?
Nah, I regret nothing. Later that day, I talked to Dubny over the radio. Told him what I think of him and his methods. And he kept bullshitting me about the needs of the many…
He should've told that to North instead… eh, fuck him. That’s all in the past now. Living here with Quiet feels different. Even the air is easier to breathe. I should have listened to Bluish earlier.
sid_phrase_SQ10_Dialog_SinajOnTihijBase_: How are you doing? Got any headaches?
So you’re the guy who saved me, huh? Back at the station, I couldn’t even see your face, let alone thank you… well, thanks, man. For everything.
I don’t get headaches anymore. But I've been having some strange dreams. I guess that’ll pass too.
sid_phrase_SQ10_dzamper_0_InfoTopic_1_In: I’m learning to search for artifacts. And you know, I’m actually pretty good at it! Never fail to get some loot. Bluish says I’m a natural!
sid_phrase_SQ10_hog_0_InfoTopic_1_Info_5: The easiest kind of job is a clean sweep. When you’ve got one man to detain and another to let go, any external factor can mess everything up.
sid_phrase_SQ10_sinaj_0_InfoTopic_1_Info: I'm trying to stay out of the Zone for now. I just help Quiet here and there — he’s always got some kind of job for me. I feel like the moment I leave the base, some monster's gonna grab me again.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Audiolog_MatiushBudnikTa: Fuck, how many of these things are there?!
Fall back! I’ll cover for you from above.
We made it! Get out of there!
sid_phrase_SQ13_Comment_GurevichDoubt_1_: That’s a bit much, isn't it?
sid_phrase_SQ13_Comment_GurevichGuard_No: You wanna talk, talk to the Professor.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Comment_MarchenkoGuard_N: You got any questions, take 'em to Zaretsky.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Comment_MatiushHeyStalke: Hey, stalker. If you’re looking for work, come on over. I’ve got a job for you.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Comment_MatiushIfEveryon: I heard you had some trouble. Don’t worry, no one will know you were there.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Comment_MatiushIfSeesDea: We found Budnik. Send someone over here.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Comment_ZareckijCall_Cal: Hello, stalker. This is Professor Zaretsky speaking. I have a job that might interest you. Come to these coordinates.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Comment_ZareckijMarchenk: It’s for the experiment. What’s the problem? Stalkers go into anomalies all the time.
Yeah, stalkers do. I don't have any such orders from my commanding officer. My orders are to protect you, Professor.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Comment_ZareckijOnSituat: Well, I’m not going after that artifact on my own.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Comment_ZareckijWaitingF: Did you bring it? No? Well, off you go. Come right back with the artifact now.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Dialog_MatiushDvoryankov: It’s not that far. I’ll be back in an hour!
Leaving the Chemical Plant is prohibited. Korshunov’s orders. Sorry, no funerals.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Dialog_MatiushFirstTalk_: I’m glad we understand each other.
I’m looking for Colonel Korshunov. Zotov sent me.
Base to Korshunov, come in. Colonel, we’ve got a… stalker here. Says he’s from Zotov, but— Yes… yes, sir.
Head over to the outpost. The Colonel is there.
Why can’t I enter the Chemical Plant?
Restricted area. The Chemical Plant is the Ward’s base. Stalkers aren’t allowed in.
Halt, stalker. This area is off limits.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Dialog_MatiushGiveQuest_: You said you had a job for me.
Do you have the artifact yet?

I wish. You loners barely ever pass by the Chemical Plant, and I’m under strict orders not to leave the base. Why don’t you do it? The job’s still the same: I need a certain artifact brought to me from a certain place.
That’s all I needed to know.
Then come back soon with the artifact!
It’s very simple. You bring me the artifact from the Chemical Tanks, I pay you a lot of coupons. The sooner you get the job done, the better.
Why is the job so urgent?
There could be other people looking for it.
What’s so special about this artifact?
It’s special to me. That’s it. No trader will pay you more for it than me. To the guys you deal with, it’s just another artifact.
All right. I’ll get your artifact.
Thanks, loner! It’s at the Chemical Tanks. I’ll send you the coordinates. Just hurry! I really appreciate this.
I don’t want to do it.
Oh, man... I can’t leave my post and go there on my own. Come back if you change your mind, okay?
That’s right, I do. There’s a particular artifact I need recovered. I’ll tell you where to find it.
But we need to act fast. It’s a matter of life and death. I’ll make it worth your while. Will you do it?
sid_phrase_SQ13_Dialog_MatiushRewardQues: I found one of your guys there. He was dead. Lieutenant Budnik. Did you know him?
I do. He’s my partner… or at least he was. To be honest, I thought the artifact came from his body – a miracle of the Zone, in stalker parlance.
That’s nonsense, of course. A grown man shouldn’t believe in fairy tales. There are no miracles in this radioactive hellhole.
Keep the artifact. I wanted to bury it instead of Budnik’s body before those SIRCAA vultures came swooping in. But the PDA will do just as well. I sent you the coupons as agreed.
At least I can give him some kind of a funeral… Thank you, stalker. I sent the coupons to your PDA.
The one your comrade left behind.
How did you… ah, so there were scientists there? Vultures! Not only do they treat us like we’re expendable, they won’t even let the dead rest in peace!
Budnik deserved better. He died out there covering us, and they use him as a test subject… This won’t stand!
Here’s the artifact you asked me to get.
I couldn’t get what you were looking for.
Then why did you come back? Go to hell.
I found your comrade’s body near the artifact. You were wrong about what happened, and here’s the proof.

I’m sorry I couldn’t tell you the truth right away. I didn’t expect you to believe me. Those SIRCAA vultures are all over stuff like this. They don’t care about the dead. All they want is test subjects.
Here, I’ve sent everything I have to your PDA. I didn’t expect a stalker to be more of a decent human being than my own men.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Dialog_ZareckijGiveQuest: All right, I’ll bring your artifact.
Thank you. Your contribution to science will be invaluable.
I’m not interested in this job.
That’s too bad. If you change your mind, you know where to find me.
And here's a solution to our problem! I've got a job for you, stalker. An officer from the Chemical Plant, Mateus, has been spreading rumors about the body of a fellow soldier spawning an artifact.
I need this artifact for research purposes. It's located somewhere above the Chemical Tanks. Bring it to me, and I’ll pay you whatever you want.
Can artifacts spawn from dead bodies?
We don't yet understand every law that governs the Zone.
If we study this artifact and find human DNA, it will confirm that the Zone’s anomalies can create artifacts out of organic matter.
Why don’t you send your guards after it?
Unfortunately, my companions value certain formalities — such as direct orders from their superiors — over scientific progress.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Dialog_ZareckijRewardQue: Good work! I have transferred your fee. Now I need to hurry to SIRCAA before Dalin takes over the analyzer again.
I found the corpse of Mateus’s comrade lying next to the artifact.
So the whole artifact story was just an idle rumor. All that time wasted for nothing…
Look... you can keep the artifact. It’s of no value to me. But while we’re here, would you mind dumping the body in this anomaly? For a fee, of course.
The dead man doesn’t care anymore, but maybe I can get more data concerning the formation of artifacts from organic matter.
All right. I’ll dump the corpse into the anomaly.
I enjoy dealing with pragmatic people.
I’m not going to drop a dead man into an anomaly.
I don’t understand this reverence for the dead, especially among stalkers. Whatever, do as you please.
I dumped the body into the anomaly.
Well, well… nothing interesting so far. I’ll check the readings after the Emission. You may go, stalker. Thanks for your help. Your pay has been forwarded to your PDA.
I've decided to keep the artifact.
I see. I shouldn’t have listened to Zotov when he told me stalkers can be trusted.
sid_phrase_SQ13_Dialog_ZareckijYouAreBac: Changed your mind, have you? Good. Holding up your end of the bargain is the key to maintaining a good reputation.
I hope you come bearing gifts, stalker.
sid_phrase_SQ13_lejtenant_marcenko_0_Inf: Even experienced soldiers have a hard time getting used to the Zone. I don’t know how the loners survive here.
sid_phrase_SQ13_matius_0_InfoTopic_1_Wha: We have a strict regimen here at the Ward – we go from one post to another, one duty to the next. We don’t have time to look for anything new.
sid_phrase_SQ13_professor_zareckij_0_Def: How stupid do you… I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_SQ13_professor_zareckij_0_Inf: The more we learn about the anomalies and laws of the Zone, the more questions we have. And the Zone is not immutable. It keeps evolving, and we're always a few steps behind it.
sid_phrase_SQ13_radovoj_gurevic_0_BusyTo: Can’t you see I’m busy here?
sid_phrase_SQ13_radovoj_gurevic_0_CallPl: Hey, stalker! We need to talk.
sid_phrase_SQ13_radovoj_gurevic_0_Defeat: Somebody help me! I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_SQ13_radovoj_gurevic_0_InfoTo: I shot some mutants yesterday, and now my uniform’s ruined! I’m all covered in mutant bits!
Those loners who come to the Zone looking for something poetic... I don’t get them. You’re up to your elbows in shit, your AK's jammed, everything wants to kill you — what's poetic about that?
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_BarikWhenrun_bar: Let’s chat when we get there.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_BorodaSecondGues: I knew I should've done it myself instead of trusting a stranger.
I told ya! He sent YOU his regards. That means YOU gotta go!
I never asked for your opinion.
Oh yeah? Maybe you should have.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_DrevkoIfrunaway_: Where do you think you’re scurrying off to? The Ringmaster is waiting to see you on stage!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_Drevko_Comehere_: Get your ass to the Ringmaster. He doesn’t like to wait.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_Drevko_Interact_: Hey, get your piece outta my face.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_Drevko_Iseeyou_i: Come on in, stalker. Don’t be shy.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_Gnutyj_Sum_Comin: Hey, what’s the Ringmaster up to now?
Who the fuck cares? We're not the ones on stage. I’m just gonna sit back and enjoy the show.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_Gnutyj_interact_: Why don’t you dance on back to wherever it is you came from?
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_GundosHasNoShame: I guess you owe us all some booze, Beard!
You wouldn’t even know about the hostages if it wasn’t for me!
You’ve drunk enough already. Pull yourself together!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_HardkorHello_hiy: Why is Beard here while my buddies are over there?
Easy, Croaker. We’re dealing with it.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_HardkorWhileKamy: And then they started shooting! Right by my feet!
And they've got all the same stuff as the Ward, can you believe it?!
And he goes, “Tell Beard the Ringmaster sends his regards.”
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_KamysIfCrossTheL: If you cross the line again, you’ll join your pals.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_Kamys_Callguys_c: Take your seats in the front row, boys! The show is about to begin!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_Kamys_Shootbefor: Hey, you’re a fast learner! Keep it up!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_Kamys_comehere_c: Come on, Din, don’t mess with customers before the show. Invite him in!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_LukicWhenrun_luk: Let’s talk when we stop for a break.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_PolakWhenrun_pol: Let me take a breather, bro.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_Sum_IfDontJump_i: Little stuck up, ain't ya? Whatever. When the Ringmaster says dance, you better dance!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_Sum_Interact_sum: If I were you, I’d stop yammering and start running.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_Sum_Jump_jump_47: Check it out, Hunch, we've got a guest! Are you looking for your pals, loner? I hope your pockets ain’t empty. The Ringmaster wouldn't like that. Come on, do a little dance! Jump, jump, let me hear those coins jingle!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Comment_ZoraKrot_Interac: Talky thing, ain't ya? Why don’t we get you on stage too?
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_BarikThankyou_bar: Christ, that was close! Thanks, stalker. Drop by the Shevchenko — Beard's got a hefty reward for you.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_BarikWhatshappene: Well, I'd heard about this Ringmaster guy, but I thought he was just some thug. Figured we could shoot our way out... but his men are damn good. They worked together so well, we never saw 'em coming.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Boroda_finishques: Glad to see you, Skif. They told me about that stunt the Ringmaster pulled.
I wish you could've saved 'em all. But still, I owe you.
Here’s a little extra for taking those bandits out. Maybe it'll come in handy.
How about a little extra vodka?
So, you came back alone. Guess you couldn't save anyone.
Hey Beard, about that job of yours…
I don’t need your apologies. I need my men, and they're all dead.
I'm afraid not. But at least the Ringmaster won’t give you any more trouble.
The Ringmaster wasn't part of the job.
You didn't save my men, so you don't get any coupons.
Well, speak of the devil! Just heard from my men. Thank you for saving them all.
Coupons aren't worth a man's life, but you can still use 'em to show your gratitude. Here you go.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Boroda_ifcomeback: Sure. The Sultan’s bandits captured my men. Vitya the Croaker made it back, the other three are being held hostage. Can you rescue them?
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Boroda_remindme_r: What did you need me to do again?
Like I said, my men are being held hostage by the Sultan’s bandits. Vitya the Croaker made it back, the other three need rescuing.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Boroda_start_help: Glad to hear it. The bandits are holding Croaker’s group at their camp. They'll be waiting for you. Those lowlifes know I never give up my men.
And stalker... this job requires precision. Get my men back, and you'll get plenty of coupons. I promise.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Boroda_start_leav: I’ll think about it. Talk to you later.
Well, think fast, or there might be no one left to save.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Boroda_start_look: I might. Say, stalker, what do you usually do first, shoot or think?
I think. But I do it really fast.
Good to know. Then I do have a job for you. The Sultan’s bandits snatched my men in the Swamps. They were ready — rounded up the whole group. Vitya the Croaker's the only guy who made it back.
Yeah, they rounded us up all right! The fuckers ambushed us!
I'd go myself, but I’m busy running everything here on the Shevchenko. The job won't be easy — you can’t just shoot your way in. So, will you go rescue my stalkers?
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Boroda_start_sult: You mentioned the Sultan. Who’s that?
He’s a mob boss and a cunning son of a bitch. He took the Skadovsk from me seven years ago. Scored himself some pretty good guns and hijacked my ship. He calls her the Sultansk now.
I left. Couldn’t bear watching what those outlaws did to her. Went to Prypiat. To Degtyarev. Bad decision.
Thought I’d never come back to the Swamps. But here I am. Got homesick and came back. Maybe I’ll even go get the Skadovsk her old name back.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Boroda_start_what: How did Croaker manage to escape?
He didn’t. They let him go so he could deliver the message. And they shot at his feet to give him a little extra motivation.
He was scared shitless... shitless and speechless. Had to give him some vodka to calm his nerves.
Now he can’t stop calming ’em. And blathering on and on. I don’t listen much. He’ll regret most of it when he sobers up.
Yeah, I’m one hell of blatherer all right! But when it comes to dealing with them thugs…
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_HudrukAboutShow_1: What's the point of all this?
Do I need a reason? I’m bored! There’s no space for my creative ambitions here in the Swamps.
And you stalkers need to know your place. You're a bunch of cocky pricks, so I took ya down a peg.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_KamysIfKillStalke: Who said anything about letting anybody go? Coming up next — jumping through burning tires! Bring in the props, boys!
Eh, common relax. You’re free to go.
Way to go! Take 'em all out!
You did a real number on your buddies there! Too bad you never finished off the third one.
Oh, you decided to share with me, eh? One missed apple, one dead performer.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Alldead_all: Well, no need to whine about it, it’s not your fault. Wait a second... IT IS! How are you gonna tell Beard you got all his chumps whacked?
Well, well, shitty skills AND shitty manners. Beat it, before I put an apple on your head too.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Allfree_all: Bravo! Bravo! Give yourselves a round of applause! Don’t be shy now!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Notallapple: Miss an apple, lose a performer.
Next time Beard can get his ass over here. I’ll save him a seat in the front row.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Rules_about: What do I need to do?
You stupid or somethin'? See your pals? See them apples? Well, shoot 'em! The apples, not the pals. It’s your call, though.
Don't try to run away, stay within bounds. I'll give ya a gun and ammo, but you can use your own piece if you want. Hit all the apples, and I'll let your buddies go. Miss one, and you're down a man.
And now it's time for the greatest show on Earth!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Rules_chang: I changed my mind. I’m not getting involved in this.
Trying to wreck my show? Not cool, pal. Don’t lose your head, or your buddies just might lose theirs.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Rules_leave: I just said I want no part of this shit.
Okay, boys, get the orchestra pit ready. Show’s over!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Rules_rules: Loners and gentlemen, today’s show is called... The Apple of My Eye!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Welcome_abo: How does the saying go again, Shaft? Seeing is believing, right?
Although in this case, seeing might be hazardous to your health. We could make you participate...
The lead roles are all taken, but I promise I’ll get you something.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Welcome_app: I guess I’m in. What kind of show is this?
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Welcome_giv: I've got the money. What do I do with it?
Well shit, looks like we got ourselves a rich customer! Next time I’ll charge you double..
You want the money or not?
Oh, I want it. I've got big plans for this fine establishment. Now grab your clowns and go.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Welcome_loo: Beard sent me. I’m looking for his men.
Oh, I'm sure I can find a part for one of Beard's boys! Too bad he didn’t show up himself... I’ll give him a call.
Hey Beard, I've got a little show for you. I had three of your chumps all dressed up, and now I just got another! Are you gonna pay for wrecking my show, or should we get started without you?
I would pay, If I could be sure you'll release my men.
Oh, what’s that? Static? An explosion? No, it’s an atomic load of bullshit.
Looks like Beard is broke, so I guess you're gonna have to pony up the dough for your pals. Either that, or you’re in the show too. Let me explain the rules.
Why, my word isn't enough for you?
I don’t want any trouble. That's why I sent you the stalker — to talk. If you want the money, release my men.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Welcome_sho: It's time to put an end to this circus.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Welcome_wel: Look at that, another performer! We've had so many volunteers lately!
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_Kamys_Welcome_who: I’m the Ringmaster. But you should've known that before you showed your face around here.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_LukicThankyou_luk: Yikes, that was close! Thanks, stalker. Drop by the Shevchenko – Beard’s got a hefty reward for you.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_LukicWhatshappene: Well, I took this damn job, and it was a bad call! We went into the Swamps and got caught on our way out. You saw the rest.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_PolakThankyou_pol: Yikes, that was close! Thanks, stalker. Drop by the Shevchenko – Beard’s got a hefty reward for you.
sid_phrase_SQ18_Dialog_PolakWhatshappene: How did you end up getting captured?
It was like all those shitheads were waiting for us. And they wanted to take us alive. They weren't shooting to kill.
sid_phrase_SQ18_barik_0_HelloTopic_barik: Okay, tell me what you want.
sid_phrase_SQ18_barik_0_InfoTopic_2_bari: Now I know for sure — the only good bandit is a dead bandit.
sid_phrase_SQ18_drevko_0_InfoTopic_1_dre: They’re all so tough when they first start running their mouths... but catch 'em, and they piss their pants.
sid_phrase_SQ18_gnutyj_0_BusyTopic_gnuty: I got no time for you right now.
sid_phrase_SQ18_gnutyj_0_InfoTopic_1_gnu: I try to stay out of the spotlight — I don’t want the Ringmaster putting me on stage.
sid_phrase_SQ18_gnutyj_0_ResumeComment_r: Let’s go back to our little chat.
sid_phrase_SQ18_kamys_0_HelloTopic_kamys: Got a question for me, clown?
sid_phrase_SQ18_kamys_0_InfoTopic_1_kamy: Everything’s peachy. Got plenty of new stunts in the works and no shortage of volunteers from the audience.
sid_phrase_SQ18_lukic_0_DefeatComment_lu: Don’t just leave me here! Help!
sid_phrase_SQ18_lukic_0_InfoTopic_2_luki: Beard always says, ain’t nothing good in the Swamps. I wish I listened. Can’t believe I’m alive.
sid_phrase_SQ18_polak_0_BusyTopic_polak_: Got my own stuff to do.
sid_phrase_SQ18_polak_0_ByeTopic_polak_b: Let’s call it a day, then.
sid_phrase_SQ18_polak_0_InfoTopic_2_pola: You saved me from the Ringmster’s gang, and now I've got a whole new lease on life... and a few more gray hairs.
sid_phrase_SQ18_sum_0_InfoTopic_1_sum_wh: The Ringmaster knows how to raise a ruckus. Respect!
sid_phrase_SQ18_vitalik_hardkor_0_InfoTo: You can't trust anybody in the Zone, and that goes double for bandits. They'll rob and kill you before you even see it coming.
sid_phrase_SQ18_zora_krot_0_InfoTopic_1_: If you're dumb enough to come here, you've got nothin' to bitch about. You made your bed.
sid_phrase_SQ195_Loudspeaker_Bereza_1_73: Guys and gals, your NVGs are here! Feel the perks of night vision that mutants have and you don’t! Come one, come all!
sid_phrase_SQ195_Loudspeaker_Boroda_1_73: Folks, a reminder: new NVGs are delivered once a month. Whoever needs them, grab them while they’re in stock!
sid_phrase_SQ195_Loudspeaker_Dorozhnyuk_: Dear colleagues, please be informed that night-vision devices for fieldwork are to be purchased with personal funds. The center does not have the budget to reimburse their cost!
sid_phrase_SQ195_Loudspeaker_Guron_1_734: For all you night owls – I've got some new night-vision gizmos. Get yours now! You snooze, you lose!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_GanzaCalls_1_522: Oh, a new face! Come here, I’ll pour you a drink on the house — in exchange for some cash, of course.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_GuysOutside_1_52: You again? Know your limits, man. Didn’t you lose everything last time?
Don’t you tell me what to do with my coupons, friend!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_GuysOutside_1_68: You’d be better off drinking your coupons than blowing them all on another stupid bet!
No way! I've got a system, and it's gonna work this time. You’ll see!
System, my ass. You've got an addiction, man — that’s what you've got.
Would you please mind your own damn business? You’re gonna be jealous later, mark my words!
Suit yourself, pal. But I won’t be buying any vodka to bring you to your senses this time, okay?
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_10hp_1_685: Well, well, looks like the stalker's down on his luck...
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_10hp_2_685: Come on, man, stop spitting blood and do something!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_10hp_3_685: Just goes to show you, stalkers can't take a hit. Anything else would be a real anomaly!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_50hp_1_685: Woah! That's gonna leave a mark!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_50hp_2_685: Hey stalker, pick up the phone! You’ve got a few missed calls!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_50hp_3_685: It’s time for our stalker friend to wake up and smell the coffee!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R1F1_1_FF_: Look at these happy faces! Is this a dream team or what? Just look at them, alive and kicking! Way to go, guys! Hope to see you again real soon!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R1F2_1_685: Did you see that? The new guy's a stone-cold killing machine! He put them all down without breaking a sweat! With skills like those, who needs partners?
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R1S_1_FF_6: Hello there, ladies and gentlemen! Welcome back to our never-ending season of never-ending fights! Let’s greet our rookie here and hope he doesn't bite the big one in his first match!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R2F_1_6852: Oh, stalker... it’s just your second date, and you're already getting all handsy! Look what you did! Blood and gore everywhere, chunks of unidentified meat flying around... keep up the good work!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R2S_1_6852: So, Comrade Janitor, are you ready to clean the pens? You'll be meeting some Zone fauna today, so be gentle.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R3F1_1_685: Aww, isn't that sweet! A surprise medkit for the old flame! Take it now, don’t be shy. Well done, stalker. We're almost beginning to believe you actually give a shit about your ex there!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R3F2_1_685: Gladiator in arena consilium capit! We accept your decision, stalker. There are no friends in the Arena. Your goal is the only thing that matters.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R3S1_1_685: One for all and all against one! Is this even fair? Of course, not, stalker, but it is what it is! Good luck, and don’t suck!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R3S2_1_685: We’re witnessing a real drama today in the Arena: trouble in paradise! A heartbroken stalker is about to face his ex-partner! Who'll be the last bro standing? Place your bets!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R4C_1_6853: Woah, what a twist! Who saw that one coming? Definitely not the chimera, heh-heh!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R4F_1_6853: The evil monster falls in agony, the princess is saved... oh, shit, that’s a different fairy tale. But a happy ending is a happy ending! Bravo, stalker!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R4S_1_6853: Here’s a special request for a very special monster. They say you’re good at this sort of thing, Mr. Stalker. I hope they're not wrong. But I wouldn’t want to spoil the surprise.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R5C_1_6853: Oh come on! Did anyone here really expect Tyrant to care about rules?! Fuck the rules, we want entertainment!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R5F_1_FF_6: And we have a winner! Slowly, steadily, and relentlessly, this stalker made his way to the final epic battle, and now he's our new Master of the Arena. That was legendary!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_Mavka_R5S_1_FF_6: Come on, we’ve been waiting for so long! And now we're finally going to see if we'll have a new champion. You’re witnessing a historic moment, people! Are you ready? Let the clash of the titans begin!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_TiranBoss_1_FF_6: This is my Arena! My rules!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_TiranMeh_1_52280: That chimera's gonna tear you limb from limb.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_TiranMeh_1_68432: What a shame. I was hoping to eat you for breakfast.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_WalterStart_1_68: We kill fast, then we drink the reward down nice and slow.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Comment_WalterWin_1_6829: That’s it, man. We’ve earned our coupons.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_ArnieAfterFight_1: One win doesn’t mean anything. You’re still just a piece of meat. Maybe not quite as rotten as you seemed at first.
Come back in an hour if you want. I don’t think we can clean up the Arena any faster. So go have a drink at Ganja’s. Your chances are always better when you’re well rested.
My bet was on Walter, by the way. Good thing it wasn’t a big bet. He went down too fast. Not much of a show.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_ArnieFirstDIalog_: Ah, fresh meat in search of fame and fortune. You’ll get it all, my friend — if you survive, that is.
So, your first fight is two on two. No self-respecting gambler would bet on a match like this, but it’s a way for me to see what you can do.
Here’s the deal: I assign you a partner, and you two face off against another pair of guys like you, except they're a couple of greedy dipshits. Sound good?
Oh-ho, welcome back! Now there's a man positively brimming with courage!
Then go! Kick their asses or wind up dog food, it’s all up to you.
Hand your gun to Wheezer. He'll provide you with a weapon. You can’t bring your own, either to my Arena or Ganja’s bar.
Two on two isn't my kind of game. Maybe next time.
It’s okay to chicken out. Who am I to judge?
You can ask Ganja to pour you one for courage — just don’t overdo it. If you’re drunk in the Arena, you die too fast. The audience doesn’t like that.
I don’t know, and I don’t care. I’m not interested in any of your credentials as long as you can paint my Arena red.
The rest is up to you and Lady Luck. Who knows? You might even knock Tyrant off his throne. The job's simple: you mow down stalkers, you make fat stacks of coupons.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round2_1_55: I see the audience gave you quite the warm welcome.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round2_2_68: Then I can put you up against a few of our little mutant friends. The odds are ten to one at the moment. Not in your favor, of course.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round2_Go_6: Mutants? Whatever. I'd bet on me this time.
Yeah, I've heard that one before. The last guy who told me that got eaten by boars. There wasn't enough left of him to fill a trash can.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round2_No_6: Mutants require special approach. So not today.
Just don’t wait too long, or everyone'll think the mutants scared you shitless. You gotta care about your reputation, man.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round2_What: What kinds of mutants am I dealing with?
Catch of the day, as usual.
I haven’t been properly introduced yet, but I can guarantee they’ve got a full set of claws and teeth.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round2_Win_: Not bad, not bad at all. You just might make it to the winner's circle one day if you keep it up.
Here’s your coupons. You earned 'em. Come back in an hour for more. In the meantime, I’ll tidy up and think about what to put you up against next.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round3_1_55: It's all been fun and games up till now.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round3_2_68: I’m offering you a serious match this time. This is the real deal. In your corner, it’s gonna be you and... well, that's it. Your opponents are gonna be all the guys who survived the last two rounds.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round3_3_68: Are you ready to show the Arena who the real king is?
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round3_HowM: So, how many opponents am I facing?
Well, you've seen it yourself — the Arena kills more than it spares.
So not too many. Let's say five. Maybe six. Or seven. If Antonov manages to sew 'em up after the last fight, that is.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round3_NoSt: I’m not going to fight stalkers. Not willingly.
That's too bad. But I’ll give you a chance to think about it a little more.
You can make some good money off this fight.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round3_Walt: One of them is Walter, by the way. Imagine taking a bullet from a guy who had your back before…
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round3_Win_: Do you like surprises, by the way? 'Cuz you’re in for a big one. All I can say is, the next fight's gonna have a nice payday.
Come back in an hour, once we've cleaned up the mess you made.
You shouldn’t have spared Walter, though. He'd never have done the same for you. He values coupons more than someone else’s life. Greed's what brought him to the Arena.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round3_Yes_: So you want me to go solo against a group, huh? That’s a challenge. I like it.
Then good luck! Just don’t catch a bullet right away. And if you die, make sure you go out in a blaze of glory. The crowd eats that shit up.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round4_1_55: One more fight, and you'll make it to the finals.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round4_2_68: So here’s what I’m offering you. You’ve got strength, agility, and cunning. Your opponent has twice as much.
As well as two heads and two hearts. How do you like my little surprise, eh? Wanna fight a chimera?
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round4_From: How did you get a chimera here in Rostok?
If you’ve got enough coupons, you can get pretty much anything anywhere, man.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round4_No_6: A chimera is a dangerous opponent. I’m not ready to face it now.
That's too bad. Well, it’ll be waiting for you here if you change your mind.
I’ve been saving it just for you. No one else is a match for this glorious beast.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round4_Win_: Now that was a sight to behold!
You're in the finals now, Skif. Go have a drink at Ganja’s while you can — and while he still has any booze left. After the crowd shows up and downs it all, we're gonna be dry for a couple weeks.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Arnie_Round5_Win_: You're the best thing that’s happened to the Arena yet, Skif. You’re ruthless, fearless, and you know how to put on a good show.
Our revenue was through the roof today. Here. That’s your cut. You deserve it.
How about a bonus, since you broke the rules and all?
A fight is only worth watching when it’s a fight to the death. That's the main rule of the Arena.
But it only works if you snatch up a promising rookie and make a champion out of him — no matter the cost. That's what we’ve done with you.
Here. Tyrant won’t be needing this gun anymore.
You bet on me this time, right?
Bets are for suckers. The Arena turns a profit either way.
Ruthless bastards like you who fight to the bitter end make sure the coupons keep coming.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_GanzaDrink_1_6827: Respect. Maybe you’d like something with a little more kick to it? How 'bout a hit?
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_GanzaTellAboutAre: 'Sup, bro! Just so you know, this is a classy establishment, so we kindly ask you to take any disputes to the Arena.
It's an awesome place to blow off some steam and earn some green. It's all about no-holds-barred brawls, bro. If you survive, you make bank. If you lose, Arnie'll give you sweet funeral.
How do I sign up, and what do I get for winning?
Talk to Arnie if you wanna sign up — he’ll get you in the ring in no time. As for the reward, it’s the usual: respect, fame, and coupons. And free booze from yours truly — if you really dazzle me.
Who’s the Master of the Arena?
The Master is the champion! It’s the highest rank in the Arena. Right now it's Tyrant, a knuckle-dragger who wears his exoskeleton even when he goes out to take a leak — if he goes out at all.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Siplyj_Force1stBa: See? All yer bitchin’ was for nothing. That’s a good gun I gave ya!
I'll take it back now, by the way.
Your gun is shit. You don’t take proper care of it.
You ain't earned a better one yet, boyo.
Keep up the good work, and we’ll see. Maybe you'll get a decent piece one day.
In the locker by the stairs, safe and sound.
Talk to Arnie to collect your reward.
First time, eh? Well, if you’re lucky, it won’t be your last. Now hand me your shit.
Why can’t I use my own gear?
The audience is more likely to bet when the odds are even.
Okay, here. What do I get in return?
Don’t worry, I won’t let you go out there empty-handed. That’s not the kind of spectacle we want.
You’ll find some gear in the locker by the entrance. Everybody gets the same stuff.
Leave your gear with me. Don’t worry, I’ll keep an eye on it. Or, if you die, we'll just keep it. I’m not gonna lie to ya, it’s a hell of a racket.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Siplyj_R2F_1_6832: I’m starting to like your style, man. You certainly know how to handle a weapon.
Just don’t get too cocky. Here in the Arena, you never know when your luck is gonna run out.
Now hand over the gun. Don’t forget to grab your stuff on the way out.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Siplyj_R3F_1_6841: By the Zone, you’re gonna make me rich, man!
Now hand over the gun, grab your stuff where you left it, and run along.
I've got a shopping list to make.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Siplyj_R3S_Go_684: What are you giving me this time? Hopefully it'll be something that packs more of a punch.
Sorry, man. I'm not the one who stocked the locker this time. It was Arnie.
So you get what you get.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Siplyj_R3S_who_68: Are the opponents any good? You've seen them in action.
Well... you’re definitely better than any of them — one on one, that is. But facing all of 'em at once... who knows?
But I'm still betting on you, so don’t screw this up.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Siplyj_R4F_1_6843: Man, that was impressive! I can't believe you just did that!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Siplyj_R4F_1_6844: Damn, I had a pen, where’s my pen... eh, never mind. I’ll get your autograph before the finals.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Siplyj_R4S_1_6843: Well... I think you realize what you're up against now. But I made a bet you'd last two minutes. I’m counting on you.
Then consider your bet lost. I’ll be back for my gear.
But you know where to find it if you do.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Siplyj_R5F_1_6845: What a fight, champ, what a fight! I was on the edge of my seat the whole time.
Wheezer, you asshole — you should’ve warned me that Tyrant was wearing all his gear.
Come on, man, I’m just the quartermaster. I keep what I’m given and hand out what they tell me to.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Siplyj_R5S_1_6844: This is gonna be the best final match ever, man! The whole Zone is here to watch you.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_Siplyj_R5S_1_6845: Leave your gear with me, as always. Grab your piece from the usual place.
It's time to dethrone Tyrant, Skif. This is a fight to the death. All my money's on you.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_TiranOffersFinals: This is the final match, Skif. There’s only one rule to this fight: show no mercy. The last man standing takes the prize.
What kind of gun would you like to get a bullet in the brain from?
If I had to choose, I’d pick a “shorty.” I’m used to that piece.
Full auto, eh? Fine by me. Let’s make it quick.
Go, go, go! The crowd’s going wild!
Then I'll take the revolver. I like westerns.
The one that lets me put twice as many shots into your head first.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_WalterHint_1_5520: Tough luck, pal. That chimera is a nasty beast.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_WalterHint_1_6844: But you’ll be packing some serious heat to even the odds. There’s a sweet piece for you in the Arena near the entrance.
Myklukha bet a ton of coupons on you, and he doesn’t like to lose.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_WalterHint_2_8637: Tough luck, pal. That chimera is a nasty beast.
But you’ll be packing some serious heat to even the odds. There’s a sweet piece for you in the Arena near the entrance.
Important people bet big money on you. And they don't like to lose.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_WalterSave_1_5520: I never aimed at you, Skif! I always missed on purpose! Don’t kill me!
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_WalterSave_No_552: You lost, Walter. Rules are rules.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_WalterSave_Yes_55: Here. Patch yourself up and get lost.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_siplyj_R2S_1_6831: You know the drill. Hand me your gear and take what you need from the locker.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_siplyj_R2S_Go_683: Will you at least give me a good gun?
A better one than last time, that’s for sure.
But the gun is less important than skill here.
Off you go. The critters are waiting.
sid_phrase_SQ20_Dialog_siplyj_R2S_Who_68: Who’s out there in the Arena?
They're about to send a rodeo clown in.
I’m actually curious to see if they gobble him up or not. I bet on both sides, so I’ll win something either way.
sid_phrase_SQ20_SQ20_Comment_GuysOutside: Hey man, I see you’re back, huh?
Come on, cut it out. It's payday, right? And you’re thinking about what to do with your paycheck?
Well, I did get some overtime this week...
Good for you! Then it’s the right time to place a couple bets — turn that overtime into double time!
sid_phrase_SQ20_arni_0_BusyTopic_1_68483: This isn't a good time for a chat.
sid_phrase_SQ20_arni_0_InfoTopic_1_1_684: The guys in Duty who’ve got any brains know that we’re good customers. Sure, it isn't easy to catch mutants alive, but it pays well. Really well.
sid_phrase_SQ20_arni_0_ResumeComment_1_6: So, let’s pick up where we left off…
sid_phrase_SQ20_docent_tolstolis_0_BusyT: Sorry, now isn't a good time.
sid_phrase_SQ20_ganza_0_BusyTopic_1_6850: Hold on, I’ll be with you in a sec.
sid_phrase_SQ20_ganza_0_ByeTopic_1_68501: Stay safe, bro. And don’t be a stranger.
sid_phrase_SQ20_ganza_0_DefeatComment_1_: I could use a hit before I go...
sid_phrase_SQ20_ganza_0_HelloTopic_1_685: Come here, bro, don’t be shy.
sid_phrase_SQ20_ganza_0_InfoTopic_1_1_68: A buddy of mine promised to get me some "magic weed" if I paid him up front.
And he wasn’t lying! His weed really was magic — it turned him invisible! I haven’t seen the guy or my money since.
sid_phrase_SQ20_ganza_0_ResumeComment_2_: Phew, I guess that’s it... so, where was I?
sid_phrase_SQ20_igor_valter_0_DefeatComm: I’m hit! I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_SQ20_igor_valter_0_InfoTopic_: Same old, same old... you make some coupons down in the Arena, then you take 'em up to the bar. You sober up, count your losses, and go back to the Arena again. That’s my life.
sid_phrase_SQ20_siplyj_0_BusyTopic_1_684: I’ve got enough on my plate as it is.
sid_phrase_SQ20_siplyj_0_DefeatComment_1: Hey! I oughtta kill you for that!
sid_phrase_SQ20_siplyj_0_InfoTopic_1_1_6: I’ll tell you this much: if you wanna make some coupons, don’t go to the center of the Zone. There's no coupons there, just trouble.
sid_phrase_SQ20_siplyj_0_ResumeComment_1: I got interrupted. Where were we?
sid_phrase_SQ20_tiran_0_InfoTopic_1_1_68: You guys are so boring. There are blind dogs that take more bullets to put down than you.
sid_phrase_SQ20_zuk_0_BusyTopic_1_68479: I’ve got better things to do, man.
sid_phrase_SQ25_Comment_GetOut_GetOut_FF: Hey, hands off! That’s not yours!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Comment_GuysOnPanasDeath: The job’s a no-go, stalker! You’re too late! Panas is gone, man. Some fucker did him in right by his stash.
He was a damn good man! If he'd stayed with us at the Slag Heap, he’d still be alive and kickin’. Here’s to Panas, God rest his soul!
No clinking glasses, okay? It's bad luck when somebody dies.
sid_phrase_SQ25_Comment_GuysTakeVodka_ta: Take the bottle on the table!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Comment_GuysWIthPanas_To: Here’s to the man who’s treating us tonight!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Comment_Guys_Tost1_Strel: Yeah! I heard he once got so drunk, he couldn’t even recognize his own face in the mirror!
Oh, wow... well, here’s to the legend!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Comment_Guys_Tost2_Commo: The kind your dome's made of, ya blockhead! Cheers!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Comment_Guys_Tost3_WhatW: Wait… wasn't there something we wanted to do?
Nah… first, we gotta pour some shots!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Comment_Guys_Tost4_MainM: Here’s to the most important guy in the Zone!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Comment_MeetTheGuys_Talk: Cheers, buddy! Here’s to us and to anyone who’s gonna help us out!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Comment_PanasAfterTalk_a: I’ll just finish my smoke, and then I’ll be on my way.
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_GuysAppealToSkif_: Did you give your friend the vodka yet?
We haven’t gotten around to it. We’re busy, okay!
Can you do us a favor? Take a bottle to each of his stashes, will ya?
Here’s to good company.
May we have a hell of a time together… and feel like hell when we're apart!
We're gonna get so loaded, we'll feel like hell whether we're together or not!
Here’s to the fallen.
Yeah, let’s honor those the Zone's taken from us.
Life's taken us to a dangerous place all right… No clinking glasses on this one. It’s bad luck.
Here’s to the Zone.
To the Zone, in all its beauty!
That one usually comes third… eh, whatever. To the Zone!
Hey, buddy!
Care for a drink? Or are you here for business?
Sure, why not?
Atta boy! Pour him a little extra.
How about a toast, buddy? What should we drink to?
Oh, look who’s here to save the day! Hey, buddy, listen up…
Straight to business, huh? Nah, let’s just relax like regular folks first. I’ll pour you one, okay?
Okay, I’ll do it. But I don’t take vodka as payment.
Aw, come on! Once Panas recovers and comes back, we’ll pay you real good.
And by the way… no stealing from the stashes, okay?
I’m not interested in digging through other people’s stashes.
How about we pour you another one, and you mull it over?
Shoo! Think about it, stalker. We’re not asking you to do this out of the goodness of your heart.
I could tell right away you were our kind of guy! Too many teetotalers nowadays…
We’ve got this friend called Panas. He’s like a bloodhound for loot. Unfortunately, he caught some rads the other day. But he's a smart guy, so he told us to leave some meds in his stash.
But we forgot which stash!
Eh, shut up! Anyway, just to be safe, we need to put a bottle in each of his three stashes. Can you help us out?
I think I’ll pass. I’m looking for work.
Not another teetotaler… All right, listen up.
Remind me what did we agree on again?
Here’s the deal: we gave you the ultimate cure for radiation: vodka!
Take it to our friend Panas’s stashes, and we’ll pay you lots of coupons!
Here’s to our health.
And no goddamn rads!
Only the purest souls don’t drink in the Zone — so pure they glow in the dark! Here’s to hoping we never start glowing like them!
Why don’t you put the bottles there on your own?
That was the plan. We bought everything, and then…
We thought we'd have one for the road, and, well… we had a bit too much. Like, half a liter too much.
We can tell you’re a good guy. We can see it in your eyes!
Understood.
Understanding is a good thing.
Here’s to understanding!
What’s up, stalker? You wanna join us for a drink? Sounds good to me! We got something to run by you too. You interested in making some money?
Easy there, don’t pressure him! Let’s start with that drink. I’ll pour you a little one, all right?
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_GuysNoPanasNoRewa: No offense, stalker, but you didn’t come through for us. How about we pour you a drink as a consolation?
Panas is sick of digging through trash with you. He’s set on exploring the Zone instead.
What the hell are you talking about? The Zone? What’s there to explore?
Yeah! Life’s good here at Garbage. Dig, sell, drink... it’s heaven, man!
Turning into a teetotaler, are ya?
Did the vodka have methanol in it? Maybe that’s why he didn’t come back.
What do you take us for, eh?
Our friends deserve nothing but the best!
There you are… where’s Panas? Answer me!
You asked me to put vodka in his stashes. That's what I did.
If Panas didn’t stop by to say thanks, then no, you didn’t!
Hear, hear! Don’t you bullshit us! We ain’t stupid!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_GuysRewardForPana: I thought Panas was going to venture further into the Zone. Is he all right?
He is now. Whenever Panas gets sober, he starts babbling about Prypiat. He wants to become a legend of the Zone, if you can believe it!
We took him across the Perimeter, taught him the ropes as a digger, and now he’s getting all cocky on us? The Garbage ain’t good enough for him! He fancies himself another Strelok, I guess.
No worries — friends gotta help each other out. We sent him some vodka, and now he’s back to normal. Thanks for your help, man! I sent you the coupons.
Have fun without me. I've got things to do.
All right! Here’s to you, man!
And here’s your reward, as promised!
Our friend hasn’t shown up yet. You’ll get your reward once he’s back here, alive and kicking.
Good to see you, man! We’re celebrating the return of a prodigal friend!
Wanna join us? Panas is footing the bill!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_PanasTheMeeting_H: I got some. Here you go.
Whoa, thanks! Here’s your payment. I should’ve paid you right away instead of trusting those two bozos.
That’s enough. I’m leaving tonight. I’ll head to the Duga, maybe even Prypiat… Misha and Grisha can find another drinking buddy.
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_PanasTheMeeting_I: I did it. Misha and Grisha wanted to give you vodka.
You’re a lifesaver, man! I owe you one, seriously.
I don’t know why I even bothered with Misha and Grisha. All they ever do is drink themselves silly and try to drag me into it. And they know damn well I'm sober now!
Eh, screw them. Here, take this. I really appreciate what you did.
So you’re the one who robbed my stashes! You asshole!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_PanasTheMeeting_J: Eh, whatever… what harm can a single bottle do? The Duga and Prypiat aren't going anywhere.
I think I’ll stop by the Slag Heap after all — give Mishka and Grishka a piece of my mind. I can't wait to hear what those two bozos have to say for themselves!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_PanasTheMeeting_N: I was asked to deliver some vodka. The rest is none of my business.
Misha and Grisha, those drunk idiots… but what did I expect? They only care about one thing.
Sorry, I don't have any anti-rad on me.
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_PanasTheMeeting_S: So you’re the one who put anti-rad in my stash? Was that your idea, or did Misha and Grisha finally remember what I gave them money for and send you?
I haven’t touched a drop of alcohol in a month! Damn vodka stopped me from going any further than the Garbage.
I quit being a digger because I wanted to explore the entire Zone. And I still do! I want to be a real stalker, you know?
If I slip now, I’ll probably just end up getting wasted in the middle of a dump. Well, maybe a couple of sips won’t hurt… hey, you got any anti-rad?
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_PanasTheMeeting_T: Misha and Grisha said you need anti-rad.
Wow, so they got it right! That’s… nice. And they didn’t send vodka. They remembered I'm sober now...
I’m gonna head to the Slag Heap and thank those guys.
And thanks for honoring their request. I owe you one.
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_PanasTheMeeting_V: Misha and Grisha asked me to put some vodka in your stashes. It’s to protect you against radiation.
Damn, so that’s it… I gave them money for anti-rad, not booze!
Vodka will do. It does the job just fine, as long as you don’t overdo it.
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_PanasTheMeeting_Y: I stumbled upon a nice stash. The loot isn’t bad, and it’s buried pretty deep.
I’m gonna bury you even deeper, you prick!
sid_phrase_SQ25_Dialog_PanasTheMeeting_h: Hey! What are you doing here, stalker?
sid_phrase_SQ25_grisa_borec_0_InfoTopic_: Boozer just got a fresh batch of sausage. He’s got the best snacks in the Zone! Sidor’s sausage is made of Flesh meat, I swear.
Ever heard that old digger saying? "Seven shots, then one trip down the mine." Or was it the other way around? Eh, who gives a shit? The important thing is, drink up!
sid_phrase_SQ25_misa_bokser_0_InfoTopic_: Do we look like reporters to you? We’re just hangin' out, man…
sid_phrase_SQ25_opanas_urkagan_0_InfoTop: That’s it, I’m done with vodka. The headaches I get from the Emissions are enough for me.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_AkopanHelpMe_Hel: Help me out, man! I’ll pay you back, just get me out of here!
Are you prayin’ or somethin'? Tell me where the stash is, and you might just make it out of here alive.
There are five of them. Sneak up from behind them, and…
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_AkopanIfBabajLiv: We’ve got nothing to talk about.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_Akopan_Akopan_53: Sorry, man. Real busy at the moment. Got a job to do.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_Approach_Approac: When we’re done with this customer, get a new piece.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_BabajIfFight_1_5: What do you think you’re doing?!
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_BabajIfSkifRunIn: What the fuck are you doing?
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_BabajToBandits_f: What’s the plan, boss? Just say the word.
After I see this stalker off, I’ll give you the rundown.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_Babaj_Babaj_5327: Looking for a job? I can help with that. Come back later.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_FofanGo_WrongDir: Where are you goin’? No foolin’ around!
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_FofanHello_Borzo: Go ahead. Cheery will tell ya what to do.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_ForceCommentBaba: I hear you're looking for a job, stalker. Let’s talk about it.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_Gena_1_43266: Business before pleasure, loner. Ya hear?
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_ShuherHitsAkopan: Spill it, motherfucker! It’s gonna get worse!
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_ZaharAtHidingPla: Wait here. I’ve got something to take care of, then we’ll move on.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_ZaharFailEscort_: It’s the fuckster who screwed me! Get him!
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_ZaharHasAlmostAr: We’re almost there. Make it quick.
