sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_ZaharIfNotTricke: You’re awfully persistent, aren't you? There’s nothing for us to discuss, I’m afraid. If you have any grievances, feel free to file a complaint or something.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_ZaharOWDavidDead: What the fuck’s going on? Answer me, now!
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_ZaharOnWayToHidi: Damn it, Akopyan… I didn’t see that coming.
It’s okay, let him come. I’ll be ready for him.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Comment_ZaharOnWayToPeop: So many plans trashed because of one snot-nosed punk…
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Akopan_AfterKilli: I heard Zakhar Babay fled the Slag Heap. Did you lure him out? How’d it go?
Yeah. He won’t bother us again.
Thanks. Now that bastard can’t hurt anyone ever again. Oh, I wish I’d been there to tell him goodbye and spit in his face.
Here’s your payment, as promised. I wish I could pay you even more, considering all you’ve done.
I’ll raise a glass to your health at Boozer’s. Actually, make it several glasses. After that, I’ll figure out what’s next. Maybe I’ll stick around here — it should be safer now.
Damn it! The asshole bribed you, didn’t he?
He’s gonna hunt me down now, and he won’t spare you either. You picked the wrong guy to get chummy with, stalker.
I need to get out of here before Babay comes back — somewhere far away, where he can't get me.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Akopan_FinishAndS: What do you know about him?
He hangs around the Slag Heap, offering stalkers a part-time job: help my buddies, and you can split the loot.
But it’s a setup. Those "buddies" of his just rob the stalkers blind.
He keeps running this same scheme over and over again, and there are always guys who fall for it.
Got a bandage, man? I need some patchin’ up.
I don’t want to cross him.
Think about it. This might be our only chance to get even.
Maybe. What’s the plan?
Go talk to Babay. Tell him I escaped, and I’m out for revenge. Show him his buddy’s gun to make it seem more convincing.
Make him think he needs to run. Either way, he’ll be scared shitless. Lure him outside, then deal with him.
I wish I could be there when he croaks. But I swear I’ll pay you plenty of coupons for his head.
Still need help with Zakhar Babay?
Of course! But you’ll have to do it alone. Lure Babay away from the Slag Heap and kill the fucker!
Need a hand dealing with Babay?
Oh yeah. I’ve got an idea that might just work.
He usually hangs around the Slag Heap. It’d be tough to nail him there. But if we lure him out, taking him down ought to be a piece of cake — especially for a guy like you!
But you’ll have to do it alone for the plan to work. Are you in?
What was your plan for taking down Zakhar Babay?
Head to the Slag Heap and tell Babay I’m out for revenge. Once he goes outside, kill the bastard.
Sorry, can’t help you there.
Right. I guess you need it more, taking down five guys on your own like that.
Here, take it.
Thanks! Those thugs roughed me up real good.
Got it. I’ll do my best.
So, what happened here, anyway?
That fucking thug sure has a way with words... and I fell for it hook, line, and sinker.
Thought I’d make some dough, but all I got was a rifle butt to the head. If you hadn’t gotten here in time…
Why do I have to go alone? What are you gonna do?
I can’t go to the Slag Heap as long as Babay is there. So you gotta do it on your own.
In the meantime, I’ll collect the money for your bounty. I got nothing on me now — those bastards took it all.
I'm lucky all I lost was money. I thought I was a goner!
Babay, that son of a bitch! I ought to kill him for setting me up like that. Hmm… you know what? That’s exactly what I’m gonna do!
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabajAfterDeal_Ah: What are you doing… what do you want?
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabajAfterDeal_He: Huh? All right, I got it. If that’s all, run along. I’m a busy man.
He asked me to show this to you. Look familiar?
Fuck! Akopyan took out my men? He looked like such a wimp…
Shit, I’m screwed! That son of a bitch is coming after me… I better get the hell out of here and lay low for a while. Let the bastard turn the Zone upside down looking for me.
Look, why don’t you help me get to my stash? Keep me safe, and I’ll pay you plenty. It’s a win-win. Deal?
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabajAfterDeal_IK: I know all about your scheme. I want a piece of the action, or I’m telling everyone about these "jobs" of yours.
The locals are aware of my business. And you can’t warn the whole Zone.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabajAfterDeal_IN: I need to get ready before we head out.
Come on, be quick about it. I’m waiting.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabajAfterDeal_Ta: You promised payment for the job, but I don’t see any coupons.
Payment? Ain’t your life valuable enough?
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabajAfterDeal_Yo: You didn’t think I’d escape from your trap, did you?
Hmm... dissatisfied customers don’t usually show up here.
And since my buddies ain’t callin' back, I guess you’ve foiled my little scheme.
Well, consider us even, then. Run along now, stalker.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabajAfterWalk_Hu: You do the job, you get the coupons. We’ll take it from here. I can’t stick around Garbage for too long.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabajAfterWalk_by: Don’t worry about me. And make sure you don’t cross my men in the future. My memory for kindness is awfully short.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabajAfterWalk_re: Aren’t you afraid Akopyan will find you?
The Zone is vast. Akopyan will have a tough time tracking me down. Besides, I’m not the only scammer out there. He can’t chase after everyone.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabajAfterWalk_ru: You can’t stay on the run forever. Sooner or later, you’ll have to answer for what you did.
Rather later than sooner. With enough coupons, you can get anything you need in the Zone, from protection to the right connections. And trust me, I’ve got plenty of coupons.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabajAfterWalk_sm: The Lesser Zone. It may be poor, but the suckers there are easy marks. The Gaffer treats them like children. They need a taste of real life.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_BabayAndDavid_1_5: I ain’t gonna beg you. If you chicken out, I’ll find someone else.
I’m not chickening out! Just double-checking. I’ll do it.
Great. I’ll tell Cheery you’re in.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Bandits_Bastards_: What if I don’t wanna do what you say?
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Bandits_Countdown: Now you can leave… in a body bag!
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Bandits_GiveAway_: I don’t want any trouble. Take it all.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Bandits_GiveMoney: Empty your pockets, stalker. I’m getting tired of waitin'.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Bandits_HelpUs_53: You got no choice. You’re outnumbered.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Bandits_IWillKIll: Tired, are you? I'll help you rest in peace!
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Bandits_KillThem_: They ain’t gonna let you go, man!
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Bandits_OhHi_5333: How nice of you to show up!
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Bandits_TimeOut_5: You’re a little slow, huh? We’ll help you loosen up!
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Bandits_Trap_5333: Here’s the deal, stalker: freeze, and hand over your coupons.
Do what we say, and you can leave.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Bandits_YourWillH: You want a deal? Sure. We take all your loot, and you get outta here.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Drabadan_HeCheats: We had a deal, and he didn’t pay me.
Babay lures stalkers into a trap under the guise of a job. He needs to be punished.
When it comes to Garbage, that’s just business as usual. If you try to punish everyone, your punisher’s gonna break.
Now, what can I get you?
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Drabadan_IWillPay: Maybe some coupons can refresh your memory?
Now I remember. A buddy of his got wasted and spilled the beans on Babay’s stash.
Every time it happens, Zakhar goes looking for a new place to hide his ill-gotten gains.
He hasn’t been outside for a while, though. Which means the stash might still be there.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_Drabadan_TellMeAb: As a bartender, you might be privy to the local stalkers' secrets. Do you happen to know about Zakhar Babay’s weaknesses?
Maybe I do. Remind me who’s asking again?
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_StartQuestBabaj_D: I’m too busy at the moment.
A stalker too busy to earn some coupons? That’s a new one! If you change your mind, drop by.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_StartQuestBabaj_I: Great. I’ll send you the coordinates. My buddies will meet you there.
Do what they say, and make sure the deal goes through. They know about your payment.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_StartQuestBabaj_J: What did you need my help with again?
You’re still here? My men have been waiting for you to help them shake down that debtor.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_StartQuestBabaj_N: Sure. Help my men shake down a debtor. You just need to hang around and look tough. When he pays up, you split the loot. Deal?
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_StartQuestBabaj_S: I’ve got a job for you. It's real simple, and the pay is good.
My buddies are planning to give a debtor of mine a warm welcome. I need you to help them out so he cracks faster.
We’ll split the profits. It's an easy job for a stalker like you, and you’ll make a lot of coupons. Deal?
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_StartQuestBabaj_T: Ha-ha, no way. If I spill the beans, you’ll do him in yourself!
You don’t need to know his name. All you gotta do is to stick around.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_StartQuestBabaj_Y: How often do you have jobs like this?
Depends. The Zone is a fickle mistress.
But no worries, nobody’s filed a complaint yet.
sid_phrase_SQ47_Dialog_ZaharOWDavidDead_: Get lost, stalker. I’ve got enough problems of my own.
sid_phrase_SQ47_akopan_0_InfoTopic_3_Wht: Pretty much everyone in the Zone wants to screw you over. Most of 'em already have.
sid_phrase_SQ47_gena_mirnyj_0_InfoTopic_: Feels good to have a boss who takes care of everything for you. I got nuthin’ to worry about. He tells me what to do, and I do it.
sid_phrase_SQ47_leha_kul_0_DefeatComment: I need to patch myself up!
sid_phrase_SQ47_leha_kul_0_HelloTopic_he: All right, I can spare you a minute.
sid_phrase_SQ47_leha_kul_0_InfoTopic_1_i: You can’t just stay put in the Zone. The moment you settle down, you gotta pack up and move on. Every single time.
sid_phrase_SQ47_leva_borzoj_0_DefeatComm: Give me a goddamn medkit! I’m dyin’ over here!
sid_phrase_SQ47_leva_borzoj_0_InfoTopic_: The boss promised me a new piece when we get the money. He’s been saying that for a month now, but he always keeps all the dough for himself.
sid_phrase_SQ47_miha_fofan_0_DefeatComme: Spare me a medkit, would ya?
sid_phrase_SQ47_miha_fofan_0_InfoTopic_1: This is my kind of job — it ain’t hard, and the money's pretty good.
sid_phrase_SQ47_sana_bodrak_0_InfoTopic_: Maybe it’s time to take it to the next level. I gotta get some boys together and be their boss. I’m sick of running errands for someone else.
sid_phrase_SQ47_vita_suher_0_InfoTopic_1: In the Zone, everyone makes coupons any way they can. If there are gullible chumps out there, it might as well be me fleecin' ’em rather than some other bloke.
sid_phrase_SQ47_zahar_babaj_0_DefeatComm: I need a medkit, now! I’m gonna pass out!
sid_phrase_SQ47_zahar_babaj_0_InfoTopic_: I like it here, loner. Back on the Mainland, we had rules, laws, taxes… here, life is simple. Whatever you can get is yours. Whoever’s got a bigger gun is always right. No bullshit.
If you wanna make it big in the Zone, sifting through trash and selling artifacts ain’t gonna cut it. You gotta get your hands dirty.
sid_phrase_SQ50_Dialog_AskSonyaAboutWork: I’m looking for work. Got any?
We've always got work for a capable guy.
If you do a good job, we’ll pay you well.
Our boss, the Sultan, has something coming up. Go see him. Tell him Kalyna sent you.
sid_phrase_SQ50_Dialog_AskSonyaAgain_Abo: Why don’t you ask the man himself? He'll tell you everything — even stuff you don't ask about.
sid_phrase_SQ50_Dialog_GiveSultanSuitcas: It was empty. So why was it so important to you?
Whoa. And the boys were just complaining about you the other day. Thought I was gonna have to deal with you… but since you did a good job for me, I’ll forgive and forget. Just this once.
Good, you handled that well. Any problems?
I’ve got what you asked for.
I’ll be frank: I suspected there was a snitch on the Sultansk, and I wanted to see if anyone went after you. Well, I was right. Now the rat’s gonna choke on his own blood.
Guess I gotta talk to Beard. He oughta stop messing with my people… but that’s no concern of yours anymore. You did a good job and earned your pay.
Some loners attacked me. They wanted your briefcase too.
sid_phrase_SQ50_Dialog_SonyaAfterQuest_Q: I took care of the Sultan’s problem.
I know a capable guy when I see him, Skif. And I was right about you. Good job, tiger.
sid_phrase_SQ50_Dialog_SultanGivesQuest_: All right. I’ll bring you your briefcase.
Very well. The job's easy enough, just a couple of mutants and some anomalies. And the pay's more than generous. Here are the coordinates.
She surely is.
I like the cut of your jib, stalker.
Maybe, to you.
I guess you’re used to it by now.
You like it here on the Sultansk, stalker? I’ve been living in the Swamps for a long time now. Had my fair share of chumps to shake down and assholes to kill. Life’s been good to me so far.

Even if you’re the kingpin of Garbage, the Zone can still fuck your shit right up. An Emission hit my stash a little while back. The place is crawling with anomalies and mutants now. The Zone’s a bitch, eh?
Kalyna says you need help with something.
You want to work for me, huh? Well, Sofiia Oleksiivna is right. I just happen to have a job that's perfect for you.
Why hire a stalker, boss? We've got plenty of decent guys starvin' for work right here!
If your buddies are starving, Knuckle, tell them they can starve to death for all I care. They need to make themselves useful. And so do you. Go make me some tea while I talk shop with this loner.
You should ask someone else.
Think again, stalker. Those who defy a kingpin in his own lair don't know what’s good for them.
So, let me get to the point: there was an important briefcase in that stash, and I want it back.
What kind of problem do you need me to deal with again?
An Emission hit my stash, and now the area is swarming with anomalies and mutants. I need you to recover my briefcase. I’ll make it worth your while, trust me.
What’s so important about the briefcase?
Ignorance is bliss, stalker. The less you know, the longer you live.
Why don’t you send your own men to get the briefcase?
It's not in their wheelhouse. Shaking down chumps — that’s their job. Mutants and anomalies — those are for stalkers.
sid_phrase_SQ50_Dialog_ThisIsOurSuitcase: Think you’re smart, asshole? Get him!
Freeze! Is that the Sultan’s briefcase? You’re not the only one lookin’ for it. Give me the briefcase, now, or we're gonna have a problem.
Fine. If you want it so badly, it’s yours.
Great. You ain’t goin’ nowhere just yet. I gotta make sure you didn’t take nothin' with you.
Right… the briefcase is empty. You trying to fuck with us? Big mistake. Get him, boys! We’ll search the body after!
sid_phrase_SQ50_kastet_0_BusyTopic_BusyT: I’m real busy right now, got it?
sid_phrase_SQ50_kastet_0_InfoTopic_1_Inf: You ever hunted piggies before, stalker? Me, I love huntin' piggies — lil' piggies like you, har-har!
sid_phrase_SQ50_kastet_0_ResumeComment_R: I kinda lost my train of thought there.
sid_phrase_SQ50_micman_0_DefeatComment_D: Fuck! When I get up, I’ll kill you!
sid_phrase_SQ50_micman_0_InfoTopic_1_Inf: I thought about bein' a merchant once. You just hang out in a nice, safe place, makin' lots of coupons doing nothin' but buyin' and sellin' stuff. Too bad it didn’t work out…
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_BorodaOnSultanKi: What the… get away from the windows!
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_KalinaCalls_Call: Hey, Skif! I’ve got a proposal for you. Come over here.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_KalinaOnOneKille: It’s in bad taste to leave a job unfinished, Skif. But that’s all right. My boys have your back.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_KalinaOnTreason_: I’ll take care of those two first, then it’s your turn.
So you thought you could screw me, huh? You disappoint me, Skif.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_SarychOnSight_Wh: Where the fuck did you come from?!
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_ShishkaOnEntranc: Get your ass outta here, stalker — unless you wanna catch a slug. Some big fish are here talkin' shop.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_ShishkaSeesMerca: There are some sketchy dudes out there, Sultan. Is this part of the plan?
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_SonyaCallInterru: Wake up! Shoot them before they get away!
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_SonyaCallLastCha: If you don’t resolve this with minimal bloodshed, my men will have to take everyone out.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_SultanAndBorodaW: Ah, our hero’s here. Come on over, Skif.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_SultanBorodaHave: Looks like it’s time for you to come back aboard, Beard. Let’s make a deal.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_SultanBorodaStar: Watch your mouth, Beard. I used to play nice with you — until you started ordering your men to loot my stashes.
I couldn’t care less about about your stashes. You’re the one who went off the rails here. First you take over the Skadovsk, and now you’re using my men for turkey shoots?
That’s enough. I’ve got plenty of men and guns to put an end to this.
You’ve grown some balls all of a the sudden, huh? Watch out, tough guy. I'll tell you again real slow, so you can understand: I didn’t give the Ringmaster any orders.
If you didn’t, then who did?
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_SultanBorodaTalk: …the rundown. First, the Ringmaster pulls off that performance with your men behind my back. Then your Stalkers try to steal my briefcase. And you’re completely in the dark about it all.
Are you saying someone’s trying to play us against each other?
Exactly. We’re being played for chumps, Beard. And I have a strong feeling I know the sneaky bitch behind it all…
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_SultanKeepsCalli: Taking your sweet time, asshole? Answer me!
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_SultanOnBorodaKi: Fuck! I gotta get outta here!
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_SultanOnEntrance: Beard, you bastard! It was all a setup!
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_TohaSeesMercenar: Did you hear that? Defensive positions!
sid_phrase_SQ81_Comment_ZebraWantsYouDea: You’re done for, stalker. Kalyna never forgives snitches!
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_BorodaAfterReturn: How does it feel to be back working here again?
Honestly? It’s the best thing that’s happened to me in the last seven years, Skif.
I didn’t give a rat’s ass about the whole squabble I used to have with the Sultan. All I wanted was to go home.
Now that I’m here, I’m good. As long as the Sultan and his men behave, we’ll get along just fine. If they don’t, I can handle it.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_KalinaGiveQuest_A: What did you want me to do again?
Listen up, Skif. The Sultan and Beard are meeting by the harbor cranes. Take them both out, and I'll make sure the Sultansk has a bright future. There’s a handsome reward in it for you too.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_KalinaGiveQuest_C: Right. The job's pretty important. Tell me, Skif — what do you do when somebody lays claim to something that belongs to you? When someone stands between you and your goal?
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_KalinaGiveQuest_D: You said you had a proposal for me.
I'd prefer to stay out of your personal squabbles.
All right, then. Suit yourself. If you change your mind, come talk to me. People who help me never regret it.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_KalinaGiveQuest_E: If someone or something gets in my way, I eliminate the problem.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_KalinaGiveQuest_G: I see. That’s all I needed to know.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_KalinaGiveQuest_I: All right. I’ll take the job.
Great. The Sultan and Beard arranged a meeting near the harbor cranes. They say they want to negotiate, but nothing’s gonna come of it. They’ll both have their entourages with them.
Don’t just barge in guns blazing. I want the Sultan and Beard dead, but I need their men alive.
The Sultan is cautious — he never goes to a meeting without a sniper covering him. Find the sniper's hiding place and take him out. Then you’ll have a perfect firing position. Good luck, Skif.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_KalinaGiveQuest_M: I’m the one who told the Ringmaster to kidnap Beard’s men, Skif. And the Ensign didn’t go after the Sultan’s briefcase on a tip from a disgruntled henchman. The tip came from me.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_KalinaGiveQuest_P: Let’s say I kill Beard and the Sultan. What’s next? What’s your plan?
The plan's simple enough: fully unify Zaton, without any hidden agenda. In Garbage, everyone wanted to have the Slag Heap for themselves.
I want to unite the loners and the bandits of the Swamps under me. Then I’ll recruit the former diggers from the Slag Heap. And the gangs that lost their bosses — where else are they gonna go?
And once I’ve secured their loyalty… then I can start looking beyond Zaton.
You’re trying to play Beard and the Sultan against each other... but why?
The Sultan invited me here to clean the place up. He said, "Whatever you build, it’s yours." And for the last seven years, I’ve been building the Sultansk. Developing trade. Making connections.
There’s nothing left for me on the Mainland. But this place — it doesn’t belong to the Sultan, Skif. Or to Beard. It belongs to me.
I never give up what’s mine without a fight.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_KalinaGiveQuest_S: I knew we were cut from the same cloth ever since I heard those rumors about you from the Slag Heap. Before you got involved in my affairs.
Have you found another contractor for that job yet?
I can’t entrust a job like this to just anyone. Have you reconsidered? Take Beard and the Sultan out for me, and I'll make sure the Sultansk has a bright future. I’ll pay you well.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_KalinaGiveQuest_W: So what do you want from me?
You’re already mixed up in my business anyway, so help me bring it to fruition. I want to rid Zaton of Beard and the Sultan and their endless games.
The Zone is changing, Skif. And it’s changing very quickly. Those who change along with it will prosper, and those who fail to adapt in time will perish.
The Sultan and Beard don't want change. As long as they’re here, Zaton will suffer. Get them out of the picture, and I’ll make sure the Sultansk has a bright future.
Why can’t you run the place the same as always? Why would Beard and the Sultan make things worse for Zaton?
Do you know the history behind these two? It’s been going on for years. At first, Beard was in charge here. The Sultan hung around the Skadovsk, smiling to his face, but plotting behind his back.
Then, seven years ago, the Sultan kicked Beard off the Skadovsk. Last year, Beard came back, and the Sultan allowed him to take over the Shevchenko. He just let him in, get it?
That’s just the way they like it: not quite together, not quite separate. But if someone takes advantage of their little games and attacks Zaton, it’s gonna be the end for bandits and loners alike.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_KalinaGivesReward: Anything else you wanted to ask?
I know, I know. Nice work, Skif.
Good hunting, Skif. Remember, no matter what happens in the Zone, you’re always welcome on the Sultansk.
You’re a goddamn killing machine, Skif. I told you not to blow everybody away! But I gotta admit, it was a hell of a show.
I beg to differ. Why’d you stop at one? Did your gun jam or something?
I sent the coupons to your PDA. Rest assured, I won’t forget what you've done for me.
The Sultansk used to be called the Skadovsk. What are you gonna call her now?
Just kidding. You can name a ship after yourself all you want, but doesn't make her your ship. The Sultansk can stay the Sultansk. Her name is my prize.
Always good to have someone do the dirty work for you, huh? Anyway, the job's done and that's what matters.
Were you following me out there?
I couldn’t afford to take any chances, stalker. And I won’t apologize for taking precautions.
What are you gonna do now?
First I'll get all the local Stalkers and bandits together. There’s no reason for them to stay on the Shevchenko. Then I’ll get in touch with my business partners and let them know what happened.
It’s good to see you alive, Skif.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_PonuryjKnowsNothi: You’re asking the wrong guy, stalker. I got no idea what’s going on around here. First, the boss leaves with all his guards, and now Miss Kalyna's gone…
And here I am, stuck behind the counter like a statue. Of course. So convenient, right? Come on, everyone, gimme your best shot…
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_SultanAfterReturn: Getting used to having Beard back on the Sultansk yet?
What's there to get used to? That smug face behind the counter fits this ship like a glove.
But don’t think we’re one big happy family now just 'cuz Beard’s men are hanging around here. Nope. His loners and my boys keep their own company. Just like it used to be.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_SultanAndBorodaGi: All right. I have to go.
Good hunting, Skif. When you’re back in Zaton, stop by. This ship ain’t going anywhere!
My debt to you is paid in full. As for Kalyna — she’s just getting a taste of what’s coming to her.
I ain’t gonna ask how you found out about Kalyna’s hit. That’s none of my business. Sure, I still gotta hold you accountable for Buzzard, but you just saved our asses, so…
What did you do about Kalyna?
I never forgive a betrayal, not even from my closest friends. If you stab me in the back, you were never on my side to begin with.
You're a modest one, Skif. If a little bird hadn't told me you refused to carry out Kalyna’s orders, Beard and I would never have known it was you we owed our lives to.
What’s gonna happen to the Sultansk now?
If the Sultan doesn’t dig his heels in at the last second, she’ll be known as the Skadovsk again.
You’ve had your eye on the helm since the moment you stepped aboard, Beard. Well, maybe I’ll let you change her name back. For old times’ sake.
I don’t like to owe people... just ask Kalyna. Beard always pays his debts right away too. Check your PDA for a reward.
I don’t know how you ended up coming to the harbor cranes when you did, stalker, but you really came through for us. Without your help, Kalyna’s mercs would have wiped us out.
sid_phrase_SQ81_Dialog_SultanMakesACall_: What the fuck’s going on, Buzzard?
This is Skif. Kalyna put a hit out on you and Beard. Time’s running out — her mercs are already on the way. I suggest you get ready to fight.
That bitch! Got it. We’ll handle it.
Looks like we got company. My spotter just went dark. Let’s get out of here.
All right. Keep your eyes peeled.
sid_phrase_SQ81_dana_ponuryj_0_BusyTopic: Go away. I feel bad enough as it is.
sid_phrase_SQ81_dana_ponuryj_0_ByeTopic_: Life is a pain in the ass.
sid_phrase_SQ81_dana_ponuryj_0_HelloTopi: Great, now we’re getting stalkers in here too. Whatcha want?
sid_phrase_SQ81_dana_ponuryj_0_InfoTopic: When I came down here from the Slag Heap, I figured Zaton would be a quiet, peaceful place to live. Yeah, right… no rest for the wicked, huh?
sid_phrase_SQ81_dana_ponuryj_0_ResumeCom: It sure is easy to distract a guy, huh? Now I gotta remember what I was talkin' about…
sid_phrase_SQ81_siska_0_InfoTopic_1_1_59: What a mess, man! I’ve been roaming the Zone for a while now, but I’ve never seen fireworks like those before!
sid_phrase_SQ81_siska_0_ResumeComment_1_: So, what were you sayin’ before?
sid_phrase_SQ81_toha_motor_0_InfoTopic_1: Thanks for your help. Never thought we and the bandits would have each other’s backs one day.
sid_phrase_SQ81_toha_motor_0_ResumeComme: Ugh, I almost forgot what I was talking about.
sid_phrase_SQ86_Audiolog_AssaultOnBitok_: What the hell? Where'd you come from, bro?
I just need the loot. I won’t hurt you. Just don’t do anything stupid.
Wait! Where are you going? Help me!
Fuck! Mutants! Don’t just stand there, man! Shoot!
sid_phrase_SQ86_Comment_Genij_AfterSecon: Thanks for handling the mutants. I hope you got 'em all.
Fuck me... how am I ever gonna get my gun back?
What do you want? Are you just here to make fun of me? Screw you.
Thanks for not abandoning me, man.
sid_phrase_SQ86_Comment_Genij_CallForHel: Hey, man! Come here, please! I need help!
sid_phrase_SQ86_Comment_Genij_PleaseRetr: Where are you going, man?! You gonna help me, or what?
sid_phrase_SQ86_Dialog_Genij_FirstMeet_A: Why don’t you just get yourself a new one? The Duty base isn't that far.
I don't have the coupons, man. I had to borrow some to buy the piece I lost... and I had to pay out the ass for it.
If I don’t get it back, I’ll never be able to pay what I owe.
sid_phrase_SQ86_Dialog_Genij_FirstMeet_D: Thanks, man. You’re my savior. So my stash is under the stairs, right next to the big wooden spool. And the gun must be nearby.
sid_phrase_SQ86_Dialog_Genij_FirstMeet_G: So... I promised you loot, so here are the coordinates. It’s Eight-ball’s stash, as you can probably guess. But it’s all I've got.
Yeah, I got your gun right here. Take it, and don’t lose it again.
Oh, thank God! You saved my life, man! I had to borrow from Huron to buy it, and now I can pay him back. Thank you, stalker.
sid_phrase_SQ86_Dialog_Genij_FirstMeet_H: You’ve been underground, man. Have you seen my gun? I need it real bad. I’ll give you my whole stash for it.
So you changed your mind? Will you go get my gun?
sid_phrase_SQ86_Dialog_Genij_FirstMeet_L: Yeah, I got your gun right here, and I’m keeping it. It'd be a waste to give it to a dumbass who can't hold onto his gear.
Come on, man! I had to borrow from Huron to buy it! How am I ever gonna get the coupons to pay him back without a gun?
sid_phrase_SQ86_Dialog_Genij_FirstMeet_M: Okay... I never expected much help anyway. Thanks for dealing with the mutants.
You mean... all of 'em? Wow, you’re good, man! You saved my sorry ass!
I promised you my stash as a reward, so here are the coordinates. Whatever you find there is yours.
I killed all the mutants. You can go get it yourself.
What kinds of mutants attacked you?
It was just Rodents, but tons of them. I don’t know where they all came from. The place used to be quiet.
But this time, I heard some kind of noise. I turned on my flashlight, and there they were, already at my feet.
I started shooting, but... well, you know the rest.
sid_phrase_SQ86_Dialog_Genij_FirstMeet_N: I don’t have time for this. Go find it yourself.
Fuck... okay, maybe I’ll find someone else. Or you'll change your mind. See ya.
No way. I’m not helping you. Go deal with Huron on your own.
That’s cold, man! His goons'll ice me on the spot...
sid_phrase_SQ86_Dialog_Genij_FirstMeet_W: Okay, fuck it, I’ll get you your precious gun.
Wow, thanks, man! I thought you were gonna abandon me. I appreciate it, stalker.
I dropped my gun somewhere near the stash. It’s under the stairs, next to the big wooden spool.
sid_phrase_SQ86_Dialog_Genij_FirstMeet_h: Everybody's just ignoring me. Thank God you’re a decent guy.
So... I screwed up big time — I left a stash underground, and now I can’t get to it. The mutants down there jumped me when I came back for my loot.
I grabbed my gun... but then I dropped it! Like it got snatched right out of my hand! So I had to run... but I need the gun really, really bad. Help me get it back! I’ll give you my whole stash!
sid_phrase_SQ86_Dialog_Genij_SecondTime_: It wasn’t just rodents there. Why didn’t you warn me about the Burer?
What Burer? I’m sorry, man, I didn’t see it! So it’s that dangerous down there, huh... we’re lucky to be alive.
I found Eight-ball’s body. You left him there to die.
Yeah, but I didn’t kill him! It was mutants, I swear! I just needed the loot to pay back my debt!
I had to borrow from Huron to buy the gun. I didn’t know his debt collectors cut your fingers off! One for every day you're overdue!
And I’m due really soon. So I followed Eight-ball to his stash... I just wanted to rob him. It’s too bad he's dead, but I got my own problems. I need a gun to pay back my debt.
Here you go. And next time, think twice who you’re borrowing from.
Thank you. You saved me, man. I know I don’t deserve it.
Here, take it. And hold on to it next time.
Oh, thank God! You saved my life, man! I had to borrow from Huron to buy it, and now I can pay him back. Thank you, stalker.
So? Have you found my gun?
I’m keeping it and putting it to good use. Say hi to Huron for me.
Come on, man! You gotta be kidding me! You’re setting me up to get killed, asshole!
It’s a good gun. It'd be a waste to give it to a dumbass who can't hold onto his gear.
Come on, man! I had to borrow from Huron to buy it! How am I ever gonna get the coupons to pay him back without a gun?
I thought we had a deal... okay, whatever. Thanks for clearing a path, at least.
I’m begging you, man... find my gun. Without it, I’m a dead man.
I’m begging you, man — find my gun. Without it, I’m a dead man.
sid_phrase_SQ86_genij_0_InfoTopic_1_Info: The most important news is that I settled my debt with Huron. Now I can finally breathe easy.
Unfortunately, a couple of punks are pissed 'cuz I robbed 'em. But I’ve got my good old gun, so I ain't afraid of nothing.
sid_phrase_SQ87_Comment_AfterDialog_Afte: Thanks for saving us, loner. We owe you our lives.
sid_phrase_SQ87_Comment_AfterFIght_Ignor: Where are you goin’, man? Don’t leave us here to die!
sid_phrase_SQ87_Comment_AfterFight_Help_: Hey, stalker! Give us a hand, will ya? Those fuckers locked us up. We’re next to the hangar. Get over here!
sid_phrase_SQ87_Comment_BandtisShout_Sho: Let 'em go, bro. You got the wrong guys. These stalkers are under our protection.
Has your Sultan forgotten how this works? Loners are there to get mugged — that’s all they're good for. Your kingpin’s a sucker. You should leave him.
There's no point tryin' to reason with suckers. Kill 'em, boys!
sid_phrase_SQ87_Comment_DoorOpened_Freed: Thanks, man. We’d have died like dogs in there if you hadn't saved our asses.
sid_phrase_SQ87_Comment_FindKey_FindKeyA: Find the key. Adik’ll have it on him. He never trusted his men with anything.
sid_phrase_SQ87_Comment_FindKey_FindKeyP: Did you find Adik? What about the key?
I searched him. He didn’t have it.
Check his PDA. Maybe there's something on it.
Open the door, man. We’ll die here without water.
sid_phrase_SQ87_Comment_FindKey_FindKey_: So? Did you get the key?
Adik has it, I’m sure of it. You’ll know him right away, he's got scars all over his face.
sid_phrase_SQ87_Comment_WhileFight_1_FF_: Take out those goons, man! We’re all empty here!
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_NeedKey_GlybaAskF: Find the key. Adik Pedal probably has it. He’s a bandit with scars all over his face.
The door’s too damn sturdy. We tried kicking it down, but it won’t budge. We need the key.
Adik probably has it – he’s the prick who locked us up. He’s got scars all over his ugly mug, you’ll know him for sure.
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_NeedKey_NeedKeyAf: Hey! Who’s there? Help me... I’m dying over here... no food, no water...
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_NeedKey_NeedKeyRe: You’re back?! You're back, man! Let me out! I’m dying!
You’re back! You’re a good man! Save us, please!
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_NeedKey_NeedKey_5: Let us out, bro! We’ve been here for two days without any water! We can’t get out on our own!
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_NeedKey_RejectAft: I’ve got enough problems of my own. Bye.
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_NeedKey_Reject_57: I’ve got enough problems of my own. Bye.
What the fuck, man?! You’re leaving us here to die!
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_SaveCaptives_Abou: What gang was holding you here?
No idea. Some outsiders. Came to Zaton and started tryin' to teach the Sultan how to run his own turf.
They tried to poach some of his men too, but the Sultan’s gang's loyal to their kingpin.
And they kept their word to us, believe it or not. They honestly tried to protect us. Too bad they’re so sloppy...
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_SaveCaptives_Bye_: You’re lucky I was passing by. How about a reward for my help?
Yeah, sure. We’d still be rotting in there if it wasn’t for you. Thanks, stalker.
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_SaveCaptives_Free: Oh... fresh air. You got any water? I’m on my last legs...
You got here right in the nick of time, loner. I don’t even know what those assholes were gonna do to us.
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_SaveCaptives_Give: Here, drink. You’ll feel better soon.
Hey... it’s you... I asked you for help, and you just left.
I got nothin' to say to you. How am I s'posed to thank you for the water when my buddies are dead 'cuz of you?
To be honest, I'd slug ya, but I can't even get my fist up. Scram. You make me sick.
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_SaveCaptives_NoWa: I've got nothing to give you. Sorry.
Please, man! You gotta find some!
sid_phrase_SQ87_Dialog_SaveCaptives_What: How did you end up getting captured?
We'd just gotten back from a run and sold our loot for a good price. We knew this place was empty... you know how it goes. We just wanted to take a little break, maybe have a drink.
So I pass out, then I hear a "click" and wake up with a gun to my head. Sobered me right the fuck up... it was Adik. He told us to transfer all our coupons to him, then he’d let us go.
I contacted the Sultan — we pay him for protection, see. Well, his men did come... two days later. And you can see how good their protection really is.
sid_phrase_SQ87_zena_glyba_0_DefeatComme: Fuck... I’m hit! I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_SQ87_zena_glyba_0_InfoTopic_1: I wish I could go to Prypiat... they say you can find the best artifacts there — the kind that earn you so many coupons, you never gotta work again.
But you need the best gear to make it there. Otherwise, it’s suicide.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Comment_FahimAfterDialog: There’s nothing left for us to discuss. Run along now.
Let’s go, guys! You take care, stalker. You might want to check Sledgehammer’s pockets for your reward.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Comment_GrebenAfterDialo: I’ll get in touch once you've dealt with Sledgehammer.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Comment_GrebenReward_Tha: Great job, stalker. Everything played out just the way I wanted it to. Now my story’s about to come to an end.
I’m sending you all the coupons I’ve got. I won’t be needing them anymore. Farewell.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Comment_KuvaldaAfterFune: Hit the road. I need some time alone.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Comment_KuvaldaAfterMSOP: Stupid fucks... why the hell wouldn’t they listen? And now they’re all dead.
Okay. Get your ass over here, Skif. We need to talk.
Over here, Skif. We need to talk.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Comment_KuvaldaAfterQues: Give me some space, okay? I need some time alone.
Not right now, all right? I have to figure out how to apologize to Crest without getting a bullet in my head.
I guess all’s well that ends well… but I still feel like shit. Crest didn’t deserve to go out like that.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Comment_KuvaldaWhileGreb: Crest is gone. He passed away a little while ago.
I reached out to him the other day, tried to make things right. He listened, and he said he forgave me.
Shortly after, he took a turn for the worse. He was coughing up blood, wheezing like hell. I took him here, gave him some vodka to ease his suffering.
Too bad it had to end like that. But I’m glad he forgave me. Now we can both find some peace.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Comment_MSOPAsksKuvalda_: Why would I off my own clients? Use your head, man!
Calm down. My man’s out there looking for them as we speak.
Then where are my men? What the hell did you do to them, you piece of shit? Spill it!
sid_phrase_SQ88_Comment_MSOPNoticeSkif_M: Whatcha doing out there, stalker? Looking for Sledgehammer? Come on in, he’s here.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutJob_AboutJob: Listen up. I’ve got clients from the IPSF who buy artifacts from me.
They pay good money, and they always pay on time. But they missed our last meeting and haven’t been in touch since.
If you can help me figure out what’s happened to them, I’ll throw a few coupons your way.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutJob_ByeSecon: I’d rather not get involved with this.
I see. Well, if you change your mind, swing by.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutJob_Deal_606: We have a deal. Where do I start?
I sent you the coordinates to the spot where I last heard the guitar. Do some recon. If that guitar hero’s got anything to do with those missing folks, we gotta find him.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutJob_RemindMe: Let’s go over the details of the job one more time.
Listen up: I need to track down my clients and find out how the guitarist I've been hearing relates to their disappearance. Are you game?
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutJob_Return_6: So, you gonna help me locate my clients?
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutJob_WhoAreTh: Maybe they’re dead. Anything can happen in the Zone.
These guys know their shit. They pack enough firepower to fend off mutants. No, it's gotta be something else…
I’ve got a hunch, though. I've been hearing someone playing guitar around here lately. But when I try to follow the sound, there’s no one there.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_AttackL: Whatever went down between you two is no concern of mine. Sledgehammer gave me a job, and I mean to see it through.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_Attack_: Whatever went down between you two is no concern of mine. Sledgehammer gave me a job, and I mean to see it through.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_Drunk_6: Why don’t you join me? Come on, take a seat, let’s have a little heart-to-heart. These grunts here can’t even string two words together.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_GrebenC: I see. Then you leave me no choice.
Seems like everything’s going as planned. Regrettably, Sledgehammer won’t be able to pay you for the job. He was the one who sent you, wasn’t he?
You don’t need to waste good bullets on me. After my trip to the CNPP, my time’s running short. But I can still compensate you if you lend me a hand.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_LeaveFo: That was truly a riveting tale, but I have to go now.
Alas, you’ve chosen the wrong ending.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_LeaveSe: Sorry, pal, but I can’t let you leave.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_LeaveTh: I gotta go. Another time, maybe.
I’m sorry, but there won’t be another time.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_Leave_6: No thanks. I’ve seen enough. Take care.
Sorry, pal, but I can’t let you leave.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_MSOPAlr: What did you do to these soldiers?
Whatever I did, they had it coming. The story’s coming to its conclusion. And it’s gonna be a good one — almost like in a fairy tale.
By the way, would you like to hear mine?
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_MSOPMes: Orlowski, come in. We’ve apprehended Sledgehammer at the fire station. We’re going to interrogate him now. If he gives anything up, we’ll terminate him on-site. Do you copy? Over.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_Okay_60: All right, I’ll help you. Sledgehammer will pay for what he did to you.
Glad you picked the right side, stalker. I’ll get in touch with you once it’s taken care of.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_TellMeS: Sure, let’s hear it. Maybe it’ll shed some light on what’s going on here.
All right, here it goes. There were two friends, both stalkers, living in Zaton. One of them loved to play the guitar, and the other was always down in the dumps about something or other.
One day, they caught wind of a rumor about the Klondike of Artifacts beneath the CNPP. They approached some familiar soldiers and obtained a key to access the site.
Turns out, there were no artifacts buried under the CNPP. The radiation was off the charts, and the grumpy stalker figured there wasn’t enough anti-rad for both of them, so he shot the guitarist.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_WhatCel: Quite a feast you’re having here. What were you celebrating?
Do I need a special reason to spend some time in a good company? These folks just swung by my fire… just like you.
I offered them some vodka. I’d offer you some too, but, unfortunately, I only have enough for myself.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_WhatHap: I take it the guitarist survived and is out for revenge? But what’s the IPSF got to do with all this?
The thing is, the soldiers knew damn well there was no Klondike of Artifacts in Chornobyl. But they went ahead and sold the key anyway…
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutPast_YouDidI: What exactly do you want from me?
The soldiers have paid their dues, and now it’s Sledgehammer’s turn. He’s in the hot seat, and I won't let him squirm out of what’s coming.
Head to the firehouse. Inform Sergeant Fakhim that Sledgehammer killed his men. He found out about their Chornobyl scam and wanted payback.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutVictims_Abou: I found the bodies of two soldiers: Machek and Poluyanov. Here, look at this PDA. Seems like that guitarist was hunting your clients.
Oh, fuck… look, the messages mention the Kindergarten. Don’t just stand there, go take that fucker down!
I’ll stay here and contact the IPSF. We’ve gotta warn ’em.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutVictims_Busy: Whatcha waitin’ for? Get to the Kindergarten!
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutVictims_Bye_: Then what the fuck are you doin’ here?
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutVictims_NoCl: If you find anything, head straight back here.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_AboutVictims_Only: Machek and Poluyanov. I found their bodies. They seemed to be celebrating something. No visible wounds.
They might’ve been poisoned. You gotta search their bodies. Maybe you’ll find some clues about who they were with.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_FirstMeet_ByeSeco: Nope, I’ve got enough on my plate as it is.
Okay, then stop by when your plate's half full.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_FirstMeet_Bye_529: Take it easy, I was just passing through. I’m already leaving.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_FirstMeet_Kuvalda: Hmm... you seem to know what's up. Wanna make some money?
Hmm... you seem to know what's up. If you feel like making some money, come with me to my den. I’ve got a job for you.
If you’ve made it this far, you must be one tough son of a bitch. Maybe you can lend me a hand. Wanna make some money?
If you’ve made it this far, you must be one tough son of a bitch. Maybe you can lend me a hand. Come with me to my den — I’ve got a job for you.
Folks keep going missing, and he’s struttin’ around like it’s no big deal. Don’t you give me any trouble, stalker.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_FirstMeet_Missing: ’Course you haven’t, you’re not from around here. Few folks venture into these parts, and even fewer live to tell the tale.
Is someone missing? I haven’t heard anything about that.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_FirstMeet_NotMine: I never go looking for trouble unless there's coupons involved.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_FirstMeet_NotYour: My business is none of your concern.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_FirstMeet_Return_: So, you’re back. So, you wanna make some money?
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_FirstMeet_Skif_52: Just taking a look around the area.
Got your fill of sightseeing? How about grabbing a fridge magnet as a souvenir and making yourself scarce?
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_FirstMeet_WhoAreY: Who the hell are you? Whaddaya want?
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_KuvaldaReward_Abo: Crest is alive, but his time is running out. You should try to talk to him. He’s over at the Kindergarten.
He told you everything, didn’t he? About Chornobyl. I don’t understand how he made it… I mean, he fell into some radioactive sludge.
That’s why I shot him, you know? I thought he was past helping. I didn’t want him to suffer.
Anyway, I should be saying this to him, not to you. Here’s your reward. I’m gonna pull myself together and go talk to Crest.
Either way, he was a goner. The radiation poisoning would’ve caught up to him sooner or later.
I don’t understand how he made it… I mean, he fell into some radioactive sludge under the CNPP.
That’s why I shot him, you know? I thought he was past helping. I didn’t want him to suffer.
But why didn’t Crest just take me out? Why did he kill those soldiers?
Those soldiers knew there weren’t any artifacts under the CNPP, but they sold you the key anyway.
Those sons of bitches! Crest did the right thing, then. I wish I could tell that to him face to face…
If I knew it was him, I would've explained everything. But now… the poor bastard had to die twice, for fuck’s sake.
All right. I gotta pull myself together. Thanks for laying it all out, Skif. Here’s your reward. I’ve got to figure out what to do next.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_KuvaldaReward_Bye: Yes, he’s alive. You’ll find him at the Kindergarten. But I don't feel like getting involved in your affairs. So, what about my reward?
But… how? I saw him… well, it doesn't matter. I better ask him myself. Here are your coupons, stalker.
All right, stalker. I wish I could’ve spoken to Crest face to face and explain why I did what I did…
Anyway, I won’t keep you any longer. Here’s your pay.
I forwarded you Crest’s journal. You’ll find your answers there. I’m more interested in my reward.
Yeah, I did. I’ll forward his journal to your PDA. Give it a read. So, what about my reward?
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_KuvaldaReward_Ski: I did. Crest was the one behind your clients’ disappearance. His PDA has all the evidence.
I did. Crest was the one behind your clients’ disappearance. I had a little chat with him.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_KuvaldaReward_Sta: Hey, you’re really something. Those grunts were about to off me on the spot. They thought I’d killed their men. Did you find anything out about that, by the way?
You… you saw Crest?! I know he wouldn’t have given up his PDA willingly… did you kill him?
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_MeetMsop_FoundMSO: Yeah, Sledgehammer hired me. I figure he wanted a plausible cover story. But he’s actually the one who took out your men in revenge for that Chornobyl incident.
Revenge? What the fuck are you talking about?! And how do you know about Chornobyl? He’s lying, Sergeant!
And why would he do that, Sledgehammer? Better yet, why don’t you tell me who ratted us out about that scam with the key?
Actually, scratch that. I don’t give a fuck.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_MeetMsop_NotYourG: Crest was the one who offed your men. He found out about the Chornobyl scam and wanted payback. Here, check his PDA.
Sledgehammer, you said he died from radiation poisoning. Guess that’s not the whole story, is it?
That can’t be right! I… I saw him… hold on. Chornobyl scam? What the fuck are you talkin’ about?
Ask your henchman. Seems like he’s got it all figured out. Hope you’re smart enough not to hold a grudge, whether past or present.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_MeetMsop_SawCorps: Crest was the one who offed your men. He found out about the Chornobyl scam and wanted payback. He’s up on the Kindergarten roof now, with the bodies of Jason and Novak. Go check it out.
And end up just like my men? Yeah, right. I’m not that stupid.
sid_phrase_SQ88_Dialog_MeetMsop_WhoAreYo: Freeze! Thinking of rescuing Sledgehammer, are you?
Hold your fire! This is the guy I hired to find your men. Tell them what you found, stalker!
sid_phrase_SQ88_greben_0_InfoTopic_1_Inf: People in the Zone, they’re like old guitars to me, stalker. Whatever tune they're playing, I always catch the false notes.
sid_phrase_SQ88_kuvalda_0_HelloTopic_Hel: Back again? What the fuck do you want now?
sid_phrase_SQ88_kuvalda_0_InfoTopic_1_In: I think it’s time to get outta Chornobyl. I’m gonna head north, to the center of the Zone. Away from other people.
sid_phrase_SQ88_serzant_fahim_0_HelloTop: The hell do you want, stalker?
sid_phrase_SQ88_serzant_fahim_0_InfoTopi: We got new badges yesterday. The commander said to break 'em in half and put a piece in each boot.
He says, if they find you in pieces after an anomaly or a mutant gets you, that way they can figure it out whose pieces they are. Some fuckin' sense of humor on that guy.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Comment_Grac_Interact_Id: I’m watching you, stalker. Keep that in mind.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Comment_MercsFinished_1_: Sidorovich, come in. It’s done. They won’t bother you anymore.
Yep, got the coupons! Perfect timing. Pleasure doing business with you.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Comment_Pass_1_68235: Who are you? What’s your business here?
sid_phrase_SQ89_Comment_Pass_1_68236: What's so important, Vovan? He’s alone, and I’m right here. So, you wanna talk, stalker? Let’s talk.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Comment_QFailTalkToMercs: Well, thanks for nothing. We’re not splitting the pay. You had a chance, and you blew it.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Comment_SidorAfterAttack: Wow! Look what we have here! So you botch the job and you come back like nothing happened. Some balls you have.
Well then. I'm not in the habit of letting grudges get in the way of business. Tell me what you’ve got.
Come in, Skif. Playing hero? Fine, have it your way.
With that attitude and your choice of friends, you're not gonna be around for long. I won’t even bother. The Zone has plenty of ways to get rid of you.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Comment_SidorAfterKillin: Skif, come in. A little bird told me there’s a new Strelok at the Cordon now.
I respect people I can rely on. Keep it up. Transferring you your reward now.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Comment_SidorMercs_1_666: Sidorovich, come in. Skif is out. No shots fired.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Comment_TraderAfterAttac: I appreciate it, stalker. Thanks for taking our side.
That fucking leech Sidor is ready to go to war to keep his throne to himself. I guess we have to retreat after all.
But we’ll regroup and come right back. It’s time for a change at the Cordon.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Comment_TunnelEntrance_1: You know, I keep thinking... it’s a good tunnel, easy to defend. But if they toss a grenade in here, it'll suck ass. Can you imagine the echo in this thing?
Hey! Do you hear what I’m saying?
Yeah, yeah, we'll bring it up with Wisp. He should be back by now, but I can’t reach him. I’m starting to get worried...
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_LastChance_1_3315: Last chance, man. Either you’re with us, or you die with these rats.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_LastChance_No_685: Just try it. I’ll bury you right here.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_LastChance_TimeUp: I see. Let's get to work, boys.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_LastChance_Yes_68: Good choice. Let's get to work, boys.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_SidorChecksSkif_1: Come in, Skif. How’s it going with Wisp?
Looks like you've got some competition. Wisp is dead — mutants got him. I looked through his PDA, and there’s a chat on it about a new trading post in the tunnel camp.
I knew it... fine. Get to that fucking joint and kill everyone, I need to send a clear message. I'll triple your reward.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sidor_IAmIn_66578: I'm in. Where do I find this Wisp?
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sidor_IAmIn_66579: Start at the Pig Farm. They say he hangs out there. Find out what he’s up to. And then smash him. Sounds right? Off you go.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sidor_NoTime_6658: I’ve got enough on my plate right now.
Come back if you change your mind.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sidor_Repeat_6658: Is the job to eliminate Wisp still on the table?
Yeah, why? Decided to help, finally?
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sidor_SpecialJob_: Do you have any special jobs for me? With the appropriate remuneration, of course.
Hm... As a matter of fact, I do. There’s one cocky bastard, goes by Wisp. Apparently, he thinks he’s the boss here. Poaching my rookies, trying to contact my suppliers…
Right under my nose, too, as if I’m a goddamn statue or something. This rat is too clever for his own good and he’ll end up with his head smashed, like all rats do. I want you to see to it.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sidor_WhatToDo_66: So you're just gonna off the guy? Have you tried talking some sense into him?
Oh! Never thought of it! Thank you for your valuable advice, Stalker, that solves it.
Let me spell it out for ya: it is him who should’ve talked to me before making himself at home in my village! In that case, he would’ve had a chance.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sidor_WhatToDo_67: So, Peace Corps, are you taking this job or not?
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sved_Bye2_66605: Suit yourself. I won’t pry. Come back after we open, you won’t regret it.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sved_Bye_66598: I’m intrigued. All right. I’ll come back later.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sved_Fight_66609: Sidorovich sends his regards. Consider your little joint closed.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sved_Help_66606: Sidorovich hired me to eliminate you. I'm not gonna do it, but he'll send someone else, and he won’t stop until it’s done. So you should leave.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sved_Help_66607: Damn! I knew that fat spider wouldn’t leave us alone, but I never expected him to get to us so soon. Thanks for the warning, stalker.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sved_Help_66608: Here, take some coupons. But we won’t be going anywhere. Soon we'll have more men to protect us. A lot of folks want to break Sidor’s monopoly. We're gonna stand our ground. We must.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sved_HowFindOut_6: Who told you about our store? It's not a secret or anything, I just want to know.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sved_Looking_6659: Hey, stalker. Looking for something? You should come back a little later... there’ll be something to look at then, if you catch my drift.
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sved_StoreHere_66: I heard you’re setting up a store here.
I sure am. And how'd you hear about it, if you don't mind my asking?
sid_phrase_SQ89_Dialog_Sved_ZhgutPDA_666: I saw Wisp’s PDA. Took it from his dead body. Mutants got him at the Pig Farm.
Fuck me! Why'd he go there alone?! That’s bad news... he was a good guy. He'll definitely be missed.
Thanks for telling me. And for coming all this way.
sid_phrase_SQ89_grac_0_DefeatComment_1_6: Oh, fuck! Toss me a medkit!
sid_phrase_SQ89_grac_0_InfoTopic_1_1_666: Bandits are drawn here like flies to shit. Their name is Legion, even among stalkers. They use fancy words and have nice manners... but their methods are the same.
sid_phrase_SQ89_grac_0_ResumeComment_1_6: So, where was I... oh, right!
sid_phrase_SQ89_sved_0_DefeatComment_1_6: Oh, fuck… I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_SQ89_sved_0_HelloTopic_1_6662: So, what brings you here, loner?
sid_phrase_SQ89_sved_0_InfoTopic_1_1_666: Everybody wants to get themselves a fancy new piece... well, I survive just fine with my trusty old gun. But if all customers were like me, would any gun trader make a fortune?
sid_phrase_SQ89_sved_0_ResumeComment_1_6: What were we talking about again?
sid_phrase_SQ89_vana_tarantul_0_BusyTopi: I don’t have time for you now. Like, at all!
sid_phrase_SQ89_vana_tarantul_0_InfoTopi: The Zone’s like a swamp — it sucks you in, right? You can never get enough of it. You want more — more artifacts, more coupons, more adrenaline...
So I’m quitting. I’m taking one last job, making a few coupons, and gettin' the hell outta Dodge.
sid_phrase_SQ89_vana_tarantul_0_ResumeCo: What was I saying... oh yeah!
sid_phrase_SQ90_Comment_BanditsChatAbout: All good, Boss! We caught ’em with their pants down and pumped ’em full of lead.
Easy there, tiger. If we hadn’t been tipped off, you’d be singing a different tune. Got it?
The freak's gone quiet... is it dead?
You wish. The fucker ain't gonna croak anytime soon. We’re lucky it went after the rookie, straight into the container.
Not so lucky for the rookie. I feel bad for the guy...
You're gonna feel bad for yourself when the thing's done gnawing on the rookie’s bones and gets serious about gettin' outta there.
We need something sturdier than this lock... just for peace of mind, ya know?
sid_phrase_SQ90_Comment_ForStealth_Gadin: Drunk morons and mutant asses, that’s all I see, day after day...
sid_phrase_SQ90_Comment_ForStealth_GribF: I’m jonesing for a drink over here...
sid_phrase_SQ90_Comment_ForStealth_GribS: Man your post today, go out on patrol tomorrow... am I in Duty or something?
sid_phrase_SQ90_Comment_ForStealth_Kuca_: Yeah... life in the Swamps was just... more fun.
sid_phrase_SQ90_Comment_ForStealth_Sipuh: At least I can have a smoke in peace.
sid_phrase_SQ90_Comment_ForStealth_Tuzik: Let those Freedom fuckers come, I’ll stuff their...
sid_phrase_SQ90_Comment_ZazimIfSkifNotTo: Think about taking those bandits down, man. If you do it, the Barkeep in Rostok will have a nice wad of coupons with your name on it. Just talk to him.
sid_phrase_SQ90_Comment_ZazimIfSkifTookQ: You should move fast. Put those bandits down, and then I'll meet you at Rostok... just let me catch my breath.
sid_phrase_SQ90_Dialog_ClosingQuestWithB: I put those bandits in the Red Forest down. I hear there’s a bounty on their heads, right?
That's right. Thank you, Skif, that's one less trouble for us. Here, for your services. Freedom won't forget who saved the day.
Now that those bastards are off our backs, there won’t be any more disruptions of our supply chain. Come see me anytime. Freedom’s grateful to you.
I put those bandits in the Red Forest down. I hear there’s a bounty on their heads, right?
That's right. Thank you, Skif, that's one less trouble for us. Here, for your services. Freedom won't forget who saved the day.
Now that those bastards are off our backs, there won’t be any more disruptions of our supply chain. Come see me anytime. Freedom’s grateful to you.
I never found that Freedom group.
Okay. We’ll send someone else to look for them.
Here, for your services. Freedom won't forget who saved the day.
Now that those bastards are off our backs, there won’t be any more disruptions of our supply chain. Come see me anytime. Freedom’s grateful to you.
Here, for your services. Freedom won't forget who saved the day.
Now that those bastards are off our backs, there won’t be any more disruptions of our supply chain. Come see me anytime. Freedom’s grateful to you.
I took care of the bandits in the warehouse.
I found that Freedom group. Clinch was the only survivor. I patched him up.
Thank you, Skif. I’ll get in touch with him.
I found that Freedom group too. No survivors.
I see. Thank you. At least we know...
sid_phrase_SQ90_Dialog_SkifTakingQuestFr: Let’s go over the details one more time.
There's a bandit lair in the Red Forest, and those sons of bitches have been raiding Freedom business big time. A group of ours went to deal with them and disappeared.
I want those goons killed — every last one of 'em. And I’d like some info on what happened to the Freedom squad. You in?
Let’s go over the details one more time.
There's a bandit lair in the Red Forest, and those sons of bitches have been raiding Freedom business big time. A group of ours went to deal with them and disappeared.
I want those goons killed — every last one of 'em. And I’d like some info on what happened to the Freedom squad. You in?
No, I’m not interested.
Too bad. The job is urgent, and the pay is good. Come back if you change your mind.
Got any work for me? Something challenging, preferably.
Okay, here’s a serious one for you. Some bandits have set up shop at the warehouse in the Red Forest. They've been robbing Freedom and get in the way of business.
A hefty bounty is already promised for their heads. A group of Freedomers was sent there, but they seem to have gotten into trouble. We lost contact with them.
So I need those bandits eliminated, and I’d like some info on what happened to the Freedom squad. Will you do it?
About the bandits at the warehouse... you still need my help dealing with them?
Yeah, no one’s bothered to put the bastards down yet. You just asking, or you gonna step up and help?
Got any work for me? Something challenging, preferably.
Okay, here’s a serious one for you. Some bandits have set up shop at the warehouse in the Red Forest. They've been robbing Freedom and get in the way of business.
A hefty bounty is already promised for their heads. A group of Freedomers was sent there, but they seem to have gotten into trouble. We lost contact with them.
So I need those bandits eliminated, and I’d like some info on what happened to the Freedom squad. Will you do it?
Sure. I’m in.
Good. I've sent you the coordinates to the warehouse and to the place where the Freedom group went dark.
But the group isn't your top priority. If you don’t find them, we will eventually. Your main job is to kill the bandits. Good luck.
Sure. I’m in.
Good. I’ve sent you the coordinates to the location where the bandits are holed up.
If you get the chance, check another spot. Freedom wanted to deal with it on our own, but our group disappeared right near those bastards' base.
But the group isn't your top priority. If you don’t find them, we will eventually. Your main job is to kill the bandits. Good luck.
Sure. I’m in.
Good. I’ve sent you the coordinates to the location where the bandits are holed up.
If you get the chance, check another spot. Freedom wanted to deal with it on our own, but our group disappeared right near those bastards' base.
But the group isn't your top priority. If you don’t find them, we will eventually. Your main job is to kill the bandits. Good luck.
sid_phrase_SQ90_Dialog_TalkWithGera_D4Ha: There are some people in Rostok who are still loyal to Duty. And that's all I'm telling you.
The Treaty is in the past now, so it doesn’t matter. There will be bloodshed soon. You’ll see.
Here, this is for you. You dealt with the bandits — that was a real decent thing to do. Buy yourself a drink. Who knows? This could be our last chance to drink in peace.
sid_phrase_SQ90_Dialog_TalkWithGera_D4Is: There are some people in Rostok who are still loyal to Duty. And that's all I'm telling you.
We never broke the Treaty, and what those bandits are doing there doesn't concern us.
So I advise you to keep quiet about it. That'd be better for everyone. Here, take this. Have a drink, relax. You’ve dealt with the bandits, so they’re not our problem anymore.
sid_phrase_SQ90_Dialog_TalkWithGera_Star: So I took down those bandits that were giving Freedom a hard time, and I found an interesting conversation. How did you know about those Freedom routes?
sid_phrase_SQ90_Dialog_WithZazim_FirstWF: I gotta go. You can tell me about it later.
Take care, man. Thanks for the assist.
Then today's my lucky day. Thanks, man. Maybe you can help me with one more thing?
We were sent here to deal with a bandit base nearby, but they were expecting us. Took us out one by one, like a bunch of rookies...
Put them down and come to Rostok. The Barkeep will compensate you for your trouble. What do you say?
The Barkeep sent me to check on your group. And eliminate bandits.
They ambushed us. We were going in through a tunnel leading to the caves. They're connected to the warehouse, it was supposed to be a good way to sneak up on the bandits.
But it was like they were expecting us! They hit us hard... so if you want to get there, here’s the key to the tunnels. The entrance is on the second floor.
I can’t help you, sorry. My ears are still ringing, and my vision’s all blurry. Good luck, man.
sid_phrase_SQ90_Dialog_WithZazim_SecondW: Not a good time. I’ve got other things to do.
Well, if you change your mind and take care of those bandits, head to Rostok later. The Barkeep will be happy to compensate you. Later, man.
Fine, I’ll take care of your bandits. Give me the details.
They’ve set up a base here, at the warehouses. There’s a tunnel leading to it, straight from this building. Follow it, and you might be able to catch them off guard.
Here’s the key to the tunnel. I’ve tagged the location so you won’t get lost. As soon as you’ve dealt with those scumbags, head to Rostok.
The Barkeep will pay you well. Those bandits have been a thorn in our side for quite some time now. It's bad for business. Okay, off you go. Good luck, man.
sid_phrase_SQ90_Dialog_WithZazim_Start_6: Whoa, man, you’re right on time... I thought I was done for. I think I passed out once or twice... how did you get here?
sid_phrase_SQ90_karl_zazim_0_InfoTopic_1: Everybody’s trying to make money here, dude. Some guys loot corpses, others hunt mutants for cash or rummage around in anomalies.
Me, I'm a bookie. I get the same rush, but I get to keep all my limbs.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_BeforeSkif_farta: You have your orders, Tryhub. Complaining isn’t one of them.
If we stay put, we’re all going down!
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_GorodetskyAgress: You’re picking the wrong fight, stalker.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_GorodetskyAliveA: I need some time alone, soldier… with the guys.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_GorodetskyBattle: You in position, stalker? Get ready. The Monolithians are closing in.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_GorodetskyBothAl: Thanks again, stalker. Good luck to you. Duty will remember what you did.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_GorodetskyReward: Thanks, stalker. The Zone’s better off without those freaks. You’ve earned a reward. It’s just too bad my men didn’t make it.
Every soldier counts now! We can’t hide behind paperwork anymore. It’s time to face the Monolith head on and rediscover what it means to be in Duty.
On behalf of Duty, I'm like to express my gratitude. This calls for a worthy reward. Accept it, stalker, and thank you. Your actions won’t be forgotten.
Every soldier counts now! We can’t hide behind paperwork anymore. It’s time to face the Monolith head on and rediscover what it means to be in Duty.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_GorodetskySeeEne: Enemy sighted. Everyone, hold your ground!
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_GorodetskySkifAg: The enemy’s closing in. Let’s not waste any time. Head to the roof.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_GorodetskySkifFa: Don’t bail on us, soldier! We need you back at Assets Storage.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_HristenkoCallAft: Come here, soldier. I owe you one.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_NovikovCallAfter: Take a breather, stalker. Then we’ll have a chat.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_SkifRefused_Refu: Return to the Cement Factory. That’s an order.
What? I can take the sniper spot, provide cover from there…
Are you deaf?! I said get outta here!
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_TrehyBothAlive_f: I’d love to give you a hug, stalker, but I’m gonna hold back. You better go before I change my mind!
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_TrehybAfter_fyou: Beat it, stalker. You ditched us back at the Cooling Towers. I’ve got nothing to say to you.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_TrehybAgressiveS: You asshole! You’re going down here without our help!
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_TrehybAliveAlone: I gotta report back to HQ, tell 'em I’m the last man standing.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_TrehybCallAfter_: Come here, stalker. We need to talk.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_TrehybReward_rew: Thank you for your help. It’s too bad about the Major — he devoted his entire life to Duty. He was a good man.
Here’s your reward, just as he promised. I wish we had more soldiers like you…
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_TrehybSkifAgreed: We just might stand a chance against them… with your help.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_TrehybSkifRefuse: We might’ve stood a chance if you'd helped us.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_VoroninReward_1_: It’s come to my attention that you’ve lent a hand to Duty, soldier. I know you were promised a reward. I’m sending it to your PDA. Thank you for your assistance.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_Wounded2Heal_tha: Those sons of bitches are in for it now!
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_Wounded2Reward_r: You’re a good shot! Accept this with my thanks.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_Wounded3Heal_tha: Those freaks really did a number on us.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_Wounded3Reward_r: Thanks, stalker. It wasn’t exactly a walk in the park, but without you, we wouldn’t be standing here today. Take this, you’ve earned it.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Comment_WoundedReward_re: Here, take this. You earned it. If it wasn’t for you, I’d be a goner for sure.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Dialog_GorodetskyQuest_C: So, what'll it be? Will you help us fend off the Monolith?
sid_phrase_SQ91_Dialog_GorodetskyQuest_H: Listen up. Time’s running out. We need your help defending this position against the Monolith.
My boys pushed the first wave back, but it cost us. Too many of the guys are banged up now. Tryhub and I are the only ones still on our feet.
According to our intel, another squad of those freaks is on the way. We’ve got to team up. If I make it out alive, I’ll make it worth your while.
We’ve got a sniper spot set up on the roof. It’s good to go, but our sniper… he’s out of commission. I need you to step in and take over for him.
sid_phrase_SQ91_Dialog_GorodetskyQuest_S: All right. I’ll help. Awaiting orders, Commander.
Head up to the roof; you’ll find weapons and ammo waiting for you. It’s a primo spot. You’ll have a clear view of the Monolithians.
Oh, and one more thing: if you’ve got any spare medkits, patch up the wounded on the second floor. It’ll improve our odds of holding out.
I’ll pass. You're gonna have to handle this without my help.
Seriously? Are you dense, stalker?! You either pitch in, or we’re done for!
sid_phrase_SQ91_hristenko_0_HelloTopic_1: Good job, stalker. We sure gave ’em what for.
sid_phrase_SQ91_hristenko_0_InfoTopic_1_: I wish we had some Warden gear. Just looking at our armor drives me to tears, to say nothing of putting it on.
sid_phrase_SQ91_novikov_0_DefeatComment_: Damn it… I need a medkit!
sid_phrase_SQ91_novikov_0_HelloTopic_1_6: You sure handed them Monolithians their ass on a platter. Way to go!
sid_phrase_SQ91_novikov_0_InfoTopic_1_1_: Ever hear that myth about the guy who has to push a rock up a mountain, only for it to keep rolling back down? Well, it fits Duty and our ongoing struggle against the Zone to a T.
It might seem futile sometimes, but we can’t just throw in the towel. If we do, that rock’s gonna crush everyone here. If we lose, everyone loses.
sid_phrase_SQ91_novikov_0_ResumeComment_: So, what were we chattin’ about?
sid_phrase_SQ91_rodeckij_0_InfoTopic_1_1: In the Zone, it hit me: we’ve been force-fed war since we were kids — heroes, noble deeds, grand tales from books and movies… and it doesn't have a damn thing to do with reality.
Reality is different. War and the Zone aren’t about heroes, stalker — they’re about people trying to survive. Whoever makes it is the real hero. It's that simple.
sid_phrase_SQ91_topuria_0_HelloTopic_1_6: I’m getting sick of these Monolithians.
sid_phrase_SQ91_topuria_0_InfoTopic_1_1_: While I was out cold, I saw everyone I’d lost in the Zone. They were crying out to me, but instead of screams, the only sound I heard was the crackling of a dosimeter. It was horrifying.
sid_phrase_SQ91_tregub_0_InfoTopic_1_1_6: The Monolithians are chasing us around, and everyone else is at each other’s throats. No one’s gonna come to our aid, you got it?
This place is beyond saving. We can't win here. Just fill it with concrete up to the top of the Perimeter and be done with it. Fuck it.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Comment_Almost2_1_67740: Got it! Activating it on my end.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Comment_Almost2_1_67741: It’s working! Sorry, stalker. I had to do it.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Comment_Almost_1_67739: You’re just about there. Now flip the switch.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Comment_ComeClose_1_6748: I’m inside, upstairs. Come on over.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Comment_EndFriend_1_6560: Try not to kill all the mutants around here — I’m gonna need them later.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Comment_ItsYou_1_67482: Howdy! Come over here, don’t be afraid.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Comment_Radio_1_65600: Hey, stalker, Mongoose here. Got an easy gig for you, some good money to be made. Swing by if you’re up for it.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Comment_Radio_1_65601: I’m near the Chemical Plant, by the silo. Look for a small two-story building.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Comment_Science_1_65660: Head up to the second device while I get everything set up here.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Comment_WowEasy_1_68211: Whoa, whoa! Easy now. Can't we talk about this?
sid_phrase_SQ92_Dialog_AfterFight_1_6558: Can't we talk this out before you start shooting?
sid_phrase_SQ92_Dialog_AfterFight_ForWho: But it was a setup. For who?
The Chemical Plant is their turf. They send patrols there at regular intervals. I wanted to make sure one of those patrols never made it back.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Dialog_AfterFight_KillYo: I'm not falling for your bullshit a second time.
You’re not getting it. I didn’t come back here to talk.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Dialog_AfterFight_WTF_65: The radiation emitted by the devices — the anomalous activity meters — attracts all kinds of mutants.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Dialog_AfterFight_WTF_68: It usually takes a while, but that pack of Bloodsuckers must’ve been in the vicinity. They showed up the moment we activated the devices.
I’m really sorry about it, honest. This set-up wasn’t meant to target you.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Dialog_AfterFight_WaitRe: You could’ve told me right away, and I wouldn’t have had any questions. Now give me those coupons.
I’ve sent the pay to your PDA. And here’s a little bonus on top — a pass to Malachite. I'm sure they'll have some work for you.
That’s my partner’s pass. Or it used to be. Anyway, thanks again for everything.
I don’t need another tall tale. Pay me extra for the risk, and we’ll go our separate ways.
I’ve sent the pay to your PDA. And here’s a little bonus on top — a pass to Malachite. I'm sure they'll have some work for you.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Dialog_MeetMangust_1_655: How about putting in a little work for the sake of science, stalker? The pay’s good, and the job’s a breeze. Even a kid could handle it.
I’ve set up two measuring devices on this silo. The catch is, they need to be activated simultaneously, and, well, as you can see, I’m flying solo here. Mind giving me a hand?
sid_phrase_SQ92_Dialog_MeetMangust_2_655: Had a change of heart, did you? Will you help me activate those measuring devices now?
sid_phrase_SQ92_Dialog_MeetMangust_IAmIn: Okay, let’s get this done. Which way?
Sending the coordinates to your PDA. Get over there and turn the device on. I’ll pick up the signal and activate the other one on my end. Be careful out there.
sid_phrase_SQ92_Dialog_MeetMangust_What_: Wait a sec. Can you fill me in on the nature of these gadgets?
They’re anomalous activity meters, courtesy of the brainiacs at Malachite.
I’ll admit it, I'm a little on the dense side. I just skimmed the instructions and figured out it’s a two-man job.
And I haven’t had a partner in a while… but let’s not go off on a tangent. Are you on board or not?
sid_phrase_SQ92_Dialog_MeetMangust_iLeav: Can’t help you. I have to go.
Well, suit yourself. But let’s keep this meeting on the Q. T... just in case.
sid_phrase_SQ92_arik_mangust_0_InfoTopic: Here’s a fresh joke for you: ever wondered why the Ward and Duty can’t do anything right? They lost the Spark!
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_EQ156Completed_EQ: These samples came at a heavy cost… regardless, I appreciate your assistance.
That’s awful… why did he have to be a hero? He had his whole life ahead of him, but he had to die in such a senseless way…
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_EQ156Completed_Mo: Blizzard was on the verge of being mauled by a Bloodsucker, so I had to step in. The stalker’s alive and well. I believe he’ll be in touch soon.
Blizzard is dead. He had this suitcase with him.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_EQ26Completed_EQ2: But if the data has been recovered, at least Lefty’s sacrifice wasn’t in vain. Thank you for bringing it here.
I warned them... I told them that Lefty and his men required assistance! But all I got was, “Calm down, they can handle it, just focus on your duties.”
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_EQ26Completed_Lev: Lefty and his group turned into zombies, so I had to put them down. Here’s your psi-radiation measurements.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_EQ26Completed_NoT: Well, I don’t have any other work for you…
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_FirstMeet_LevsaUS: I stumbled upon these psi-radiation measurements at Yantar. I found your team, but they’d turned into zombies. I had to put them down.
I pleaded with them, begged to get them out. But the professor and his “friend” were always preoccupied. They brushed me off, claimed I was overreacting.
But if the data has been recovered, that means Lefty’s sacrifice wasn’t in vain. Thank you for bringing it here.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_FirstMeet_SkifAsk: It’s unusual to find a scientist behind a counter rather than in a lab.
What’s so unusual about it? I've got a degree in math. That’s why Professor Ozersky assigned me to this post.
