sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_AboutLe: If you find them, but they’re already beyond help… try to retrieve the psi-radiation data. It’s of the utmost importance.
The Yantar area. We had an urgent need to measure the psi-radiation there so we could try to understand it.
Some individuals such as Professor Ozersky believe that Lefty’s group can handle it on their own. But what if they can’t? Especially given that I’m the one who sent them to take those measurements...
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_AboutMo: I believe he ventured to the outskirts of the Industrial Zone. It’s a swampy area, a favored habitat for Bloodsuckers.
I warned him not to go alone, but he was always a bit stubborn.
Do you know where I can find Blizzard?
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_Details: Maybe I can help, but I need to know more.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_Dorozhn: That’s a shame… All right. Take care of yourself.
For instance, nobody seems to care that neither Blizzard nor Lefty ever came back from their expeditions. By the way… do you think you could assist me with… helping them?
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_EQ156Do: That’s fantastic news! I hope he makes it to Malachite safely.
The samples he was after will aid us in developing new anticoagulants. Thank you for your valuable contribution to science.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_MorozAl: I crossed paths with Blizzard on the outskirts of the Industrial Zone.
He was on the verge of being mauled by a Bloodsucker, so I had to step in. The stalker’s alive and well. I believe he’ll be in touch soon.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_NoTime_: I’ve got my hands full already. I’ll come back later.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_NotNowD: I see. When you’re in the mood to make some money, I’ll be here.
I see. If you change your mind, I’ll be here.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_NotNow_: Sorry, I can’t help you right now.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_Okay_67: Excellent. I’ve forwarded the coordinates to your PDA. I’ll be waiting for the good news. Or… well, any news at all.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_OneTask: Everyone around here might see me as a soulless bureaucrat, but I genuinely care about missing people.
A stalker called Lefty and his group went to take psi-radiation measurements. Shortly afterward, he sent word they were in trouble — and then they went dark.

A stalker called Blizzard went to collect bones from Bloodsucker victims, and we haven’t heard from him since. I’m worried. I need you to find him — with the samples he set out to retrieve, if possible.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_OnlyAbo: The Yantar area... some individuals believe that his group can handle it on their own. But what if they can’t? Especially given that I’m the one who sent them to take those measurements...
Do you know where I can find Blizzard?
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_QuestIn: You’re not in too much of a rush, I hope? I have another errand for you.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_TraderI: STC Malachite is like a tumultuous ocean of scientific chaos. But I'm still trying to make a stand against it, even from here.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestPack_TwoTask: Some might see me as a soulless bureaucrat, but I genuinely care about missing people. Even if they went missing "for the sake of science".
First, there’s Blizzard. He's a stalker who’s been part of our team for a long time. He went to collect bone samples from Bloodsucker victims, and we haven’t heard from him since. I’m concerned.
Second, Lefty and his group went to take psi-radiation measurements. Shortly afterward, he sent word they were in trouble — and then they went dark.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestTrachuk_ImIn: All right. I’ll get to the bottom of this.
I don’t know what kind of trouble Trachuk is in, but it sounds pretty serious. Be careful out there.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestTrachuk_NoTi: Can’t help you, sorry. I don’t have time for this.
That’s a shame. But if you have a change of heart, stop by the Vehicle Station. Trachuk is a good colleague of mine, and your assistance would be greatly appreciated.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_QuestTrachuk_Trac: Victoria, come in! Can you hear me? The data from the field lab at the Vehicle Station… ever since the Emission, there are anomalies all over the place! I need help!
Skif, please hold on. I know you’ve already done a great deal, but Trachuk wouldn’t bother me without good reason. I’m deeply concerned about him.
Something must have gone awry during his research. I’m not entirely sure what Trachuk was working on, but he once hinted that it could revolutionize life in the Zone. Help him, please.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_SkifReturn_Return: About that task of yours. You still need my assistance?
About Lefty. You still need my help locating him?
About Blizzard. You still need my help locating him?
About that scientist at the vehicle station. Does he still need my help?
Yes, the job is still available, stalker. Could you investigate what happened to him?
About Blizzard and Lefty. You still need my help locating them?
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_TrachukDone_Trach: Trachuck’s dead. Here’s his flash drive.
That’s heartbreaking news. Trachuk was one of the few people who came close to comprehending the Zone.
If he was willing to lay down his life for this data, it must be truly valuable. Thank you for preserving his work.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_TrachukDone_USBDo: I helped Trachuk with his problem. After the Emission, the Vehicle Station was hit by anomalies, and he left a flash drive with measurements there on his way out. I had to retrieve it.
Yes, Trachuk’s already contacted me. That situation with the Ward was rather… unpleasant.
If he isn’t overstating the significance of his data, you’ve helped even more than you realize. Thank you.
It was a pleasure working with you. It's always nice to meet a professional.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_TrachukDone_USBTa: Trachuk needed to get his flash drive from the Vehicle Station after it got hit by anomalies. The moment I retrieved the data, the Ward arrived. I had to deal with them.
Yes, Trachuk’s already contacted me. It was awful... the poor fellow could barely speak. He was terrified.
I appreciate you holding onto the flash drive. I’ll make sure it gets to the right hands.
sid_phrase_SQ93_Dialog_TrachukDone_USBVa: Trachuk needed to get his flash drive from the Vehicle Station after it got hit by anomalies. The moment I found the data, the Ward arrived. I had to hand it over to them, along with Trachuk himself.
What?! How could you? He was our employee, and the research was ours. This data belongs to Malachite!
You've made a grave mistake, stalker.
sid_phrase_SQ94_Loudspeaker_Boroda_1_809: Guys, it’s no rumor about Honta. He’s back. If you wanna learn how to hunt and make some money, look for an isolated hut north of Sultansk.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QC_Gonta_ChimeraKilled_C: Damn thing's dead! To the tunnel!
sid_phrase_SQ94_QC_Gonta_ComeBackTomorro: Stop by tomorrow. We'll talk then.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QC_Gonta_EmissionCombat_: Everyone to the shelter! Keep shooting!
sid_phrase_SQ94_QC_Gonta_Invite_Invite_8: Loners, Honta here. If anyone wants to take up hunting, I'll share everything I know. I'm at the hut north of the Sultansk. Feel free to stop by.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QC_Gonta_KeepDistance_Ke: Don't get too close – it'll smell you.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QC_Gonta_SlowSkif_SlowSk: Skif, get to the location. We can't wait long.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QC_Gonta_WallGun_GunOnWa: It's an old piece. Take it if you need it.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QC_Zuza_FirstComplain_Fi: Honta hunted a chimera when he was my age! And he won't let me do anything other than hunt fleshes. What's his deal?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QC_Zuza_ThirdComplain_Th: We got nothing to talk about.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QC_Zuza_ThirdHappy_Third: I got this idea... Don't go too far away. I'll mull it over and get in touch with you!
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_GontaZuza_FirstArgue_: You shittin' me! I gotta hunt fleshes, again?! Give me something serious!
I will – when you waste less than two mags on a single one. Go get ready, and quit fussing.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_GontaZuza_SnorkArgue_: Why'd you go up against that bastard? And then drag it all the way here?
There! Fresh bullet holes, and those bullets were mine. Now do you see I'm good for more than shooting fleshes?
I can see all right! See you fucking limping! You pull another stunt like this and you can find yourself another teacher, got it?!
Go cut the vertebra out and toss the corpse away. And get a proper bandage for that leg! Idiot…
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_AfterChimeraHun: I still got lessons and orders. But I can't do any of that right now, you know. Zhuzha needs a proper funeral. Stop by tomorrow.
He dragged himself into this. Never thought what it'd turn into for you and those saving him. Not your fault.
I get it. All of it. Still doesn't make me feel any better.
Damn this hunting school. Losing guys this way... it was never supposed to happen.
I just wanted to help. Thought I could show them the ropes, save these hotheads from throwing their lives away. And this is what I get for it.
Okay, Skif. Thanks for helping out, you saved my ass. Here… take this. For your help.
Others need your advice. Don't leave them with no help because of what happened here.
I won't. And I'll make damned sure shit like this never happens again.
Why the hell did Zhuzha do this? To prove a point? Was it worth it?!
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ApproachTrain_C: Chimera's at the lair… Zhuhza… can't see him.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_AskWhereZuza_ID: I don't have a clue where he is.
Okay. I'll leave the hut for a while and go look for him. Over and out.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_AskWhereZuza_In: Skif, this is Honta. Do you know where Zhuzha is? We had a fight, and he left real pissed off. I hope he's not going to do something stupid.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_AskWhereZuza_Kn: He just called me. Invited me to the north tunnel.
Damn it, that's the chimera's lair! Skif, get there quickly! We'll meet by the wagons.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_CallHelp_Call_8: Skif, this is Honta. I need you, now! Zhuzha's at it again. The goof went after a chimera. Alone!
I'm putting together a team. Bring lots of ammo and head to the north tunnel. Meet you by the wagons.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ChimeraPlan_Chi: Roger. The chimera's having a snack. While all it can smell is blood, this is our chance to get close and take positions.
Also, there are fuel barrels near the lair. Looks like Zhuzha dragged them in. We'll shoot at them, too. And last but not least…
Hunting a chimera means you'll either be a legend or six feet under. So if it all goes south, it's every man for himself.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ChimeraPlan_Int: Thanks for coming. Here's what's up – Zhuzha was spotted at the tunnel. There was gunfire, explosions, and he's not been on comms since.
I gathered some folks. The mission is to kill the chimera and search the lair. If Yaryk is— No, I can't even think about that right now.
I need someone experienced for round-the-cover fire. One of the wagons has a good spot. Or you can join us attacking head-on. Which do you prefer?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ChimeraPlan_Let: That's it. Let's roll once the Emission is over.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ChimeraZuzaDead: Take a look at his PDA. You'll see why he was so fearless and didn't care what might have happened to him.
Zhuzha, Zhuzha, why didn't you tell me right away? Maybe I would've treated you differently…
You shouldn't train people without thinking about what's going on deep inside them. Can't treat everyone the same way.
I'll leave you to be on your own.
Wait a minute. I owe you the reward for the burer.
Someone spotted you and Zhuzha near the north tunnel, the chimera's lair. Zhuzha's not answering, and you're here…
I wish the occasion was freaking different. But here… take it. This piece served me for a long time. Now it'll serve you just as well.
I got more to teach you, and more jobs to give you. I'll always pay a good price for mutant parts, too. So don't you forget good old Honta, and make sure to stop by again.
I'll get Zhuzha's body out of the tunnel and keep teaching folks to hunt. What else can I do?
Speaking of, I owe you the reward for the burer.
Yaryk had his reasons to risk it. He left on his own terms.
I think you know what happened. I shouldn't have come with him. Maybe, he wouldn't have gone alone.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstHuntBack_E: Good luck. Remember, don't bite off more than you can chew. If the job's too hard, don't risk it.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstHuntBack_N: I wouldn't mind a tip on how to hunt using an NVD.
I can tell you the basics. If you don't have a stock, you're good. Aim as you normally do. But if you do, you'll need a collimator sight installed.
Or a laser one. But then you'd need to aim following the beam. Techs can work magic with these NVDs.
Without all that, the only option is to just toss the gun up and fire away. But I doubt you'll be able to hit anything.
Okay, just don't rush it. I'm not going anywhere.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstHuntBack_R: Remind me how to hunt blind dogs.
Dogs attack in packs. So stay alert, stay on the move, keep them in your sights and don't let them attack from behind.
If you're a good shot, grab your gun – the damn things are weak. A shotgun will do, but you'd best get them together in one spot to make sure you hit them.
Remind me how to hunt fleshes.
So, those damn fleshes are good jumpers, almost like snorks. If you can't rely on your reflexes, don't get too close and make sure you keep your distance.
You can pierce the skin with whatever, but the flesh itself is pretty fat. Save on ammo by shooting it right in the head.
Good. Here's your reward. Now it's time for the grown-up talk – moving up to snorks. There's a specific spot you need to clear, but there's a catch…
Hell knows why, but those bastards only gather at that spot at night. Clueless loners simply end up trapped over there.
Someone needs to deal with it, but I won't let you go there empty-handed. Here's an NVD. Use it so you can tell a snork from a rock at night.
A night-vision device? I had one back when I served. This will sure come in handy in the Zone.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstHuntBack_S: What about snorks? How do I hunt them?
Those critters are jumpy as hell. You can't let them near you! They'll kick you so hard you won't be able to run away, and if they gather around you, you're toast.
A revolver is a good choice for medium range. But if they got you cornered, you'd better grab your Saiga.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstMeet_ComeB: Wanna go hunting? Once again, the lessons are free. The reward is good. We can start with the basics or move on to the tougher jobs if you know the drill.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstMeet_Exper: It's not my first day in the Zone. Treat me as an advanced student.
It's not my first day in the Zone. Treat me as an advanced student.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstMeet_Hunt_: What can you tell me about blind dogs?
Dogs attack in packs. So stay alert, stay on the move, keep them in your sights and don't let them attack from behind.
If you're a good shot, grab your gun – the damn things are weak. A shotgun will do, but you'd best get them together in one spot to make sure you hit them.
Watch and learn, Zhuzha. No job's too small for this one.
So, those damn fleshes are good jumpers, almost like snorks. If you can't rely on your reflexes, don't get too close and make sure you keep your distance.
You can pierce the skin with whatever, but the flesh itself is pretty fat. Save on ammo by shooting it right in the head.
Got it? Off you go, then. I'll send the info on where to find the mutants and what to cut out to your PDA.
If you find another lair, great. You can hunt wherever you want, just make sure you're gutting the mutants, not the other way around.
Sure thing. I start with small potatoes, fleshes and dogs. Get some trophies and you pass. The reward is coupons, of course.
If you do well, I'll give you bigger game to hunt.
What do you think, stalker? Starting with the basics, or have you shot some fleshes or dogs on your way here? If you have, I'll give you a tougher job.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstMeet_Intro: Tell me – you here to learn hunting or just wanna chat? I started a school here, kinda. Shot down my share of mutants, so time for me to pass on what I know.
I'm not in great shape anymore, though, so I can't join you on your runs. My lessons are theory only, but free. What do you say?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstMeet_Newbi: Start at the beginning, like I'm a total rookie.
I respect this approach. Pick a mutant to start with.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstMeet_NotNo: Not now. Got too much to deal with.
Come by if you change your mind.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstMeet_Start: I know your kind. Met a "teacher" once before. Talked gibberish and ripped off rookies. Are you any different?
You mean Legend? Yeah, I heard about him. A sly dog, for sure. I hope someone teaches him some manners.
Maybe. Give me the details and I'll think about it.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_FirstMeet_WhatP: Free lessons? I'm interested, but why would you do it?
Think about it. Zaton is crawling with both bandits and mutants. It won't hurt to have more experienced loners around. Well, it would only hurt the bandits and mutants.
I can't send anyone after the bandits or they'll destroy my business. Critters are a different story, though. I can train folks to shoot them all they want. No one cares.
Even the thugs would thank me. They're hiring hunters, too, when a mutant becomes too much trouble. So, got any questions? Or can we get on with it?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_GraveTalk_ComeB: I got more orders if you want them. And I'll always pay a good price for mutant parts. Make sure to stop by again when you have a minute.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_GraveTalk_Intro: You came, thank you. I'm saying goodbye to Zhuzha. I found his PDA – he kept a journal. Can you imagine?
Turns out the Mainland doctors gave him less than a year. That's why he came to the Zone, "to party and go out with a bang".
He didn't want pity, just wanted to leave his mark. And I made him hunt fleshes…
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_GraveTalk_Rewar: Here, take this. For a job well done. This piece served me for a long time. Now it'll serve you just as well.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_GraveTalk_StopP: But I didn't invite you here for a philosophical dispute. I've got something for you. Wish the occasion was freaking different…
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_GraveTalk_YouWa: You knew he wasn't ready. And acted right, as his mentor.
No, Skif. You shouldn't train people without thinking about what's going on deep inside them. Can't treat everyone the same way.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_GraveTalk_ZuzaM: In the end, Zhuzha's wish came true. We sure will remember him.
That's right. Still, you shouldn't train people without thinking about what's going on deep inside them. Can't treat everyone the same way.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Bay: Gotta have energy drinks to hunt a bayun – a can in each pocket and spares in your pack. If it puts you to sleep, it'll tear you apart while you're dreaming.
They're tricky and jumpy, so you won't be able to keep your distance for long. Get close and shoot, preferably with an auto shotgun. My personal preference is the Saiga.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Bli: Dogs attack in packs. So stay alert, stay on the move, keep them in your sights and don't let them attack from behind.
If you're a good shot, grab your gun – the damn things are weak. A shotgun will do, but you'd best get them together in one spot to make sure you hit them.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Blo: Play it cool with bloodsuckers. If you huff and puff, it'll creep up on you, invisible. Trust what you hear! If you hear footsteps, shoot, and make a run for it.
I'd recommend an assault rifle against them. A Fora, for example. Or a Kalashnikov with expanding bullets.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Boa: A boar is a walking battering ram, and if you hesitate, it'll knock you down for good. But boars aren't too quick on their feet.
If you see one headed straight at you, jump to the side and shoot it in the ass. A shotgun would be your best option.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Bur: Don't attack the bastard head-on. If it sees you, it can snatch your gun, shoot you with it, and toss it away fuck knows where.
If you hear humming, that's the 'shield' it's got. Shooting's pointless while that's up. Hide, wait a bit, and shoot it in the back on auto. Use dum-dums, if you got any.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Chi: The chimera is the top species. Hears you a mile away. Runs like a damn cheetah. Tough enough to survive a couple of tank rounds.
So, unless you carry a Gauss around with you, use a Dnipro and a shitload of expanding ammo. Or a Saiga with an extra large magazine.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Con: I'll tell you this – nothing works better than a sniper rifle with expanding ammo against a controller.
Whatever you do, don't let it see you. If your ears start buzzing, hide immediately. Otherwise, it'll leave you wandering around the Zone, drooling all over yourself.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Dee: Screams so damned loud the whole forest can hear. But don't get distracted. Kill the deer quickly and quietly or his 'pals' will pay you a visit.
Keep your distance, and use a good old Super against it. Just don't aim where its body's covered in bark as you aren't likely to get a shot through it.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Eas: I want to know about regular beasts.
Regular. Right, that'll be rodents, fleshes, blind dogs and boars. That's pretty much all. Pick one to start with.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Fle: So, those damn fleshes are good jumpers, almost like snorks. If you can't rely on your reflexes, don't get too close and make sure you keep your distance.
You can pierce the skin with whatever, but the flesh itself is pretty fat. Save on ammo by shooting it right in the head.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Har: I need some tips on the most dangerous mutants.
The most dangerous would be burers, chimeras, poltergeists, and pseudogiants. That's about all the surprises the Zone's got for us.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Hum: I'd like to know how to hunt the… humanoid ones.
Hm, I can give you some tips on a bloodsucker, controller, and snork. Others are, well, less humanlike. At least the ones I've had to deal with.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Int: Tell me how to hunt mutants.
Always welcome. What kind of mutants?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Med: I wanna hunt a more dangerous beast.
As for the dangerous ones, I'd hunt a bayun, hornhead, or a pseudodog. For now.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Pol: If it looks like a weird anomaly is throwing teapots at you, you got yourself a poltergeist. The faster you move, the better it's able to see you.
Here's what you should do: sprint, get down, sneak. While it's attacking the spot where it last heard you, gun it down fast with a Kharod or Dnipro.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Pse: Can't stand the damn things. Just too many of them, like rabbits. You gotta waste ammo before you find the real one, so better to shoot the phantoms with a pistol.
Once you see the main dog, load the Lavina with some expanding ammo and don't let the bastard out of your sight or you'll have to start all over again.
This fatty could swallow a full case of machine gun ammo, just like that. If you're up against it, you better have expanding or armor-piercing ammo. Or an RPG.
If you come across one, look for something to blow up near it. But my advice is to get on the freaking move. Don't go up against these big bastards unprepared.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Sno: Those critters are jumpy as hell. You can't let them near you! They'll kick you so hard you won't be able to run away, and if they gather around you, you're toast.
A revolver is a good choice for medium range. But if they got you cornered, you'd better grab your Saiga.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_HuntLessons_Tus: A slingshot can kill those little fuckers. But there's often too many of them, running around in packs, and they're fast.
So don't waste expensive ammo on them. Shoot with whatever's cheap – and do it quickly, or they'll chew you up.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ItWasRisky_Come: I got more to teach you, and more jobs to give you. I'll always pay a good price for mutant parts, too. So don't you forget good old Honta, and make sure to stop by again.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ItWasRisky_Gont: You youngsters! The thought of both you staying there for good… Just don't think you survived because you're pros. You might not be so lucky next time.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ItWasRisky_Intr: Well, Skif. A little birdie told me all about the north tunnel. I asked you to set Zhuzha straight, and he ended up wrapping you around his finger.
Do you have any idea how risky that was for you two? What were you thinking? It was a chimera, for crying out loud!
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ItWasRisky_Rewa: Okay. I know it wasn't just the chimera. You finished a burer off, too. For that… here, take it. This piece served me for a long time. Now it'll serve you just as well.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ItWasRisky_Risk: Zhuzha had his reasons to risk it, and it wasn't for nothing. If Yaryk feels like explaining why, he will.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ItWasRisky_Zuza: Zhuzha had been watching it. Knew when it slept and when it hunted. He dragged some barrels to the lair.
It wasn't the most reliable plan, but it wasn't the stupidest one, either. He pulled it off with my help.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_AnyJob_8: Got some kind of special order for me?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Bayun_80: If you go after a bayun, don't forget to stock up on energy drinks.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_BlindDog: Need some noses cut off those blind mutts. Can you do that?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Bloodsuc: Lots of those damn bloodsuckers around lately. It's a good thing there's a demand for their tentacles.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Boar_807: Be careful with those boar fangs. Sharp as hell.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Burer_80: Hope you remember my burer tips. If you need a refresher, feel free to ask.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Chimera_: Yeah, this is no easy job. But it pays well.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Controle: When hunting controller brains, the most important thing is to keep yours in one piece.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Decline_: I won't be able to do it.
No biggie. I'll give the job to one of my guys.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Deer_807: Not an easy job. If you need some tips on how to hunt a hornhead, I'm willing to share.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_DoneSeco: You kept your word. Good. Job's done.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_DoneThir: Here are all the mutant parts.
All intact. Great. A job well done has to be well rewarded.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Done_808: If we had more people like you, there'd be a lot less critters in the Zone.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Flesh_80: An easy-peasy job for you. Just cut the eyes out carefully so they don't get damaged.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_JobList_: I do, actually. These critters have been in demand lately.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_MaybeLat: No problem. If someone else takes the job, no hard feelings.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_NoJob_80: Not right now, but stop by from time to time. New orders come in pretty often.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_NotYetSe: Working on it. Need a bit more time.
There's no rush when it comes to hunting.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_NotYetTh: Not yet. I'm working on it.
I'm sure you can do it.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_NotYet_8: Haven't got everything yet. I'll be back later.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Polterge: No clue what a "poltergeist organ" is supposed to be. Scientists just call it an "organ", so I bet they can't even figure it out themselves.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Pseudodo: Haven't seen this mutant in a while. But their skins cost a pretty coupon, so it's worth hunting one down.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Pseudogi: Hope you got a good knife. Cutting the legs off those bastards is a pain in the ass.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Snork_80: No doubt you've hunted snorks before. You know the drill.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Orders_Tushkan_: Why the hell would scientists need the paws of these rats on steroids? I don't really care. As long as they pay.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_SecondHuntBack_: How do I hunt a burer?
Don't attack the bastard head-on. If it sees you, it can snatch your gun, shoot you with it, and toss it away fuck knows where.
If you hear humming, that's the 'shield' it's got. Shooting's pointless while that's up. Hide, wait a bit, and shoot it in the back on auto. Use dum-dums, if you got any.
Wait. Could you talk to Zhuzha, maybe? He keeps asking for a real challenge, but he's… Well, he's a goof.
He just won't listen to me. But maybe you could talk some sense into him. Do me a favor, will you?
I killed the snorks at that spot.
I see. You're seasoned enough to train rookies yourself. On to the next lesson – you'll go up against a burer.
One's lurking somewhere on the region border, in the tunnels, and it needs killing. No one can lure the damn thing out.
My NVD might come in handy. You still got it, right? If you need a refresher on how to use it, feel free to ask.
You're alive. Good. How's the job going?
Okay. Just don't rush it. I'm not going anywhere.
Remind me how to hunt snorks.
Those critters are jumpy as hell. You can't let them near you! They'll kick you so hard you won't be able to run away, and if they gather around you, you're toast.
A revolver is a good choice for medium range. But if they got you cornered, you'd better grab your Saiga.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ThirdHuntBack_A: Okay. Thanks, Skif. I'll see what I can do about him.
I talked to Zhuzha. He wants fame, and fast. He's a grown man, if he wants to take the risk, let him.
I won't get into this. You know how many hotheads I've met? How many never came back from a job I gave them? I've had enough.
I talked to Zhuzha. He wants fame, and the sooner, the better. He won't listen to me, either.
Those youngsters… Got any idea how many I've met? Hotheads, looking for a fight, then never coming back from a job. I've had enough.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ThirdHuntBack_I: You're alive. Good. What about the job?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ThirdHuntBack_N: Okay. Just don't rush it. I'm not going anywhere.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ThirdHuntBack_R: Remind me how to hunt a burer.
Don't attack the bastard head-on. If it sees you, it can snatch your gun, shoot you with it, and toss it away fuck knows where.
If you hear humming, that's the 'shield' it's got. Shooting's pointless while that's up. Hide, wait a bit, and shoot it in the back on auto. Use dum-dums, if you got any.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_ZuzaTrophy_Zuza: I left the hut for a bit and came back to find this beauty. And a note from Zhuzha on the table... I wish he'd told me right away.
You shouldn't train people without thinking about what's going on deep inside them. Can't treat everyone the same way. Life taught me that, at least.
I'm in a brooding mood today. How are you, Skif? Ready to take on a job, or just wanted to ask something?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Gonta_Zveroboy_Zverob: I ran into another hunter. Goes by Trapper. We took down a hornhead.
Trapper? Who would've guessed! Skif, you got the chance to hunt with a true legend! And hunting a hornhead, too?! I wish I was there.
I used to run some errands for him way back. Legendary guy, taught me a lot. I'm glad he's alive. Means the Zone doesn't take all the good ones before their time.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_AboutGonta_AreYo: None of my business, but what's the deal with you and Honta?
The deal is that Honta thinks he's my freaking mother, not my teacher. "Oh, Zhuzha, you're limping, oh, go hunt some more fleshes". He's a nag and a buzzkill!
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_AboutGonta_Flesh: How long do I have to sit around, huh? There's only two ways to be remembered as a stalker –the way you live, and the way you die.
How can I leave my mark when Honta's like this with me? "The Great Flesh Slayer" is all I am! Pfft…
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_AboutGonta_Intro: Heard that Honta sent you after a burer. Wow, damn it…
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_AboutGonta_Trust: Honta's keeping you alive, and for free. Just listen to him. You'll get your time to shine.
Oh, now I see. We got a teacher's pet – who's another buzzkill! I don't need someone else lecturing me. Get outta here… hunter.
It's not like Honta put you on a leash. If you want more, and you're sure you can do it, go do it.
You're right! I will! Thanks for your support, man.
I owe you one. Don't know yet what exactly, but I'll let you know once I figure something out!
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_AboutGonta_WTFsn: Why did you drag a snork here?
So Honta finally gets it! That I'm no rookie anymore and I can look out for myself. If I needed mothering, I'd have stayed on the Mainland!
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_CallHunt_CallHun: Skif, come in! Remember when I said I owe you one? All done! Get to the north tunnel.
You'll see when you get here!
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraPlan_Craz: Do you have a death wish with these ideas of yours?
Nope, the opposite! This is living life! Going on a real mission, blood boiling in my veins.
You were the one who said, "If you want more, you gotta act like it". And I'm about to. The only question is, are you with me?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraPlan_Intr: Finally! And here I was, getting ready to swim in all this glory on my own. Here's the thing – we got a chimera in the tunnel. Don't sweat it! It's chewing on something and doesn't care about us.
While it was hunting, I did some prep – dragged some fuel barrels to the entrance. Lure the critter out, shoot the barrels, boom! It's toast!
You can take the ear, if there's anything left. Just don't forget to tell everyone who helped you take the chimera down and came up with the whole plan. What do you say?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraPlan_NoGo: So, you choose a quiet life. Okay. Bye, Skif.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraPlan_Shit: Your plan is bullshit, but I won't leave you alone with a chimera.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraPlan_Skif: I can't believe I'm saying this, but I'm with you.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraPlan_Zuza: I knew you wouldn't leave me hanging! Listen... If the bastard gets us, don't worry about me. Just get outta here in one piece.
And tell Honta that I might be a goof all right, but this is my decision. I chose this! 'Cause I know him. He'd go on about how he couldn't save me.
Back to the point. Let's take cover. Weapons ready.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraSuccess_D: And… don't mention this to Honta. My health thing, I mean. I'll do it in my own time.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraSuccess_F: After a couple of months in the Zone, you'll see more wonders than the Mainland could ever offer. You just gotta look. Maybe you'll find something for yourself out there.
Yeah! I was fixated on playing the hero when I could maybe get better instead. Or at least try. Thank you, Skif.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraSuccess_H: The Zone has enough critters – and I don't just mean mutants. Help others, and you'll be remembered as more than just a hothead or a daredevil.
True. No more talking folks into hunting chimeras, then. All right, enough sob stories. Thank you. For everything.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraSuccess_I: Gotta say, Skif… you're a real psycho coming out here with me.
I'm okay. Just realized what I signed you up for.
Doctors on the Mainland gave me six months. A year tops. I didn't want all that moping back home, so I bolted to the Zone. To party, go out with a bang…
I didn't tell anyone so they wouldn't feel sorry for me. Just wanted to show off. Leave a mark. I talked you into risking it all, too, and now… I'm not sure what's next.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraSuccess_R: Take this. A little compensation for almost dying here with me.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraSuccess_S: I'm not one to give advice, but one thing's for sure – I'll definitely remember you.
Well, there's that! Drink one to good old Yaryk the daredevil. What a touching moment… No hugging, though!
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraSuccess_T: I thought you'd cut the chimera's head off right away and claim your bragging rights. What's the matter?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_ChimeraSuccess_W: We killed the chimera. Just like you wanted. What's up?
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_OnTheGoSuccess_O: Ran off without saying goodbye! What a busy guy! Okay, thanks for everything. Just wanted you to know…
I don't have much time left, apparently. And thanks to you, I managed to do at least this one cool thing in my freaking life.
Just don't tell Honta. I want to tell him myself. And don't get too proud – it was my plan, after all! Okay, don't be a stranger.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_StayAfterSucces_: You should head off. I'd like to stay here for a while and admire the view.
sid_phrase_SQ94_QD_Zuza_YesWeDidIt_YesWe: Did you see that?! Damn... We really got it!
sid_phrase_SQ94_arik_zuza_0_InfoTopic_1_: Have you seen an Emission yet? I was at Honta's when I saw my first one. Stood there watching the beauty of it as long as I could… Maybe that's why he thinks I'll up and die the moment I leave the hut
sid_phrase_SQ94_arik_zuza_0_InfoTopic_2_: The Zone's got itself a flesh expert. You're looking at him. There's no place I haven't hunted them. Fields, forests, swamps, damn it… I could write a book about it. "Hunting 1001 Fleshes".
sid_phrase_SQ94_arik_zuza_0_InfoTopic_3_: I do some runs for the scientists every now and then. Fascinating stuff and some real cool shit! I ask them about artifacts, too. Who knows, maybe there's a healing one out there…
sid_phrase_SQ94_arik_zuza_0_InfoTopic_4_: Dragged two nitwits out of the swamp – stumbled upon a bloodsucker. I killed it, and went on, all nerdy, Honta-style, "Play it cool with bloodsuckers". He did teach me something!
sid_phrase_SQ94_gonta_0_HelloTopic_2_1_8: Hi there! How's your hunt going?
sid_phrase_SQ94_gonta_0_InfoTopic_1_1_81: The Zone is changing. Its critters sure are. They're getting bigger, smarter, faster – this is pure evolution. Us trying to wipe them out, them trying to do the same to us.
sid_phrase_SQ94_gonta_0_InfoTopic_2_1_81: Sometimes I hear my students telling stories about Zhuzha by the fire. How he saved someone from a bloodsucker and went on expeditions with scientists. Hope he finds what he needs. Hope he's got time.
sid_phrase_SQ94_gonta_0_InfoTopic_3_1_81: I'm interviewing my trainees now, can you believe it? Gotta pour them one to get them chatty. Then I ask them about this and that, why they came to the Zone. Won't repeat my mistake with Zhuzha.
sid_phrase_SSP_Radio_1_1_60503: Unauthorized Perimeter crossing is illegal! Trespassers will be shot on sight!
sid_phrase_SSP_Radio_2_1_60504: Stalker! Don’t take your chances! Illegal entry into the Zone is a criminal offense.
sid_phrase_SSP_Radio_3_1_60505: If you are caught inside the Perimeter, do not resist arrest. Patrols are authorized to shoot to kill.
sid_phrase_SSP_Radio_4_1_60506: Security can and will use all means available in case of any attempt to enter the restricted area!
sid_phrase_SSP_Radio_5_1_60507: Attention! You are approaching the protected Perimeter of the Ecological Disaster Zone! Crossing the Perimeter is strictly forbidden!
sid_phrase_SSP_Radio_6_1_60508: Entering the Exclusion Zone is a criminal offence. Stalker, don't fall for easy money, don't risk your life and freedom!
sid_phrase_SSP_Radio_7_1_60509: Crossing the Perimeter without ISPF management authorization is illegal. Trespassers will be punished to the full extent of the law!
sid_phrase_SSP_Radio_8_1_60510: You were lucky to come back from the Zone today. Will luck be on your side tomorrow? Stalker, don't risk your life, don't cross the Perimeter!
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Audiolog_1_1_: Get a medkit ready, Beard. Some thugs jumped us. Filya got shot.
Fuck! The Sultan’s gonna pay for this!
I just need to get some more guns, and more guys.
Damn, this couldn’t have come at a worse time…
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Barman_Meet2_: You here for some gossip too? Seems like the whole bar’s buzzing about Beard.
Dunno what his beef with Sultan is. I reckon that bandit wants our ship too. But Beard won't let him have it, that's for sure!
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_BorodaDegot_1: It sure feels nice here now. Like home. Where’s Beard been at all this time?
I heard he’s been hanging out with Degtyarev in Prypiat. They go way back, ever since Deggy first came to the Zone.
Whoa. So why’d he come back?
No clue. Maybe he just missed the Swamps!
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Infotopic_Bar: Have you been to Rostok yet? From the outside, it looks like a funfair full of amazing stuff. But once you take a closer look…
You know what's the cheapest thing in the Zone? A Stalker’s life. One wrong step, and they’ll eat you for breakfast.
It’s the most terrifying place in the entire Zone. No old lab will ever fuck you up like Rostok does.
I know it might be kinda early, but I made a shopping list for our little celebration. When Beard comes back, we’ll throw a party!
Maybe we’ll even do it on the Skadovsk…
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Infotopic_Bor: The Zone sees right through you. While you’re running around shooting mutants and scavenging for artifacts, it peels the fake stuff off, bit by bit.
And then it hands you a mirror to show who you really are.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Radio_1_1_588: If you're thinking about any deals with bandits, think twice. Then spit in their faces and think again.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Radio_2_1_588: This ship isn’t gang turf. She belongs to decent Stalkers.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Radio_3_1_588: Don’t bring any bodies to the Shevchenko. We don't have a medic here. No gravedigger either.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Radio_4_1_588: Make sure you don't piss off the Ward. We don't want no trouble.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Radio_5_1_588: This is the safest place in the Swamps. Keep it cool, and make yourself at home.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Radio_6_1_588: This… gang turf… belongs… dead Stalkers.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Radio_7_1_588: …bring… bodies… to the Shevchenko… have… medic… grave…
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_WorkForKalina: No more freebies for you, bud.
Relax, I got it covered. Got a gig that paid real good.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Zombied_1_587: You heard what’s going on over at Icarus?
What? Some guys saw those swamp lights at the Ranger Station again. That place is haunted, I’m telling you. What's up with Icarus?
Who gives a damn about your stupid swamp lights?
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Zombied_2_587: The whole Ward camp's gone zombie! Got what they deserved!
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Zombied_3_587: Their whole base cleared out. Prolly headed for SIRCAA.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_Zombied_4_587: I’ve been thinking... in a few days, we could swing by and see if they left any goodies behind. You in?
I dunno. Doesn’t feel right, and I trust my gut.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_aleks_lesnik_: You got some business here, or…?
If it were up to me, I wouldn’t change a thing. We’ve got the Shevchenko, and that suits me just fine.
I’d rather send Croaker to the Sultansk. Teach those bandits a lesson!
A little while ago, I decided I was done. That’s it, I’m leaving the Zone. And as soon as I made up my mind, the anomalies started raining artifacts.
The Zone just won’t let me go…
Word is, Beard and the Sultan are making some kinda deal. I just hope they ain’t carving up the Shevchenko, ’cuz there ain’t no other ships around.
All Beard used to ramble about was how we shouldn't get mixed up with bandits. And now look at him…
Black helos keep landing at SIRCAA every night. Security, dogs... I think they’re hauling in the survivors from the Chemical Plant or the Observatory, as, like, guinea pigs…
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_boroda_0_ByeT: One less problem to deal with.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_boroda_0_Hell: We don’t like rats on our ship.
Hey, good to see you! Come on in!
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_boroda_0_HubI: As you can see, she’s a bit of a wreck. But a ship doesn’t have to be pretty; she just needs to stay afloat.
Here on the Shevchenko, you can buy supplies, take a breather, and wait out an Emission.
The Skadovsk is a lot comfier, but as long as bandits call her the Sultansk and claim her as their own, I wouldn’t go there. Just wait for her to come home to port.
What can you tell me about the Shevchenko?
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_boroda_0_Info: This one time, Noontiders barged onto the Shevchenko. One was hurt. No one helped. So I patched him up, fed him… And now they’re all out there, murdering whatever they see.
I don’t know what to think. When they did have a choice, they chose to be civil… Which is pretty rare.
Have you heard about SIRCAA and the Monolith? Bet you have. We still get drifters come here asking why Wild Island is deserted.
Don’t know what rock they’ve been living under. But just in case, I’m warning everyone – times are tough. Get whatever you might need before you need it.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_boroda_0_Meet: I’m Beard. I’ve been the captain of this rust bucket for a year now.
I used to be in charge of the Skadovsk. That’s what we used to call her back in the day. Been seven years, but I remember it like it was yesterday.
I can fill you in on the rest of the story later, or the guys are gonna get weird about it. We all lost the Skadovsk, but not everyone wants to bring it up.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_boroda_0_NPC_: That’s it, the Emission's over. If you're done sitting around, feel free to go.
Stalkers, there's an Emission underway! Everyone, stay inside.
Attention, Stalkers! There’s an Emission coming. Those outside the Shevchenko, find shelter if you wanna live.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_boroda_0_Rest: I got into a little fight with some Stalkers. How about we settle this peacefully?
So you wanna be a bandit now, eh, Skif? You think that’s a wise choice? 'Cuz they don't last long here in Zaton.
Here’s the deal: I’ll tell my boys not to put a bullet through your skull, just this once.
But you’ll have to return the favor. A good reputation in the Zone comes at a price, you know.
Fair enough. Here’s something to help clear my name.
Don’t expect a warm welcome from my men, but they won't go in guns blazing either.
I can take care of myself. If your men start shooting, I’ll shoot back.
Are you threatening me? There's quite a few of us here, we ain't scared.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_boroda_0_Trad: I’d rather not waste any of this stuff on someone like you.
Only the finest for you. I give you my word.
My selection is almost as good as what you’d find on the Mainland. I've got everything you need.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_closing_1_633: Some lunatic outside thinks he’s a one-man army. Until he cools off, no one's getting in or out of the Shevchenko.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_fila_patlatyj: What do you want? I’m busy!
I don't get loners hanging out on the Sultansk. If it was up to me, I wouldn’t let 'em on board.
I met Strelok once. One hell of a creepy guy. He's got this ugly face, and when he looks at you… feels like he’ll kill you right now and walk over your corpse like it’s nothing.
Legend, my ass. If you ever meet that legend, better run and hide. He ain’t human, I tell ya.
Beard’s been taking too long with the Skadovsk. We should’ve taken the Sultan out right away, not just sat there on our asses!
Looks like the rats have jumped ship, huh? Me, I ain’t budging. I’ll hang around and wait for Beard.
I’m so drowsy. Maybe it’s the rustling reeds. Got work to do, but I'm just so beat…
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_misa_koraga_0: I’ve got things to do too.
That guy from the Cordon wouldn't stop talkin' about those swamp lights by the Ranger Station. Then he just vanished into thin air. I guess the dead finally summoned him.
If you run into a Ward patrol, just slip into the bushes and lay low. Better to get muddy in the grass than get dissected at SIRCAA.
The guys who went with Beard ain't answering. Something's off.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_misa_koraga_W: Why didn’t they invite me to the show? Like I can’t handle a gun or something.
When you sleep here in the rain, it’s like Zaton’s completely flooded, and you’re just floating, riding the waves all alone… above the swamps, in the dark...
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_opening_1_633: Stand down, the ship is no longer in danger. You’re all free to come and go.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_poplavok_0_By: I'm sure you can find your way out.
I hope you find so much loot, you can barely lug it around.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_poplavok_0_He: Your face is so bloody ugly, no vodka can help fix that.
No "pay you next time", I've got enough of those already.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_poplavok_0_In: Cossack vodka tastes the same as I remember… but where are those who share the memory?
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_poplavok_0_Me: You should’ve seen the Shevchenko before Beard stepped in. I’ve been here before, and it was nothing but a hollowed-out tub.
It’s actually pretty cozy here now. The old man knows how to make a place comfortable, make it feel like home.
He's always grumbling about how this ship is no match for the Skadovsk, but I still like it. I trust the folks here — no one’s gonna stab me in the back just 'cuz they don’t like their drink.
sid_phrase_Shevchenko_Camp_poplavok_0_Tr: You’re in for the best deals. Best quality too.
What can I get you? Or are you just here to chat?
sid_phrase_Snipers_General_IPSF_1_1_6975: The site is under IPSF protection. Trespassers will be shot on sight.
sid_phrase_Snipers_General_IPSF_2_2_6977: Unauthorized entry into IPSF territory will be met with deadly force.
sid_phrase_Snipers_General_Monolith_1_1_: There is an infidel here, brothers. Eliminate him!
sid_phrase_Snipers_General_Monolith_2_2_: Enemy of the Monolith detected. Terminate.
sid_phrase_Snipers_General_Warden_1_1_69: We have a breach. I’ve got eyes on the target.
sid_phrase_Snipers_General_Warden_2_2_69: Visual confirmed. Ready to take the shot.
sid_phrase_Stuf_gulaka_0_Alert_FriendDea: Our guy is down! Search the enemy!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_Audiolog_1_1_631: You think Sidor’s gonna protect your ass, you little prick?
Don’t get your fucking hopes up! He don't even respect decent blokes, and rat asses like you - hates their damn guts.
Soon as he gets a call from the right people, he’ll boot your sorry ass out of the village and paint a target on your back. You’re wasting my time, chump!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_GCA_1_1_63112: I’m telling you, don't borrow from her, but if you get in trouble with loan sharks, Miss Kalyna can make sure to get your arse out.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_GCA_1_1_63114: Is it scarier than kickin' the bucket? She’ll probably have you run a few errands, and then you’ll be square. Those other nutjobs'll just strangle you and call it a day.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_GCA_2_1_63125: Been a while since boss left the Sultansk.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_GCA_2_1_63126: Yeah, last time he left the Sultansk was still the Skadovsk.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_GCA_2_1_63127: Sure hope we won't have to change it back…
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_GCA_3_1_63162: Only took him a year… more like seven.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_GCA_4_1_63203: Them stalkers are swarming the Swamps. Found the way to the Klondike of Artifacts, they say. Maybe we should check it out.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_GCA_4_1_63204: You got a death wish or somethin'? You'll either drown your ass or wind up in an anomaly out there. And I ain’t seen no one haulin' a ton of artifacts back from there neither.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_PropTopic_10_1_6: If you’re itching to use your gun, do it away from the ship. Or make sure to clean up the mess you make.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_PropTopic_11_1_6: Tip for newcomers: I’m in charge of everything around here. Especially if it involves money.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_PropTopic_1_1_63: Welcome to the Sultansk. Make yourself at home, but remember, I’m the boss here.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_PropTopic_2_1_63: Sultansk is the place to buy what you need, sell what you don’t, and have your fun. Anyone but zombies and mutants is welcome!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_PropTopic_3_1_63: If you want a cushy life, come work for me. I'll be more than generous.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_PropTopic_4_1_63: If you wanna fight, take it outside. I won’t hesitate to toss hotheads out, and an Emission is no excuse.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_PropTopic_5_1_63: Loners, take your artifacts to Sonya or Owl. No one else is gonna bother with that crap here.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_PropTopic_7_1_63: This place welcomes loners and bandits alike.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_PropTopic_8_1_63: Drop by for a visit, folks. Here on the Sultansk… or the Skadovsk… whatever, the vodka is still cold as ice, and the gun prices are still cool as ever.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_PropTopic_9_1_63: If you borrow money, remember that debts are meant to be paid. Don’t make me come after you. Because I will.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_Sultan_closing_1: Some chump's been causing trouble out there. Stay put, and batten down the hatches!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_Sultan_opening_1: All right, folks. The chump’s been taken care of. You can come and go as you please.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_Syc_closing_1_63: Another idiot running around showing off his damn gun! Until the show's over, Sultansk is closed.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_Syc_opening_1_63: The Sultansk is safe and sound. You can all take it easy.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_aleks_lesnik_0_I: Finally, I can leave the Skadovsk and chill. Back in the day, whenever loners saw me here, the whole Shevchenko wouldn’t stop gossiping.
You gotta think ahead. I told the stalkers to play nice with the bandits. They’re good for trading, and they’ve got a medic here too.
But they decided to dance to Beard’s tune and give me the cold shoulder instead. And where’s Beard now?
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_boda_varenyj_0_I: Loners ain't always useless, ya know. If you got mutants to handle, just send ’em in.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_boda_varenyj_0_N: Saw my pals packing some serious heat. Looked like Ward guns.
On the bright side, now I don’t have to worry about paying Kalyna back.
You can’t rob the local loners anymore — we're supposed to be, like, neighbors now. How's a guy s'posed to make a living? Life didn’t prepare me for this.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_boda_varenyj_0_R: So what were we chatting about?
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_boroda_0_InfoTop: Got word from the Slag Heap. Those Noontide oddballs swung by just before Nestor vanished. Turned out one of the locals used to be a Monolithian.
Imagine the look on his buddies' faces when they found out. Then him and his brothers took off for Wild Island.
That’s the Zone for you. You never really know who the guy watching your back really is.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_boroda_0_Meet_1_: My men are glad to be back on the Skadovsk, and the bandits don’t mind. No more coups, at least.
Owl's the only one who ain't happy. Hasn’t said a word since I got back, all shy and stuff.
Funny thing is, he’s the one who set me up and switched sides, and now he’s acting like I'm the bad guy. Scared I'm gonna come after him, I guess.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_cervonec_0_ByeTo: Best of luck, best of loot!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_cervonec_0_Hello: Hey there, buddy! The call of the wild tellin' you to hit the road again?
You stalkers just can’t stay outta trouble, can you?
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_cervonec_0_InfoT: I was hanging out at the cemetery, the Old Church, and boom! There's this cross with a name and a photo. So I look closer, and it's my freaking face! I blink, and it ain't there - cross ain't got nothing on it.
I almost said a prayer! Man, I’ll never set foot in that place again, I swear.
You know why I like cards? Even if I lose, dealing cards still beats dealing with Wardens.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_cervonec_0_Meet_: You heard about the new hand we've been dealt? Deck's missing a queen. Turns out she was marked.
Now we got two kings in charge, and I ain’t figured out who's my best bet.
Either way, I don’t give a shit. Kings fall, folks still need a guide, and I'm here to take 'em wherever . Where you headed, by the way?
What a hand we’ve got, eh? One queen beatin' two kings at once!
Trust me, Miss Kalyna's ace! You oughtta stick with her. You don’t want her as an enemy.
And unless you know your way around here like the back of your hand, you oughtta stick with me too. You do know my prices, though?
When I play cards, I can count on luck. If I lose, that’s on me. I can always figure something out.
But the Zone is a whole different story. You won't be gambling with Sultan, you're gambling with your own life. Risking death, not debt.
So don’t worry — once I step outside the Sultansk, I keep my wits about me. I owe too many folks already, don't wanna be in the Zone's debt, too.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_cervonec_0_Trave: Ain't you scared I'll take you down the wrong road? Calm your tits, I don’t give a damn about you. All I care about is your coupons.
You're ace! I'll show you a shortcut and won’t charge you an arm and a leg.
The Zone always deals marked cards, but I’m no slouch at cheating either. The more you pay, the faster we'll get there.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_dantist_0_ByeTop: Can you die already and stop bothering me?
Take care. Try not to catch a cold…or a bullet!
Come back anytime, and don’t forget the cash!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_dantist_0_HealTo: All I got for the pain is brass knuckles.
Quit messing around. You’re healthy as a horse.
Come on, a veterinarian could handle this.
Looks like you're dying… eh, just messing with ya. You’ll be fine.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_dantist_0_HelloT: What do you want? Dying already?
Hats off to the loner guinea pigs.
Whoa, a live stalker! It’s all right. I can fix that.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_dantist_0_InfoTo: Plenty of Stalkers lately, all freaking scratches. And they keep showing up and whining! Did they make a deal with our bosses behind our backs  or something?
Whatever, I’m gonna stay out of it. What’s the fucking point? Dead men ain’t gonna settle my tab. If they wanna play war, they can knock themselves out!
I don’t give two shits who’s gonna get me bandages now — Beard, Kalyna, or the Sultan himself...
As long as I've got plenty of injured stalkers, I'm good.
Hey, we finally got some painkillers. But I’m only giving them to a chosen few. Not everyone deserves 'em, if you ask me!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_dantist_0_Meet_2: Them palace politics don’t matter here: pay up, and I’ll fix you up.
I’ll getcha back on your feet, even if you ain’t got none.
I’ll patch you up all right. Doctor’s Oath is one thing, but a true thief’s word is rock solid.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_dantist_0_Meet_m: I’ve seen my share of shit here: gunshot wounds of every caliber, nasty stab wounds, presents from the Zone…
So you ain't dying on my watch.
If you cough up some coupons for the meds, of course. Free healthcare is a mortal sin, ya dig?
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_dantist_0_TradeT: I'm not a charity. You’re paying the full price.
What's up? I can give ya a discount.
Stop eyeing my pharmacy like it’s a buffet.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_fila_patlatyj_0_: Cheers! Finally, I can enjoy another drink on the Skadovsk. Here’s to Beard!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_kovyraska_0_Busy: I’ve got my own mess to sort out.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_kovyraska_0_ByeT: Feel free to drop by if you need anything. I can pick at your gear, and we'll have a nice chat.
Your gun is your only friend here in the Zone. Keep her in good shape.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_kovyraska_0_Hell: You brought me some scrap again, didn't you?
I'd love to pick at some decent weapons, bro.
Okie-dokie, let's see what you've got.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_kovyraska_0_Info: I heard a story about those beacons in the Swamps. Dunno how they work, but I’d love to pick at 'em. Must be something cool if there's so much goss.
I gotta plant a bug at the bar, or something. Just to make sure I don't miss anything next time.
They’re finally taking me out on runs! Not the bandits, the Stalkers.
I can fix their gear on the spot and scavenge for all kinds of useful scrap. It’s too bad I can’t get out there more often. I’m the only tech in all of Zaton!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_kovyraska_0_Meet: Then the Sultan paid a visit to our top dog. “Welcome aboard, we've got all kinds of gizmos here.” I thought maybe I’d find the vacuum tube. So I made the move.
The ship didn’t have one either, but at least I’m having fun. Folks bring me all sorts of stuff, blows my mind. Too bad they won’t take me along, I’d slow them down.
I missed everything, man! I was so busy tinkering, I didn't even notice everything's gone upside down here!
Now I see why so many folks lined up to pay me a visit - wanted to get their gear fixed and piss off!
Looks like things turned out pretty darn well in the end.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_kovyraska_0_Upgr: You must be all thumbs if your guns keep falling apart like that.
It’ll be good as new, even better.
Need something fixed? Lemme pick at it.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_misa_koraga_0_In: I don’t think we have much to worry about from the bandits next door. Got 'emselves some serious firepower, but a lot of 'em don’t even know how to use it.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sana_galuska_0_B: Back off. I’m real busy right now.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sana_galuska_0_I: I sell all my artifacts to Miss Kalyna or Owl. Do they do more harm than good? Hell if I know. But coupons never hurt nobody.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sana_galuska_0_N: I’d love me a drink, but I’m all outta coupons.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sona_closing_1_6: Someone’s trying to play pirate here. All hands, prepare to defend the Sultansk! Secure all entrances and exits!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sona_kalina_0_Bu: Hold your horses, I got stuff to do, we'll chat later!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sona_kalina_0_By: If you don’t come back, I won’t cry.
Remember, no brawling in my bar. Capish?
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sona_kalina_0_He: You sure you're on the right ship?
Having a stalker on board is good luck!
You got some business here, or you just wanna shoot the shit?
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sona_kalina_0_Hu: Loners used to be scared to come here, but now they've finally grown some balls.
They know I welcome anyone who's not half-stupid. Bandit, loner, undecided - I don't judge.
I’ve heard the Shevchenko is falling apart with no one on board. That’s not good at all. I might need to see if there’s anything I can do about it.
What can you tell me about the Sultansk?
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sona_kalina_0_In: You know coupons were invented by some smart-ass Freedom guy from Rostok, right?
Wasn't that long ago, but the whole Zone uses 'em. Jobs, trades, payments — it's all coupons now.
I wonder if it's human nature, or does the Zone turn anything new into something ordinary just like that?
They used to say our Zaton is the middle of nowhere. Now, when the Monolith reshaped the trading map, any back of beyond can be the new capital.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sona_kalina_0_Me: They already tried to take me out. Can you believe it? The plan itself was bad enough, the execution was even worse.
Something tells me I haven’t seen the last of ’em, though.
Oh well, no biggie. I’m a lucky gal. Might as well start decorating walls with those guns I took from wannabe assassins.
First time here, huh? Don’t be shy, loner, we won’t bite. Visit the Sultansk once, you’ll see there’s no better place in all of Zaton.

If you’re looking for a job, got artifacts to sell, or just need a drink for the road, you’ve come to the right place. I know all about how this place works, and I can tell you how to make it work in your favor.
Rule number one: no trashing my ship. I’m not gonna like it. Name’s Sonya, by the way. Sonya Kalyna.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sona_kalina_0_NP: If you're sick of sitting around, the Emission is over now. Feel free to go outside.
There’s an Emission outside, gentlemen. Stay put.
Listen up, everybody! There's an Emission on the way. If you’re not already in a shelter, find one quickly. The Emission isn't gonna wait for you.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sona_kalina_0_Re: The people here don’t think too highly of me. I want to make amends.
I was wondering when you’d show up, Skif. First you shoot at my men, and now you wanna apologize?
If it wasn't for that favor, we’d be having a very different conversation.
I won't forget that you did right by me, so I’ll make things right for you — for a small, purely symbolic contribution, of course. And don't push it.
Let’s talk about it another time.
If you keep messing with my guys, there might not be another time.
I want to set things right. I don't mind making a little donation.
Now that’s the Skif I used to know. Pleasure doing business with you!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sona_kalina_0_Tr: You’re quite a handful, you know that? You make me nervous, but you make me money!
All of Zaton’s finest goods right here, just for you!
Take a look. You won’t find this kinda stuff even on the Mainland!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sona_opening_1_6: The enemy's boarding attempt has backfired spectacularly! The Sultansk is open to all visitors again.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sultan_0_ByeTopi: See you later, my good man.
If you’ve got something to talk about, come on over.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sultan_0_HelloTo: You're still kicking, huh? What a shame.
Why, if it isn't my favorite bigwig!
Well, speak up since you're here.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sultan_0_HubInfo: Here on the Sultansk, we don’t treat stalkers as enemies.
Behave, and you'll make some good money just like my guys.
But if you’re a Shevchenko rat, that’s a whole different story. And trust me, it ain't pretty.
What can you tell me about the Sultansk?
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sultan_0_InfoTop: Let me tell you something: the Ward, they’re just basic cops. Gear's fancier, but that's all there is.
Even the Wardens can’t resist a little extra coin if you approach ’em the right way. Coupons are sorta like magic. They make folks turn a blind eye and a deaf ear.
They say the Ward's outta Icarus, all of them.
It ain't bad, they'll stop poking around, at least. But come to think of it, they didn't just up and leave for no damn good reason. Gotta keep our heads on a swivel.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sultan_0_Meet_2_: Can’t help but wonder who else was in on it with that bitch, Skif.
They’re all laying low, for now. Chickenshits.
But I’m gonna find ’em all anyway and finish ’em off. Hell knows what Kalyna put them up to. I won't be looking over my shoulder on my own ship.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sultan_0_Meet_me: Remember this: I’m the Sultan, and this ship is mine.
If you play by my rules, you’ll have a good life here. But step out of line, and you can kiss that good life goodbye.
Don’t bother me with crap, and don’t start shit with Kalyna or my men — unless you want a bullet in your knee.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sultan_0_NPC_Emi: That’s it, folks, we’re in the clear. The Emission’s over!
All right, folks. Just hang tight. There’s an Emission out there.
Listen up, folks! An Emission’s about to kick in. Get to your hidey-holes, and fast!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_sultan_0_Restore: I had beef with your guys, and I want to make amends.
So you’re here to show some respect, huh? Right your wrongs? Good for you!
I told my guys to go easy on you. For now…
But remember, you owe me. With interest.
I need to think it over.
Think fast, or things could get ugly.
You’re right. Let’s keep things smooth.
Good call, stalker. Now go, and remember — I don’t want any more trouble from you.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_syc_0_ByeTopic_B: Drop by if you find anything interesting.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_syc_0_HelloTopic: You didn’t come here just to show off your pretty face, did you? Spit it out or hit the road.
You gonna spill the beans or keep me guessing?
What’s the holdup? Just tell me what you want.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_syc_0_InfoTopic_: I don’t share info with strangers. But if you're looking for work, I’m your man.
Back to the good old days. Weren't good at all. Same ugly mugs as ten years ago, here we go again.
I knew it from the get-go — anyone who sides with the old men in that standoff is gonna lose.
Some folks just don’t get it. Think if they talk shit quietly enough at the bar, no one's gonna know. But I can hear every word.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_syc_0_Meet_2_1_6: You’re not the first loner I’ve seen today, and you won’t be the last. There’s a whole lot of you now, all moving in with Beard.
Didn't think I'd see that old shitface here again. Kalyna must’ve busted their balls real bad to get those two to join forces.
Well, we’ll see what they’re made of. At least Kalyna had an iron grip.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_syc_0_Meet_3_1_6: I hope we’ll get more loners here now. They used to be too shy to trade here, with Beard around. But who’s gonna stop ’em now?
You oughtta swing by too. Whenever you need good gear and good intel.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_syc_0_Meet_meet_: I've been here for a while now. Way back Beard used to hang around the Skadovsk. Then the Sultan kicked him out… with a little help from yours truly.
The Sultan went easy on Beard for old times' sake. But I'd like you better not cross him. Might find yourself in an underwater expedition in the Swamps.
Don't bother the Sultan with stupid shit. If it's important, Miss Kalyna will tell you when to pay him a visit. She's the one to talk to if you need a job.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_syc_0_TradeTopic: You're lucky I'm selling you anything at all.
I only got the quality stuff, guaranteed.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_vitalik_hardkor_: We’re finally back on the Skadovsk! I'll drink to that!
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_zeka_zubilo_0_Bu: You picked a bad time to mess with me, bud.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_zeka_zubilo_0_In: We’ve got some well-off chumps around here — the kind that got an artifact in every pocket, ya know? But you gotta get 'em before the mutants do.
It’s kinda weird having two kingpins now, eh? I might just stick around and see how things play out.
I don’t give a damn who’s in charge. As long as the boss follows our code, I ain't whining.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_zeka_zubilo_0_NP: I’m so sick of sitting on my ass all day. Why won't the Sultan give me something to do, a real gig?..
I better go check on my stash. If things go south, I’m outta here.
sid_phrase_Sultansk_Hub_zeka_zubilo_0_Re: So what were we chit-chattin’ about?
sid_phrase_TQ01_DV_ChortFinishQuest_hell: It is your reward for work
I think now you can go
sid_phrase_TQ01_DV_ChortGiveQuest_lets_g: I hope, we make it quickly
sid_phrase_TQ01_DV_ChortGiveQuest_monoli: I just came from there and destroyed a group of Monoliths
It is good news, thank you stalker.
sid_phrase_TQ01_DV_ChortGiveQuest_no_int: I`m not interested to help you.
Tell me if you change your solution.
sid_phrase_TQ01_DV_ChortGiveQuest_proble: Yes, we need to go to the other side of the school. If you join us, I give you a new gun.
sid_phrase_TQ01_DV_GivePDANeutrals_give_: Yes, can you delive to Barmen this PDA
sid_phrase_TQ01_DV_SQ_PraporFinishQuest_: Hello, I have what you want
Good, take your prize and get out
sid_phrase_TQ01_DV_SQ_PraporGiveQuest_he: You look like a veteran. I give you a little case. Kill monoliths near the school and delive me  he`s PDA
Of Corse I give you prize for this
Hello, stalker. Hide your weapon if you dont want die
sid_phrase_TQ01_DV_SQ_PraporGiveQuest_no: Then get out of here and dont return
sid_phrase_TQ02_DV_FreedomQuest_hello_59: Hi, you want to go through this field?
A little. We guard this shelter and every time before E wave of mutants attacks us.
Yep. I propose you help us and wait in the shelter when E end.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_Audiolog_BadThin: This is bad. We shouldn’t have left Bobcat.
Eh, quit bitchin' already. All four of us coulda died. That better?
No. But we should’ve shot him, at least. He was screaming at the top of his lungs...
It was his own damn fault! He was slowin' us down. Besides, those fuckers like it better when their food's still kicking.
What’s wrong with you, huh? You heartless fuck...
Let’s see what you say when Gnats feeds you to the mutants. I’m not going with you two ever again. Fuck you.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_Audiolog_RattedO: You fucking asshole! You're the piece of shit who ratted me out to the Ward?! Talk!
Say it! You were the only one who knew about our little scheme!
Stealing Ward guns and swapping them for our old ones? Yeah, brilliant idea...
Can't you get it through your fucking skull? They could've gotten us all killed 'cuz you were fucking around!
You're the only one who gotta catch a slug for this shit. Damn mastermind.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_Audiolog_Revenge: Hey Gnats, can you hear me? Good. Our friend here wants to tell you something.
All hell broke loose over here. Noontiders went fucking crazy. When things get tough, you gotta count on your friends. Ain't that right, Slapstick?

Slapstick here ain't a very good friend. But you, Gnats... you're even worse. You saved your loot and left your partner to the Snorks. Was that your plan all along, or did you just see an opportunity?
Well, here comes Noontide. Guess I gotta go. I won't ask you to come along, Slapstick — you ain't running for your life with them busted legs of yours.
But you, Gnats... you I will see real soon. I promise.
Bobcat! Please! Just shoot me! Bobcat!
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_Comment_Dissatis: I’m sick of these “guests” walking all over us. That kind of shit never happened when Nestor was around.
The Slag Heap’s done for. Even you guys are sick of them cops taking over. That’s no place for our kind anymore.
Your kind'll get over it. You've got plenty of places to go. We diggers ain’t got no other home.
You gonna stay here with the cops then? You’re a decent guy, never did any time, but that's all right. Quit digging and come join us at the Swamps.
Nah… I’m feeling lucky today. I just might make enough to get back to the Mainland. I ain't like you guys.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_Comment_Gangs_1_: Without Nestor, this place is gonna turn into a freaking bloodbath. The kingpins are gonna fight to the death, I tell ya. You wanna stick around for that?
Well, where else are we gonna go, smartass? Know any other places with enough chumps to shake down?
Word is, there’s a new gang boss in Rostok, and he’s hiring. We could join the Sultan at the Swamps too…
And if it gets real bad, we could always sign up with the mercs. Ha ha...
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_Comment_Principl: What’s up? Got your ass kicked again?
Yeah, sort of. It’s okay, I’ll be fine.
Was it worth it? Lost your loot, got the shit beaten outta you… like, what the hell?
If you wanna work here, you gotta pay for protection. You got a death wish?
Nope. They freaking broke ya. Eat shit, bastards, you ain't getting my damn loot!
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_Comment_TerrorFa: Don’t overdo it, man. You’ll end up like those two.
Not before those pills of yours kill your liver. What else am I supposed to do? Stay sober and wait for the Noontiders to turn us all into zombies?
Well, go on, march into the Duga if you believe those ghost stories.
I’d rather head over to the Cordon and beg Sidorovich for a favor. He’s gotta have some connections at the IPSF. I wanna make it out of here without losing everything.
You dumbass! You really think you’ll still have anything left to lose after the old man robs you blind?
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_10_1_6: Any rat that shoots people running from this Emission will be left to die in the next one.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_11_1_6: Please remain calm. The Ward is clearing the area.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_12_1_6: Anyone who obstructs Ward officers in the fulfillment of their lawful duties will be subject to physical force.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_13_1_6: Any suspicious activity may result in immediate termination.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_14_1_6: In the event of a perceived threat, the Ward is authorized to use lethal force.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_15_1_6: Please conceal all bladed weapons and firearms to avoid fatal incidents.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_16_1_6: Stay put, guys. If you see anyone brainwashed-looking, don’t shoot. Give us a heads-up.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_17_1_6: The next idiot who asks me how to join Monolith is gonna join them in the afterlife. Is that clear?
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_18_1_6: The Slag Heap is well protected. Stop bothering me with dumb-ass projects. Traps, fortifications... We’re diggers here, not the fucking Viet Cong.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_1_1_63: Inside these walls, you’re under the protection of Nestor and the diggers. Once you’re outside, you’re on your own.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_2_1_63: Precious metals, radio equipment, microchips, and spare parts are to be brought directly to Diode. Otherwise, I’m not responsible for your belongings.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_3_1_63: Misplaced items are considered public property. Theft is punishable by face-smashing.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_4_1_63: Be polite and respectful to your fellow drinkers here — even if they're teetotaling pigs.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_5_1_63: If you're acting like a prick, you'll be lying in the creek. No offense.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_6_1_63: All the ass-kicking and face-smashing is to be taken outside, am I clear?
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_7_1_63: If your counter squeaks like a mouse, get some vodka. If it rattles like a snake, go see Schulz. If it howls like a cat in heat, get some vodka for your buddies to drink to your memory.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_8_1_63: Anyone who gets drunk and falls in the creek won't be allowed in the bar without proper decontamination.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_PropTopic_9_1_63: No fights, no shooting, no petty squabbling. This is the place to chill.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_capa_hmuryj_0_In: No one dared to start shit with us while Nestor was in charge. Everything's gone to hell in a handbasket without him.
What news? Those fucking zombies keep killing both your guys and ours! Shitheads!
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_capa_hmuryj_0_NP: Nestor picked the wrong time to piss off. Didn’t leave anyone in charge either.
Those shitheads are the last thing we need right now! Fucking scientists and their fucking experiments...
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_capa_hmuryj_0_Re: So, where was I... oh, yeah!
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_closing_1_63426: The Slag Heap's closed until you're all done playing cops and robbers.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_drabadan_0_ByeTo: Come back whenever you want a drink or two.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_drabadan_0_Hello: Skif, old pal! What can I get you?
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_drabadan_0_InfoT: Duty is getting lazy. Back in the day, you could walk all the way to the Cement Factory and never see a single dog. But now? Ugh.
The folks from Wild Island are weird. They don’t drink, they don't smoke weed… they ain’t human, I tell ya! Uh… you’re not one of them, are ya?
Some thug from the Swamps came here a while ago. He was acting pretty wild for a guy who doesn't drink. What a weirdo…
Folks are drowning their fear in booze. I’m kinda scared they’ll drink their brains away before the psi-radiation even gets to them.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_drabadan_0_Meet_: I knew it! Welcome, welcome! Here, have a drink. To new friends!
