With customers like these, I might as well close up shop. No one wants to drink with them.
Your guess is as good as mine.
Hey, you’re clever. Our kind of man. How about a shot?
It's not too crowded here now. I get it. Those ugly mugs by the bar could put anyone off their drink.
Hey, you’re alive! We were wondering if you got caught in that whole mess. I was betting on you!
Well, well, looks like we've got a new guest. Fresh from the Cordon, are ya? Or is it the Lesser Zone? I'm guessing the Gaffer sent you.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_drabadan_0_Trade: I’ve got drinks, I’ve got snacks. Pick what you want.
Here. This is all I've got.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_feda_katod_0_Inf: This place is up shit's creek without a boss. How could Nestor just leave us like this?
Some pretty messed up shit. Monolith. And I thought I’d never hear that word again...
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_feda_katod_0_NPC: It’s gonna be hard times for the Slag Heap. The kingpins won’t be happy if there's nobody here to shoot the shit with.
Don't piss your pants yet, boys. We kicked their asses before, and we’ll do it now. Just gotta stick together.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_feda_katod_0_Res: So, what were we talking about?
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_guron_0_ByeTopic: Bring back some loot next time.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_guron_0_HelloTop: Whatcha waitin’ for? You buying or what?
Take your pick, stalker. My prices are fair.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_guron_0_InfoTopi: I hate Garbage trade. Those thugs think I shit guns. I gotta haggle for every piece you guys bring me, dammit!
I’d be gone already, but now they're bringing me the sweetest loot ever. Nah, I'll wait it out.
Folks say the chief Monolithian bit the dust at the Duga. Good, but it changes nothing. If I knew about him, I’d have put a bounty on his head long ago.
Here’s what bugs me: did Gaffer train his chumps into champs, or is the Monolith not as ballsy as they say? The Wardens got screwed, and Zalissya is still standing.
You heard? Zalissya’s fucked. Folks went up there to check, and there’s more loot than they could carry. Those Monolithian bastards sliced everyone up but didn't take a fucking thing.
You hear that Sultan and Beard made up? Sworn enemies all these years, and now bandits and loners are shaking hands on their barge. Who would’ve fucking thought!
So, the Sultansk got a new queen, ha? That’s Sonya Kalyna for you – sweet-talking, back-stabbing Sonya. Beats me how all of them follow orders from a wench…
My goods ain’t selling. Fucking Ward cops are all over me with “Where’d you get this?" or "Show us the serial number”. Wish I could just pay them off! Shit.
Damn Ward pigs got nastier. Sitting on their asses, bugging us, running folks through their databases. Should’ve finished them off at the Duga.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_guron_0_Meet_2_1: And how am I supposed to do business with this freak show on my back? They ain't sticking around, are they?
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_guron_0_Meet_3_1: Diode got us some bandit backup, but folks aren't too happy about it. Still, you know what they say about beggars and choosers.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_guron_0_Meet_4_1: Come in, come in. Brought anything good? You know it's high time for...big opportunities.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_guron_0_Meet_Mee: Hey there, stalker. What can I do for ya? If you’re looking to buy or sell, great. If not, head over to SIRCAA. They just love answering questions.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_guron_0_TradeTop: Look all you want, but don’t touch anything.
Come by, I’ll always have some goodies for you!
You got some loot? Let me have a look.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_konder_0_ByeTopi: If you wanna talk business, stop by.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_konder_0_HelloTo: You wanna talk business? Well, let’s get it over with.
Good to see you. You need something?
I hope you're here to talk business.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_konder_0_HubInfo: We’ve had our eye on this place for quite a while now. We've got diggers here from the Flea Market and the Depot, along with a bunch of new ones.
We got some crooks here too, but Nestor taught them to respect the rules. We’re civil with them, and they behave... most of the time.
To be honest, we aren't much interest to them. If they shake down a stalker, they might get a nice artifact. But what can you get from a digger? A lamp? A microchip? What are they gonna do with that?
What can you tell me about the Slag Heap?
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_konder_0_InfoTop: If you’re about to get involved in something, think it over. The locals are a shady bunch. They’ll take you for every coupon you're worth.
The junk we're walking around on could make us rich on the Mainland. You just gotta know what to look for and keep your eyes open.
More and more people are leaving for the Perimeter. Guess they just don't got the guts to keep digging here after... you know.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_konder_0_Meet_2_: Nestor sure picked the wrong damn time to check out. Who's gonna sort this shit out now?
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_konder_0_Meet_3_: I never expected the Ward to come here. But I sorted it all out somehow. Now I guess I’m in charge of these folks again. I'd rather stay a tech, it was way easier.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_konder_0_Meet_4_: I guess we're on our own again here at the Slag Heap. I don’t know how long we’ll last, but we’re not giving up. Not to the Monolith, not to anyone else.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_konder_0_Meet_Me: Got anything to sell? Any lamps? Capacitors? Come on. Don’t be shy.
Or you need some repairs? That, I can do. For a reasonable price, of course.
Unless it requires parts that aren’t easy to get.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_konder_0_NPC_Emi: The Emission’s finished. You can come out now, diggers.
There's an active Emission out there. Stay in cover!
Listen up, diggers! We got reports of an Emission coming, so get to cover.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_konder_0_Restore: I’d like to smooth things over with you guys. I can't have a drink in peace when they're staring at me like that.
Well, the boys have been saying some stuff about you. Nasty stuff.
If you don’t want them spitting on you — or worse — you're gonna have to make an effort.
Okay. I’ll pass the word along to the boys.
I need to think about it.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_konder_0_Upgrade: Ain’t you afraid I might forget to tighten a screw on your gun one day?
Okay, okay, let's see what I can whip up.
Tell me what you wanna upgrade.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_kukuha_0_ByeTopi: Just tell me where you need to go. I’ll get you there fast and safe.
You wanna head out? Let’s head out!
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_kukuha_0_HelloTo: If you've got coupons, I can take you anywhere.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_kukuha_0_InfoTop: The Zone is always changing, like a living thing. If you haven’t been someplace in a while, it’s like you’re going there for the first time.
You kids are always asking me what’s new… try asking what’s old and gone forever for a change!
Fleshes might look clumsy, but if they come in a bunch, they’ll gobble you up just like that. A pile of shit and a couple of teeth — that's what you're gonna be when they're done with you.
Those old routes are more dangerous than ever. How do folks even find them? I have no idea.
A Monolithian bigshot got killed yesterday. You heard? I wonder how they pick a new one – whoever the Monolith points at?
My guys used to ask me to guide them to Wild Island. As a joke. See if the Noontiders would chicken out. Come to think of it now, I’m glad I said no. The boys would’ve been sliced into pieces.
You should've seen the boys doing a runner when Korsh stormed in! Me? I'm no tilt-rotor dick-a-copter to get’em all out, so I evac'ed who I could…
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_kukuha_0_Meet_3_: Heading out somewhere? I say let’s get as far away from these damn pigs as possible.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_kukuha_0_Meet_4_: Now's the time to get yourself a guide. I haven’t even raised my rates — out of pure solidarity, of course.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_kukuha_0_Meet_An: Scared? You must have me confused with someone else. Nothing to be scared about.
Yeah, that’s right. If the Zone has ya spooked, there goes your loot!
Well… you might've heard some rumors... actually, never mind. It was a long time ago, and it never really happened.
I'm not done here yet. I just wanted to chat for a bit.
Right-o. It's dead in here, so we can chat all you want.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_kukuha_0_Meet_Me: If you need to get someplace, speak up. Whatever they tell you about Bonkers, I know my trade.
Ready to go? Gettin’ scared yet?
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_kukuha_0_ResumeT: I'm out of it these days… Ah, that's it!
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_kukuha_0_TravelT: If you've got the coupons, I'm your man. Where to?
Well, where do you wanna go?
I can take you where you need to go.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_maksimyc_0_InfoT: Garbage's kingpins are already eyeing the Slag Heap. They'll come for us if we don’t sort this out soon.
What, you don’t know? Maybe you’re one of them zombies yourself?
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_maksimyc_0_NPC_C: The Brood and the Commissary are gonna tear us apart now. Either them or their masters. What do we do?
Shit hit the fan pretty damn hard... I would've gotten outta here already, but I’m broke...
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_opening_1_63427: Okay, I guess they’ve wasted all their bullets. Come on in.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_sulc_0_BusyTopic: Can’t you see I’m busy right now?!
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_sulc_0_ByeTopic_: Get lost. You're stinking up the place.
You take care now. Don't squander your health — you won’t get it back.
If you need fixing, come see me.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_sulc_0_HealTopic: So, what is it? A big wart on your ass?
Are you kidding me? You’re as healthy as a horse.
Show me what you got. I’ll take care of it.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_sulc_0_HelloTopi: No anesthesia for you. I’m running low on supplies.
Good to see you. Man, you really oughta be more careful out there.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_sulc_0_InfoTopic: No matter how tough they might look, folks around here are just a bunch of kids. Too bad their wars aren't make-believe.
First they shoot each other, then they come here in tears. “Schulz, patch me up, Schulz, save me!” Use your damn brain for once!
If you take a bullet or get mauled by a monster, don't spare the bandages! Dress the wound right away, before you lose too much blood.
I’ve got more work now, of course, but less than expected. Those Monolithians don’t spare the wounded.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_sulc_0_Meet_3_1_: So, the circus is gone, but the clowns stayed behind. We’ll see how long it'll last.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_sulc_0_Meet_4_1_: Everyone's losing it. Stocking up on psi-pills like crazy. As if they're any good, yeah…
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_sulc_0_Meet_Meet: Another patient, eh? Are you here to talk business, or just stopping by?
I can fix you up if you’ve got the coupons. If you’re broke, well... as long as you can still walk, you’ll have to do a little work for me.
Don’t look at me like that. Even fleshes ain’t treated for free, and they’re good for something, at least.
sid_phrase_Terricon_Hub_sulc_0_TradeTopi: Okay,  since you're here, I`ll take a look.
Take it. When it comes to meds, overkill is underrated.
It never hurts to restock your medkit.
sid_phrase_WildIsland_Dialog_BarmenCamp_: How the fuck else am I gonna keep my head on straight?
If I told you it's sausage, would you believe me?
Vodka, of course. Our most precious commodity.
sid_phrase_WildIsland_Dialog_MedicCamp_c: So much death. I do what I can, but I fear for the worst.
sid_phrase_WildIsland_Dialog_MedicCamp_f: I'm not surprised you ended up this way. The hare never stops to consider the wolf’s weaknesses. It just runs like hell.
What is surprising, is just how many hares have made their home here in the Zone.
sid_phrase_WildIsland_Dialog_MedicCamp_s: A pity so few of us understand the situation you’re in.
Well… It's a relief to know that at least someone in the Zone can think beyond the next glass of vodka.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_Audiolog_Garpia_1_6: I’m sick of being stuck here, Deggy. Let me go out on patrol one more time.
We’ve been over this, Harpy. You’re a good soldier, and I thank you for your service, but given your injury, it’s too risky for you to go on patrol.
You've pulled guys out of a tight spot before, but you can’t do it anymore. And there’s no way to tell if they're gonna be able to rescue you either.
I need your expertise here in Yaniv. If you’re tired of tinkering with stuff, then go help Nor. You can recruit good free stalkers to run errands for me.
Loud and clear, sir. Fine, I’ll keep tinkering and chit-chatting with strangers all day. But one day you just might need some real help from me, Degtyarev. You’ll see.
And when that day comes, I know where to find you.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_Audiolog_Nor_1_6241: Howdy, Nor! Got yourself a flat butt from all that sitting around Yaniv?
I stopped by our old hiding spot, the one where we used to hide from the Corps. Remember those days?
I’m gonna have a smoke and start looking for Monolith stashes, or whatever else Degtyarev is hiding around here.
Get out of there, Tick! No one's allowed in that sector, not even with a pass. And you don’t have one — I’ve checked the lists.
Well, in that case, you better warn your boys. You’re in charge.
Degtyarev is the one in charge, and he’s ordered his men to shoot on sight.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_1_1_62183: Any idea who’s gonna replace Hawaiian at the bar? I’ve heard he’s leaving for the Mainland — health issues.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_1_1_62186: He’s been “leaving for the Mainland” ever since I joined the Corps. And naive stalkers throw him a farewell party every damn day. He’s raking in the dough.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_1_1_62188: They should’ve spent their coupons on better gear instead. You wouldn’t believe the old junk I find on their corpses sometimes.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_2_1_62190: Here’s a riddle for you: there’s a dead stalker in Prypiat. He managed to dig his way in somehow. Can you guess what killed him?
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_2_1_62194: You did him in during a raid?
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_2_1_62195: Nah, he did it all by himself. The idiot turned off his comms so we couldn’t track him and ended up getting caught in an Emission!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_3_1_62290: Allowing the Monolithians into Prypiat was a smart move!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_3_1_62291: Why’s that? We’re gonna have our hands full.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_3_1_62292: Not really — the mutants and the Monolithians will wipe each other out. Then we’ll just clean up whatever’s left.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_4_1_62297: I wonder how many Monolithians have drunk to your health while posing as stalkers here.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_4_1_62298: I had Strider stop by once. He said his brothers don’t drink at all.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_4_1_62300: They don’t? Maybe that’s why their brains got fried.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_5_1_62398: I've heard some stalkers found an apartment in Prypiat, and someone still lives in it. I wonder who.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_5_1_62399: We’ll be hearing a lot more bullshit like that now that they’re letting all the stalkers in.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_GCA_5_1_62400: Wouldn’t be surprised if it was Degtyarev's place.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_10_1_6231: Stay safe! Buy some anti-rad from Bonesetter!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_11_1_6240: Gear up and get ready to run into a Monolithian!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_12_1_6240: Come to Hawaiian’s and raise a glass in honor of those who’ve fallen in Prypiat!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_13_1_6240: Clashes between factions are strictly prohibited! We've got a common enemy here: the Monolith!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_14_1_6240: Who’s up for hunting some Monolithians? Get in line!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_15_1_6240: Hey stalker, stock up on meds from Bonesetter and get yourself a new gun at Wreck’s!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_1_1_62166: The list has been finalized by Degtyarev. We won’t be adding any new names.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_2_1_62171: Garry the guide won’t take you to Prypiat. Any groups approved by Degtyarev make the trip on their own.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_3_1_62174: We don't do any search and rescue operations in Prypiat. You’re on your own out there.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_4_1_62177: If you're planning to give your guns to Harpy for repairs, clean 'em first!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_5_1_62181: Don’t bring any corpses to Yaniv. Bonesetter already has his hands full.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_7_1_62306: Just because Monolith got into Prypiat doesn’t mean you will. No stalkers allowed!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_8_1_62310: Hey stalker, don’t forget to upgrade your gear! Wreck’s shop is open 24/7.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_PropTopic_9_1_62312: Prypiat is an extremely dangerous place as long as the Monolith is there. Stay alert!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garik_2_ByeTopic_By: Run along now. I won’t keep you.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garik_2_HelloTopic_: Since you’re here, come on in.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garik_2_InfoTopic_1: A stalker is responsible for his own safety, not his guide. Uncle Lyonya is the only guide in the Zone who babysits his clients. That is not an option here.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garik_2_InfoTopic_2: Never thought we’d have a Monolithian among us. He was always looking after the rookies.
So much for trusting people in the Zone.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garik_2_Meet_1_6204: Welcome to our boring routine. Prypiat’s off limits without proper clearance. If your name isn’t on the list, you’re stuck on this side of Yaniv.
The Red Forest isn’t exactly a vacation either, so you better get ready.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garik_2_Meet_2_1_62: Who would’ve thought the Monolithians would ever come back? We helped the Noontiders get set up on Wild Island. It didn't seem like they were gonna cause any trouble out there.
Now some stalkers are trying to run from the Monolithians while others have this stupid urge to come here and look at them. Meanwhile, Prypiat is off limits to everyone.
So what route do you plan to take?
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garik_2_Meet_3_1_62: If you were thinking about going to Prypiat, this is your chance. Degtyarev’s Corps has their hands full — regular stalkers are the least of their concerns now.
But keep in mind that that place is still as dangerous as ever — maybe even more so with Monolith around.
If you’re up for it, let’s go. But remember, even if you tag along, you’re on your own out there.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garik_2_TravelTopic: All right, we can get moving. But I can’t promise you you'll make it back.
Where do you want me to take you?
Just tell me where you want to go.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garpia_0_ByeTopic_B: Let’s see what else you can find me.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garpia_0_HelloTopic: You again! Thanks for ruining my lunch.
All right, my smoke break can wait. What’ve you got?
Be quick about it, my tea’s getting cold.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garpia_0_InfoTopic_: I may not have the best aim anymore, but when it comes to disassembling and reassembling guns, I’m the quickest in all of Yaniv.
I can make you a rifle out of a stick and some duct tape, but if a stalker can’t figure out how to hold a gun, it won’t do him any good.
To tackle Prypiat, a stalker’s gotta be among the Zone’s elite. But we keep getting greenhorns who shouldn’t have made it to Yaniv in the first place.
Even now, they’d jump at a chance to get into Prypiat. Degtyarev made the right call by locking them out.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garpia_0_Meet_1_620: Another sour puss. What’s with the long face? Degtyarev didn’t give you a pass, eh? You ought to be thankful he didn’t.
I’ve been guarding the Boundary for a decade now, and trust me, you’re better off here. But if you’re itching to impress Degtyarev’s Corps, I can hook you up with a side gig — paid, of course.
Or did you swing by just to get your gun fixed? Well, show it to me while I’m still here.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garpia_0_Meet_2_1_6: It's too bad those Monolithians didn’t show up when I was on active duty. That would've been one hell of a hunt!
But regular stalkers... they don’t belong in Prypiat. Those fanatics'll put them down in a heartbeat. They don’t even spare the wounded.
Get ready, just to be safe. If you’ve got anything that needs fixing, hand it over now.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garpia_0_Meet_3_1_6: Hey there, daredevil. You heading to Prypiat? I tell ya, that place can turn a vet into a rookie and make him cry for his momma.
Out there, no one’s gonna wipe your butt or fix your gun. But I can help you with that. The gun, I mean.
Now make sure you get everything sorted out before I step out for a smoke.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_garpia_0_UpgradeTop: I couldn’t fuck it up, even if I wanted to.
I’ll fix it in no time.
I can fix anything for enough coupons.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_gavaec_0_ByeTopic_B: Hope we can toss a few more sometime.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_gavaec_0_HelloTopic: You stick out like a sore thumb around here.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_gavaec_0_InfoTopic_: I’m so sick of the food here. Wish I could have something homemade. There was a guy called the Chef who claimed he could make chicken Kyiv right here in the Zone. Too bad he didn’t live to prove it.
When I make it back to the Mainland, the first thing I’m gonna do is have some real chicken Kyiv.
I’m doing pretty well, but sometimes I feel like I’d trade all my loot for an apple. I don’t care if it’s rotten or full of worms, as long as it’s from my apple tree back home.
When I make it back to the Mainland, the first thing I’m gonna do is eat a pound of apples. Scratch that — make it two pounds!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_gavaec_0_Meet_1_619: Are you new here? Me, I’ve been in Yaniv for a while now. I used to be a trader. I was always stuck inside... to be honest, sometimes I felt like there was no way out.
These days I serve drinks to customers, but that won't last long. I’m heading back to the Mainland to take a break and work on my health. I’ve had enough of the Zone.
So, how about a drink to my health? On you, of course.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_gavaec_0_Meet_2_1_6: I can barely keep my supplies in stock! They keep drinking 'cuz of all the stress, and can't even get drunk anymore.
A lot of folks regret not leaving for the Mainland in time. I’ve decided it’s time for me to go.
If I’m not around next time you’re here, pour one for me. Or maybe you’d rather do it right now?
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_gavaec_0_Meet_3_1_6: Don’t you find it odd how Degtyarev opened Prypiat to stalkers all of a sudden?
First he had that list of his, then he locked everybody out, and now, with the Monolith around, he’s suddenly letting everybody in. Maybe he thinks the stalkers are gonna do more good than harm...
Anyway, it’s none of my business. My business here is pouring vodka. Care for a drink?
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_gavaec_0_TradeTopic: Don't expect any discounts from me.
Anything I’ve got is yours. I’ll even give you a discount!
I got all the shit you’re ever gonna need.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_hana_0_ByeTopic_Bye: Step aside. You’re blocking my merchandise.
If you find any artifacts, you know where to take them.
If you’re too stingy, don’t come crying to me later.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_hana_0_HelloTopic_H: Are you gonna stand there twiddling your thumbs, or buy something?
Don’t be afraid. Come on over.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_hana_0_InfoTopic_1_: It’s better to walk around rich and witless than run away scared shitless.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_hana_0_InfoTopic_2_: They say it's always darkest before the dawn. Bullshit! In the Zone, it's always darkest before you get clobbered by a fucking Emission.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_hana_0_Meet_1_62112: I don’t recall seeing you here before. I’ve got everything you need, and my stuff is top-notch. You won’t find anything better in Yaniv.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_hana_0_Meet_1_62113: There was this one guy who tried to find a better deal and ended up buying used gear from a stalker. He never came back from Prypiat, and no one’s bothering to look for his corpse.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_hana_0_Meet_1_62114: I stand by the quality of my merchandise. Take your pick.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_hana_0_Meet_2_1_622: The Zone rewards the well-prepared. And with Monolith right next door, you better stock up. Better safe than sorry.
There was this one guy who tried to calculate everything. He figured running light would be quicker. But he couldn’t outrun a Monolithian’s bullet.
So my advice is: think twice and buy thrice. Take your pick.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_hana_0_Meet_3_1_623: Heading to Prypiat, eh? I’ve noticed quite a few of your kind passing through here lately, but not all of them make it back.
There was this one guy who wouldn’t stop bragging about his fancy gun, but he skimped on ammo. A couple days later, another stalker brought me that same piece to sell.
So if you don’t want your gear to end up on my counter, get your coupons ready now.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_hana_0_TradeTopic_T: No one’s ever complained about the quality of my goods.
If I were you, I’d rather run out of coupons here than bullets out there.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_korica_0_InfoTopic_: Every day, there’s a line waiting to enter Prypiat. They’re all loaded up on ammo and ready for the hunt.
Except that in Prypiat, you’re not the hunter... you’re the prey.
I figured most stalkers would scatter once they heard Monolith was in Prypiat. But no, some guys actually want to get closer to the action.
The smart ones have been drawin' up their wills in advance. And the really smart ones... well, they get the hell out of here.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_korica_0_NPC_Intera: Whatcha waitin' for? If you wanna get to Prypiat, you better get a move on before we start drawin' up a new list.
Freeze! Entry to Prypiat is available by permit only. If you’re not on the list, you ain’t gettin' in.
Freeze! Monolithians have infiltrated Prypiat. Entry is prohibited until further notice.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_korica_0_chatter_1_: The equipment sent through the Red Forest didn’t make it. Looks like we’ll have to buy it from the stalkers again.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_korica_0_chatter_2_: The Monolithians are packing some serious heat. Their gear is as good as the Wardens'. While we barely got enough ammo to get by.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_korica_0_chatter_3_: Stalkers are so eager to get to the Dead Valley, you’d think there were exoskeletons buried under every bush.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_kostoprav_0_ByeTopi: Remember to look for shelter during Emissions.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_kostoprav_0_HealTop: You’re as fit as a Burer.
I’ll take care of it. You’ll be as good as new.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_kostoprav_0_InfoTop: Stalkers enjoy solving the mysteries of the Zone, but what they love even more is making up their own mysteries.
Any corpse found in Prypiat with no bullet wounds gives rise to all sorts of wild theories about the cause of death.
As far as I’m concerned, the cause of death is always the same: the Zone got him.
I’m tired of dissecting regular stalkers. But I have to admit, the prospect of examining a dead Monolithian’s head does pique my curiosity.
I wonder what’s going on inside their skulls... after all, their brains are usually melted beyond recognition.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_kostoprav_0_Meet_1_: Yaniv has changed hands and new mutants have appeared in the Zone, but the stalkers keep on bringing me corpses.
I don’t like doing autopsies, and I hope for both our sakes that your body never ends up on my table.
However, I can do a checkup for you. Want one?
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_kostoprav_0_Meet_2_: I can finally take a break. No one’s bringing in any dead, and the living tend to stay away.
The Monolithians shoot to kill. Those who cross paths with them don’t make it back to me.
If you’re here and in one piece, consider yourself lucky. Need me to run a checkup?
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_kostoprav_0_Meet_3_: I’ve been stitching them up all day and handing out anti-rad like candy. Feels just like the good old days.
Why are they so eager to get to Prypiat? Can’t they go die somewhere else?
Are you heading out there? Let me run a checkup while you’re still in one piece.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_kostoprav_0_TradeTo: I'll sell you whatever I’ve got.
I don’t have much for sale, but take a look.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_molotok_0_ByeTopic_: Don’t wander off. I’ll track you down if I have to.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_molotok_0_InfoTopic: Loners have been dropping like flies in Prypiat. I've been picking off a trespasser or two myself on every patrol. But the line to get in just keeps getting longer.
But I guess if they’re chasing artifacts, I sorta get it. I’ve come across a few myself. Powerful stuff.
I’ve been kind of fascinated by artifacts lately. I used to think they were all the same, but nope! When I come across one on a stalker’s body, I take a moment to examine it. Each is unique.
Some of them are incredibly beautiful... it’s almost a shame to sell them. But you never know what they might do to you. Besides, once we deal with the Monolith, I can always find some more.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_molotok_0_chatter_1: Entering Prypiat without proper authorization is basically volunteering to get taken out.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_molotok_0_chatter_2: The Monolithians go to places I was never authorized to patrol.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_molotok_0_chatter_3: I earn more dough selling artifacts to the merchant than I do in the service.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_BusyTopic_1: I’m busy enough as it is.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_HelloTopic_: What the hell are you doing here?
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_HubClose_1_: Yaniv is under attack! No one's allowed in until we handle it!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_HubInfo_1_6: Yaniv is the safest place around here. Prypiat is just past here.
Degtyarev’s Corps makes sure that no one passes through without authorization. He personally reviews and approves the list of stalkers permitted to enter or exit Prypiat.
If you’re not on the list, you can’t get in. I strongly advise against trying to enter without proper authorization. We’re pretty strict about it.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_HubOpen_1_6: It’s over! Yaniv is open for entry.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_InfoTopic_1: I believe that the Zone and the stalkers are connected in some way. Look at Bonesetter: never leaves the base, but he can always sense an Emission coming.
As for me, the Zone guided me here for my past misdeeds... but not as punishment. I was sent here to help others avoid making the same mistakes I made.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_InfoTopic_2: The Zone’s first rule is “do no harm.” To yourself, at least.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_Meet_1_6222: The name’s Nor. I’m in charge here. It's my job to make sure Degtyarev’s orders are followed.
Back in the day, this station was split between Duty and Freedom, while the stalkers stripped Prypiat of anything of value. I was no saint, either…
These days, Degtyarev’s Corps is in control, and that’s why we have order here. I’m doing my best to keep it that way.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_Meet_2_1_62: Have you heard that the Monolith is in Prypiat? Yeah, those are the neighbors we've got now.
Degtyarev’s latest orders have closed access to Prypiat for everyone — even those who used to be on the list.
He did the right thing. Regular stalkers have no business going there these days.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_Meet_3_1_62: Degtyarev personally put all the forces in Prypiat on high alert.
As long as the Monolith is around, nobody’s worried about keeping rogue loners out of Prypiat or checking lists. In theory, the road’s open to anyone.
However, I'd still advise against going into Prypiat. Compared to that place, everywhere else in the Zone is just peace and quiet.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_NPC_Emissio: The Emission is over! You can go outside now!
Stalkers, take cover! There's an Emission coming!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_rudoj_0_RestoreRepu: We started off on the wrong foot. How about we make amends?
I’m here because Degtyarev gave me a second chance. That’s why I’m willing to give you an opportunity to prove that we can count on you.
If you want to be part of Yaniv, you need to  contribute.
I need to think about it.
Come back once you’ve made up your mind.
Then welcome to Yaniv. Make yourself at… Yaniv.
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_vita_ryzak_0_InfoTo: Back in the day, you’d walk through a ravine without knowing what's around the corner. But now… everything got mapped out a long time ago.
So I came to Prypiat, and… here, I feel like a rookie myself.
I thought Strider had set his men straight. Turns out they were just playing dumb. They locked themselves up on that island, and now they've put their plan into action. Sons of bitches!
sid_phrase_Yanov_Hub_vita_ryzak_0_chatte: The veterans here wouldn’t freaking mentor us. They stick together and ignore the rookies.
There’s nothing left for us to do in Prypiat. I’ve heard even Degtyarev left the place.
I wanted to go to Prypiat, too, but then I took a bullet in the knee.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_AboutGuide_AboutG: What exactly does a guide do?
Guides help lads get where they need to go in one piece. Of all the Zone’s ways, us guides know the safest ones.
Or at least they say they do. Them lot will take ye somewhere, another camp or an early grave. Just kidding, me boy... just kidding.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_AboutTechnician_A: They make sure your gun barrel doesn’t fall off when you most need it. And if it does, at least they'll be here to replace it.
Why does the Zone need technicians?
Weapons upgrades, repairs – that’s us. Armor, too. You can’t roam the Zone in a crappy vest. Not for long, at least.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_Audiolog_Photo_1_: Wow, looks gorgeous! If Lens’s cameras didn’t conk out after every Emission, I could’ve taken me some amazing pics… I mean, the Poppy Field alone! Just think about showing it to the rookies…
But them lot would all rush over to see it on their own. Unprepared, with no plan…
Forget it, old spice. Sometimes beauty just ain’t meant to be seen.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_Closing_Hub_Closi: Zalissya is under attack! Everyone, get back to your homes, and keep your heads down!
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_1_GCA_1_33963: Man, I had a good run. Got three whole artifacts. Hamster was jumping with freaking joy. I could go back any day now…
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_1_GCA_1_63667: So what are you still doing here?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_1_GCA_1_63668: Fuck knows. It’s like I gotta, but… you can’t even see the sunset out there, right? Just concrete boxes all the way to the sky.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_1_GCA_1_63670: And at night, lights everywhere. Can’t see a single star. Here, there’s a whole bunch of ’em. Pick your favorite.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_1_GCA_1_63671: That’s it. The Zone’s got you.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_1_GCA_1_63672: Nah. It’s the Mainland that finally let me go.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_2_GCA_2_58995: First, the Duty and Freedom beef, now the Ward showed up and there’s another coup brewing up. Why can’t folks just live and let live? Is it a Zone thing?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_2_GCA_2_58996: Yeah, sure. It’s one hell of a Zone thing – you’re getting wasted at the bar every night instead of settling your debt with Mykolayich.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_2_GCA_2_58997: What the fuck’s that s’posed to mean, man? I’ve been buying your drinks every time!
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_2_GCA_2_58998: It’s not a Zone thing. It’s a human thing. We just can’t stop screwing up our lives.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_2_GCA_2_58999: How the hell are we supposed to stay sober knowing that?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_3_GCA_3_28793: I heard Uncle Lyonya’s back at his usual place.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_3_GCA_3_28815: Yeah. He showed up as soon as they lifted the restrictions. Says he missed going out on runs.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_3_GCA_3_28816: Why wasn’t he guiding folks around the Lesser Zone when the borders were closed? Always complained about his knees, but it’s a pretty short trip, right?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_3_GCA_3_28817: Yeah, keep listening to his whining. He could run all the way to Yaniv and back like it’s a walk in the park.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_3_GCA_3_28820: Guess he had his reasons to lay low.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_4_GCA_4_59736: So where does an ordinary stalker find a little peace and quiet? Here I am in the Zone, surrounded by miracles... how come it isn’t making me happy?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_4_GCA_4_59737: Have a little fresh bread with your stew after a run, get some drinks with your pals, chat about life. That’s happiness. Got nothing to do with miracles.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_4_GCA_4_59738: Come on, Ruby, like you can’t do that back home! That’s not what I’m talking about. Remember how it felt on your first day here?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_4_GCA_4_59739: If that’s what you’re lookin’ for, head north – past the Red Forest, or even farther, over the Boundary. To Prypiat, the CNPP, the Wish Granter…
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_4_GCA_4_59740: All you’re gonna find there is a bullet for your head and rads for your guts. The guys who make it back ain’t ever gonna be the same.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_5_1_59745: We’ve set up our defenses, we’ve got volunteers patrolling the area… but is it enough?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_5_1_59746: Grab a drink and chill out. We’ve done all we can. Getting all worked up about the Monolithians ain’t good for your nerves.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_5_1_59747: I get it. But I still can’t sleep. Every time I hear gunshots, I get the jitters.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_GCA_5_1_59748: All the more reason to have a drink. Or you can head to Rostok – they might give you some meds.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_Opening_Hub_Openi: All right, you can come out now. But remember, you’re in the Zone, so stay put.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_10_1_60: We don’t shoot at other loners here. Try to pull that shit, and you’re done.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_11_1_60: Zalissya pulled through. We held our ground. This place is, and always will be, a safe haven in the Lesser Zone. We’ll defend it together!
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_12_1_60: Volunteers fresh off patrol get drinks on the house.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_13_1_60: If you’ve got any healing artifacts, swing by, and I’ll give you a good deal. Make some cash, save some lives.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_1_1_599: Attention! A quarantine is now in effect. This area is restricted. Please stay where you are.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_2_1_599: The Ward is offering a reward for any information about Squint. The sooner we find him, the faster we can put an end to this unpleasant situation.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_3_1_599: The Ward won’t be sticking around here for long, folks. Try to avoid conflict. The less you bump into them, the smoother things will go.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_4_1_599: Please remain calm. Ward is clearing the area.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_5_1_599: Any suspicious activity may result in immediate termination.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_6_1_599: Feeling worn out? Caught some rads? Swing by Warlock’s bar for a little R&R!
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_7_1_599: If you're not geared up for heading out, Hamster’s got everything you need... and a few extra things he’ll talk you into needing.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_8_1_599: Stay away from the Perimeter, and don’t go sniffing around the Sphere. We don’t bother the IPSF, they don’t bother us.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_PropTopic_9_1_599: Got an artifact? Don’t rush to Rostok, just stop by my shop! A coupon or two beats getting beaten black and blue.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_bata_0_HelloTopic: Nice to see you around, man!
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_bata_0_HubInfo_Hu: What can you tell me about Zalissya?
I fought tooth and nail for this place – first against Monolith, then against those Slag Heap scumbags – so that decent stalkers could have a place to crash.
Mutants and anomalies are bullshit, my boy. You’ll figure that out soon enough. The most dangerous thing in the Zone is other people.
We might not all be best buddies here in Zalissya, but we sure as hell ain’t enemies, either. And as long as I’m breathing, it’s gonna stay that way.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_bata_0_InfoTopic_: If you’re bored, have a seat by the fire at the bar. Our jokes might not exactly be subtle, but you just might pick up some useful tips.
You wanna know what's killing the most rookies? Not mutants or anomalies.
It’s their own loose lips. I can keep them safe in Zalissya, but outside the village, it’s every man for himself.
I don’t know what’s in store for us. Nobody does. Things can always get worse, that’s for sure.
But they can also get better. And I choose to hold onto hope, even if my grumpy mug doesn’t look like it.
The Monolith had to retreat from the Duga, but at what cost? The Ward, armed to the teeth! What if those bastards try to take Zalissya again? I dunno, Skif. It’s tough…
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_bata_0_Meet_2_Mee: Didn’t think you’d get involved in this mess, but here we are. You did pretty good, I gotta say.
Something tells me you're gonna be famous in the Zone.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_bata_0_Meet_3_Mee: Some things will never be the same anymore. Uncle Lyonya won’t be sitting by the fire, and the bar will need time to get back on its feet.
But we won, Skif. We held our ground! And that means everything’s gonna be all right.
All these years, my boy... they weren’t for nothing.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_bata_0_Meet_meet_: So, have you had a chance to look around yet? This is how we do it around here.
The rules are simple enough: no waving guns around, no brawling, and any disputes get settled outside the village.
And a tip from me: don’t get too close to the Ward. They don’t see you as a human being, just a tool. And, as you’re well aware, tools are disposable.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_bata_0_NPC_Emissi: The Emission’s over, folks. You can come out now! If you need a medic, you know where to find him.
Listen up, guys! An Emission is coming! Everyone, take shelter!
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_bata_0_RestoreRep: I want to mend fences with the loners.
Well, you stirred some shit. I won’t even ask why. Don’t really care.
If you don’t want them stabbing you in the back — or worse — you’ll need to show folks you wanna make things right.
I’m glad we understand each other. I can handle the rest.
I need to think about it.
Well, that’s a choice you’ll have to live with.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_dada_lena_0_Hello: What the hell do you want?
Good to see ya. How can I help?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_dada_lena_0_InfoT: Lens thinks I’m protecting them young lads too much. He says, because of me, they don’t take the Zone seriously, just playing around.
The thing is, Lens wandered off on his own once, and… well, he ain’t walkin' anywhere now. I don’t want them lot to end up like him. And neither does the Gaffer.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_dada_lena_0_Meet_: You’ve made a hell of a scene here, lads. I’ve been stomping around the Lesser Zone for years, but this is the first time I’ve seen this quarantine of yours.
Good thing Uncle Lyonya’s got everything prepared: a shelter for the Emissions, some snacks… A good guide always thinks ahead, me boy!
Well, where are we gonna go?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_dada_lena_0_Trave: All the way to Prypiat, if ya want!
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_gosa_sapoznik_0_I: Sukhin’s got the Sphere soldiers by the balls. Poor bastards can't even fart without an order. They used to hang out at our bar back in the day, and now they're shooting at us…
The Ward may be pricks, but they sure know what they’re doing. They’ll have the Zone under their thumb some day, mark my words.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_gosa_sapoznik_SCA: It’s just another day, but I’ve got a bad feeling. Something's coming. And it ain't something good. I can feel it in the air. Yeah, exactly.
If I had a gun like Zotov’s, I’d wanna show it off too…
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_homak_0_ByeTopic_: Come on over, I’ll set aside the best stuff for you.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_homak_0_InfoTopic: They say the Gaffer used to know Strelok himself! The Strelok, who went to the center of the Zone and stirred up so much shit, we’re still talking about it. But the Gaffer won’t say a word, damn it.
Then again, if I knew a dude like him, I guess I’d keep quiet too. Just to stay on the safe side.
I heard IPSF’s gonna call all their lap-dog troops outta the Zone next year.
Over at the Slag Heap, some folks are already talking about stripping the Duga, or maybe looting the Sphere.
If you ask me, I think the Ward’ll just step in for the military, and those guys won’t get squat.
These surprises are making me all paranoid. Like, uh…
Tell me, how could we possibly know Uncle Lyonya was one of them?
Now I’m freaking out about all the old-timers. What if there's another weird signal, and they all go bonkers too?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_homak_0_Meet_2_Me: Those bastards! Turned the place upside down, ruined my deals... Who cares where my goods came from? What’s it got to do with me? Complicit, my ass…
But what are you gonna say when they put a gun to your head? Crap…
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_homak_0_Meet_3_Me: Thanks for helping us out. I thought that basement was the end of me. If they’d tossed a couple of grenades down there, we’d have been and gone.
Monolith takes no prisoners. Maybe that’s for the best…
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_homak_0_Meet_meet: I’ve got the best deals in the Zone. Ask anyone, guaranteed! I never try to pull one over on the rookies like Sidor does.
If anything breaks, it’s ’cuz you need to take care of your gear! This stuff’s not made of steel…
Well, except for the things that are. Ahem. Anyway, show me what you’ve got.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_homak_0_TradeTopi: Let’s see what kinda crap you brought me.
Best deals for you, Zone's my witness!
Well, show me what you’ve got.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_koldun_0_ByeTopic: If you need anything, stop by.
I’ll always keep a bottle ready for you!
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_koldun_0_HelloTop: This place attracts all kinds of scum…
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_koldun_0_InfoTopi: The Gaffer’s a good man. I’ve been with him since we made our way here from the Cordon. We took on the Monolith at the Sphere together. I helped him defend Zalissya and got this bar up and running…
But there’s one thing he doesn’t quite get, stubborn old fool. Risking everyone to save one guy is gonna get you all killed. But he’s still willing to risk it all.
Here, I serve the Wardens just as well as I serve loners, ’cuz I’ve learned my lesson. And the Gaffer’s gonna learn it too, sooner or later.
You got any idea how many years I’ve been battling rats in this joint? A normal rat’s a pain in the ass, but the Zone’s critters can chew up a tank for breakfast.
I thought it was gonna be the end of Zalissya. We put up a fight, sure, but folks were getting serious about bailing on the Zone.
Then, guess what happened the other day? Newbies rolled in. That’s when I knew we’d pull through.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_koldun_0_Meet_2_M: Well, all the drama’s finally over! Anything can be settled with words if you’re willing to talk.
Good luck finding a guy like that, though. Zone folks want it all, and they want it now.
An anomaly? It's gotta be the Oasis! First mission? CNPP! And when it’s about picking a fight, they gotta go up against the Ward. And then we gotta clean up the mess.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_koldun_0_Meet_3_M: Thanks, Skif! You’re welcome at my bar anytime.
Folks who fought with us remember you fondly. Most guys would’ve just walked away, but you stuck with us. Looks like the Gaffer was right – it wasn’t all for nothing.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_koldun_0_Meet_mee: You know, when I opened this bar, I never expected to see so many folks here. I guess the guys at the Cordon had enough of that greedy toad Sidor.
Back in the day, it was just me and the Gaffer having a drink here, and now look at us – a whole bar full of lone stalkers.
If the Ward stopped bugging us, that’d be awesome. Let’s toast to that, huh?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_koldun_0_TradeTop: I’ve set it aside just for you!
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_linza_0_HelloTopi: A decent visitor, finally. Good to see you.
Need anything fixed? Come on, speak up.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_linza_0_InfoTopic: Have you seen the Sphere? Do you know what it does? The thing’s mapping the Zone! I wish I could see what’s inside of it, what kind of anomalies are out there – it’s a true miracle.
I still don’t know how the Gaffer got the Chandelier here – that’s the balloon above Zalissya. The huge-ass thing made it all the way from Prypiat!
They say if you go up there, you can still get a heavy dose of rads.
Or if it comes crashing down on our heads…
Zalissya is slowly recovering. We finally gave the fallen a proper burial.
Some fresh-faced rookies have been showing up, and I’m helping them out as best I can.
You can’t do much against Monolith with your grandpa’s rusty old shotgun, you know…
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_linza_0_Meet_2_Me: They march in here, make a scene, then walk away, just like that? They don’t know squat about how we roll.
Do they really think barging in and pointing their stupid guns at us is gonna scare folks?
Well, around here, anyone who tries to scare us usually ends up with a bullet in the back.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_linza_0_Meet_3_Me: I didn’t honestly think we could hold Zalissya. The Monolith doesn’t mess around!
It’s too bad about the rookies. They weren’t prepared for this.
Honestly, neither were we. But we’ll be on our guard from now on.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_linza_0_Meet_meet: Are you new here? Come on in, make yourself at home – but don’t get too comfy. If you need anything fixed, I’m your man.
If you wanna swap some stories, go to Mykolayich. Or the Gaffer. They’ve got all kinds of baloney to choose from.
All right, come on. What've you got there?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_linza_0_UpgradeTo: The kind of people I have to work with… Fine. Let’s see what you’ve got.
For you, I’ll do my best.
Tell me what you need, and I’ll see what I can do.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_nikolaic_0_ByeTop: Let’s hope this is the last time we bump into each other.
Stay safe. And be careful out there in the field.
If you need my help, you know where to find me.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_nikolaic_0_HealTo: I’m out of painkillers. You’ll have to tough it out.
Are you kidding? You’re perfectly fine.
I’ll take good care of you!
What the hell happened to you?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_nikolaic_0_HelloT: You’re a waste of good bandages… All right, what's the matter?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_nikolaic_0_InfoTo: Back on the Mainland, they never trusted me with anything important. I didn’t spend seven years in med school to stitch paper cuts and write reports for professors my whole life.
But I really wanted to help people, so… I came here. Man, it’s like a fairy tale! All these artifacts… A real miracle!
They’re dangerous, sure. But so is open heart surgery. Should we stop doing it? No way, bro! I’ve brought so many folks back to life… They need me here.
There was this one stalker who thought he could waltz into an anomaly field without a detector. He said he believed in the miracles of the Zone.
You know what the real miracle is? That he somehow made it to me alive with all those injuries.
I didn’t think we’d make it, but somehow we pulled through.
If I’d used medkits, I would’ve lost so many guys... but with artifacts, I managed to save them!
I had to give away most of my stock, but it was worth it. As long as Zalissya still stands, Warlock’ll get me new ones.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_nikolaic_0_Meet_2: I should’ve snatched a couple of medkits from the Ward. You wouldn’t happen to have any?
Eh, forget it. Someone’s gonna open their mouth, and Zotov’ll come snooping around tryin’ to find out where we got ’em.
Our medkits are just as good as theirs, and if you know how to use artifacts, you don’t need ’em anyway.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_nikolaic_0_Meet_3: We took it too easy, and now we've paid for it.
Zalissya is barely hanging on, if at all.
But it doesn’t matter. We’ll recover. We’ll mend and rebuild. I won’t give up this village, or any of our people.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_nikolaic_0_Meet_m: Try not to get caught in an Emission out there in the field. Few people can survive it, and those who do…
No artifact or medication can help them. Trust me – I’ve tried everything.
Sorry, I always feel a little off after an Emission. I don't think I’ll ever get used to it. How can I help?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_nikolaic_0_TradeT: I might have something I can share.
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_rubincik_0_InfoTo: Everyone used to hang out at the Cordon until Sidor went full asshole. He’s milking the rookies like freaking cows. If it wasn't for the Gaffer and Warlock, I’d still be paying that dude for my first gun.
I can finally get outta the Lesser Zone now. But where should I go? And what’s the point, anyway?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_rubincik_0_Resume: So... what were we chattin’ about?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_rubincik_SCAction: Some hot tea would be perfect right about now, strong and spicy as hell…
Wherever I go, those damn pigs just won’t leave me alone… why the hell did I ever leave Garbage?
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_sasa_rabcik_0_Inf: It’s a lot better since we switched over to Myklukha’s coupons. Back in the day, you’d walk around with those stupid papers like a dumbass. Now it’s all on your PDA.
This used to be Monolith turf. The Sphere too, I think. Word is, you can still find their stashes around. If I ever found one, I’d head straight to Yantar with that kinda gear!
Monolith… it’s crazy, man! I used to think, “I wish I could find their stashes and score some loot…” Well, turns out they beat us to the punch!
sid_phrase_Zalesie_Hub_sasa_rabcik_SCAct: So I'm sitting here, just trying to chill, and some bastard thing out there keeps on howling. I almost feel sorry for it, man. Why won't the damn thing shut up?
All the anomalies here have been picked clean. I gotta head over to Prypiat…
No way in hell I’m going deeper into the Zone after this shit. Thought I’d make it all the way to Prypiat, but fuck that!
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_QD_Banzai_: We opened this closet up, and there it was! Probably left from a radio class. Enough spares for a shop – and nothing had burst or got soaked!
Scoutmaster got me all these books… guidebooks for this and that. Weapon manuals. Turns out they're not that hard to fix! Way harder to shoot.
Look… are you really interested? 'Cause everyone's sick and tired of my radio stuff, and there's no news apart from that really.
I played the guitar yesterday, first time ever. Fixed this guy's PDA, asked him to teach me as payment. Maybe, one day I'll buy my own guitar…
A little birdie told me what Rascal was selling my work for. Almost hit him. I know I let my people down, but I can't keep working my ass off for nothing.
Medulin took me in for rehab. I sleep with sensors on, sit around in headphones with theta-waves. I used to be a rat, now I'm a lab rat.
Skif? It's Skif, right? Sorry, my memory's been kinda… off.
It's great that you found Medulin because I'm not really a Zone pro, and he's fragile as a radio lamp.
Rascal just got back, and he's raising hell already. Set up shop here, figure out the routes there.
Could I get a soundproof room first? Before he goes all Las Vegas on this place?
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_QD_HubInfo: It's become our home. Rascal will set up shop, Medulin will make us dig a bunker. Banzai… let's just hope he gets better.
And I'll just be watching how this camp, once abandoned, welcomes new guests by the fire.
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_QD_Hub_Clo: The camp is under attack! No one goes in or out!
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_QD_Hub_Ope: We fought them off. The camp is open.
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_QD_Medulin: I'll demand decent conditions for us from Scoutmaster. This is a matter of life and death, literally. I'm not trained to work in a field hospital!
Gathering medical supplies here and there. Some think we've got enough to get by, but I'd say to "get by" we need triple what we have. At least.
If you need sleeping pills or sedatives, let me know. I can share some from my personal stash.
Beats me how others get by without it. The bounty on our heads makes getting a healthy amount of sleep pretty difficult.
I never got to present my doctor's thesis. Now I have people come in for medical help – "Doctor, take a look". It's flattering, damn it!
Hope I can show you the new admissions wing soon. If Scoutmaster's finally done with his endless renovations!
I filed an anonymous request about myself to Malachite. Turns out they didn't even look for me! After an employee vanished?! Whatever… It's okay, their loss.
I can't believe it's finally over. Let's hope there are no more surprises.
Banzai is whipping up a gift for you. To say sorry.
Good god. His rehab alone was enough for three research papers! The best gift from him would be getting better, finally.
Hope it's not sclerosis. Where were we?
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_QD_Selma_M: Banzai is whipping up a gift for you. To say sorry.
After he almost got us killed?! Nah, that won't fly. He's in the doghouse while he works his fingers to the bone as payback. He can take that gift and shove it.
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_QD_ShelmaI: Scoutmaster and I think you're a reliable one. We're considering offering you a couple of contracts, once I get this place up and running. Think about it.
I'm just thinking: what could our USP be? Bets? Movie screenings? Urban legends about an arch-anomaly in the Burnt Forest?
When will this radio thing finally be over? We're sitting here, all scared, missing out on all the opportunities!
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_QD_ShelmaM: I know for damn sure that shooting's not my thing. I'll save up and hire security for my shop.
Banzai is our golden goose. Learns how to fix stuff faster than lightning, yet doesn't know the market prices for his work. With his prices, I can triple my profit margin!
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_QD_Shelma_: That frequency gave Banzai some brains as well as wiping his memory. He says he'll start charging market price for his work. Looks like the freebie days are over.
Rostok is interested in us already. A trade partnership. That's one hell of a PR campaign I launched, right?
That was some of my genius marketing! A story about a wandering anomaly in the Burnt Forest that always has artifacts.
Tell it a couple of times by the fire, they'll spread it around. Folks will come looking, and where will they buy stuff? Exactly!
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_QD_Vojatiy: Welcome to Kazkovyi. The best sanatorium in the Zone for weary professionals.
Banzai is whipping up a gift for you. To say sorry.
It's tough with idealists. When I cooled off, I told him that history's written by the victors. He doesn't get it – and he won't until he forgives himself.
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_QD_Vozatiy: Medulin appreciated your gift – he'd sleep in that suit! If he could fall asleep without a blanket and pillow…
Rascal already shared his problem-solving ways, right when you came. I won't even bother running them by you. He's hopeless.
I was wrong about Banzai. The problem wasn't him, it was the tools. You can ask him for repairs, now. I can highly recommend him.
Banzai versus equipment is something different now. Got him a pile to practice repairs on. So far, the equipment's winning 3-1.
Kazkovyi isn't the best place for defenses. But it's the best the Burnt Forest can offer.
Zalissya and Sidorovich solved similar problems. We will, too.
Must be a full house at the Rostok bar now. I miss these little joys of life.
When you're there, drink to Kazkovyi. To us – able to walk the Zone with no targets on our backs.
Step by step, we're repairing the second building. Sometimes it seems like it would be easier to blow it up – and I can't say I don't want to.
Medulin came over a few days ago with a med request, three pages worth. Guess how he justified it. "In a couple of years, you'll be the one who needs it".
We're getting more folks coming in. Guitar, campfire songs… I wonder if I should open a bar here when the time's right.
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_supack_ass: I warned you it would turn out like this.
Hm. It seems fine to me. Or this diagnosis is beyond my competence…
Poor you… Should've been more careful! We'll fix that…
Hope you're good, and not here for medical help?
Finally, we get to meet in an almost calm environment.
Assistant professor Medulin, psychology PhD., specializing in anomalous psychophysiology.
Ages ago, I was a hospital intern. Considering our state of emergency, looks like I still am.
This isn't Malachite. I can't guarantee quality.
Take some more. Who knows what you might find yourself up against.
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_supack_ban: Stop by! Good to see you.
Oh, hey! You need something, or just chatting?
Here we are again. I'm settling in, so far so good. It's no Rostok, of course, but…
I can't do much, apart from radios. But I'll find a way to make myself useful! Scoutmaster can't do it all alone.
I'm no pro, but I'll do my best.
If nothing comes out of it, I'll revert it!
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_supack_sel: Drop you a message when we have discounts?
You'll always be a VIP here.
Look who's here! My favorite client!
Did you sort your money trouble? Congrats, or whatever?
So, what's new around the Zone? Scandals, gossip, business opportunities?
You were just on time with those bandits! I could've sorted it myself, but didn't have the time or the mood…
Nice to meet you. Rascal. The person the whole Zone will soon want to meet.
You didn't just help out a man in his hour of need, you made an investment in the future.
Not much yet, but the right package is on its way!
If I had a VIP card, I would've given it to you already.
sid_phrase_supack_Kazkovy_Hub_supack_voz: Not now.
Good luck in the Zone.
Off you pop.
Always happy to see you.
Welcome.
Need a guide? Or..?
I knew you'd come by. Hey there.
A shelter that you helped us build with your own hands. I hope we'll be able to settle down here and hold our fort.
No one really wanders off to the Burnt Forest, and Kazkovyi has the reputation of a place of slow and painful deaths. So far, that's good for us.
So you're here to check on us? Not bad, for a start. Thanks to your help in particular.
I took it upon myself to oversee things here since I'm quite experienced, and the others don't seem to mind.
But I'm still at your services as a guide. I don't think anything will blow up if I step out for a quick stroll.
Sky is clear. Back to your posts!
Emission. Hang tight until my command.
Emission! Run and hide, quickly!
I was wrong, Scoutmaster. Can we talk?
More than simply wrong, Skif. Those things are hard to forget.
You're no stranger to this camp. Put some coupons in the pot to help set things up here, and I'll spread the word.
I need to think about it.
Do that. But we'll think it over, too.
I hope this helps.
It does help. You, in particular.
Let's take a stroll, then.
Where to?
The Zone's quiet today. There's a lot to be admired.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QC_Banzai_TurnOn: So I thought you should do the honors and turn the switches on. If anyone deserves it, it's you.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QC_Medulin_After: Perfect timing, Scoutmaster. He's the one that could always get through to Banzai, and he's gone.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QC_Shelma_AfterS: Talk some sense into Banzai, or we're all toast.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Banzai_AboutG: Sounds good. I'm waiting for your guide.
Great! He's nearby and will come get you!
I've got stuff to do. I'll find my own way.
Just hurry up, okay? And stay safe. Over and out.
Skif, Banzai here. Are you okay there? Haven't heard from you in a while…
Just wanted to say I pulled some strings with the Rostok guide. He'll pick you up at the coordinates and get you to Kazkovyi. Sound good?
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Banzai_Skif_F: You okay? Are your ears bleeding?
Nah! I told you we had it under control.
I don't have military-grade capacity! Though, wait a minute… Maybe there is somewhere. I did listen to one of their frequencies from…
There's an amplifier at the Volkhov SAM site. If you unscrew it from there and fix it onto here, I'll record it all!
Let me transfer some software to your PDA. It'll help you find the amplifier, but be careful! Hell knows who's lurking around there.
Without the full transmission – nothing. Banzai, can you make a longer recording?
The analyzer has started recording. Don't you lose it now! Just a bit more… there… Damn! Lost it!
Wait… turn it up a bit… there! Medulin, get it!
It's clear that nothing's clear. What do we do now?
That's all you can tell me?
Banzai, are you sure you recorded it right? It's literally a brain activity recording!
But there is no way a brain could be this complicated! I don't understand…
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Banzai_Skif_N: I get it. The place is weird. Spooky.
At the Volkhov SAM. I fixed up your PDA, so there shouldn't be a problem detecting the amplifier.
Where can I find it again?
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Banzai_Skif_R: If Rascal's radio keeps screaming, I won't be able to do much here.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Banzai_Skif_T: I almost got it! The frequency's hopping, but I got it!
If it wasn't for Rascal and his radio, damn it!
Pay him a visit, will you? If he won't do it the easy way, turn it off yourself.
What's this have to do with Rascal and the radio?
Slow down. You found that transmission of yours?
Yes, Medulin tuned his whatever-analyzer so that the machine would do the listening and our ears won't bleed. Problem is, Rascal's a moron.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Banzai_TurnOn: Don't be scared, hit em'! Medulin and I have it under control.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Medulin_Skif_: Banzai said there was one at the Volkhov SAM. Your PDA should detect it.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_AllGroup: I got the amplifier from Volkhov.
Great! I knew you'd pull it off. Bring it over here.
Don't you fucking give it to him! That thing'll be the death of us all!
With the amplifier, I'll record the whole transmission for Medulin to decipher, and that's it!
If you manage to make an interfering signal out of the full recording, they'll be toast, not us!
I spoke to Skull at the Volkhov site.
Gee… how did you make it out? Does he know about us? Could he have followed you back?
Of course he could have! We should get outta this dump and to the Mainland while we can!
I knew I should've bolted to Rostok!
But don't turn anything on until Scoutmaster's back, you hear me?
I'll just check the amplifier. Maybe it's no good at all. Skif, you coming? Let's have some peace and quiet.
Enough with the panic. I trust Banzai.
At least someone's got a bit of brains left…
Let me at least check if the amplifier works! What if it's no good?
Poor, poor me… Skif, go with Banzai and keep an eye on him please.
Rascal's right. Let's wait for Scoutmaster.
Where did Scoutmaster go?
Ah, hell knows! Wandered off somewhere, and he's too proud to say where.
What are you fighting about?
Banzai wants to use the amplifier at full capacity to record the whole transmission. But there's a problem…
If you just listen to me, it'll all be fine! Can you take my word for it just this once?!
A big fucking one! Mercs will be able to track it and come for us!
Why'd it be the death of you?
Because if he turns it on at full power, mercs will be able to track us down!
If we don't, they'll come up with another way. The Zone is small. This way, we'll deal with the transmission, Skull, and everything!
You're both nuts with that radio of yours! If you won't listen to me, wait for Scoutmaster!
Are you nuts?! Skull will track the amplifier and we're as good as dead!
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_Banzai_G: First: do you trust me? That I know how to put an end to this? And that I wanna help us?
I'll try to find him. Any leads?
He had a stash at the edge of the Burnt Forest. I know because the jammer's always on. So no transmission can… catch my drift?
I'll send you the coordinates. Just don't do anything stupid if you're not sure!
I believe you want to. But I'm not sure about the rest.
Back when you found me in the mine, in the cage, you told me to wait, and I did. Told me to follow, I did. No questions asked.
It was your playing field, and I trusted you, but now we're both on mine.
Your plan threatens the whole camp. That's no way to help.
Just hear me out, okay? Let me finish. And give me the amp.
It's working great. Just as I thought.
Didn't wanna say it in front of everyone… We got a rat. You don't think Skull just happened to be at Volkhov?
Scoutmaster disappeared right after you left. I don't wanna jump to conclusions, but… it's weird.
Not just him. I don't wanna badmouth anyone since the other two stayed here, you know.
Why would Scoutmaster do that? He's the one who cares about the camp most.
Let's be real. Every one of us here at least once thought about ratting the rest out and saving himself.
Someone might've had enough. Might be Scoutmaster. I wouldn't blame him.
At least you have a plan. Unlike the others.
Thank you. You know, it's hard when everyone thinks you're cuckoo… I appreciate it. Give me the amp.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_Choice_D: You sure they're worth your help? Or your life? This is the last time I'm gonna ask you.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_Choice_G: I can, but not for free.
Ballsy move. I like it. Go on, check your PDA.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_Choice_H: Banzai. I want him to solve the puzzle, his life's work.
I respect him. He'd slaughter his way to his dream, if he was able to kill.
Medulin. His research could save hundreds of lives.
After he sent dozens to the slaughter. That's just the way science works.
Scoutmaster. And he's helping the others.
Dear old Scoutmaster. New life, new callsign, and the same trick of fooling folks with his words.
Rascal. He's just a merchant. He shouldn't be caught up in this.
"I know nothing, I'm just a merchant" is his catchphrase before every deal he makes.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_Choice_I: I promised to help, and I'll keep that promise.
A man of his word in the Zone. Which one are you trying to help?
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_Choice_O: The whole group is in the Burnt Forest, Kazkovyi camp.
And my respect. You took out Pickaxe's whole gang on your own, so you're someone I'd part ways with peacefully.
And my respect. I knew you were a sharp one since the Old Mine. You're someone you part ways with peacefully.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_Choice_R: Classic Scoutmaster – hiding a tree in a forest. You can go. No one will touch you.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_Choice_S: I don't need any loot from Kazkovyi. Consider it yours if you help me.
Stay where you are. Nice 'n' easy. We can see you.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_Choice_T: A guide, a medic, a tech, and a merchant, all in my debt. It's useful.
I get that. But they're no use to a dead man.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_Choice_W: How can you guarantee you'll let me walk away?
My contract is only for those four, and I've got nothing against you. My lack of interest is your guarantee.
I need the whereabouts of the NK-5 group. Medulin, Banzai, Scoutmaster, Rascal. Send me the coordinates, and be on your way.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ100_QD_Skif_Shelma_A: Whoa, whoa! Chill out. Who needs a transmission to be at each other's throats?
Banzai asked you to turn the radio off.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_AL_VozWithCherep: Surgeon, come in. You at the spot? The group still clueless?
Yes. As they should be. They're tinkering with radios, looking for something. No idea what.
Whatever it is, let them find it. Sending the frequency now. Let them tune in to it and get back to base.
That's it? Our tickets to the Mainland are worth so little? Well, it really is a rich man's world.
Hey, man! What's up?! Hey… Hey! What the hell?! Drop the gun! Drop—
(groans, the sound of radio being turned off)
Help the scientists? Let them listen to that transmission?! You fucked me over, you piece of shit!
You thought you could use me one last time? So everyone would die 'cause of me and I'd put the last bullet through my own head?!
Wrong fucking guess, Skull. I'm alive, of sound mind, and I turned that shit off. I'll be seeing you…
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QC_BanAfterGivin: Please hurry back with some news. I really wanna be wrong about Scoutmaster.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QC_BanzajCrazy1_: Don't go… just don't run away, I almost got you…
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QC_BanzajCrazy2_: Thirty-two… Seventeen… Twenty-one… What's that song you're singing to me?
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QC_IntBanzAfterT: Scoutmaster wanted to see you. I won't pull anything this time.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QC_InteractVozEn: Go to Kazkovyi. Don't bother an old man smoking by the water, getting his thoughts straight.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QC_MedulinGoSlee: I, uh… I need some air.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QC_OnInteractAft: Decided to sleep over? Open up, quickly.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QC_RatShelmaInte: You need something? I'm just here… weighing my options.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QC_VozCallAfterF: Skif? I reckon this isn't a social call. Come on over, let's talk.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QC_VozCallNearSt: We're here. Come closer. I'll give you the stash key.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QD_DrinkingWithM: I got my head bashed in on my first day in the Zone. I came to without my stuff, an anomaly field around me, and a blind dog chewing my leg.
On my first day in the Zone… Well, it's good thing we didn't meet earlier! I was putting together a rookie team. Hot-headed, fearless. All of them died…
Not here, yet. But I saw worse things on the Mainland.
I think I'll come back later.
Provided there is a "later"…
Have you ever met Skull before? Maybe he was in one of your field teams?
I give you my word: it's the first time I've heard of him! I'd remember… he wouldn't have passed the psych eval with that name!
Nasty stuff… Between us – have you been in tough situations like this before? Or is this the worst yet?
This is between you and your conscience, and that's up to you. But you're not the rat.
I'm not scared anymore! You think you're the first group I've sent to their deaths? Maybe this is what I deserve, but not you…
(drinks vodka)
Heard of the Duga assault? I saw many battles before the Zone, but nothing like that.
Duga? God… but you're not one of those? The Wild Island ones? They were my first group… and I sent them under that transmission! To their deaths!
An Emission. While I was running to shelter, I realized people can be persuaded, mutants – shot. But this is different.
No way! No way, like with this transmission. It kills everyone: old-timers, rookies, random folks! I gathered groups, tried to get them ready… it destroyed them all!
My home burned down, along with all my memories. I was forced to watch the flames in my slippers, nothing to do, nowhere to go.
That's how I got out of Malachite – in my slippers! So I could be with this group until we solve it. Or die… I deserve it! After sending so many to their deaths.
Spell it out: what does Banzai want to do?
Use a military amplifier to record the whole transmission, from start to finish.
Then, I'd be able to create an interfering signal. If it's overlapped, this radio nightmare will no longer be a threat to anyone!
But if Banzai turns the amplifier on, I'll be trying to beat death itself! And if Skull makes it out here first, we're as good as dead anyway.
Yes. Even here in the Zone.
I guess it's personal, but will you tell me? Give me an example?
Doesn't look like your fault. Skull took all your groups out, right from the very first one.
What?! I tormented myself… when it was that bastard?! I couldn't have expected merc involvement…
It wasn't a good thing you did, but you tried to save your groups. You're not an asshole or a rat.
A drink, maybe? What does science say about the impact of alcohol on stress?
No way! Death is breathing down our necks. What if I have to shoot?
Know anything about the Monolith? I saw it. I witnessed it frying brains first-hand.
Where were you all this time with experience like that? That psi-resilience… Just what I needed for my group! So they'd have had a chance instead of a death sentence…
You don't seem tipsy at all. One more?
What are you doing? Go drink with Rascal, he's used to that! What have I become…
Being afraid won't help. I'd have a drink if I were you. Liquid courage.
A rat? What does it have to do…
You'll be less scared to do it. Grab a shotgun from Rascal. It's hard to miss with one of those.
I'll trust your expertise.
Even if he won't – we'll figure it out. Rascal ordered a whole lot of medkits for you.
Right here, at Kazkovyi, in one of the buildings. So… Skif, be honest – am I an asshole?
I can get them from his other warehouse. Where was it again?
I'm not saying we should get wasted. Just the prescribed amount.
Maybe, just a little. As a sedative.
Banzai and his ideas! I'm no better, I should have seen this coming…
Your groups were dying, all you did was whine. I agree. I'm surprised you're not the rat.
If Skull contacted me, I'd give him anything! Just so he'd leave the group alone… If he'd just take me…
When I got back from the war, to a world I didn't belong in, with no one to fucking care.
You were in the military? Then… you get it! NK-2 was a search group, I sent them to at least find the bodies… I sent them to die, you understand?!
See what coming?
That this group would be in danger, too! I should've gotten more medkits, psi-protection, headphones – everything, for crying out loud!
I was thinking: Skull figured out I was at Volkhov. Any idea how?
None whatsoever! Maybe they came to get the same amp? Just bad luck?
I guess this is the worst one by far.
Now I get why you wanted to have a drink. You're scared too, aren't you?
Only psychos aren't scared when there's good reason to be. One more? Liquid courage.
You think it was your fault the groups died. Why?
I got them the best gear! Tried to prepare them for anything… but I couldn't tell them what they'd gotten into!
They'd have refused, and a great discovery was at stake! I should've stopped after the first group died…
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QD_DuringWalkWit: So you do trust me a bit? I didn't expect you to. Good to know.
That isn't any of your business. At least, not yet.
You still think I sold you out. Suit yourself.
I hope you're working on your defenses, and not just looking for double agents.
You got the wrong suspect, but the suspicion is justifiable. Skull managed to find you somehow. You still have the amplifier, right?
Not going to say anything? I'll wait.
sid_phrase_supack_SQ101_QD_FinalWithBanz: Medulin can create an interfering signal with the full recording. We'll be safe from the transmission, while everyone who's coming to get us won't.
It doesn't matter how cool you are if your brain gets fried… Hold on. The mercs have turned their comms on!
Give me one good reason not to put a bullet in your brain.
Honestly? I haven't got one. At least now I can listen to Skull & Co. on the radio. So why don't you go ahead and get in line after them.
You knew Skull would be at Volkhov. Am I right?
Skif, I…
Yes or no?
Yes. I made sure everyone could hear us on the radio talking about Volkhov. I thought it'd be some thugs, not a merc squad!
I needed the mercs' frequencies. When I tinkered with your PDA to detect Volkhov's amp, I might've added another feature.
Well… if the mercs go on comms near you, the PDA detects it and sends it to me. And I find the algorithm of their frequency hopping.
I asked if you trusted me, and you said you didn't. So I had to risk it.
I knew I couldn't trust you.
