sid_stashes_Gen_Stash245_description: You're better off not stashing anything of value, but I'm no chump: this place is pretty hard to stumble upon.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash246_description: Left to get: grub - 3 cans, ammo - 2 mags, sausage - 2 packs, vodka - 1 bottle.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash247_description: You find this stash - you take a moment to remember Toad. It's his stuff.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash248_description: Whoever finds it, say hello to the Shah for me, and make sure to spit in his fucking face.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash249_description: Won't give anything back to that piece of shit! I'd rather leave it all here to rot, damn it! Who does she think she is? The queen of Zaton?
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash24_description: I have no idea who left this here. Whoever they are, they never came back for it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash250_description: That's for taking Walrus out. He might be alright now, but there's no such thing as a former Monolithian.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash251_description: Now I see why he joined the local goons. Second day on the job, and this much loot!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash252_description: More than I hoped for, less than I wanted.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash253_description: Better to pay them smugs than to catch them slugs.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash254_description: Already got a buyer for this stash. Better not mess with them.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash256_description: Hid it as well as I could. Let the Zone be the judge of that.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash257_description: Shouldn't have messed with me. Now the loot's mine, and that clown is blind dog food.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash258_description: Some jumpy chump was hanging around here. Could it be a stash?
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash259_description: This loot wasn't worth catching a slug. And way too heavy to carry around.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash25_description: No one will think to look here.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash260_description: Would be a shame if someone got for free what I worked so hard for.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash261_description: Genius plan, my ass. Here's your joke of a cut.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash262_description: I may be a rat, but I'm a rat with coupons.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash263_description: It's coming. The chaos is underway. Coupons won't be worth anything. The only chance to survive is to prep.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash264_description: Don't get too excited if you found my stash. Nothing's for free in the Zone.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash265_description: If you try to track me down through this stash, I'm not working with you anymore.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash266_description: Go ahead, knock yourself out. Quite literally.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash267_description: Coupons are good, but not good enough to patch up a wound or load your mags.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash268_description: It smells like flesh ass, but at least no one will bother to look for my stash here.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash269_description: Saving up doesn't get any easier. Am I gonna return to the Mainland with nothing?
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash26_description: A little something for a rainy day.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash271_description: Lookie here! My very first stash.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash272_description: If you got the guts to take it, know this: the stuff belonged to a dead guy. I couldn't do it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash273_description: You gotta offer something to this place if you wanna stay in one piece. Leave a gift here, and no one will dare touch it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash274_description: I hope you made it. Couldn't wait any longer, went on to the next spot. Take it all and catch up.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash275_description: Attaboy! You made it this far, which means you learned your lesson. Grab the goodies and get your arse back - we got business to discuss.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash276_description: Rumor has it, Noah was seen somewhere around here with a pet pseudodog. Maybe I'll be lucky enough to see it for myself when I go back for my loot.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash277_description: I won't need this in the Shining Zone.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash278_description: Can't decide if I should go kill that poltergeist or not. Let the Zone decide. If no one nicks this stash by tomorrow, I'm going.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash279_description: Now all I gotta do is keep my mouth shut about this place when I go drinking.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash27_description: Screw it, this loot is cursed!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash281_description: Hid it while everyone was asleep.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash282_description: Can't see it from a couple meters away - good enough for me.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash283_description: What am I supposed to do, throw it away? What if I need it later?
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash284_description: Whoever managed to find this must be worthy of taking it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash285_description: Looks like someone's got sticky fingers. Also looks like you won't be needing them.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash286_description: I'll grab it if I ever want to go back to the Mainland.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash287_description: I'll grab it on the way back from the hunt.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash288_description: My debt, with interest. It's all I've got.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash289_description: Left it here just for fun. If you find it, pour one and toast to me.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash28_description: I’m sick of lugging all this stuff around. I’ll come back later.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash290_description: No time to find a better place to hide it, so I'll leave it here for now.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash291_description: Time to cleanse my karma. Take it if you need it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash292_description: Heading to the merchant tomorrow to get some coupons for it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash293_description: I left it right freaking here! Damn! Can't find it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash294_description: Let it stay here and dry out, I'll come get it later.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash295_description: Can't trust anyone at camp. Them shitheads will nick it for sure.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash296_description: I'm almost sure I put some supplies away a couple of days ago. Or maybe I didn't? Or maybe I stashed them somewhere else? I'll mark the spot just in case.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash297_description: The true value of this stash is its history: I had to fight three fleshes for it!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash298_description: Had to sweat a bit before I pulled this stash out of an anomaly! Would be a bummer if someone snatched it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash299_description: Everything in this stash brings good luck to the owner.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash2_description: Took some stuff off those stalkers. I’ll come back for it later.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash300_description: They promised top-notch goods, exclusive. Bastards. I spent so much on this…
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash301_description: Don't you dare whine about how I didn't leave you the stuff we agreed on. You screwed me over big time, you don't even deserve this.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash302_description: Folks say this one stalker exchanged goods using stashes as dead drops. Started with a gauze, went all the way up to a Gauss! I wonder what I'll end up getting.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash303_description: Every damn time I hide some goodies away, someone finds 'em. I bet that guide makes his trails near my stashes on purpose!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash303_name: A hidden stash once again rehidden
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash304_description: I know how hard it can be here in the Zone. May this help you get through another day.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash305_description: Keep looking, you nasty fuckers. My stashes are a form of art.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash306_description: I just need to save up a bit more to buy a gun. Won't get me a Gauss, but they say the Ragman has some decent stuff for a good price.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash307_description: Hope this helps, stalker. 'Cause it sure didn't help me.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash309_description: Can't let it go to waste, can I?
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash30_description: I’ll leave it here for just one day. Gonna come back tomorrow.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash310_description: Gotta remember where I left it. Lost two stashes already. Or someone ripped me off.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash313_description: I'll have plenty of time to come back for my stuff.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash314_description: I'll make sure to find it this time.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash315_description: Can't hurt to have some goods stashed away for later.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash318_description: Damn pseudodog! Right where my stash was! I'll have to get it later.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash319_description: I hope that idiot didn't forget where the stash is and has enough brains to grab the supplies.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash31_description: A stash like this saved me once. Maybe this one will save a life too.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash320_description: Hell knows if I ever end up here again. But if I do, at least I won't starve.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash321_description: Mom always taught me to stash stuff for later. Who knew I'd actually start taking her advice, now that I'm thirty.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash322_description: This is your first job. If you can't deliver it, you're no courier for my crew.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash323_description: Deliver before midnight. It's a matter of life and death.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash324_description: Who knows what I might need on that run. Better to scatter stuff around and stash it in different spots.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash325_description: Leave the merchandise here. I'll grab it on my way back.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash326_description: So sick of shooting back at mutants. Just a couple more stashes, then I'll hire some muscle and open my own shop.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash327_description: Like we agreed. Now you talk to Myklukha and make sure I get to join Freedom.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash328_description: I'm no thief! But I can't return it - they'll shoot me right away.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash329_description: So what, if this never made it to its rightful owner? I need it more.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash32_description: Finally, I’ve got enough to repay my debt. But it'd be impossible to carry it all in one go.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash330_description: This looks like a lousy hiding place, but I'm way too tired to carry it on.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash333_description: Stumbled upon a bloodsuckers lair. Luckily, they just ate and were out like a light. Still managed to loot a couple of corpses.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash334_description: Out to meet some folks. If I don't come back, this is all yours.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash335_description: Free piece of advice: never trust stash resellers. Total scumbags.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash336_description: Vadya, don't touch this! This is for a special occasion.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash337_description: If you take it, I won't cry. I stole it myself, anyway.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash338_description: Getting greedy, ha? Well, don't. Say thank you for the little freebie. Can't get much for free around here.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash339_description: This loot is a one-way ticket.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash33_description: This stash is as reliable as a Swiss watch.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash340_description: My whole squad was wiped out right here.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash341_description: At least this one spot never let me down.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash342_description: I'll win it all back, sure ain't a first. But I'll stash something away this time.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash343_description: Want a piece of the pie - get ready to die.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash344_description: So basic. I'll trade it for something more fun for my collection.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash345_description: When I kick the bucket, sell my loot and give me a proper goodbye. Don't wanna die as some mutant chow.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash347_description: They're tracking their shipments, for sure. But how? I'll leave it here until I figure it out.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash348_description: It was way more fun to hide something when I was a kid.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash349_description: Wanna snatch it - go ahead. But remember, revenge is a dish best served in your damn face from a gun barrel.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash34_description: If you hit my stash, I’ll find you and beat the ever-loving snot out of you.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash350_description: All this sweet stuff's from my loyal followers! Don't you touch it, or you'll have to deal with Lex the Legend himself. And I'll send my chumps after you, too!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash351_description: Some loot for Swedish's shop. I'll take it to him when I get the chance. Sure hope his plan works.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash352_description: Trinkets for Swedish. I wonder if Sidor offed him already.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash353_description: I hope this is enough to get back to the Mainland. I'll kill Adik and get the hell out. Screw all of this, screw the Zone.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash354_description: Just wanna get rid of all this crap and drink to Tolik's memory. If someone beats me to it… At least pour one to honor him!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash355_description: Crest and I used to share this stash. Can't keep it any longer. Can't get myself to use it, either.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash356_description: Damn it, Sledgehammer, here's your advance. Why the hell don't you trust us anymore?
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash357_description: I'll stash everything up here and be on my merry way. Don't even know where to. Somewhere far away from Valerian and his reminiscing about the good old days.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash358_description: This is the stash of a future Warden, Kiryukha Drive, y'all. If you're thinking of nicking it, better think again!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash359_description: Lookie here, so Filimon wasn't shitting me. Turns out it's a decent stash, for real. I'll grab whatever's worth a pretty coupon and leave the rest here for later.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash35_description: Who would’ve thought there’d be a place for a stash here?
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash360_description: Trickster said he left this stash for me. In case Wardens start snooping around and he'll have to get out of Malachite for good. And what is a scientist supposed to do with all of this?
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash361_description: Southpaw asked me to make a stash here. Like, they'll finish their last run for the scientists and switch to the big leagues. About time.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash361_name: A small stash for the team
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash362_description: Hromovyi, don't be such a wuss, pick up your pals' gear already. Or someone sure will beat you to it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash363_description: If this trick doesn't work at the Central Elevator, I'll save up for a decent gun. This will be my down payment.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash364_description: Seryoga Root, a decent bloke, is giving this stash to his poor yet proud lads. What's the craic with Freedom, by the way?
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash365_description: The truth is one, but the paths toward it are many. I will no longer require this on my path. Take it. Hermit.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash366_description: If Shapka finds out I'm side hustling, I'm fucked. Guess I'll hide these goodies where the devil don't go.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash367_description: Saving up for a new guitar. Guys, show some respect. If you find it, don't nick it. Beer's on me. Vadyk Firecracker.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash368_description: Yukhym, here's what I owe you, bastard. Hope the fleshes tear you apart bit by bit.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash369_description: If you stick around with bandits, you can actually learn a lot. Like, how to hide loot so they won't find it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash38_description: Why is it so heavy? I hope no one finds it here.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash39_description: Fuck this! I’m dropping it here. Finders keepers.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash3_description: I'll leave it here just in case. I wouldn’t want to have it on me if I run into some bandits.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash40_description: If you find it, good on you!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash41_description: I had to bring my loot here — my other stash got compromised.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash42_description: I hate to leave it, but I can’t carry it either. Hopefully I can find it when I come back.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash43_description: I caught a bullet, can’t carry all this weight anymore. Gotta leave it here.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash44_description: They say one fence had his couriers leave stuff for him here. So this must be a good spot.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash45_description: Some dumbasses got eaten by mutants, so I grabbed their stuff and hid it all here.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash46_description: I’m leaving it here, hoping to find it later. But if you’re reading this, I guess that's not happening.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash47_description: To whoever reads this: screw you.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash48_description: I'd say this is for a rainy day, but there’s no such thing as a sunny day in the Zone.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash49_description: If you touch it, I’ll come back and bury you.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash4_description: If you find it, it’s all yours, stalker.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash50_description: I’ll bury it here before they bury me for stealing it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash51_description: Dig in, boys. I’m feeling generous.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash52_description: Take it, I dare you. The Zone isn't that big.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash53_description: If you steal it, I’ll curse you!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash55_description: A stash a day keeps the mutants away.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash57_description: This is my life savings, so don't touch it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash58_description: Loot for everyone, free, and let no one even think of stealing my shit!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash59_description: One more drop for you, and we’ll call it even.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash5_description: Got too much loot already. Better leave it here and come back later.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash60_description: If you find something here, it means I’m already dead.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash61_description: You’d better look around before diving into this stash.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash62_description: I never managed to haul this stuff to the trader. Now you found it, so it’s your problem.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash63_description: I lost my pals to an anomaly. I’m leaving their stuff here. Wouldn’t want it to go to waste.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash64_description: Congratulations, you found the treasure of the Monolith! Ha ha, just kidding!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash65_description: It’s too much loot! I can’t carry it anymore!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash66_description: This place looks shady, but I guess I have no choice.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash68_description: So, you found it? Well, enjoy it while you can. Asshole.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash69_description: This is my stash. There are many others like it, but this one is mine.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash6_description: I’ve got too much already. I’ll come back for it later... if I’m still alive.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash70_description: If you only knew how little I care about this stuff, you’d cry.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash71_description: How did I end up here — and with a full backpack, no less? Better drop some stuff, or it'll slow me down...
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash72_description: What the hell are you hoping to find here, asshole?
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash74_description: Go ahead, take it. But you’ll have to pay me back with interest.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash75_description: Easy come, easy go. Take it. The Zone will give me more.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash77_description: If you take what’s mine, you’ll be in my debt for the rest of your life.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash79_description: While you’re trying to get this loot, keep in mind that I’m watching you and laughing my ass off.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash7_description: I’m going to a dangerous place, so I need to travel light.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash80_description: I brought everything you asked for. Now I expect you to do the same. I’ll see you at the meeting place — don’t be late.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash82_description: Leave your payment here, and don’t even think about trying to find me.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash83_description: You left me with nothing. I hope you choke on it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash85_description: I expect to find your payment in the usual place.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash86_description: For that little favor you did me.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash87_description: I know, it’s not nearly enough. But I’ll get you the rest in a couple of days, I swear!
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash88_description: Random stuff to be exchanged for something useful.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash89_description: If you see it, take it. I’m heading back to the Mainland.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash8_description: I got a great haul this time. One more raid, and I can finally retire.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash90_description: Whoever you are, I know you’ve been going through my stashes! You won't get anything of value — I hid all the good stuff someplace safe.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash91_description: This is the last time I save your asses.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash92_description: I’d rather give it to a stalker than let some bandits have it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash93_description: I’m a guide, okay? Stealing my stash would be pretty low.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash94_description: If I catch you with your mitts in the loot, you’ll regret it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash95_description: Congratulations, asshole, you found my stash. I hope you choke on it.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash96_description: If I get robbed again, that’s it, I’m joining the bandits.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash97_description: There’s no safer place for a stash than this.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash98_description: This'll come in handy on my way back.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash99_description: One man’s trash is my treasure.
sid_stashes_Gen_Stash9_description: I need to remember where I hid it...
sid_stashes_SQ01_Stash_description: Those greedy bastards won’t get a single coupon from me. I left a stash in case I get cornered. I’m gonna shoot them one by one.
sid_stashes_SQ03_Stash_MastifReward_desc: Hopefully I'll find it all here when I get back from the Slag Heap.
sid_stashes_SQ05_ShakhStash_description: I got a gun delivered from the Mainland. What a beaut! Cost me an arm and a leg, though. I’m putting a couple of goons to protect it from stalker scum before I have a chance to put it to good use.
sid_stashes_SQ10_MonolithStashSPO_descri: May those who first hear the voice of the Monolith equip themselves in order to defend it.
sid_stashes_SQ47_ZaharBabajStash_descrip: There's a lot of people at the Garbage — plenty of fools for my share. But a stash for a rainy day is never a bad idea. Just in case someone slips away
sid_stashes_SQ86_Stash_GenijCache_descri: The underground area beneath the Concrete Forest is one hell of a maze. I stashed some goods by the wooden spool under the stairs. It’s a secure spot... as long as no one’s tailing me.
sid_stashes_SQ89_ZhgutCache_description: I left another backpack on the train by the Curved Bridge. It’s a well-known place, so the backpack has to get picked up real soon. Good thing it’s not far from the store.
sid_stashes_Swamp_OldChurch_1_Stash_desc: A stash like this saved me once. Maybe this one will save a life too.
sid_stashes_Swamp_SunkenTugBoat_2_Stash_: No one will think to look here.
sid_stashes_TestEQ_Stash_Dima_Moose_desc: Сталкер оставил здесь часть добычи, чтобы вернуться за ней позднее.
sid_stashes_supack_SQ100_MapMarkerAltern: Kazkovyi is not broadcasting anymore. What's happening out there now?
sid_stashes_supack_SQ102_CherepStash_Var: A stash for the last mission. Get it done, and I'll talk to S as promised. He knows how to hide from the Ward and the ones above them, especially on the Mainland. Don't let me down. Nord.
You know what's at stake. We need to stay off the radar until their secrets are uncovered. Kill everyone who could expose us. Don't let me down. Nord.

Last shipment. Smart – leaving Nord before the event. To hell with the laboratory, we only need the technology. Get rid of everyone who knows about it, and I'll teach you to hide from our enemies on the Mainland. Chekhov.
sid_stashes_supack__SQ98_MedulinStash_de: You have to be prepared for anything in the Zone. The stash is in one of the two wagons on the railway tracks. It even has enough medkits to patch up a small crew.
sid_stashes_supack__SQ99_ShelmaStash_des: Rascal, your financial investment is behind the box in the booth. This time, be careful with the tripwire. Take it only if absolutely necessary.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_backpack_01_a_descri: Allows not only to carry more items, but to do it with maximum comfort.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_backpack_01_b_descri: Provides additional storage and carrying capacity.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_backpack_01_descript: Efficient equipment distribution greatly increases carrying capacity.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_backpack_02_a_descri: A professional backpack for tourists and mountaineers. Has a large capacity and fits snugly against the back, distributing the load evenly.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_backpack_02_b_descri: Proper gear stacking reduces its weight and increases the efficiency of pockets, pouches, and backpacks.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_backpack_02_descript: The back frame alleviates shoulder fatigue by evenly distributing the load across the entire body, allowing the wearer to efficiently carry a greater quantity of weapons, supplies, and equipment in the backpack.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_bp_01_a_description: Shock absorbers ensure even distribution of impact energy.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_bp_01_b_description: Overlapping seams, rather than butt joints, slightly increase clothing resistance to physical impact.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_bp_01_description: Crafting improvised chain mail is a tedious and time-consuming undertaking, but there are documented cases when it has actually saved lives.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_bp_02_a_description: Lightweight structures provide protection without restricting movement.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_bp_02_b_description: Anti-ricochet coating on armor plates improves small fragment and bullet capturing for better protection.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_bp_02_description: The aramid lining efficiently disperses impact force, providing effective resistance against shrapnel and bullets in appropriate circumstances.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_bp_03_description: Expanding the surface area of the armor plate optimizes the distribution of kinetic energy.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_bp_04_description: At its core, the Dragon Skin consists of numerous overlapped ceramic plates, designed to provide maximum coverage over areas struck by bullets or shrapnel.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_chem_01_a_descriptio: Installed rubber elements serve as chemical protection.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_chem_01_description: The suit’s securely sealed seams effectively keep harmful substances at bay.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_chem_02_a_descriptio: The use of artifact elements noticeably improves chemical protection, but outside the Zone, these properties diminish.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_chem_02_description: Through special treatments, ordinary fabric gains resistance to chemically aggressive environments.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_container_01_a_descr: The artifact container is made of polymer material, significantly reducing the weight of the item.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_container_01_b_descr: A specialized compartment for artifacts. Can be combined with other containers.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_container_01_descrip: A container fashioned by local craftsmen, offering a secure resting place for an artifact.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_container_02_descrip: A container for a single artifact, suitable for attaching to a suit or backpack.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_container_radconsume: A simple and practical way to stay protected from the radiation emitted by artifacts.
A scientific breakthrough employing a field system to contain radiation emissions.
The container incorporates a small Wrenched artifact strategically placed to absorb radiation from nearby artifacts.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_durable_01_a_descrip: Using strong shoe thread in the seams increases the overall durability of the suit.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_durable_01_b_descrip: Reinforcing the wear-prone parts of the suit increases the product's lifespan.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_durable_01_descripti: An airtight synthetic lining serves as a secondary protective layer in case the outer layer is damaged.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_durable_02_a_descrip: Replacing regular zippers with quality-material ones notably improves the overall durability.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_durable_02_b_descrip: Seams treated with special textile glue increase the product's strength greatly.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_durable_02_descripti: While stacking additional plates doesn’t enhance bullet resistance, it does contribute to the improved mechanical durability of the vest.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_el_chem_fire_01_a_de: Graphene inserts enhance the protective properties of the gear.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_el_chem_fire_01_desc: The external placement of filters on the gas mask allows for the simultaneous use of multiple filters.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_el_chem_fire_02_desc: Fiberglass is used extensively in equipment utilized by personnel from the Ministry of Emergency Services.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_elecrt_chem_01_a_des: Leather patches reinforce vulnerable areas and extend the service life of the outfit.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_elecrt_chem_01_descr: The dense polyethylene lining ensures protection against both poisonous substances and electric shock.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_elecrt_chem_02_a_des: Insulating most metal elements improves electrical protection and resistance to aggressive chemicals.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_elecrt_chem_02_descr: The integration of Plexiglas fiber and lead mesh in a woven pattern creates a seamless shield protecting against radiation and harmful substances without impeding mobility.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_electr_01_a_descript: A small device that simulates grounding. Developed by the STC Malachite.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_electr_01_descriptio: The inclusion of a thin Constantan layer provides the suit with excellent protection against electricity.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_electr_02_a_descript: Replacing conductive materials in the gear with dielectric counterparts.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_electr_02_descriptio: The soles and gloves are coated with a metamaterial incorporating cavities containing an absolute vacuum.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_exo_bp_01_descriptio: The integration of thin armor sheets that overlap in a scale-like pattern augment the exoskeleton’s resistance to bullets and deterioration.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_exo_bp_02_descriptio: Although titanium is generally considered too heavy for personal protective equipment, it’s a feasible choice for exoskeleton construction.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_exo_dur_stam_01_desc: Mobile protective plates safeguard the joints, preventing overloading and augmenting the overall durability of the armor.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_exo_dur_stam_02_desc: Replaces the steel frame with a lighter titanium counterpart.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_exo_durable_01_descr: The considerable weight of early exoskeletons prompted the gradual replacement of metal components with lighter alternatives made of carbon fiber.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_exo_durable_02_descr: Enhances durability without the added burden of increased weight.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_exo_hands_01_descrip: The incorporation of servos helps counteract inertia and stabilizes weapon handling.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_exo_sprint_01_descri: The incorporation of hydraulic amplifiers that enable running is the defining characteristic that separates the fourth generation of exoskeletons from the third.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_exo_sprint_stabilize: With an increased-capacity battery, there is no need for power conservation while operating all servos in the exoskeleton.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_exo_stamina_01_descr: Replaces the helmet with a lightweight version, while preserving the overall quality.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_exo_stamina_02_descr: The formation of ions from molecules of atmospheric air makes it possible to generate what is known as ion wind.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_01_a_descriptio: Filling the suit cavities with special foam reduces the effect of high temperatures on the body.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_01_description: The use of asbestos fabric provided heat protection for twentieth century firefighters.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_02_a_descriptio: A compact compressor and flexible refrigerant tubes allow for more efficient dissipation of excess thermal energy.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_02_description: The development of nickel alloys with a low melting point has made it possible to create elements exhibiting a significant increase in heat capacity when transitioning to the liquid state.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_chem_01_a_descr: Coating the suit with a homemade resin mixture increases its resistance to external high-temperature exposure.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_chem_01_b_descr: Polyester inserts in clothing elements slightly improve heat resistance.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_chem_01_descrip: When applied to the suit, it provides protection against both open flame and electrical discharges.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_chem_02_a_descr: Latex increases protection against chemical exposure, particularly effective at the junctions of different gear elements.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_chem_02_descrip: A pneumatic expulsion system for removing hazardous substances from the respirator holes.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_elecrt_01_a_des: These plates won't provide full protection, but will significantly improve resistance to thermal and electrical impacts.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_elecrt_01_descr: Thanks to its anti-static properties, the treatment provides protection against both fire and electricity.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_elecrt_02_a_des: Installing a complex electronic system that compensates for abrupt voltage and temperature changes around the wearer.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_fire_elecrt_02_descr: The suit’s lining not only excels in thermal insulation but also provides effective protection against electricity.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_pockets_01_a_descrip: An all-purpose pouch suitable for storing small items that require quick access.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_pockets_01_descripti: Extra pockets are stitched onto the pants and sleeves.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_pockets_02_descripti: Sewing an extra zippered pocket into the backpack provides a quantitative boost in volume. Qualitatively, the design leaves much to be desired.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_psy_01_description: The coating operates akin to a Faraday cage. Due to its small size and inherent limitations, the suit can only offer protection for a short period of time.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_psy_02_description: A state-of-the-art psi defense technology pioneered by a scientist named Sakharov.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_rad_01_a_description: A thin lead plate shields part of the radio emission.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_rad_02_a_description: An experimental device that blocks a small amount of gamma radiation. Developed by the STC Malachite.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_rad_02_description: This system electrifies the protective suit’s surface, repelling radioactive particles.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_rad_03_description: Lead provides reliable protection against radionuclides by absorbing all forms of ionizing radiation.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_rad_container_01_des: The container incorporates two compartments for artifacts and acts as a protective shield against their harmful effects.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_rad_psy_01_a_descrip: A makeshift metal device that shields a small portion of psi-emission and radiation.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_rad_psy_01_descripti: The entire body is shielded from beta- and psi-radiation by the use of Plexiglas elements incorporating metal fibers.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_rad_psy_02_descripti: A complex system of thin cables affords the wearer some protection against both electrical and psi effects.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_stamina_01_a_descrip: A set of underwear that improves the body's thermoregulation during physical activity.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_stamina_01_b_descrip: Installing valves and membranes in the suit significantly improves air circulation and ensures more efficient moisture absorbing.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_stamina_01_descripti: Incorporating a hydrator in the backpack ensures quick recovery of the water-salt balance. Nothing prevents the user from filling it with an energy drink, of course.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_stamina_02_descripti: An active suit ventilation system equipped with a safety filter. Efficiently removes excess heat or warms the air to ensure a comfortable temperature.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_weight_01_a_descript: Replacing metal hardware with polymer parts slightly reduces the suit's weight.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_weight_01_b_descript: Allows to lose the excess weight and improve thermoregulation.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_weight_01_descriptio: An ergonomic improvement consisting of specialized fasteners and slings, designed to achieve optimal weight distribution.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_weight_02_a_descript: Ceramic armor plates are more expensive than steel ones, but offer a better weight-to-protection ratio.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_weight_02_b_descript: Changing the geometry and attachment system of the backpack allows for more efficient use of its capacity.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_weight_02_descriptio: The adoption of lighter synthetic materials for the fabric, buckles, and tighteners decreases the overall weight of the armor.
sid_upgrades_ArmUpg_weight_03_descriptio: Ultra-dense polyethylene provides protective capabilities on par with steel and ceramics, despite being several times lighter.
sid_upgrades_GunAK74_Upgrade_Attachment_: Installing a flash suppressor reduces the visibility of the muzzle flash when firing for both the shooter and the enemy.
sid_upgrades_GunAK74_Upgrade_Barrel_1_de: The rubberized surface dampens the recoil and enhances the weapon’s grip.
sid_upgrades_GunAK74_Upgrade_Barrel_2_1_: Reduces bullet deterioration within the barrel to preserve its intended design characteristics.
sid_upgrades_GunAK74_Upgrade_Barrel_2_2_: Increases barrel pressure, resulting in increased muzzle velocity.

sid_upgrades_GunAK74_Upgrade_Stock_3_des: Effectively dampens recoil, providing a smoother shooting experience.

sid_upgrades_Upgr_unic_MP5_description: This modification can only be done once, since it involves replacing the barrel and adjusting parts to accommodate the new caliber. Increases damage.

sid_upgrades_Upgr_unic_Sayga_description: Substituting the semi-automatic trigger with an automatic one drastically boosts the rate of fire.
sid_upgrades_Upgr_unic_Tar_description: This modification can only be done once, since it involves replacing the barrel and adjusting parts to accommodate the new caliber. Increases bullet range at the cost of a noticeable increase in spread.

sid_upgrades_myriflepack_Upgr_stvol_16_d: Proper heat treatment of the barrel allows it to endure more without deformation. This makes it possible to use lower-quality ammunition, although firing such rounds will accelerate weapon wear.
